I can bash you to a pulp.
你是这么暴躁的人吗？君子动口不动手，这张俏脸要是挂了彩，多难看呀。
Is that the kind of violent thug you are? Hey, you don't want to ruin this pretty face, do you?
我劝你还是放下屠刀，乖乖就范，收容舱的日子也没那么糟，上次，那个温命得队长差点就进去了，你俩今后也许还能搭个伴。
I advise you to lay down your arms and hand yourself over. Life in the Storage Zone is not so bad. Last time, Mr. Wen Mingy almost went in. You two may keep each other company in the future.
嗯，想把赌注押在第三方证人的判断之上……那拉明娜，就由你来定生死吧。
Yeah, let's see what the third-party witness says... Lamina, it's your call.
拉明娜？你怎么又不说话了？！你不会这时候良心发现，想反水吧，咕噜噜。
Lamina? Why aren't you saying anything!? Did you suddenly find your conscience? You want to back out now? *gurgle*
咕噜噜，暴露了又怎样？{NICKNAME}，我想你还没有搞清楚现在的状况。
*gurgle* So what? {NICKNAME}, I don't think you really understand the situation.
咕噜噜，还真是，你怎么跟拉明娜一样不争气？！那么我来解释解释。
*gurgle* For crying out loud. Are you two serious!? Do I have to spell it out for you?
那你说说，现在是什么状况？
Oh... well fine. Then tell me, what's going on now?
Do I have to spell it out?
别在这里跟我打哑谜！我看你呀，就是没搞清楚状况。
Don't play games with me! I don't think you understand the situation.
没错！不愧是我们，{NICKNAME}！但是你只猜到了前半段。
That's right! Good one, {NICKNAME}! But you only guessed the first half of our plan.
你们想拿我狸猫换太子。
You want me to take your place as the Xenohydro.
再正确不过！不愧是我们，{NICKNAME}！竟然把一切都看穿了。
That's right! Well done, {NICKNAME}! You saw through everything.
我早就猜到有人会来调查我的行踪，所以我和拉明娜，决定把多管闲事的人骗到这里，把他干掉，冒充水魈交上去，从此一劳永逸。

I had long guessed that someone would come to investigate my whereabouts, so Lamina and I decided to lure the investigator here, kill them and then hand them in as the Xenohydro, then we'll finally be free.
只是没想到来的是你，拉明娜心慈手软，想要给你一个机会，计划才从「武力清除」变成了「循循善诱」——
But I didn't expect you to come. Lamina was soft. She wanted to give you a chance. And so we changed the plan from "elimination" to "persuasion"—
现在你想离开这里，只有两个选择，要么乖乖答应，代替我去蹲收容舱；要么被我干掉后，再代替我去蹲收容舱。
Now if you want to leave this place, you only have two choices. Either obey and go to Storage Zone in place of me, or die and then go to Storage Zone instead of me.
都这时候了你还在想为什么！作为你的对手，我觉得我受到了侮辱，咕噜噜，我要给你点颜色瞧瞧！
Jeez, is that really what you're worried about? At a time like this? You know what? As your opponent, I feel insulted. *gurgle* I'm gonna teach you a lesson!
那是什么？难道是把我干掉…咕噜噜，你好大的口气！我要给你点颜色瞧瞧！
What's that? To kill me? *gurgle* You talk big! I'm gonna teach you a lesson!
看来，我和你，注定要共沉沦了……
It seems you and I are destined to go down together...
对不起，{NICKNAME}…我就是那个与水魈合谋的共犯，我愿意接受处罚。
Sorry, {NICKNAME}... I'm the accomplice in collusion with the Xenohydro. I'm willing to accept my punishment.
What on earth is going on?
你是知道我的，知道拉明娜究竟是怎样一个人。
You know me. You know what kind of person Lamina is.
没有天赋。没有作品。只有靠多做杂活，才能在夹缝中证明自己的价值。
No talent. No achievements. I can barely prove my value by doing the most trivial jobs.
但一辈子做流水工，对得起我自己，却对不起我的家人。
But working on the assembly line all my life... It's fine for me, but how can I face my family?
亲人牺牲了自己的一切，供养我来这里，我难道就用…捡垃圾，来报答吗？
They have sacrificed everything for me so that I can come here. Do I repay them... by being a cleaner?
我不能，也没脸这么做。卡波特是第一个跳板，唯一的跳板。虽然要依附于他，但那总归是隶属于界种科辖下的，一个体面的工作。

I can't, and I am not shameless enough to do that. Capote was my first springboard to success, the only springboard. Although I had to rely on him, it's still a decent job in the Department of Ecology.
我一度以为只要好好帮他做事，至少还有机会熬出头。没有功劳，硬熬总行吧？
I once thought that if I just served him well, I would at least get a chance to succeed. Hard work always pays off, right?
——直到水魈冒充了我，它以捉弄卡波特为乐，处处斗智斗勇。
Until the Xenohydro impersonated me to prank Capote and make a mockery of him.
它就像一面镜子，照出了我无所遁形的丑态。是那么卑微。那么弱小。那么…无力。
It's like a mirror, it showed me my pitiful appearance, so humble, so weak, so... powerless.
它也像一面宝鉴，照出的拉明娜，能够摆脱他人的钳制，终于活得像个人样。
It also taught me a valuable lesson. Even Lamina can liberate herself from the constraints of others and live like a person.
我第一次发现，我愿意用平庸的前途，来换恣意潇洒的生活。
For the first time, I found that I was willing to trade my mediocre future for a free and unrestrained life.
于是我放任了这一切。直到科员窝藏水魈的谣言风传一时，他们叫嚣要严惩知情不报之人……
So I let it all happen, until the rumor that someone in the staff harbored the Xenohydro became widespread. They called for severe punishment for those who did not report relevant information...
我才发现，我个人的愿望，又哪里重要呢？我可以做个劣下的科员，但黑塔不能赶走我。
That's when I realized that my personal wishes were not important. I can just be a low-level researcher, but I can't let the space station drive me out.
不能把家里对我的最后期望也毁掉。
I can't ruin my family's last bit of expectation for me.
当听说有人开始调查水魈与共犯一事，我就下定决心，要铲除对手，保护自己。
When I heard that someone began investigating the Xenohydro and its accomplice, I made up my mind to eradicate my opponent and protect myself.
好不容易决心勇敢一次，却没想到，被你我的牵绊干扰了判断。如果来的是别人，那该多好啊。
Finally, I decided to be brave for once, but I didn't expect to be hampered by the bond between us. If only it was someone else who came here.
I can understand why you did it.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。但我说这些并不是为了换取你的原谅。只是…把你当作朋友，久违地，说一说心里话而已。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. But I'm not saying this to get your forgiveness. I was just... talking to you as a friend, getting things off my chest.
Your bravery is wasted in the wrong pursuit.
是吗？也许吧。当人被逼到绝路上时，急智是会显得冷酷绝情。但那只是出于生存的本能。
Is it? Maybe. When a person is pushed to a dead-end, wit might appear cold and heartless. But it's just survival instinct.
你说了很多不拉明娜的话。
You said a lot of things that are unlike the Lamina I know.
或许是平时过分压抑了自己。眼睛总是盯着别人的需求，才会忘了低头看看自己的心。
Maybe it's because I suppress myself too hard. I am always focused on other people's needs and have forgotten to look inside myself.
如果我能早一点从别人眼中看到自己的模样，遭遇也许就会截然不同，不论是依靠水魈，还是依靠那封信。
If I could see myself in other people's eyes earlier, my life might be different. If it wasn't for the Xenohydro, then it was the letter.
我早就看出来了，那封信中所写的共犯就是我。只是我真的…不敢面对。
I had already figured that the "accomplice" in that letter was referring to me. It's just that I didn't really... have the courage to face it.
其实，一切都写在了信里。
In fact, everything is written in the letter.
我也早就看出来，那封信中所写的共犯就是我。只是我真的…不敢面对。
I had already figured that the "accomplice" in that letter was referring to me. It's just that I didn't really... have the courage to face it.
One day, as they turn around...
A path will be lit by the radiance of the stars.
「戚戚与之同谋，不如皎皎独立。他日纵然回首，自有星辉拂路。」
"Better off alone than to be an accomplice. One day, as they turn around, a path will be lit by the radiance of the stars."
之前完全忽略了这些话啊。难道这是一封…劝慰信？
I completely ignored these words earlier. Is this letter... meant to persuade me?
告密人打从一开始就在劝说我，让我放弃与水魈合谋，独立去过自己的生活？
So from the beginning, the informant tried to persuade me to give up my conspiracy with the Xenohydro and live my own life independently...
或者说，独立的意义，不仅是要摆脱水魈，还包括卡波特，以及我的软弱。
In other words, independence does not only mean leaving the Xenohydro, but also Capote and my weaknesses.
那么我明白了。虽然明白的时机，有些晚了。
Now I understand. Although this realization has come a little too late.
You've committed a crime. You must be punished.
我明白，我会跟你回去，接受应有的处罚。
I understand. I'll go back with you and accept due punishment.
但是在那之前，我会向你证明，经历了这番曲折，我已经做出了改变。
But before that, I will prove to you that I have really changed because of this experience.
I can let you and the Xenohydro go.
真的吗？谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。我会严加看管水魈，不再让他危害空间站。
Really? Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I will keep a closer eye on the Xenohydro and stop him from endangering the space station.
而且，我会向你证明，经历了这番曲折，我已经做出了改变。
I will also prove to you that I have really changed because of this experience.
你还有机会，但水魈必须回收。
You still have a chance, but the Xenohydro must be returned.
你的意思是，你不会告诉别人共犯究竟是谁？…谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
You mean, you won't tell them who the accomplice was? Thank you, {NICKNAME}.
我会珍惜你给我的这次机会，并且证明，经历了这番曲折，我已经做出了改变。
I will cherish the opportunity you gave me and I will also prove to you that I have really changed because of this experience.
You're back. Did you conclude the matter?
嗯，不急，水魈倒是次要的事…那边和卡波特站在一起的，是拉明娜吧？
Well, don't worry, the Xenohydro is of secondary importance... Is that Lamina standing with Capote over there?
你这个逢场作戏的骗子，你践踏了我们的真心。
You fraud. You trampled on our sincerity.
曾经，波少是那么完美，现在也没有逃过塌房的命运……
Oh, Master Capote used to be so perfect, and now he is just another deceitful celebrity...
波少！你竟然喜欢吃蛋黄酱那么难吃的东西，把我送你的礼物还给我！
Master Capote! I can't believe you eat mayonnaise. That's disgusting! Give me back the gifts I gave you!
拉明娜，你叫这么多人来干什么？
Lamina, why did you invite all these people?
不是我叫他们过来的。我只是把你的粉丝回信都是由我代笔的事实告诉了她们。
I didn't invite them here. I just told them the fact that I was the one who replied to all your fans.
大家别急，晚点听我解释…拉明娜，你是一点也不想要我给你的好处了是吧……
Everybody calm down, let me explain later... Lamina, you don't want the benefits I give you at all anymore, do you?
对，我不想要。从今以后，我不会再帮你做饭、洗衣擦鞋、代笔写信，也不会再做你的傀儡，听明白了吗？
That's right, I don't want any of it. From now on, I won't help you cook, wash your clothes and shoes, write your letters, or be your puppet. Get it?
如果你还有事找我，记得去找我的秘书「不存在先生」拿号。
If you want to find me, remember to ask my secretary Mr. Nonexistent for a number.
{NICKNAME}, what do you think of this?
I don't know what they are arguing about.
真没想到你口风这么严哪。不过现在，我们大可以打开天窗说亮话。
I didn't think you can be so tight-lipped, but now, we should be honest and clear this up.
She'll be able to look after herself.
没错，这都多亏了你从中斡旋，才能既保全她的安危，又促成她的心境转变。
Yes, thanks to your mediation. Not only did you ensure her safety, but also encouraged her to change.
You seem to know the back story.
我自认为策划得非常缜密，没想到还是被你察觉了。
I thought I was careful, but you still noticed.
…哎呀，想起「好似凌霄攀援，难免低入尘埃」这句，平仄、韵脚都没押上，我下的功夫还是不够嘛。
...Oops, "Like the risk of falling into the depths when trying to mount the sky." I didn't use any rhymes or enough alliteration for this line. It's still not good enough.
嘿嘿，不瞒你说，宓堂空境解语人不是别人，就是我。当初要写这封古言信，我可是向温明德队长请教了十来天，吃了不少苦头呢。
Hehe, to tell you the truth, the Cryptologist From Locus Silentii is none other than yours truly. This letter took me more than ten days to write, and I asked Mr. Wen for advice. It wasn't easy.
写好这封信之后，我很长一段时间都找不到合适的人，来转交劝慰信。还好水魈从来只是小打小闹，回收它也不必急于一时。
After I wrote it, I couldn't find the right person to get it delivered. Fortunately, the Xenohydro is just a prankster, and there's no rush to retrieve it.
后来{NICKNAME}出现，不啻为最好的人选。我急中生智，想着让你和拉明娜共同经历一番，也许能有意想不到的收获。
Then you appeared, {NICKNAME}. And you turned out to be the best candidate. So I came up with the idea to let you and Lamina share some experiences together, see where it takes you.
毕竟经过这次事件你也应该了解，拉明娜是个善良的女孩，她值得再拥有一次机会。
But now you should also understand that Lamina is actually a kindhearted girl and she deserves another chance.
She is bound to turn over a new leaf.
Why go around this massive circle?
好啦，既然我的初衷已经达成，我宣布，异星水魈案就此告一段落，这是{NICKNAME}来回帮忙的奖赏。
Well, now that my objective has been achieved, I announce the Xenohydro case is officially over. Here is your reward. Thanks for all your help.
今后还请多回黑塔来看看。别忘了，这里始终有你倾力建设的痕迹，还有你曾倾心帮助过的那些人。
Please come back to the space station more in the future. Don't forget, there are a lot of people who've received your help here, and many traces of your hard work throughout the place.
欸，你说这卡波特是不是彻底玩儿完啦？以后，还会有粉丝把他当偶像吗？
Hey, do you think Capote is over? Will the fans still idolize him?
要我说，就是这空间站里帅哥太少了，个个儿才把他捧上天去。
If you ask me, there are just not enough good-looking guys in the station. That's why they treat him like a god around here.
You ARE better looking than him.
咕噜噜，我从卡波特那里偷了些好东西，送给{NICKNAME}。
*gurgle* I stole some good stuff from Capote. They're for you, {NICKNAME}.
毕竟，咱们可有一段时光是「不分你我」哪，怎么能亏了你？
After all, we used to be inseparable. How can I not look after you?
不好意思，各位粉丝，你们别听那女人乱讲…大家不要聚集在此处，以免干扰研究秩序，引来防卫科的大哥们。
Sorry, everybody, don't listen to that woman... Let's not gather here. We don't want to disturb the researchers and attract any unnecessary attention from security.
空间站里谁不知道拉明娜是你波少最信任、最得力的秘书。她说的话，那一定不会假！
Everyone in the space station knows that Lamina is your most trusted secretary. What she said must be true!
拉明娜某种程度上可是我们的粉丝头头啊，连她都离开你了，那不是说明，你根本不值得……
Lamina is the leader of your fanclub to some extent. If even she has left you, then maybe you're really not worth it...
算了，在这里呆再久也没用。能讨回真心吗？能讨回我们的笑和泪吗？能讨回在他身上寄寓的研究梦想吗？！
Forget it, there's no point staying here any longer. Can we get our hearts back? Can we get back our laughter and tears? Can we get back our hopes and dreams!?
我看，还是各自回去，各自疗伤吧……
I think we should go back and let our hearts heal.
这位叫做…呃的科员说得对！各位先请回吧。
Miss... uh... researcher is right! Please go back for now.
呵，都看见了？他连我们姓甚名谁也不知道呢。
Oh, see? He doesn't even know our names.
——所以你叫什么名字？一会儿找个地方一起喝点「卡利百」？我现在可是一肚子火！
So what's your name? Why don't we find a place to drink Kali-Kapo later? I need to vent!
行、行啊，可我怕我一开口，这眼泪就止不住……
Okay... Okay, but I'm afraid I won't be able to stop my tears as soon as I start to speak...
Don't you all have to work?
哪、哪还有心思干活啊，呜……
How can I be in the mood to work? Woo...
你在问我吗？今天，的确是没有什么研究的活啦。
Are you asking me? There is really not much research work today.
老实说，「波少」真是叫我失望啊。亏我有什么应物科的好东西都想着他。现在看来，还不如送给……
To be honest, Master Capote really disappointed me. Can't believe I wanted to give all the good things in the Department of Implement Arts. Now it seems we might as well give them all to...
没意思，还是去找小阿德勒玩吧。
Nah. I should just go play with little Adler.
这个教训你好好记住吧。
你又是什么人…少多管闲事……
Who are you anyway... Mind your own business...
呵，他连我们的名字都记不住，要他记住教训，恐怕也是够呛的。
Oh, he can't even remember our names. I'm afraid it's hard for him to remember this lesson.
啊？那「波少」岂不是连收了我什么礼物也记不得了？不行不行，我一定得要回去，不然被应物科的伯伯们发现了，那就糟糕了。
Oh? Can't Master Capote even remember what gift he got from me? Oh no, I have to get back. If those old guys in Implement Arts catch me, it'll get ugly.
各位好姐姐！听我的，先散了吧。
My ladies! Listen to me, please just go now.
那个，后续我会送上慰问信，来安抚大家受惊的心灵。放心，那一定是由我本人亲笔撰写的慰问信。
Well, I'll send you all a letter of condolence later to mend your hearts. Don't worry, it will be written by myself personally.
嘁，谁稀罕呵。光是处理你以前那些代笔信，就不知道要花多长时间。
Urgh, who wants that. It will take me forever just to deal with your previous ghostwriter letters.
我的那份还是给我吧，刚好凑个整……
Oh fine, just give me one. It'll complete the collection...
那边看热闹的，也都散了吧！
Hey everybody! Nothing to see here, let's bounce!
也不知道拉明娜怎么突然魔怔了，别是有共犯，或者幕后主使者吧？
I don't know why Lamina threw that tantrum all of a sudden. There must be an accomplice or someone behind the scenes.
唉，没时间胡思乱想，这次一大堆的慰问信，还等着我自己写呢……
Alas, I don't have time to think about it. I still have a lot of consolation letters to write.
拜托拜托，我只是想站在这儿看个热闹就走，千万别被其他人发现……
Sorry, sorry, I am just here to see the excitement. Don't let the others see me...
欸，是你啊！好险好险，幸好来的不是防卫科的人。
Hey, it's you! Close call! Luckily you're not from security.
哈！瞧，他们果然没跟进来！自由啦！
Hah! See, they weren't brave enough to follow us! Freedom!
活该！哈哈，想逮住我们，还早了几百年哪！
Serves them right! Better luck next time, slowpokes!
结果就是一切～敢冒风险的人才能获得成功～
Oh please, it's the result that counts~ Gotta take risks sometimes if you wanna succeed~
Hehe, it was a team effort~
运气也是实力的一部分～
Well, you can get good at getting lucky~
银鬃铁卫只是被我们打了个出其不意，用不了多久，他们一定会追进来的。
We caught them by surprise, nothing more. They'll be in pursuit soon enough.
沿着道路移动吧，先确保安全，再作下一步计划。
Let's follow the path. We need to guarantee our own safety before making any further plans.
这道门，好像没法直接打开啊…欸，你们看这个机关的构造，是不是有点眼熟？
Doesn't seem like there's any way to open this gate... Ooh, check this mechanism out. Look familiar?
的确，在希露瓦的机械屋那见过。
Yes, we saw one in Serval's workshop.
得抓紧时间破解，追兵就在我们身后。
We need to solve it before we run out of time. The Guards are right on our heels.
成功了，开了开了！快走吧，我好像都听见追兵的脚步声了！
We did it! It's open! Quick, let's go, I think I heard footsteps!
I don't see a switch for the gate.
有个怪物在开关附近打转，得先解决它。
There's a monster in the area. We'll need to deal with it first.
就算遭到了裂界的侵蚀，这里始终是贝洛伯格的一部分，是我们曾经的家园。铁卫对这里了若指掌。
Even though it has suffered Fragmentum corrosion, this is still part of Belobog. It was our home. The Guards know this place like the back of their hand.
逃亡游戏结束了，放下武器，跟我回去吧。
Enough cat and mouse — drop your weapons and come with me.
你真是死缠烂打啊…搞不懂我们到底犯了什么罪，让你一直追到这儿都不罢手！
Ugh, you're such a nuisance! Just what crime are we supposed to have committed again? It better be worth you following us all the way out here!
我接收的命令是捉拿你们，至于详细的罪责和判罚，裁判团会向你们解释。
My orders are to arrest you. It is for the adjudication panel to present you with the nature and penalty of your alleged crimes.
你昨天见过我们，还记得吗？那时我们是作为可可利亚女士的贵客被招待的。
You saw us yesterday, do you remember? Madam Cocolia received us as honored guests.
一夜之间这翻天覆地的变化，我们也很难接受。
How can such a drastic change have occurred in the course of one night?
…守护者大人调查了你们的背景。
她在昨晚召见我，说你们欺骗了她；你们的身份和目的皆是伪造的，意在破坏筑城者对贝洛伯格的掌控。
She summoned me last night to tell me that you had deceived her. Your identities and purpose here are counterfeit. You seek to overthrow the rule of the Architects.
啊，这老巫婆怎么人前一套人后一套！
公开侮辱大守护者只会让你们罪加一等，放下武器投降吧！
Publicly insulting the supreme guardian only elevates the seriousness of your crimes. Throw down your arms and surrender!
多言无益了，三月。至少有一件事很清楚：现在我们绝不能被逮捕。
We're wasting our words, March. At least one thing is clear: We mustn't be caught.
既然没路可逃了，那就让他们见识下{RUBY_B#星穹列车}列车组{RUBY_E#}的厉害！
Well, if there's no escape, then maybe it's time we gave them a taste of Astral Express medicine!
他们的阵型…完全找不到破绽啊！
Ugh — can't find a way to break their formation!
这孩子…有点过于厉害了啊。喂，丹恒，快把你隐藏的力量用出来呀！
This girl's pretty strong... Hey Dan Heng, maybe now's a good time to show off your secret strength!?
束手就擒吧，入侵者！我会确保你们得到公正的审判。
Intruders, give it up! You will be guaranteed a fair trial.
呃，我不是故意要破坏这个紧张的气氛哈～
Ooh! Sorry, I didn't mean to ruin the intensity of the moment~
到底发生了什么事，为什么那个大守护者突然派人来抓我们啊？
So what happened back there? Why did the supreme guardian send people to arrest us?
在人家睡得正香的时候搞突然袭击，也太卑鄙了吧！
Imagine launching a surprise attack when your enemy is fast asleep. The cheek!
那个女人身上有种令人不安的气息…直觉果然不会撒谎。
That woman had a troubling aura... our instincts were correct.
等一下！里面有银鬃铁卫，小心别惊动他们！
Wait! There are Silvermane Guards here. Careful not to alert them!
八成是从其他方向前来围堵我们的士兵。
They must have entered from another direction to cut us off.
不要正面跟他们冲突，找找别的路吧。
We should avoid an open conflict. Let's find another path.
How can I get out of here...
我没有迷路，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不用担心。他说过，只要听他的话，任何坏事都不会发生。
I'm not lost, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Don't worry about me! He said nothing bad can ever happen so long as I listen to him.
你一个人在这？太危险了。
What are you doing here all by yourself? It's not safe.
这里没有危险，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不用担心。他说过，只要听她的话，任何坏事都不会发生。
It's plenty safe here, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Don't worry about me! He said nothing bad can ever happen so long as I listen to him.
爸爸？不对，不是。他是重要的人…但不是爸爸。
Dad? No, nope. He's important, but he's not my dad...
Is "he" talking nonsense? We are in the Fragmentum...
裂界…？不对，这里是商店街。他说过，这里是贝洛伯格最热闹的地方。
Fragmentum...? No, this is our shopping street. He said this is the busiest spot in all of Belobog.
对了…他说过，礼貌的孩子不能忘了自我介绍。我叫希莉儿，很开心…很荣幸认识你。
Oh, he also mentioned that it's polite to always introduce yourself. So, my name is Cyrille, and it's nice... an honor, I mean, to meet you.
对不起，这么说不太礼貌。他说过…对任何人都要时刻保持礼貌。
Sorry, it's not polite to say that. He said... gotta be polite, to everyone, at all times.
我得带你离开这里，希莉儿。
I have to get you out of here, Cyrille.
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不愿意告诉我你的名字吗？
{F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, don't you want to tell me your name?
嗯…没关系，别在意。他说过…对任何人都要时刻保持礼貌。
Oh... that's okay. Don't worry. He said... gotta be polite, to everyone, at all times.
我不能跟{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}走。我必须找到走出去的方法才行。
I can't go with you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I have to find a way to get out.
你到底在说什么…我听不懂。
What are you saying... I don't understand.
对不起。希莉儿不是姐姐…姐姐很聪明，一定能跟你解释清楚。
I'm sorry. I'm not like my sister... My sister is smart, and can explain everything to you.
良心不允许我把你留在这儿。
I can't just leave a little kid like you here all alone.
别担心。哪怕他不在，还有姐姐在。姐姐也会保护希莉儿。
Don't worry. Even if he's not there, my sister is with me. She'll take care of me.
得找到走出去的办法才行…我到底是哪一步没走对呢？
I have to find a way to get out... Where on earth did I go wrong?
（这个叫希莉儿的小女孩，好像一直在盯着那边看……）
(This little girl named Cyrille seems to be fixated on that spot the whole time...)
（莫非她所谓的「走出去」，和这些箱子有关系？）
(Could it be that her idea of "getting out" is connected to these boxes?)
我来帮你处理这些箱子吧。
I'll help you sort out these boxes.
可以吗？但这是我自己的事，不应该麻烦别人……
For real? That'd be great! But I shouldn't bother others with my own business...
嗯…但我已经在这里待了很久很久了。如果有人帮忙的话，也许就能走出去……
Mmm... but I've been here for such a long, long, long time. Maybe if someone helps me, I can get out...
如果{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}你愿意的话…可以帮帮我吗？
If it won't be a bother to you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}... Could you help me out?
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}…真厉害！我在这里待了很久，但一直没想到办法……
{F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}... you are amazing! I've been here for so long but never could figure out how to solve this...
可是…为什么？为什么希莉儿还是走不出去……
But... why? Why can't I get out still...
我不明白…你要「走」去哪里？
I don't get it... Where are you trying to go?
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不明白吗？但我也很难解释…要是他和姐姐，他们中有一个人在就好了……
{F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, don't you get it? It's hard for me to explain... If only either he or my sister were here...
你只要跟着我就行了呀……
You just have to follow me...
…不对，我不能从这里离开。他和姐姐，他们中只要有一个人在就好了…他们一定能解释清楚……
...No, I can't leave this place. If only either he or my sister were here... they'd be able to explain everything to you...
（这个小女孩说的话完全不符合逻辑…或许她遭受了什么刺激？）
(This girl is not making any sense at all... Perhaps she's been somehow traumatized?)
（不能用太强硬的态度对待这孩子。慢慢来吧，先顺着她的话问下去。）
(Don't be too tough on this child. Be patient, and go along with what she's saying for now.)
他…他是对希莉儿来说很重要的人。
He... he's a really really important person... to me.
大家都只喜欢姐姐…这也难怪，因为姐姐漂亮又聪明。只有他愿意和希莉儿玩…他觉得希莉儿很特别。
People only like my sister... That's no surprise since my sister is smart and pretty. All this time, he's the only one who's willing to play with me... He thinks I'm very special.
你的姐姐，她没陪着你吗？
Your sister... why isn't she with you?
姐姐她…她不知道去哪儿了。
She... she... I don't know where she is.
姐姐总是很忙，她身边总是围着很多人…我不认识的人。姐姐很会照顾人，也很温柔…可她一忙起来就没空管我了。
She's always so busy, and there're always so many people around her... people that I don't know. She is so caring and kind... but when she gets busy, she doesn't have time for me.
我只是想帮你，不用害怕。
I just want to help you. No need to get scared.
谢谢你，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。也许只要再重复一次…希莉儿就能走出去了。
Thank you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Maybe if I try once more... I'll be able to get out.
Hmm... okay. But how do we try once more?
可这里已经什么都没有了……
困住我的东西，总会不断地出现…它们不希望我走出去。是因为我犯了什么错吗？他说过，犯了错误就该道歉…可希莉儿该找谁道歉呢？
There's always something trapping me here... They don't want me to get out. Did I do something wrong? He said, "you should apologize if you do something wrong"... But who should I apologize to?
这些箱子到底是怎么回事？！
What on earth is going on with all these boxes!?
它们…总会不断地出现，不断逼着我思考。可我不是姐姐，我不擅长思考……
They... keep showing up and keep making me think and think. But I'm not like my sister, and I'm not a good thinker...
Things are starting to get weird...
这些箱子…总会不断地出现，不断逼着我思考。可我不是姐姐，我不够聪明…我不知道该怎么办。
These boxes... keep showing up and keep making me think and think. But I'm not like my sister, and not smart enough... and I don't know what to do.
我想让它们消失，我想离开这里…我想去见他，他答应希莉儿，会带我过上完美的生活……
I want them to disappear, and I wanna get out of here... I want to go and see him. He has promised to give me a perfect life...
谢谢你，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。我就在这里等你。
Thank you {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I'll wait here for you.
又解开了一个谜题，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}的脑子真好用！
That's another puzzle solved, {F#ma'am}{M#sir} — you're so smart!
不过…好像什么都没能改变呢。我还是被困在这里…走不出去。
But... nothing's changed though. I'm still stuck here... and can't get out.
你抓紧我就行，我带你出去。
Just hold on tight to me, and I'll get you out of here.
…真的吗？你能带希莉儿离开这里？
...Really? Can you really get me out of here?
你伸出手去，尝试握住女孩苍白、纤弱的腕关节。
You reach out and try to grab her pale, slender wrist.
但在接触到来前的一瞬间，一股巨大的斥力扇开了你的手掌——紧跟着的是一阵刺痛…酥麻，滚烫。
However, just before you reach her, a huge force repels your hand — followed by a tingling sensation, then a numbing burn.
某种力量在阻止你带走希莉儿…通过这一连串的反馈，它还完整地向你传达了另一则信息：停止尝试，否则等着你的会是更大的苦头。
A force is preventing you from taking Cyrille away... Based on this feedback, you understand it is trying to tell you to stop trying, or face more pain.
Huh...? What are you talking about...
果然，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}也帮不了我吗？哪怕找到了解开谜题的办法……
So, you can't help me either? Even if you've found a way to solve the puzzle...
没关系，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不用难过，这不是你的错。我会在这里等到他来…他总是有办法解决困难。
That's okay, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Don't be sad. It's not your fault. I'll wait for him to come back... He always knows how to fix things.
我去找帮手，你在这儿等着。
I'm going to find help. You wait here.
…不用了，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。我不想让你这样的好心人受伤。
...Don't worry, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I don't want to hurt a kind person like you again.
我会接着努力，争取靠自己的力量走出去。他说过，只有努力的孩子才配得到表扬。
I'll keep on working hard and try to get out on my own. He said only hardworking kids deserve praise.
再见，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。希望你在商店街逛得开心。
Bye-bye {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Hope you have fun on the shopping street.
（那个孩子…还有那些不断出现的军械箱…究竟是怎么回事？）
(That girl... and those Armory Boxes that kept showing up... What the heck is going on here?)
（或许是裂界产生的某种现实扭曲现象？但那个女孩看上去有血有肉，不像幻觉……）
(Maybe it's some kind of reality distortion in the Fragmentum? But that kid was of flesh and blood, and not some kind of hallucination...)
（只能去找人帮忙了。对这种奇异事件有了解的人…只能想到他了。）
(Got to find someone to help. Someone who understands this weird stuff... and I can only think of him.)
哎哟，这回真让我撞上大运了！机械臂小子这回居然不参赛，嘿嘿，那操作空间可就大了……
Wow, I sure hit the jackpot this time around! That guy with the robot arm isn't competing — yes! That's so much more wiggle room...
你在那儿神神叨叨什么呢？
What are you babbling on about there?
…哎哟喂，别这么吓我啊！老桑博这小心脏脆弱的很呐……
...Argh, don't scare me like that! This ol' heart of mine is really weak, y'know...
咳咳，别在意…你懂我的，无非就是生意上的事儿嘛！这回保证和你们没关系。
Ahem, don't worry... You know me, it's just business! This time I promise it's got nothing to do with you guys.
话说回来，不是还有那么句话吗？「无事不登三宝殿」…你这回主动跑来跟我搭讪，想必是有什么要紧事吧？
Anyway... To what do I owe the pleasure, this time? You've gone through all the trouble to find me here, so you must have something urgent, right?
It's a matter of life and death...
…咋了，有人受伤了？那不是该去找娜塔莎吗？
...What? Is someone getting seriously injured? Shouldn't you ask Natasha for help instead?
出了这么大的事儿，你第一个想到的居然是来找我…这就是坚不可摧的友谊啊！说吧朋友，只要是老桑博能力之内的事，绝对帮你安排到位！

Something this big happens, and your first thought is to find... me? Now that's what I call an ironclad friendship! Tell me, my dear old friend — I'll do anything for you as long as it's within my capabilities!
这事说来有点不可思议…
Well, actually, this matter is a bit strange...
…怎么，还有你没见识过的怪事？
...Huh? Is there really something out there that even you've never come across before?
然后你第一个想到的居然是来找我…这就是坚不可摧的友谊啊！说吧朋友，只要是老桑博能力之内的事，绝对帮你安排到位！
And your first thought is to find... me? Now that's what I call an ironclad friendship! Tell me, my dear old friend — I'll do anything for you as long as it's within my capabilities!
把你在边缘通路偶遇希莉儿的事告诉了桑博……
You tell Sampo about your chance encounter with Cyrille at Backwater Pass...
呃…你确定那不是失眠导致的幻觉？
Oh... Are you sure it wasn't some kind of hallucination induced by sleep deprivation?
那什么，这事…怎么说呢，咱们要不就别追究了吧？你要是睡眠质量不行的话，可以去娜塔莎那儿整点补剂……
So uh, this thing... ah, how about — let's not look into it any further? If you're having problems sleeping, then Natasha will have something for you...
你已经答应帮我了，不许反悔。
You've promised to help me. Don't go back on your word.
This... ah, I'm just saying stuff on impulse...
你是不是觉得这事没赚头？
Are you worried that it's not profitable?
啊？当、当然不是，你可别把我当成唯利是图的主啊……
Mmm? O—of course not. Don't paint me as such a greedy mercenary...
嗐，谁叫干咱这行最重要的就是客户信用呢…行吧，那我就陪你过去看看。
Hey, the most important thing in this line of business is the customer's trust... alright. I'll go with you and take a look.
——你确定不是出现幻觉了吗？我和你说，娜塔莎那儿什么药都有，不止能治失眠……
Are you sure you weren't hallucinating? I'm telling you, Natasha has all kinds of medicines for you. Anything!
呃…行，知道了，不说了！咱们走着。
Um... Okay, I got it! Enough chitchat. Let's go.
那什么…你倒是说句话啊？
我就说吧——你肯定是睡眠质量太差导致出现幻觉了！
Well, then, I will say it out loud for you. You are definitely suffering from hallucinations due to a lack of sleep!
我就说吧，你桑博哥哥的判断一向准确！
I told you so. My diagnoses have always been accurate!
所以…呃，根本没有什么小女孩，也没有什么军械箱。那些东西都是你凭空想象出来的，对吧？
So... hmm, there's no little girl to begin with. And no Armory Boxes, either. You just made everything up out of thin air, right?
不过…考虑到这里是裂界，这事儿也不能完全怪你。这破地方就是这么离奇——不瞒你说，我也在裂界里见过各种奇异现象，等你跟我一样习惯了以后，就不会一惊一乍了。

But... since we're affected by the Fragmentum here, you're not completely to blame. It's just how weird this place is — and to tell you the truth, I've seen all kinds of strange stuff in the Fragmentum. You'll get used to it soon enough.
…那个，你要是没有别的要紧事，我就回磐岩镇去了？我跟老史考特还有生意要——嗯？这是什么？
...Well, if there's nothing else going on, I'll be heading back to Boulder Town. I've still got some unfinished business with Scott. Wait... eh? What's this?
…这是啥？看着像是什么人留下的笔记？似乎有点年头了。
...What's this? Someone left some notes behind. They look old.
看不出有什么特别的…也没有藏宝图或者暗语之类的记号，好像没啥价值。你要是觉得有点意思，不如就自己留着吧？
I don't see anything special... There's no treasure map or secret code words. Nothing of value. You can hold onto this if you want.
呃，那我就先走一步了，大客户！希望你能改善改善睡眠质量，下次找我的时候清醒一点儿……
Mmm, then I'll be heading out, my valued patron! Here's hoping your insomnia improves. Make sure you're fully awake next time you come and see me!
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}还不走吗？没事的，不用担心我……
{F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, you're still here? All good, don't worry about me...
我会努力，争取靠自己的力量走出这里……
I'll work hard and try to get out on my own...
我们就从这里开始搜索茉莉小姐的东西吧，没必要沿着阶梯再向上了。那里只有茫茫无际的战场遗址，不属于旧城塞的范围。
Let's start searching for Miss Molly's things from here. We don't need to go up the stairs. That place is not part of the old city fortress and has nothing but ancient battlefields.
虽然我们来时没遇到什么敌人，但回头就不好说了。眼睛放亮点——我感觉这里今天的气氛有点不同寻常。
Thankfully, we didn't encounter any enemies coming here, but I can't promise it'll stay that way on our way back. Keep your eyes peeled. This place gives off a strange vibe today.
You seem familiar with this place?
是啊。我之前经常陪同杰帕德来这里勘察地形——不过那是很久以前的事了。
Yeah. I used to come here with Gepard to survey the terrain — but that was a long time ago.
戍卫官自不必说，亲自测绘战场对情报官来说也是相当重要的。可惜前线压力越来越大，我们不得已退守铁卫禁区…这些情报最后都没怎么派上用场。

Needless to say, it was very important for an intelligence officer to personally map the battlefield. Unfortunately, the pressure on the front line increased so quickly that we had to retreat to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And those pieces of intelligence were not very useful in the end.
What's so strange about this place's vibe?
太…冷清了。要是平时的话，我们根本不可能在避免战斗的情况下一路走到这里。
It's... too quiet. Normally, we couldn't have come all this way without any fights.
从结果来看这当然是好事…但我总本能觉得有点不对劲。总之，我们接下来多加小心吧。
That may seem like a good thing... But deep down, I'm disturbed by this strange quietness. Anyway, let's be more careful from now on.
我们为什么要从这里开始搜索？
Why should we start searching here?
这个旧城塞的构造是南北走向，而我们所在的位置是它的最南边——
The old citadel runs from the north to the south, and we are now at the southernmost end—
从这里开始搜索就不必多走回头路。不过从北边开始搜索也一样，我只是来时随便找了个方向罢了。
If we start from here, we can save a trip going backward. Technically, it'd be the same if we were to start from the north. I just picked this direction at random when we came.
嗯，我们走。虽然我们来时没有遇到任何敌人，但后面就不好说了。如果一定要开战的话，我也会从旁援护你。
Great, let's go. Even though we didn't encounter any enemies coming here, it's still hard to say what will happen later. If we get into a fight, I will cover you.
如果你不幸战败，我当然会想办法带你撤退到安全地带，等你准备好后再一起继续探索。
If it so happens that you are defeated, I will definitely fight my way to bring you back to a safe place and continue our exploration when you are ready.
但最好别让这种事发生，毕竟我能提供的支援也是有限度的…拜托你了。
But it's best to avoid that. After all, there is only so much help I can give you... So stay sharp, {NICKNAME}.
哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，发现近似物件——请问是否要切换至搜索模式？
Beep! Beep! Matching object found, matching object found — do you want to switch to search mode?
呃，{NICKNAME}…你怎么随身带着这种东西？
Um, {NICKNAME}, why are you carrying that thing with you?
哔嘟…查宝不是东西。本机为「家用寻物仪『理查德』•版本<unbreak>0.63</unbreak>•专家型•年度豪华版」，昵称「查宝」。
Beep... Findie is not a thing. I am Richard, the Home-Use Object Finder. Model information: Version <unbreak>0.63</unbreak>, Professional model, Annual Deluxe Edition. Nickname: "Findie."
它能帮我们找东西，挺好用的。

原来如此…你们「外来者」倒是有不少有用的小玩意呢。

呃…这是说它不太可靠吗？但它好像确实发现了什么东西……

不管了，多一双眼睛也不是坏事。我们试试看吧。

它是我的情感支持机器人。

...If you say so. But it just called itself a "Home-Use Object Finder." So, can it help us find things?
不管了，多一双眼睛也不是坏事。我们试试看吧。
Anyway, one more pair of eyes might not be a bad thing. Let's try it out.
喂，查宝！你可以为我们带路吗？
Hey, Findie! Can you show us the way?
对对对，太对了。需要找东西的时候，呼唤查宝就对了。
Yes, yes, yes. When you need to find something, just call Findie.
当前要目标物件为「被藏起来的东西」，范围内共「一个」目标物件。请根据「家用寻物仪安全使用指南」，跟随本机进行搜索。

The current target is "something hidden." And there is "one" such target in detectable range. Please follow yours truly to conduct the search in accordance with the "Home-Use Object Finder Safety Manual."

既然它写的是「踩我」…那我们就按它说的做吧。
Well, it says "stomp on me"... So, let's do just that.
难道这是什么压力机关踏板？

我想这样比较合理。既然如此，那我们就按它说的做吧。
That makes more sense. In that case, let's do as it says.
哇，你看，前面这块地砖浮出来了——这是什么，暗格吗？里面还有枚椭圆形的……

一枚小巧的卵形相框中载着略微泛黄的肖像，静静地躺在地砖改装成的暗格中。
A small oval frame containing a slightly yellowish portrait lies quietly in a secret compartment hidden in the tile.
将肖像翻转，你们看到一<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案，墨迹已然干涸。

历代情报官的照片都挂在我办公室的墙上。如果只看这幅肖像，这位老巴拉金还是很有风度的…说是帅哥也不为过。

I have photos of all the intelligence officers throughout the ages hanging up on my office wall. Compared with them, old Balakin here does look quite classy in this portrait... One can even describe him as handsome.
现在的话…我只感觉好像有某种珍贵的东西从内心中残酷地消失了……
Alas, now I just feel like something precious has been cruelly ripped from my heart...
有些事，不知道会活得更幸福。
…不要这么冷漠地复述悲惨的现实啊。
Now you are making me all sad.
这可能就是静态美人吧…
This might be the so-called "Static Beauty."
是啊，但我对这种属性确实没感觉……
Maybe, but I'm kinda agnostic about this.
冷静，佩拉，冷静…快把今天看到的都忘掉……
Calm down, Pela, calm down... Forget what you saw today...
——好，我已经全部忘光光了。哇，{NICKNAME}，你快看：巴拉金还在这幅肖像背后画了个<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案呢！
...Okay, I've put all that behind me now. Wow, {NICKNAME}, look! Balakin has also painted a pattern of <color=#dbc291ff>a clockwise rotation arrow</color> on the back of this portrait!
This may be a new clue.
既然这是老巴拉金留下来的东西，还用这种隐蔽的机关保护着，那大概就是新的线索了。可他到底是想表达什么呢？
Since this is something left by old Balakin and protected by this hidden mechanism, it very much could be a new clue. But what is he trying to say?
感觉…毫无头绪。我们还是跟着查宝接着找其他线索吧。
Ugh... I don't have any ideas. Let's just follow Findie for now and look for other clues.
{NICKNAME}，你可以不用陪着我一起演的。这样会显得我很蠢……
{NICKNAME}, you don't have to patronize me like that. It's making me feel stupid.
总之，这个箭头图案应该就是进一步的线索——只是我也不太清楚这意味着什么…我们还是跟着查宝接着找其他线索吧。
Anyway, this arrow pattern must be another clue — but I'm not sure what this means... Let's follow Findie and look for other clues.
不要再故作坚强了，佩拉小姐…
No need to put on a happy face, Miss Pela.
…住口！我已经全都忘掉了，我什么都不知道…不要再让我想起来那种事了！
... Shut up. I've put it all behind me now. I don't know anything... Don't you even try to remind me of that kind of thing!
总之，这个箭头图案应该就是进一步的线索——只是我也不太清楚这意味着什么…我们还是跟着查宝接着找其他线索吧。
Anyway, this arrow pattern must be another clue — but I'm not sure what this means... Let's follow Findie and look for other clues.
这次的线索倒是很直白嘛——你看这块地砖上，刻了一个<color=#dbc291ff>「逆时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案…想必和之前的线索有所关联吧。

The clue this time is very straightforward — you see, on this floor tile, there is a pattern of <color=#dbc291ff>a counterclockwise rotation arrow</color>... It must be somehow related to the previous clue.
查宝到底是怎么找到这东西的？
How on earth did Findie find this thing?
…果然。这块地砖没被砌进地里，也是人为改装过的、暗格一类的东西。查宝大概是因为这个把它判定成「被藏起来的东西」了吧。
... Just as I thought. This floor tile was not built into the ground. It was also artificially modified and concealed. It's probably because of this that Findie judged it as "something hidden."
这些箭头到底是什么意思？

实话说，我目前还不能确凿地指出这些图案到底是什么意思，但这大概和某种<color=#dbc291ff>「可旋转的构造」</color>有关。
To be honest, I don't know for sure, but it's probably related to some kind of <color=#dbc291ff>rotatable structure</color>.
总之，我先把它记录下来，然后也给你抄一份。喏，给你。
Anyway, I'll write it down first, and then I'll copy it for you. Here you are.
佩拉递来的纸张上依次画着<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>「逆时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案，底下还附有她关于「可旋转的构造」批注。

On the sheet of paper Pela gave you, there are several ordered drawings of <color=#dbc291ff>clockwise rotation arrow</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>counterclockwise rotation arrow</color>, with her annotation at the bottom that says "rotatable structure."
将纸张翻面，你看到一些字迹娟丽却略显潦草的手稿。词句支离破碎，你只能大约猜测出这段文字与名为「阿尔乔姆」、「安娜」和「达米尔」的人有关。

You turn the sheet over and see some beautifully written but illegible scribbles. The words are all jumbled, but you do see that this passage is about three characters, respectively named Artem, Anna and Dalmir.

{NICKNAME}, ahhhh... You gotta be kidding me! If you don't give it back to me right now, I'll... I'll have to take it back! Give it to me.
呼…让我重、重新找一张空白页……
Grr... Let me find another blank page to write it down...

我们到了——从这里沿左侧道路向前就是堡垒防线的后方「筑城领域」，右边则可以取道登上锋线堡垒的城垛。
Here we are. Now, on the left, it's a road towards the Fortified Zone, which is just behind the fortress defense line. And on the right, it's the path leading to the Frontline Fortress's parapet.
我们先分开行动吧。筑城领域中有着和铁卫禁区中同样构造的旋转栈桥，我得去调查一下它的控制终端。

Let's split up for now. In the Fortified Zone, there is a revolving gear bridge that has the same structure as the one in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. I have to go there to investigate its control terminal.
我会顺着左侧道路继续前进，在这期间就拜托你去右侧的锋线堡垒寻找线索了。

你要是遇到裂界怪物怎么办？

来时我已经确认过了，那条道路上堆满了路障和杂物，怪物是不会靠近那里的。
On the way here, I checked and found that that road is full of roadblocks and debris. Monsters wouldn't get close to where I'm going.
虽然很不想承认…但以我的身型来说，穿越那些障碍绰绰有余。所以就让我一个人去吧。
Plus, all those obstacles are much easier for someone as small as me to pass through, even though I hate to talk about my size. Anyway, I can do it alone.
栈桥四周不都有控制终端吗？

This kind of gear bridge is pre-equipped with a data storage terminal. Only through this very specific terminal can you view essential data about the gear bridge.
我需要有些想法需要验证，所以必须去调查那个数据储存端——从这里沿左边道路往下就是了。
I need to verify some theories of mine, so I have to investigate this data terminal myself, which is just down the road on the left.
哼哼，可不要小看情报官——我已经计算到各种可能性啦，肯定不会出事的。
Humph, never underestimate an intelligence officer — I've worked out every possible scenario, and nothing will go wrong.
那我们就分头行动吧。各自的调查完成之后，我们就在大桥另一边会合。
So let's split up. After we finish our respective investigations, we shall meet on the other side of the bridge.
毫不意外地，此处的地砖也被刻上了<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案。
Unsurprisingly, the tiles here are also engraved with the pattern of <color=#dbc291ff>a clockwise rotation arrow</color>.
你尝试依旧法操作旋转栈桥的控制终端，但没能成功。

Find a way... to unlock it!
Remember the sequence from the notes!
（想想办法，试着解锁操作终端吧……）

操作终端内传来清脆的响声。

操作终端内的机械结构不断转动着。随后，一声铿然清亮的脆响传来，操作终端重新归于寂静。
The mechanical structure in the control terminal is rotating nonstop. Then, you hear a loud and clear sound coming from within, and the terminal becomes silent again.
(The rotation of the gear bridge seems to be operable again.)
啊，终于！我还以为你过不来了……
Ah, finally! I almost began to think you couldn't make it.
你解决得倒也挺轻巧嘛，不愧是和前任大守护者斗智斗勇的人。
You handled that with such elegance. Looks like you truly are worth your salt.
谢谢你关心我，不过我没事——毕竟我可是银鬃铁卫的情报官。

你对我就这么没信心吗…

来梳理一下刚才发生的事吧——我检查过数据储存端后，发现只要按照图案给定的顺序操作栈桥，就可以解除栈桥的制动。
Let's recount what just happened. After checking the data storage terminal, I found that the gear bridge brakes can be released by following the sequence of these given patterns.

However, I still don't quite understand why old Balakin left these passwords behind. So I thought I should meet up with you first and discuss it together.
谁能想到——我刚一过桥，旋转栈桥居然自己转了起来，把我留在了另一边！
But who would have thought... The moment I crossed the gear bridge, it started rotating by itself, leaving me on the other side!
我试图操作机关，结果发现栈桥居然因为紧急制动抱死了——
I tried to control that thing, but the bridge was locked by an emergency brake.
我实在没办法，情急之下只好大声喊你名字…还好你听到了，谢天谢地。

你应该知道如何解除制动吧？
I suppose you know how to release the brakes?
实话说，在调查数据储存端之前，我真不知道有这种操作…铁卫禁区栈桥的制动系统是希露瓦他们改装过的，用起来比这个方便多了。

To be honest, before looking at the data terminal, I really didn't know it could work this way... The braking system of the bridge in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone was modified by Serval, and is much easier to use.
而且，最重要的问题是——我按照终端里的指令试着操作了一番，结果旋转栈桥纹丝不动。
Anyway, the strange thing is... I tried operating the terminal according to the instructions, and the gear bridge didn't move at all.
我猜应该是老巴拉金亲自修改了操作指令吧，而且还用旧指令伪装起来了。要不是你找到了正确的指令，我还真有可能要一辈子待在这里了。谢谢你……

I guess old Balakin somehow modified the instructions himself and purposefully used some outdated instructions as a ruse. If it weren't for you, I would have been stuck here forever. So, I really can't thank you enough.

Then let's go kick its butt!
是啊，我腿都走酸了…赶紧拿到「钥匙」就回去吧！
Hear, hear. My legs are sore... Grab the key and let's go back!

This piece of drill-shaped jewelry is engraved with the word "Balakin"... It must be the key Miss Molly is looking for.
任务完成，我们回机械屋去吧。这一趟可真够折腾的……
Mission accomplished. Let's head back to the workshop. This trip has been so tiring.
那我们就先沿着来时的路开始跟着查宝一起搜索吧。出发！
Let's use Findie to search along the way we came. Let's go!
好像有怪物来到这附近了…是我们动静太大了吗？
Looks like monsters are here now... Were we too loud?
我们还是尽量避免战斗，小心前进吧。
Let's avoid fighting them and move forward with care.
这个敌人盘踞在道路上…只有打倒它才能前进了。
The enemy is guarding this path... Looks like we have to defeat them to go forward.
哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，发现近似物件——请问是否要切换至搜索模式？

查宝好像有反应了，在这附近仔细搜索吧。

This monster doesn't seem to have any intention of leaving the area near the gate... Guess we'll have to take it out.
（似乎听到了旋转栈桥运作时的轰鸣……）

哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，发现近似物件——请问是否要切换至搜索模式？
Beep! Beep! Matching object found, matching object found — do you want to switch to search mode?
（查宝好像有反应了，在这附近仔细搜索吧。）
(Findie seems to have found something. Let's take a look around here.)
（该去大桥对面和佩拉会合了。）

画面上的男性身着铁卫旧制制服，看起来风度非凡——如果他没做鬼脸的话。
The man in the picture is dressed in the old uniform of the Guards and has quite a classy look about him — if only he weren't making such a silly face.
咦，这底下好像还有一句话…<color=#dbc291ff>「下一个线索在拱门的荫蔽中酣眠」</color>？

至于新的线索，大概是和这个<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>有关。我们就把它当做下一个目标吧。
As for the new clue, it is probably related to the <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color>. Let's make this our next objective.
总之，这个箭头图案应该就是进一步的线索——至于新的线索，大概是和这个<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>有关。我们就把它当做下一个目标吧。
So the arrow pattern must be a clue... and this <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color> is probably the next clue. Let's make this our next objective.
总之，这个箭头图案应该就是进一步的线索——至于新的线索，大概是和这个<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>有关。我们就把它当做下一个目标吧。
So the arrow pattern must be a clue... and this <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color> is probably the next clue. Let's make this our next objective.
这里似乎也有敌人在游荡…看来我们不能随心所欲地使唤查宝了。
There seem to be enemies roaming nearby... We probably shouldn't call Findie right now.
一边小心前进，一边寻找那个可能藏着线索的<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>吧。
Let's proceed with caution, and keep an eye out for the <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color> that may contain clues.
关于上次回收处理「特效药」的事，我想再郑重地和你道一次谢。
I want to thank you again for recovering the wonder medicine. It meant a lot to me.
但光是销毁瓦赫留下的试剂，并不能解决医疗物资短缺的问题。很多患者还是没法及时处理病情，我的药物储备也有些捉襟见肘。
But disposing of Vache's reagents isn't enough to solve the medical supply shortage. Many of my patients can't be seen promptly, and my stock of medicine is running low.
多亏了你们，通向上层区的「炉心」通道重新开放了。借着这个机会，我想回上层区一趟，争取一些支援。
Thanks to you, the route to the Overworld through the Furnace Core has reopened. I'd like to use it to return to the surface and see if I can get some help.
我一猜你就会对这件事感兴趣。
需要恢复药？我包里有不少…
If you need recovery meds, I've got some in my bag...
还是一如既往地幽默呢，{NICKNAME}。
还记得我之前和你说的，有关我的养父母的事吗？
Remember my adoptive parents I mentioned to you a while ago?
「炉心」通路重新开放之后，我心里就萌生了一个想法。我给养父母的老宅地址写了一封信，拜托桑博替我送达。
After the reopening of the Furnace Core passage, I had an idea. I wrote a letter and asked Sampo to deliver it to my parents' old address.
我原本没有怀抱太大希望，但没想到桑博居然真的带来了妈妈的回信……
I didn't have high hopes, but amazingly, Sampo brought me my mother's reply.
原来桑博也是会干人事的啊…
Sampo being a gentleman... a rare occurrence...
拿到回信的时候，我和你有相同的感受。
Hehe, that's exactly what I thought when I got her letter.
Sampo couldn't have forged it, could he?
不会，我们一家人的笔迹我绝对不会认错。别忘了，他们可都是医生。
No, I recognize my family's handwriting. We are all doctors after all.
爸爸妈妈都还住在老地方，他们虽然已经不再工作在一线，但是和学院、医院的联系应该还在。
Mom said they still live at the old house, but they're not working on the front lines anymore. They should still have some connections in the medical school and the hospital, though.
如果运气足够好的话，或许我能拜托他们，帮下层区争取到额外的医疗资源。
If I'm lucky, maybe I can convince them to send extra medical supplies to the Underworld.
当然，除了这件事之外…我想和爸妈团聚的心情也十分迫切。我从妈妈回信的字里行间可以感受到，他们也跟我一样激动。
Of course, that's not the only reason for me to go back to the surface... I can't wait to visit my parents again, and I can tell from my mom's letter that they feel the same.
{NICKNAME}，如果可能的话，我希望有你陪我同去。
If possible, I would like you to go with me, {NICKNAME}.
I won't say no to you.
…太好了，这样我就能安下心来了。
我已经又给妈妈送去了一封信，约好了会面的地点。我们就在喷泉广场的附近集合吧——别担心，行政区的周边环境我还大抵记得。
I've sent another letter to my mom telling her to find us near Fountain Plaza. Don't worry, I know my way around the Administrative District.
…这里和印象中相比好像没什么变化呢。
...this place doesn't seem to have changed much from what I remember.
…啊，你来啦。抱歉，刚才看得有些入神了。
...Oh, there you are. Sorry, I got distracted watching the crowds.
看看这忙碌的人流，{NICKNAME}——上层区的生活还是一如既往，就好像什么都未曾发生。
{NICKNAME}, look at the busy flow of people — life in the Overworld carries on as usual, as if nothing has happened.
离我跟妈妈约定的时间还有一阵。我有个想法……
We're a little early. I've got an idea...
我想给她准备一份礼物。{NICKNAME}，你现在应该比我更熟悉上层区吧？你有什么建议吗？
I want to buy my mom a gift. {NICKNAME}, you're more of an Overworld local than I am now. Any suggestions?
去长夏花店买一束花吧。
How about flowers from Eversummer Florist?
是个好主意呢。在下层呆得太久，我也已经很久没闻到过花朵的芬芳了。
That's a great idea. I've been underground for so long, I almost forgot what flowers smell like.
那就这么决定吧，{NICKNAME}。可以请你带路吗？
Flowers it is then, {NICKNAME}. Can you lead the way?
去黄金歌剧院看一场戏吧。
How about watching a play at Golden Theater?
听上去很有趣，但就怕当天的剧目不合妈妈的胃口。我再想想……
Sounds fun, but there's a chance it won't suit my mom's taste. Let me think...
对了，我记得上层区有一家花店？不如我们去那边看看吧。
Oh, yes! I remember there was a florist in the Overworld. How about we head over that way?
在下层待得太久，我也已经很久没闻到过花朵的芬芳了。
I've been underground for so long, I already forgot what flowers smell like.
机械屋？抱歉，我不太明白…还是再想想吧。
Workshop? I'm not too sure about that... Let's see if we have other options.
对了，我记得上层区有一家花店？不如我们去那边看看吧。
Oh, yes! I remember there was a florist in the Overworld. How about we head over that way?
在下层待得太久，我也已经很久没闻到过花朵的芬芳了。
I've been underground for so long, I already forgot what flowers smell like.
「长夏」…这花店一直都叫这名字吗？看来我小时候还没能领会其中的讽刺意味。
Eversummer... Was that always the name? Seems I was too young to get the irony back then.
…抱歉，一不小心就说了些不中听的话。也许这店名只是代表了某种单纯美好的愿望，并没有其他意思。
...Sorry, don't mean to sound cynical. Maybe it simply represents the people's hopes up here.
现在想想，对于我们这一家来说，「送花」还真是件有仪式感的事呢。爸爸、妈妈、瓦赫、还有我…只要遇上了值得纪念的事情，我们总会靠送花来表达喜悦。
Now that I think about it, sending flowers is quite the tradition in my family. Mom, dad, Vache, and I... whenever something good happened, we sent each other flowers to celebrate.
你愿意听我讲讲有关花的故事吗，{NICKNAME}？
Do you want to hear a flower story, {NICKNAME}?
What was your mother's favorite flower...?
每年他们的结婚纪念日，爸爸都会送妈妈一束红纸包扎的「球牡丹」。
Each year for their anniversary, my dad would send my mom a bouquet of Ball Peonies wrapped in red paper.
听说「球牡丹」的花语是「永不磨灭的爱」——用这几个字来形容他们的婚姻，的确再合适不过了。
I heard that Ball Peonies represent "love that knows no end..." It does fit their marriage.
What was your father's favorite flower...?
我的养父是贝洛伯格名气响亮的外科医生。也正因如此，他的每台手术都是医界的焦点…他总是背负着巨大的压力。
My father is a famous surgeon in Belobog. Because of his fame, people in medical circles paid great attention to his surgeries... He always had a lot of stress to deal with.
他每完成一台高难度的手术，我和妈妈都会去买一朵「暖阳花」，别在他医务服的前口袋上。
Each time he finished a tricky operation, my mom and I would buy a single stem of Sunshine, then pin it on the chest pocket of his apron.
「暖阳花」的花语是「温暖、向往光明」…对于濒临死亡的患者来说，爸爸他应该就是唯一的那束光吧？
Sunshines represent "warmth and love of light..." For patients on the verge of death, my dad might have been the only light to penetrate the darkness around them.
瓦赫…要说我们家谁和花的缘分最浅，应该就属他了吧？
Vache... Out of everyone in my family, I think he probably appreciated flowers the least.
但我记得很清楚，他拿到医学院录取通知书的那天，爸妈带我去花店买了最贵的一株「侯爵夫人」。
Still, I remember the day he received his offer from the medical academy. My parents took me to the florist and we bought him the most expensive Marquise stem in the shop.
把那株花送给哥哥的时候，我看到他露出了笑意。你肯定想不到，要让那个人笑一笑是件多难的事。
When we gave him the flower, he failed to hide his smile. You can't imagine how hard it was to get him to smile.
我从小一个人长大，完全不知道自己的出生日月。养父母把我带到上层区以后，就把领养我的日子当做我的生日来过。
As an orphan, I never knew my birthday. My adoptive parents took me to the Overworld and made the day I joined the family my birthday.
每年的这一天，爸妈都会送给我一束「初雪八落」，花的枝数等同于我来到这个家中的年限。
Each year on that day, my parents would give me a bouquet of First Snow. The number of stems represented how many years had passed since I joined the family.
后来我才知道，「初雪八落」的花语里有「美好的回忆」这层意思。我还没来得及感谢他们…感谢他们给了我美好的童年。
I only found out later that First Snow represents "beautiful memories." My parents gave me a beautiful childhood, and I still haven't had the chance to thank them for that...
我清楚了，咱们去挑花吧。
I see. Shall we go to the florist?
抱歉，现在没有那个心情…
…也对，都是些不值一提的陈年旧事而已，不值得浪费你的时间。
...You're right, not the best moment for distant memories, I don't want to waste your time.
{NICKNAME}，能请你为我挑一束送给母亲的花吗？
{NICKNAME}, will you choose some flowers for my mom?
对我来说，这些花各自都有不同的涵义。让我亲自挑选的话，肯定耗上很久都拿不定主意。
To me, every flower carries a different meaning — it would take me ages to decide.
放心吧，我觉得爸妈不会太介意花束的品种。那个店员姑娘在盯着我们看呢，快去吧。
Don't worry. I don't think my parents will be picky about the flowers they get. Quick, that florist is looking at us.
Oh, hey {NICKNAME}. I thought you went to choose some flowers?
还是说…你想听听有关我的家人和花的故事？
Or... did you want to hear some family flower stories?
What was your mother's favorite flower...?

Vache... Out of everyone in my family, I think he probably appreciated flowers the least.
但我记得很清楚，他拿到医学院录取通知书的那天，爸妈带我去花店买了最贵的一株「侯爵夫人」。
Still, I remember the day he received his offer from the medical academy. My parents took me to the florist and we bought him the most expensive Marquise stem in the shop.
把那株花送给哥哥的时候，我看到他露出了笑意。你肯定想不到，要让那个人笑一笑是件多难的事。
When we gave him the flower, he failed to hide his smile. You can't imagine how hard it was to get him to smile.
我从小一个人长大，完全不知道自己的出生日月。养父母把我带到上层区以后，就把领养我的日子当做我的生日来过。

每年的这一天，爸妈都会送给我一束「初雪八落」，花的枝数等同于我来到这个家中的年限。
Each year on that day, my parents would give me a bouquet of First Snow. The number of stems represented how many years had passed since I joined the family.
后来我才知道，「初雪八落」的花语里有「美好的回忆」这层意思。我还没来得及感谢他们…感谢他们给了我美好的童年。
I only found out later that First Snow represents "beautiful memories." My parents gave me a beautiful childhood, and I still haven't had the chance to thank them for that...
我了解了，现在就去挑花。
I see. I'm going to go pick out some flowers.
没什么，我现在就去挑花。
Nothing. I'm going to go pick out some flowers.
谢谢你愿意为我做这些，{NICKNAME}。
又见面了客人，瓦丝卡为您服务！您如果需要一些买花的建议的话，可以随时来问我。
Nice to see you again! Vaska at your service. If you need some help picking the right flowers, feel free to let me know.
该帮娜塔莎挑什么花呢…
What flowers should I pick for Nat...
A bouquet of Ball Peonies, please.
我明白了，要一束「球牡丹」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
Aww... Ball Peonies, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...
我明白了，要一束「暖阳花」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
Hm? Sunshines, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...
我明白了，要一株「侯爵夫人」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
Aww... Marquises, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...
A bouquet of First Snow, please.
我明白了，要一束「初雪八落」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
Aww... First Snow, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...
…久等了，这是您要的花，请拿好。欢迎下次再来。
There you go, sorry for the wait. Hope to see you again soon!
等待瓦丝卡为你挑选鲜花……
You wait for Vaska to get the flowers for you...
娜塔…是娜塔吗？快，快过来，让妈妈好好看看你……
Nat... Nat! Is that you? Oh come here, my darling...
太久了…实在过去太久了，妈妈……
It's been too long, mom... too long.
…抱歉，奥森先生。你还好吗？谢谢你这十几年来一直陪在爸妈身边。
Sorry, I don't usually get this emotional... How have you been, Mr. Oswell? Thank you so much for taking care of my parents these last ten years.
我很好，娜塔莎小姐，我很好…您出落成一个大美人了啊！可惜老爷他……
I'm doing fine, Miss Natasha, just fine... Look at you! You've blossomed into a fine young woman. Such a pity that your father...
…爸爸他？对啊，怎么没看到他人呢？他是不是——
...Dad? I was wondering where he is. Is he...
…是三年前，娜塔。不用难过…他走的时候没有痛苦。
...It was three years ago, Nat. No need to be sad... he passed away very peacefully.
对不起，妈妈…对不起，这十几年来我没能陪在你们身边。也让你受累了，奥森先生。
I'm so sorry mom... I'm so sorry. For ten years, I left you both in the Overworld. Mr. Oswell, I'm sorry you had to bear all this weight.
不必这样，小姐…能一直照顾老爷和夫人是我的荣幸。
Don't be, my dear... It is my honor to look after your parents.
而且上下层的封锁也不是你的错，女儿。你不用为此感到自责。
It's not your fault that they sealed off the passage between the surface and the underground. Don't be so harsh on yourself, daughter.
妈妈…我真的有很多话想对你说。但眼下还有一件更紧急的事需要你帮忙。
Mom... I have so much to say to you, but there's an urgent matter that needs your help.
抱歉，我也希望这能是一次温情的重逢…但现在下层区还有很多我关心的人，他们正在遭受病痛的折磨，而你是我眼下唯一能求助的人。
I apologize. I wish this were a happier reunion... but there are too many suffering with sickness in the Underworld. You're the only person I can go to for help.
你不用道歉，孩子…我听闻了一些你在下层的事。我知道你救了很多人的命。你爸爸他一定会为你骄傲的。
There's no need to apologize, my child... I've heard of your deeds down there and I know you've saved many lives. Your father... he would be proud of you.
我们家在医学院的人脉很深，不管你需要的是药物或是文献资料，应该都不成问题。
We have many connections in the medical academy. No matter what you need, be it medicine or data, I should be able to get it for you.
去履行你作为医生的职责吧，娜塔。至于我们家人之间的事，来日方长……
Be the doctor you always were, Nat. We have all the time in the world to catch up later...
她一直都是这样，从没改变。
She's always been there for me.
没关系，{NICKNAME}。我其实早有心理准备了…虽然从妈妈口中确认这个消息，我的心头还是会刺痛。
It's alright, {NICKNAME}. I was prepared... Although it still hurts to hear it from mom.
有了妈妈的帮助，下层区药物短缺的情况肯定能得到缓解。这样一来，很多走投无路的病人应该也能看到希望了。
With her help, we'll be able to ease the Underworld's medical supply shortage. That's good news for patients who'd lost hope.
我很想花上一整天的时间，坐下来跟她叙叙旧。可惜现在还不是时候。
I really wish I could spend the whole day talking to her about the old days. But sadly now is not the time.
我们回下层吧，{NICKNAME}。得把这个好消息告诉那些需要帮助的人。
Let's head back to the Underworld, {NICKNAME}. We need to spread the good news.
娜塔莎和养母紧紧地拥抱在一起……
Natasha and her adoptive mother share a warm embrace...
商议了为下层区提供药物援助的细节……
You discuss the details about the medicine supply work in the Underworld...
奥森先生？你不是陪着妈妈先回去了吗？怎么……
Mr. Oswell? I thought you headed back home with mom. How come...?
娜塔莎小姐，抱歉！其实…其实我有重要的事必须当面告诉您。
I apologize, Miss Natasha! As a matter of fact... there's something I have to tell you in person.
…是不能当着妈妈的面说的事吗？
Something that mom isn't supposed to know?
您还是和小时候一样，聪明又敏锐。实际上…上下层封锁后的头两年，我收到了很多封瓦赫少爷的来信。
You haven't changed a bit — smart and sensitive. The fact of the matter is... in the first two years after the passage was closed off, I received many letters from Master Vache.
…什么？瓦赫的信？奥森先生，你确定吗？
...What? Letters from Vache? Are you certain, Mr. Oswell?
当然，小姐，我不可能认错少爷的笔迹，您看过以后也会明白的。
Of course, Miss. I recognized his handwriting. You'll see what I mean when you read the letters yourself.
其实…少爷那些信都是写给您的。收件地址填的都是下层区，但因为封锁令，这些信件都被退回到了老宅，到了我手上。

Actually... those letters were intended for your eyes only. The delivery address was the Underworld, but because of the sealing off of the passageway, the letters were sent back to your old house, to me.
我不明白——你没有把信转交给爸妈吗？
I don't understand — did you not show them to my parents?
我…对不起，小姐，我出于好奇打开了其中一封。瓦赫少爷在信里嘱咐您，一定不要让老爷和夫人知道他的事……
I... I'm sorry, Miss. I opened one of them out of curiosity. Master Vache stressed in the letter that your parents must not know what happened to him...
所以我把它们都藏到了安全的地方，等着您回到上层区的那天再予转交。
That's why I put the letters in a secure place, waiting to hand them to you when we could meet again.
我…娜塔莎小姐，我也不知道自己的选择对不对。我只是不想看到老爷和夫人被思念之苦折磨……
I... I'm not sure if I did the right thing, Miss Natasha. I just didn't want your parents to feel that their son was so close and yet so far away...
…你把信带在身上了吗，奥森先生？给我看看吧。
...Do you have the letters on you, Mr. Oswell? Let me take a look.
当然，当然。给——您肯定能认出来，这绝对是少爷的笔迹。
Of course, of course — here... You can tell it's the young master's handwriting.
「透骨的寒冷让我明白了自己的傲慢。一直在温室中长大的孩子，怎么可能领悟驱散严寒的魔法？」
"The cold has revealed to me my arrogance. How can a child who grew up in warmth ever begin to comprehend a cure to bitter cold."
他…瓦赫，即使在离开城市之后，他仍然没有放弃对「风雪免疫」的研究。
He... Vache didn't give up on his research into Blizzard Immunity... even after he left the city.
「我寄宿在被遗弃的屋檐下，在风雪里不断实验、突破，再实验、再突破。我在颤抖，但不是因为寒冷，而是因为我正一步步接近成功……」

"I live in abandoned houses under broken roofs and continue my experiments. One step after another, I've made breakthroughs. I'm trembling, not because of the cold... but because I can feel I'm getting closer to the answer I seek..."
如果这信里的话属实…那瓦赫一定是在雪原的某处搭建了自己的实验室，甚至还获得了一些成果。但这怎么可能……
If what's in here is true, then Vache must have built a lab somewhere in the Snow Plains... and even made progress in his research. But how can that be...
他没必要在信里对我撒谎。当然也有一种可能，或许在写下这些文字的时候，他已经彻底疯了……
There'd be no point in him lying to me in the letters. Still, it's possible he may have gone completely insane before he started writing them...
或许吧，但如果他写下这些字的时候还清醒着…
It's possible. But what if he was still sane when he wrote this down...
{NICKNAME}，我想出一次城，去寻找哥哥留下的研究成果。你愿意和我同去吗？
{NICKNAME}, I need to leave the city to recover my brother's research data. Are you willing to come with me?
出城？娜塔莎小姐，这未免太冒险了……
Leave the city? You are taking too much risk, Miss Natasha...
It's dangerous outside the city walls...
这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}说得对，贝洛伯格的城墙外遍地都是危险……
This {F#young lady}{M#young gentleman} is right. Danger is everywhere beyond the walls of Belobog...
我知道，奥森先生。但我身边有这位拯救了下层区的英雄，{F#她}{M#他}会保护好我的，对吧？
I know, Mr. Oswell. But I have a hero with me — {F#she}{M#he} saved the Underworld. I'm sure {F#she'll}{M#he'll} protect me, right?
瓦赫…这么多年过去了，你该不会还在那片风雪里……
Vache... It's been so many years. Are you still alone in the blizzard...?
…没什么，只是我的自言自语而已。走吧，{NICKNAME}，该去追逐往日的影子了。
...Ignore me... I'm just talking to myself. Let's go, {NICKNAME}. It's time to face my past head-on.
如此严寒…实在难以想象有人能在这种环境下生存。
Such harsh cold... It's hard to imagine anyone surviving in these conditions.
除非真的有「风雪免疫」这种药物的存在……
我们快些走吧，{NICKNAME}。得在身体冻僵之前找到瓦赫留下的线索。
Let's hurry up, {NICKNAME}. We need to find any clues that Vache may have left behind before both of us become ice sculptures.
你看，这里有些类似实验仪器的东西，说不定是瓦赫留下来的。
Here, this looks like lab equipment. Maybe Vache left it behind.
但也只是些已经废弃的试管、烧杯，还有其它容器。没有留下任何试剂样品，甚至没有用来记录实验结果的笔记……
Still, it's all just used test tubes, beakers, and other vessels. No sign of any sample reagents, or lab notes for that matter...
也许是因为条件太艰苦了…
Maybe things were too harsh here for record-keeping...
我了解哥哥，他对医学实验的态度严谨得可怕。不管条件有多艰辛，他也绝对不会漏记任何一次实验结果。
I know my brother he's — meticulous when it comes to medical experiments. There's no way he wouldn't document his results.
说不定是因为他的记性很好。
Maybe his memory's too good for lab notes.
我了解哥哥，他对医学实验的态度严谨得可怕。他绝对不会漏记任何一次实验结果。
I know my brother he's — meticulous when it comes to medical experiments. There's no way he wouldn't document his results.
{NICKNAME}，我想再向雪原深处探索一阵。你还能坚持住吗？
{NICKNAME}, I want to go deeper into the Snow Plains. Can you press on any further?
呵…温度越来越低了呢。但我可不想就这样半途而废。
*shivering* Gosh... The temperature keeps getting lower... but we can't give up halfway.
Trailblaze protects me. It's you I'm worried about...
不用担心我，可别小看了「地火」领袖的体质。
Hehe, no need. Don't you underestimate the leader of Wildfire.
I can warm you up if you'd like.
真贴心，好意我先心领了——但你可别小看了「地火」领袖的体质啊。
Hehe, that's very kind of you. Don't you underestimate the leader of Wildfire.
虽然我从没这么说过，但这次…希望那些筑城者信奉的神祇能分给我们些运气。
This may not sound like me, but... I hope that deity the Architects worship can grant us some luck.
…市民？在城墙外面？喂，你们两个，给我站住！
...Citizens? Outside the walls? Hey, you two, stop right there!
那个铁卫，他是在冲着我们大喊大叫吗？
That's a Silvermane Guard. Is he yelling at us?
啊，我差点忘了…擅自离开贝洛伯格是违法行为——看来我们有得解释了，{NICKNAME}。
Ah, I'd almost forgotten... No one can leave Belobog without authorization. Looks like we need to talk our way out of this, {NICKNAME}.
虽然你们的态度很诚恳…但想让我相信这些话，未免也……
I can't say you sound suspicious, but... I can't just take your word for it either...
队长，你看这位医生的项链…或许她说的是真的。
Captain, look at her necklace... Maybe she's telling the truth.
那是…和瓦赫医生一样的……
It's... the same as Dr. Vache's.
我和哥哥确实经常戴一样的项链…怎么了？莫非你们认识瓦赫医生？
My brother does wear an identical necklace... Do you know him?
您真的是那位医生的妹妹吗？瓦赫医生，他可是我们不少弟兄的救命恩人啊。
Are you really his sister? Dr. Vache saved a lot of my soldiers!
是啊。你看我们这些在城外巡逻的铁卫，哪个不是冒着生命危险在执勤？
Yes. Take a look at the guards patrolling outside the city. All of them are risking their lives.
先不提四处游荡的怪物，光是因为这极寒天气殉职的弟兄，每年就不止几个。
Aside from the monster-related casualties, we lose men to frostbite every year.
多亏了那位医生留下的抗寒药，我们才能安心地在这雪原里扎营、巡视，不用担心自己会被冻成冰雕。

But thanks to the medicine the doctor leaves us, my soldiers are able to withstand the cold. They can make camps in the Snow Plains as footholds for our patrols... If it weren't for the doctor, we would have long since frozen to death.
瓦赫医生总是神出鬼没的，我们小队只撞见过他一次。他好像…不太爱说话，每次都只是把药箱留在特定的位置，等巡逻队自行来取。
Doctor Vache is... elusive. My squad only met him once, and he didn't seem like the talkative type. He leaves the medicine at specific locations and our patrols go there to collect it.
他给的药功效极强，只要一小瓶就能让人连续一个星期感受不到寒冷。
The medicine is extremely potent — a small vial can keep someone warm for a week.
他留下的药够你们所有人分吗？
Is there enough for all of you?
这药的功效极强，只要一小瓶就能让人连续一个星期感受不到寒冷。之前留下的存货，到现在还剩下一大半。
The medicine is extremely potent — a small vial can keep someone warm for a week. We have over half our stock left.
瓦赫医生总是神出鬼没的，我们小队只撞见过他一次。他好像…不太爱说话，每次都只是把药箱留在特定的位置，等巡逻队自行来取。
Doctor Vache is... elusive. My squad only met him once, and he didn't seem like the talkative type. He leaves the medicine at specific locations and our patrols go there to collect it.
不过话说回来，距离上次有人撞见瓦赫医生已经过去很长时间了…大概有两三年了吧？希望他还平安……
Speaking of the doctor, it's been a long time since we last saw him... at least two or three years. I hope he's alive and well...
所以，他真的在雪原里取得了研究突破……
So he really did have a breakthrough in the Snow Plains...
那你们呢？这药物有没有什么副作用？
Did the medicine have any side effects for you?
…副作用？完全没感觉到。要说真有什么不方便的地方，那就是在药劲没过去之前回不了城……
...Side effects? Not that I know of. If there were a problem, it'd be that we couldn't go back to the city until the effect had worn off...
——因为全身上下都在发热，一回城里就会闷得满身大汗，哈哈哈。
...because the city would be too hot for us. We'd break a sweat just sitting idle, haha.
谢谢你们提供的信息。我们打算再深入雪原一些，寻找我哥哥的下落。
Thanks for the information. We're planning to head deeper into the Snow Plains to find my brother.
…看来你们是已经下定决心了。我很想派人护送你们，但出外勤的小队绝对不能擅离职守……
...Seems like you've made up your mind. I'd really like to send some of my men with you, but we can't leave our posts.
这样吧，这一瓶瓦赫医生的抗寒药，请两位拿着。如果你们叙述的经历都是真的，我觉得两位肯定有能力保护自己。
Here, take this medicine. If what you two told me is true, I'm sure you're more than capable of handling yourselves out there.
谢谢你，队长。那我们就收下了。
Thank you, captain. We'll take it with us.
向巡逻的银鬃铁卫解释了你们的身份和来意……
You explain your identity and purpose to the patrolling Silvermane Guard.
等一下！那边有个巨大的家伙。
Hold on! That's a big guy over there.
你也看到了吗？那怪物身后好像有什么东西。
Did you see that? There's something on the monster's back.
我准备好战斗了，{NICKNAME}。安心把你的背后交给医生吧。
I'm ready, {NICKNAME}. The doctor's got your back.
对了，「风雪免疫」...要不要喝下它，就由你来决定吧。
Oh, the Blizzard Immunity. Shall we drink it? It's your call.
不服用药物，直接与敌人战斗。
Let's not drink it, it's time to fight some enemies.
你感觉到了吗，{NICKNAME}？瓦赫的药物似乎起效果了。
Can you feel it, {NICKNAME}? It seems like Vache's medicine is working.
离得这么近观察你战斗的样子，我还是头一次。帅气又利落，不愧是下层区的救星。
That was my first time seeing you in battle... you've got some moves, don't you? No wonder you were able to save the Underworld.
我们去查看一下那边的情况吧。我有预感，应该能找到和瓦赫有关的东西……
Let's have a look over there. My gut tells me we should find something connected to Vache...
These are... records of his experiments.
是瓦赫的笔迹，这里一定就是他最后的实验据点。{NICKNAME}，你也过来看看吧。
It's Vache's handwriting. This must be the location of his final lab. {NICKNAME}, come have a look.
与娜塔莎一起，为瓦赫在雪中立了一座墓碑……
You and Natasha put up a headstone for Vache...
他最后一次实验的时间是接近两年之前。在那之后发生了什么？看实验笔记上的内容，他应该还在寻求改良「风雪免疫」的方法。
His last experiment was nearly two years ago. What happened after that? His notes seem to suggest he was working to improve Blizzard Immunity.
哥哥…你到底去了哪里？你到底……
Brother... where are you? What happened...?
Let's call it a day, Nat.
抱歉，我刚才没控制好情绪。
Sorry, I needed to take a moment.
从看到奥森先生保存的那封信开始，我就一直怀有一丝侥幸心理。逼着你陪我来到这么凶险的地方，是我太过任性了。
After seeing the letters Mr. Oswell kept for me, I was hoping things might've ended differently. I shouldn't have asked you to come with me to such a dangerous place.
What is your feeling towards Vache...
…我的家人，也是我曾经追逐的目标。
...He was my family, and someone I used to look up to.
我无法原谅他的行为。但我也没法控制自己对兄长的思念……
I can't forgive him for what he's done. But nor can I say I don't miss him...
我…也许我该感到高兴才对。他的坚持最终还是获得了回报，哪怕没能做到完美的地步…也许他能获得一丝安宁……
I... maybe I should feel glad. The medicine might not have been what he wanted it to be, but it came to something... Maybe he found some inner peace...
被他伤害的人们不会感到安宁。
Too bad his victims won't ever share that peace.
…你说得没错。瓦赫犯下的恶行无法宽恕，他也愧对「医生」这个称呼。
...You're right. There can be no forgiveness for the crimes he committed. He didn't deserve the title of "doctor."
…记得他曾是伤害无辜的加害者，记得他曾经犯下的恶行。瓦赫愧对「医生」这个称呼，这点我再清楚不过。
...They'll remember him as a murderer... as someone whose evil experiments brought great harm to the innocent. Vache doesn't deserve to be remembered as a "doctor." I know that very well.
但哪怕出自「恶魔」之手，这些「风雪免疫」还是可以造福后人。
But maybe this Blizzard Immunity can now bring benefit to others... even if it was made by a monster.
还真是矛盾啊，人这种生物……
Human beings really are conflicted life forms...
我要带走这些实验记录和资料，继续瓦赫未竟的研究。总有一天，最完美的「风雪免疫」将会问世。
I'll take his records and data with me and continue what he started. One day, the world will see a perfect Blizzard Immunity.
但在离开这里之前，{NICKNAME}——我还想请你帮我一个忙。我向你保证，这是最后一次……
Before we leave, {NICKNAME}, I'd like to ask for another favor — the last one, I promise...
…这样就可以了。希望它能在风雪里多伫立一段时间。
...That should do. Hope it can withstand the snow.
墓碑上应该有墓志铭才对。
You ought to put an epitaph on the headstone.
好像是这样没错。让我思考一下……
瓦赫值得你为他做这么多吗？
Is Vache worth you doing all this for him?
我不知道。这只是我脑海里一闪而过的想法而已。
I don't know. It's just something that suddenly occurred to me.
话说回来，墓碑上一般都会有题字，对吧？让我想想……
People write things on headstones, right? Let me think...
这样就可以了，{NICKNAME}。谢谢你帮我了断这最后一桩心事。
That'll do. Thank you for helping me, {NICKNAME}. I feel like a great weight has been lifted.
再见，哥哥。希望你还记得爸爸的教诲。
So long, brother. Hope you don't forget dad's teaching.
「医生没有选择患者的权力，孩子们——记住，永远不要放弃任何一个向你求救的人。永远不要。」
"A doctor does not get to choose his or her patient, my children. Remember, never say no to those who come to you for help. Never."
挑好了吗？让我看看你选了什么花吧。

我就知道你的选择一定能让我满意。爸妈收到这花，一定会喜出望外的。

走吧，约好的时间快到了。可不能让老人家等太久。

我就知道你的选择一定能让我满意。爸妈收到这花，一定会喜出望外的。
I knew you'd pick the right flowers. Mom and dad will be so happy.

侯爵夫人…这么名贵的花……
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。不瞒你说，看到这朵花的一瞬间，我立刻就联想到了瓦赫…啊，不用担心，我想到的是一些幸福的回忆。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. To be honest with you, it reminds me of Vache... Don't worry, good memories only.

Thank you, {NICKNAME}. It reminds me of carefree childhood days... Those times were pure and innocent, just like these petals.

没关系，我理解。你肯定在忙很重要的事吧？那就快去吧。
It's okay, I understand. You must have some important things on your plate? Don't let them get ahead of you.
Nat, do you have something to ask?
就像是静候着好心人将椅子放回原位，珍贵的宝物迫不及待地出现在你的眼前。
The precious treasure suddenly appears before your eyes, as if it was waiting for a well-meaning person to put the chair back in place.
就像是默默注视着自作主张的举动，灯具的坐台悄悄地移开了位置，珍贵的宝物猝不及防地出现在你的眼前。

就像是为了鼓励勤勉的士兵，看似随意摆放的沙包发出机关的声音，珍贵的宝物突然出现在你的眼前。

是你啊，{NICKNAME}！还能在行政区碰见你真是太好了。最近怎么样？

那就好！星核的影响消散之后，整个贝洛伯格的氛围明显欢脱了不少，这跟你们的努力脱不了干系。

——回答你的问题，我最近也过得不错，谢谢关心。

唔…相信我，都会好起来的。
