Uhh, kind of... There was one on its own — I managed to chase it away.
话说回来，我看你们来自那个方向——你们有见过两个人吗？是姐弟俩，一大一小……
Speaking of which, you came from that direction, right? Did you see two little kids? A girl and her brother...?
他们已经退到安全区域了。
They've retreated to the safe zone.
哈，那就好…我还怕自己追得太远，把他们落下了呢。
Ah, thank goodness... I chased the monster too far and lost them.
他们被裂界怪物困住了。
What!? Quick! I knew I shouldn't have—
不必担心，我们已让他们退到了安全区域。
Easy, they went back to safety.
总之，那对姐弟现在安然无恙。你也快向矿区大桥撤离吧，铁卫联手「地火」在那里建立了安全区。
They'll be okay now. You should head back to the bridge too — the Guards and Wildfire have set up a safe zone there.
喔、喔！太好了，他俩没事就好…我可以放心撤了。
Thank you — all of you. I'm just glad they're okay... I can finally retreat as well.
不过，前面似乎有个非常强大的怪物，像是这帮怪物的头儿…你们可得小心哪！
I heard there's a powerful monster down the road — some kind of leader of the pack... I'd take caution!
感谢你的情报，我们一定会谨慎应战。
Thanks for the intel. We'll be careful.
看来前面有强敌盘踞…希露瓦，{NICKNAME}，千万小心。
I think he was right about the monster... Serval, {NICKNAME}, no sudden moves.
那种怪物…我在禁区前线时也与它打过几次照面。
I've seen this type of monster a few times near the restricted zone.
等等，先保持距离！这个敌人有些不对劲……
Wait, don't get too close! Something's not right...
这种怪物的战意通常十分高昂。平时若在裂界中遭遇，激战往往在所难免……
These monsters are usually eager to fight — you're guaranteed a fierce battle if you see one in the Fragmentum...
但眼前这家伙看到我们后却无动于衷…我担心这其中有诈。
But this one doesn't seem concerned about us... This could be a trap.
A trap laid by a Fragmentum monster? Are they that smart?
…倒不是字面意思。我只是觉得情况不同寻常。
...I'm not sure either. I just have a feeling that something's different.
冷静些，{NICKNAME}。情况特殊，我们小心为上……
Careful, {NICKNAME}. Special circumstances require a special approach.
…不要贸然出手，做好反击准备……
...Steady, get ready to counter its attack...
（它刚才…是不是提到了姐弟两人的名字？）
…这家伙，好吵啊！裂界造物居然还会碎碎念吗？
...Ugh, that noise! Do Fragmentum monsters usually sound like this?
...It's talking to us. Can you not hear it?
…说话？我只听到了一阵杂乱的噪声……
等等——难道你能理解它的语言？
我听说过民间的传闻——「披上庄严人形的裂界幻影，是往昔守护者的意志凝结成的回响」。
I heard rumors about this kind of monster... "Shadows in the Fragmentum that assume human forms are echoes of the will of past guardians."
If the rumors are true... could it be...
你这女人…真是阴魂不散。
You... You just won't stop haunting me.
我已经想尽办法努力忘记先前发生的一切了，可你总能变着法子又回到我的视线中……
I try everything to put the past behind me... and yet you always manage to creep up again...
可可利亚，你这个…混蛋！先是终止我的研究，然后又要破坏我的生活…你还想从我这儿夺走什么？！
Cocolia, you... you witch! You terminated my research and ruined my life... What else do you want to take away from me!?
希露瓦，冷静！那只是裂界的幻象！
Calm down, Serval! It's just a Fragmentum illusion!
难道我们一起度过的那些时光…都是虚假的吗？
All that time we spent together... was any of it real?
你走得倒是潇洒…你难道就不觉得，自己还欠我一个解释吗？！
It was so easy for you to just leave this world behind... Don't you at least owe me an explanation!?
█约定的新世界 █ ██ 没有你们的位置——！
█There is no place for you█ ██the promised new world!
冷静下来，姐姐！我知道你想从可可利亚大人那里得到回应——
Sister! I know you want Madam Cocolia to respond...
但我们眼前的这个…东西，它只是我们的敌人、只是裂界中成型的恶意罢了！你从它身上找不到答案！
But this... thing in front of us is our enemy! It was born out of the evil gathered in the Fragmentum! You won't get answers from it!
并肩作战吧，姐姐——我们一起驱散旧日的幻影。
Fight with us, sister. Let's dispel the shadow of the past once and for all!
当然，如果你还是觉得暂时无法直面自己的种种过去——
Of course, if you're not yet able to confront the past...
我和{NICKNAME}会暂时代你战斗…直到你将自己的心结彻底解开为止。
Then {NICKNAME} and I will fight for you... until your heart is ready.
一起来吗？把它痛扁一顿。
Are you coming with us? Let's take it down!
好好享受你的私人空间吧。
You need some space. I understand.
抱歉啦，老弟。每到关键时刻，我总是要让你费心。
I'm sorry, brother. I always make you worry when things get serious.
不过嘛，你小子居然也学会激将法了——
But I see what you're doing... Reverse psychology, huh?
Well, seeing as we've come this far...
可可利亚——咱们之间的陈年旧事，就在这里彻底清算吧！
Cocolia... let's settle this bad blood right here, right now!
看来，前任大守护者的执念确实夹杂其中。
太难看了，可可利亚——缠着人不放可不是你的作风啊。
Hmph, since when did you forget how to let go, Cocolia?
温度逐渐恢复正常了。裂界怪物也在逃散。
The temperature is returning to normal... the monsters are retreating.
可以合理推测…可可利亚大人的幻影就是引发这次入侵的罪魁祸首。先前未知的异变可能也是由它引起的……
...I think it's safe to say that the shadow of Madam Cocolia was the reason for this invasion. The other anomalies we experienced were probably also a direct result...
无论如何，这次的危机应该就算告一段落了。你还好吗，{NICKNAME}？
Whatever the case, we've managed to avert a crisis. Are you okay, {NICKNAME}?
的确。好在你战斗经验丰富，能够见招拆招。
Indeed it was. We're lucky to have an experienced fighter like you who can adapt to different enemies.
That's it? That barely scratched the itch!
不愧是贝洛伯格的英雄。
Sounds like something the Hero of Belobog would say alright.
如果少了你，恐怕我们还要和那幻影纠缠一阵…姐姐，你还好吗？感觉如何？
It would've taken us much longer to fight off the shadow without you. Serval... how are you feeling?
感觉…心里的一块石头落地了。
I feel like something heavy has finally been lifted.
不过，那家伙消散前可真够吵的…{NICKNAME}，你听清楚它说什么了吗？
All that noise before it perished... {NICKNAME}, did you catch what it said?
它说「你怎么总这么碍事」。
It said, "Why do you always have to stand in my way?"
…原来如此。你真是一条路走到黑了啊，可可利亚……
I see... You really made no effort to correct your mistakes, Cocolia...
不过，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
Anyway, it doesn't matter anymore... From here on out, I'm over that woman.
哎，罢了罢了，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
*sigh* I guess it doesn't matter. From here on out, I'm over that woman.
哎，罢了罢了，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
*sigh* I guess it doesn't matter. From here on out, I'm over that woman.
...I can tell you mean it this time.
如果你真的能彻底放下执念…那我替你高兴，姐姐。
I'm happy for you, Serval... It's not easy to truly put the past behind you.
任务到这里就算告一段落了，但我还需要组织铁卫和「地火」进行善后。
Looks like we accomplished our mission. I need to get back to the Guards and Wildfire to wrap things up.
你们先回娜塔莎小姐的诊所吧，去看看我们救下的伤员情况如何。
You two should head over to Natasha's place and check in on the wounded.
没问题，那我们之后就在诊所碰头。{NICKNAME}，这儿就交给老弟，我们先回镇上去吧！
Sure, come find us later at the clinic. {NICKNAME}, let's leave Gepard to his business and head back to town.
非战斗人员请从这里向磐岩镇撤离！
Non-combatants, retreat from Boulder Town through here in an orderly fashion!
(It doesn't seem like we can go to the battlefield through here...)
前方是战斗区域，非战斗人员不得入内！
Battleground to the fore, non-combatants are not allowed beyond this point!
（还是听从杰帕德的指令，不要擅自行动为好……）
(I should take Gepard's order and not act on my own...)
（还是先调查一下这处临时营地吧……）
(I'll just investigate this temporary camp for now...)
Why are they not back yet...
Calm down, don't engage the enemy!
There are so many monsters outside, I'm scared...
Ssss... Why isn't Wildfire here yet?
别慌，冷静点告诉我，后面还有被落下的人吗？有多少，在哪里？
Calm down, answer me, are there anyone else who's left behind? How many, and where?
有、有不少哩！他们在那个旧矿坑附近搭了个临时阵地……
Th—There are quite a few of them! They're there at the old mine shaft with a temporary camp...
那里还有小孩和老人…求求你们，快去救他们吧！
There are children and seniors too... Please, save them!
嘿，这里稀罕宝贝可真不少啊！老弟你不会是嘴上说做义工，其实偷偷在这里寻宝吧？
Hah, there's plenty of precious stuff in here! You aren't looking for treasure in the museum while pretending to volunteer, right?
哎，这是什么机器？还有屏幕跟键盘…难道是操控自动机兵用的终端？
Oh! What's this gadget? This monitor, and this keyboard... is it an automaton remote control terminal?
你看，这里还贴着纸条呢！「佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜」……
See, there's a piece of paper here! It says "Penya Sergeyevna"...
这是物主的名字吗？怎么听着有点熟悉……
Is that the owner's name? Sounds a bit familiar...
…姐姐，这都是文物，你别乱动。万一弄坏了就不好了。
These are all relics, sis. Please don't touch them. What if you break something?
哟，{NICKNAME}来啦！我们俩正等你呢。
Oh, {NICKNAME}! We were just waiting for you.
好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我本来提议直接在群里聊，但姐姐坚决不肯…辛苦你特地跑一趟了。
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. I wanted to talk about this in our chat group, but sis won't have it... I'm sorry you had to run all the way out here.
一定要在这种地方聊吗？
哎…这都是姐姐的主意。她说这样比较有密谋的感觉。
Um... That was Serval's idea. She said it needed a level of secrecy.
不过我也碰巧在博物馆帮忙，索性就随她在这里等你了。
I happened to be helping out at the museum, so we both ended up waiting for you here.
其实，这次请你来这里，是想和你聊聊我们家玲可的事。
Actually, I want to talk to you about our little Lynx.
她是我们俩的妹妹，也是朗道家年纪最小的孩子。
She's our little sister, the youngest child of the Landau family.
原来你们认识啊，那就好说了。
So you know her! Well, that makes this easy.
她最近刚从雪原科考归来，但状态一直不大好，似乎有什么心事……
She just came back from a scientific exploration on the Snow Plains, but she seems really out of it... almost like she's worried about something...
她也不想告诉我们到底发生了什么。我们很担心她，想帮她的忙，但又实在毫无头绪。
And she won't tell us what happened. We're really worried and want to help, but we don't know where to start.
我上次遇见她的时候，她似乎正准备去雪原跟某人见面，还问我要了一套炉具……
The last time I saw her, she was preparing to meet someone on the Snow Plains. She even asked for a stove set from me...
可不管我们怎么旁敲侧击，她都不肯告诉我到底要去见谁…嗐，我这姐姐当的，真是憋屈。
But no matter how Gepard and I asked and probed, Lynx simply refused to tell us who she was gonna meet... *sigh* I'm such a failure of a sister.
所以，我和老弟不得已才想了这一招，想请你代我们去侦查一下！
So, that's why Gepard and I came up with this idea. We'd like you to help us find out what's going on!
还有一个请求…希望你务必不要被她发现，否则玲可肯定又要对我们发脾气了。
One more thing... don't let her discover you. Otherwise, she'll probably get upset with us.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！我们确实是放心不下她随便和陌生人见面……
Thank you, {NICKNAME}! We're worried about her meeting strangers...
她经常一个人前往雪原考察，我们也一直相信她能保护好自己。但毕竟这次情况特殊——要是她被坏人利用，陷入危险就糟了。
She's used to doing research alone in the Snow Plains, and we've always believed she can protect herself, but this is different... I'm worried she could run into bad people.
话是这么说，她也确实经常一个人前往雪原考察，我们也一直相信她能保护好自己……
I know she's used to going into the Snow Plains alone for research, and we've always believed she can protect herself...
但这次情况特殊，我们确实放心不下她随便和陌生人见面——要是她被坏人利用，陷入危险就糟了。
But this is different. We're worried about her running into strangers... She might get herself into trouble.
哦，对了！你要去找玲宝的话，还得知道她长什么样吧？
Oh, right! If you're gonna go find Lynxy, you gotta know what she looks like!
放心，她很显眼的：她跟我俩一样，一头金发，然后…唔，个子比较小，平时总会戴一顶白绒帽…如果我没猜错，她应该会在靠近雪原的出入口等人。

Don't worry. She stands out. She's blonde like us and, um... quite short. She's always wearing a white fur hat... If I'm right, she should be waiting for someone at the city exit closest to the Snow Plains.
总之，我们最可爱的妹妹就拜托你了——要是发现了什么情况，记得随时联系我们啊！
We are putting our dearest baby sister in your hands this time. Let us know immediately if anything happens.
（哎？那边那个孩子…和希露瓦描述的有点像。）
(Huh? That girl over there... seems like she fits Serval's description.)
（那应该就是玲可了。先在这里观察状况吧。）
(That must be Lynx. Let's hide here and observe for now.)
佩拉情报官刚才好像和什么人向雪原的方向去了……
Intelligence Officer Pela just left for the Snow Plains with somebody...
呼…原来从行政区到雪原要花这么久啊。
Phew... I never knew how long it took to get from the Administrative District to the Snow Plains.
好大的雪…感觉比北方山脉里见到的还要大。
So much snow... Even in the northern mountains, it wasn't like this.
Did you bring enough warm clothes?
不出意外的话，雪在入夜前还会越下越大…你有好好准备防寒的衣物吗？
The snow is supposed to get heavier later in the day... Have you got enough warm clothes?
嗯，都按你说的准备好啦。多亏了你的露营手册。
Yep, I brought everything you told me to — all thanks to your camping guide.
然后，按你手册里说的——我们该找一处合适的露营地了，对吧？平整干燥、背风背阴，还得是地势比较高的地方……
Speaking of which, according to the guide, the first thing we need to do is find a good place to set up camp, right? Flat, dry, sheltered, facing the sun, high elevation...
要先找一处合适的露营地。
We need to find a good place to set up camp first.
不出意外的话，雪在入夜前还会越下越大…我们得先找个合适的地方扎营才行。
The snow is supposed to get heavier later in the day... We need to find a good place to set up camp first.
嗯，我记得这个——你在露营手册上也是这么写的：露营地必须平整干燥、背风背阴，最好是地势较高的地方……
Right! The guide says we should find a flat, dry, sheltered location — facing the sun at high elevation...
…不愧是你，记什么都这么清楚。不过，这附近应该很难找到完美符合所有条件的露营地。
...You remembered all that? I expected no less from you! But it's gonna be hard finding a place that fits those criteria.
我们就一起边走边看吧——当然，还得方便观测极光才行。
Well, we'll just keep moving and see. The place has to be convenient enough for us to observe the aurora, too.
那就交给你啦——我会乖乖跟着你的。
I'll leave it to you then. I'm gonna follow right behind you.
平整干燥、背风背阴、地势要高……
Flat, dry, sheltered, facing the sun, high elevation...
还要方便观测极光…好难挑啊。
...and we need to be able to observe the aurora... This is going to be difficult.
这个坡道的视野好像很好…观测极光感觉会很方便欸。
This slope has a good view... It'll be easy to watch the aurora.
不。这里是风口，还有冰原狼活动的痕迹…在这里扎营会有危险的。
Nope. The wind blows strongly through here, and there are signs of direwolf activity... It'd be too dangerous to make camp.
原来如此…那我们还是继续向前找找吧。
I see... Then let's keep moving.
嗯…这里倒是背风背阴，地面也很平整。但……
Hmm... This area is sheltered and facing the sun, plus it's flat ground, but...
但四周都是山崖，如果遇到落石或者塌方就危险了。而且这里视野也不是很好……
But there are cliffs all around. We'll be in trouble if there's a landslide or rockfall. Also, there isn't much of a view...
…啊！我想到一个好地方——离这里不远，跟紧我。
Ah! I remember a good place that's not too far from here. Follow me!
我们好像走进死胡同了……
难道…玲宝说的「好地方」，就是这里？
Lynxy, are you sure this is the place?
没错。这里是通向坎特谷的必经之路。虽然两边有矮崖，但我先前已经为了通行方便清理过了，不必担心坍塌。
Yep. This is the path to Kandor Valley. There are low cliffs on both sides, but I cleared all the monsters here a while ago, so it should be safe and sound.
而且，这个季节的山风通常是北风，这两座矮崖正好可以为我们挡住雪原的强风——这也是不能在刚才坡道上扎营的原因之一。
Also, the mountain wind during this season usually comes from the north, which is another reason why we couldn't camp on that previous slope. These two hills can block the Snow Plains gales for us.
…我完全没注意到这些细节！露营原来这么深奥吗……
I never even noticed! Huh, camping is a complicated science...
…也不是啦，只是贝洛伯格之外的自然条件比较恶劣而已。
...Not really, but the environment outside of Belobog is very tough.
如果这里的天气像城里一样好，那只要找个舒服的地方扎营就可以了。
If the weather here was as good as inside the city, then we could have camped anywhere.
也是。希望那一天能早点到来。
That's true. I hope that becomes a reality one day.
啊，不过这里的视野似乎不是很好…看极光的话，这里没问题吗？
Hmm, only problem is... the view here isn't great. Are you sure we'll be able to watch the aurora?
嘿嘿，这个悬念留到最后再揭晓——我们先把帐篷搭好，然后一起去收集今晚要用的食材吧。
Hehe, don't worry about that for now — let's get the tent ready then go find our dinner.
欸，好——那让我来试试吧！露营手册上相关的部分，我已经全都背下来了！
Sure! I can help out with the tent — I memorized that section in the camping guide.
好啊，那我先安装炉具好了。如果觉得拿不准，随时来问我哦。
Okay, then I'll go set up the stove. If you have any questions, just ask me.
(Darn, doesn't seem like an easy fix...)
奇怪…手册上是这样说的没错啊……
Weird... That's what the guide says...
啊，玲宝！你快来看看这是怎么回事！
Hey, Lynxy! Come and have a look at this!
——我明明已经按手册上说的来了，可这个帐篷怎么还是摇摇晃晃的……
I did everything according to the guide, but the tent's still wobbly...
支架、横杆、缆绳…都没问题……
Main poles, check. Brow poles, check. Ropes, check...
这样就好了，是地钉的问题——忘记说了，在这种积雪比较深的地方，要用实心的铅铁钉才行。
The pegs. I forgot to mention — thick snow needs leaded iron pegs.
原来如此。现在看起来确实稳固多了…不愧是玲宝！
Got it! It's definitely sturdier now... Nice job, Lynxy!
这就别夸啦…毕竟是我疏忽了。
呃，然后不巧的是——你能看看这个炉具吗？它好像坏掉了……
Uhh... I've got a question, too. Can you take a look at this stove? I think it's broken...
Huh? Sure, let me take a look.
嗯…应该是地髓燃料的激活元件坏掉了。你有备用的吗？
Hmm... The Geomarrow fuel activation component probably stopped working. Do you have a spare one?
没有…姐姐和我说，这个是全新的……
No... Serval told me this was a brand-new stove...
（该不会是我拿错了吧…那今天岂不是只能用地髓生火了？亏我特地跟姐姐要了这个……）
(Did I bring the wrong stove...? Does this mean we have to make a fire with Geomarrow? I specifically got this stove from Serval...)
没事没事，这种元件很常见，保不齐附近的废墟里就有能用的替换件呢。
That's okay. These components are really common. Maybe we can find a spare one in the ruins around here.
你先忙其他的吧，我去附近帮你找找——啊，顺便也收集一下食材！
You take it easy — I'll see if I can find one. Oh, and I'll keep an eye out for food too!
收集食材是可以，但那个元件肯定很难找……
Finding food is easy, but finding that component is gonna be hard...
先找找看，实在不行就按你在手册上说的——砍柴生火好啦。
We'll do our best. If we can't find one, we'll just do what your guide says and chop wood to make a fire.
啊，其实我有备用的地髓块……
Oh, actually, I have some spare chunks of Geomarrow...
这座废墟里或许就能找到炉具的备用件。让我看看……
There might be spare stove parts in the ruin. Lemme see...
Don't tell me you wanna crawl in there...
当然，毕竟想要的东西不可能自己钻出来嘛。
Of course I do. It's not like the stuff we need is gonna come crawling out.
元件没找到，但是找到了这个…不知道能不能吃就是了。
I didn't find any components, but I got this... I don't know if we can still eat it...
多亏了寒潮啊…不然我们根本吃不到七百年前的生鱼片。
It's all thanks to the Eternal Freeze. We can eat raw fish from <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago!
Huh? What's in this tree trunk...
是拟态雪蛞蝓。它会根据周围环境将自身重塑成与之接近的模样，以此伪装自己，非常可爱。
These are mimic snow slugs. They can change their appearance to match the external environment. They're really cute.
可这东西，看着不像很好吃的样子……
Yeah, but... we should put them back.
不。这种蛞蝓在火上烤过之后，口感会变得非常好——可能有点像…雪地鼠？
No, no! These slugs taste really good once they've been roasted... They kinda taste like... snow mice?
…后面那个听上去也不能吃吧？！
这座雪堆里似乎有什么东西……
There's something in this snow drift...
…哎？！我来挖就好了！你不用动手……
...Huh!? I can do the digging! You don't need to...
这也是露营的一环嘛——就让我体验一下吧。
Come on, camping is about teamwork! Let me have a try.
没错，这是雪地萝卜。味道甜甜的，很好吃……
Yep, that's a snow radish. They're really sweet and tasty...
…不对。这应该是正在冬眠的雪地萝卜兔。
...Actually... no. This is a hibernating snow radish rabbit.
是的，这种兔子的外形特别像雪地萝卜——耳朵是叶，身子是茎。它冬眠的时候会用土块包裹身体，看上去就和地里的萝卜没有任何区别了。

Yep. They look really similar to snow radishes. Their ears look like the leaves and their body looks like the radish bit. When they hibernate, they cover themselves with dirt, just like real radishes.
原来如此…那我们还是把它放回去吧。
I see... In that case, please tell me we can put it back?
嗯…这样对雪原生态比较好。
Yeah... It's better for the Snow Plains' ecosystem.
这个板条箱…看起来很可疑啊。说不定能找到炉具的替换件……
This crate looks promising. Maybe there are spare stove components inside...
那让我来打开它看看吧。
哎，不用不用——玲宝你别操心，放着我来吧！
Ah! N—No! Don't worry about it, Lynxy! I'll manage!
看起来是的，而且大概是不久前才被放在这里……
Sure looks like it... And they were probably placed here not long ago...
…难道是贝洛伯格野人囤的食物吗？
...Could it be the Belobog Caveman's food?
什、什么，贝洛伯格野人是什么？
是一种传说中的生物——它的外形介于人与猿之间，近似成年男性，毛发是深蓝色的；而且它神出鬼没，整个贝洛伯格都找不到能证明它存在的确切证据……

It's a legendary creature. It looks like something between a man and a monkey, roughly the same size as a man, with dark blue hair. Its activities are very mysterious, and no one in Belobog can find concrete evidence of its existence...
我也只是偶然看到过几次，但刚想认真拍个照的时候，就发现它已经消失不见了。
I've only chanced upon it a few times myself, but whenever I tried to take a photo of it, it had already run away.
我觉得…这捆红肠，有可能成为轰动贝洛伯格的科考发现！我们把它带回去吧。
I feel like... these sausages might constitute a great Belobogian scientific discovery! Let's bring them back with us.
啊…可是你看，这里好像写着字哎：
Ah! Hold on... There are some letters here.
…「桑」什么什么「基」。中间看不清楚，但好像是个名字。
"SAM" something, "KOS" something... I can't read the rest, but it seems like a name.
这应该不是那个什么野人的屯粮吧…还是说，野人也会写字？
Guess it can't be the Belobog Caveman then... Do cavemen even know how to write?
别、别伤心！玲宝肯定还能找到其他证据的……
D—Don't worry Lynxy! I'm sure you'll get concrete proof one day...
至于这捆红肠…还是留在这里，等物主来拿吧。
Let's leave the sausages here, I think someone might be missing them if we take them.
这附近应该搜索得差不多了…佩拉，我们回去吧？
I think we've searched through everything here... Let's head back, Pela.
只能回去了…可惜没找到炉具的替换件。
*sigh* Okay... I feel bad that we didn't find a spare component.
没关系，我们用地髓生火就好了——一起回去吃饭吧。
It's fine, we'll just light a fire with Geomarrow... Let's go back and have some food.
其实…没有那个炉具也能生火做饭的。
We... don't really need that stove to cook.
…我知道啊。反正也要出来收集食材嘛，顺便的事而已。
...I know. But since we were looking for food, I figured we might as well try to fix the stove.
营地里好像有什么东西…我们小心一点。
I think there's something in the camp... Be careful.
Is it some kind of animal?
…玲宝，等等。营地里的那个东西，是很危险的裂界生物。
...Lynxy, wait. That thing in the camp is a dangerous Fragmentum creature.
嗯，我也看到了。可它好像没什么敌意，长得也挺可爱，圆滚滚的……
Mm, I see it too. But it doesn't seem aggressive... and it's all chubby and cute...
别被外表骗了。历年在裂界里失踪的银鬃铁卫，有两成就是因为不听指挥、擅自追逐这种裂界生物才没能归队的。
Don't be fooled by its appearance. About <unbreak>20%</unbreak> of our Silvermane Guard Fragmentum losses are a result of chasing this creature.
我们还没研究清楚这类生物的习性，但有一点很确定…它肯定具备某种蛊惑人心的能力，我们还是谨慎一点为好。
We haven't figured out everything about it yet, but there's one thing we're sure of... they have the power to control people. We need to be careful.
哎？但是这个小家伙上次还给了我件好东西呢，也没有伤害我的意思……
Huh? But this little buddy gave me something good last time, and it didn't hurt me...
那应该就是它蛊惑人心的伎俩了。还好你没遇到危险。
That must be the first step in their mind control process. You were lucky.
为了安全着想，我们还是消灭它吧——裂界生物是贝洛伯格的敌人，不值得信任。
We should defeat it just to be safe. Fragmentum creatures are Belobog's enemies — they shouldn't be trusted.
之前我都没来得及给它拍照，但现在是个好机会……
I didn't even get to take a photo of it last time. Now's a good chance...
至少让我拍张照吧，佩拉——身为科考人员，这也是我的义务。
Can I at least take a picture, Pela? That's also my job as a researcher.
…我明白了。但快门的声音和闪光灯很有可能会激怒它……
...I understand, but the sound of the shutter and the camera bulb might send it into a frenzy...
它可能正在寻找袭击我们的机会…小心。
It might be looking for an opportunity to attack. Be careful!
它好像消失了…是逃走了吗？
It disappeared... Did it run away?
嗯…那个小家伙的习性就是如此。只要受到惊吓，它就会以一种奇妙的方式立刻消失不见。
Yeah... that's the nature of these little things. They disappear in a flash when they get scared.
它不见了…玲宝，小心偷袭。
It disappeared... Lynxy, be on the lookout for an ambush.
不用紧张啦，佩拉。那个小家伙的习性就是如此——只要受到惊吓，它就会以一种奇妙的方式消失不见。
Don't worry, Pela... that's the nature of these little things. They disappear in a flash when they get scared.
这是我经过长期观察总结出的经验。至于那些失踪的铁卫…我想应该是在追逐中迷了路，所以才都没能全身而退吧。
That's my conclusion from my long-term observations. As for those lost Guards... maybe they were chasing these little creatures and couldn't find their way back.
不用道歉，谨慎一点是好事。
Don't be sorry. It pays to be careful.
总之，危机解除——我们可以好好准备露营餐了……
Anyway, crisis resolved! We can now make some food...
…咦？那个小家伙好像掉了什么东西？
...Huh? Our little buddy seems to have dropped something.
呼…这样就算是把它赶走了——虽然不知道去了哪里，但一时半会大概不会出现了吧。
Phew... Hopefully it won't be coming back any time soon.
这次也莫名其妙地消失了……
应该只是利用了裂界的某种性质吧。你很在意它去哪里了吗？
It must have used some Fragmentum loophole to escape. Do you really want to take after it, Lynxy?
没，只是有点好奇。它以前受到惊吓时，好像也是通过这种奇妙的方式消失不见的。
No, just a bit curious. But these guys do disappear in a flash when they get scared.
总之，危机解除——我们可以好好准备露营餐了……
Anyway, crisis resolved! We can now make some food...
…咦？那个小家伙好像掉了什么东西？
...Huh? Our little buddy seems to have dropped something.
太好了！玲宝，你快看——居然是地髓激活元件！没想到在这里找到了！
Awesome! Lynxy, look! It's a Geomarrow Activation Component! I never thought we'd find one here!
你呢玲宝，找到什么好东西了吗？
What about you, Lynxy? Did you find anything good?
…啊！没、没什么。好像只是一些古董……
能、能找到这个零件真是太好了！快让我们把炉子修好吧——
I—It's great we finally found the component! Let's go fix the stove!
嗯？玲宝…你是不是有什么话想说？
Huh? Lynxy... is something the matter?
…好吧，不逗你玩啦。你先休息一下，让我来看看这座炉子吧。
...Oh, uh... Why don't you take a break — I'll have a look at this stove.
…这莫非是什么魔法？！我怎么什么问题都看不出来……
What is this magic? I couldn't figure out the problem at all...
不是什么高深的技巧啦，我只是先前跟着希露瓦学了两手而已。
No magic here. Just a trick or two I learned from Serval.
Yep, that's her. What's the matter?
啊…没什么。只是，偶尔…挺羡慕姐姐的，毕竟她什么都会……
Ah... nothing. Just... sometimes I'm a bit jealous of Serval, you know? She knows everything...
你想，极地探险专家和机械专家不都是专家嘛。在我看来，你和希露瓦一样厉害哦。
I'm serious! Outdoor explorer, mechanic — they're both experts in their field, right? I think you two are awesome.
而且，玲宝想从她那里学点什么的话应该不难吧？她肯定很乐意教你——毕竟你是她亲妹妹嘛。
Anyway, it wouldn't be hard for you to get her to teach you something. You're her sister, she'd be happy to teach you.
…先不聊这个啦。天色不早了，我们开始做饭吧。
...Never mind. It's getting late. Let's cook something.
好！我最期待的环节终于——啊，不是，我最期待的当然还是看极光啦！
Yay! That's my favorite part... Wait, no, my favorite part is watching the aurora!
总之，我们先清点下食材吧。
Anyways, let's take a look at what ingredients we have.
（根据经验，每种食材都有自己独特的功效，组合在一起更会有意想不到的功效出现……）
(Every ingredient has its own effect, and combining them will create unexpected results...)
（究竟会产生怎样的效果呢？随意试试吧。）
(What kind of effects are they gonna make? Let's just give it a try.)
啊…是七百年前的生鱼片。
就不用再强调一遍七百年了吧……
You don't have to emphasize the "<unbreak>700</unbreak> years" part, y'know...
年份越长越稀有嘛。而且还是佩拉你特地钻进废墟里找到的……
The older, the rarer! Plus, you had to enter that ruin for it — even more special...
…这个也不用再特地强调一遍啦！
You don't have to emphasize that either!
那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——嘿嘿，让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
Then let's just say it'll be tonight's main course, haha. Time to show you my culinary skills!
那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...
哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
It's no problem! Leave it to me.
锵锵——霜纹鲑面包做好了！
Ta-da. Frostweave Salmon Bread is ready!
Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!
从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...
啊…是可爱的拟态雪蛞蝓。
Are we really going to eat that...?
别害怕，虽然看上去不怎么美味——但只要尝试过一次，你肯定会爱上这种食物的。
Don't worry. It may not look tasty, but I guarantee you'll fall in love with it on the first bite.
说到底，它根本不是食物吧……
I still don't believe this is supposed to be food...
那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——嘿嘿，让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
Then let's just say it'll be tonight's main course, haha. Time to show you my culinary skills!
那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...
哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
It's no problem! Leave it to me.
锵锵——岩烧山珍串做好了！
Ta-da. The Stone-Roasted Meat Skewer is ready!
Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!
从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...
啊…是七百年前的生鱼片，还有可爱的拟态雪蛞蝓。
Ah... raw fish from <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago and some cute mimic snow slug.
感觉…好像都不太适合放进嘴里啊。
I don't think... either is edible...
没关系，做成火锅就没问题了。只要加入奶油和饼干碎，再加入我准备好的鲱鱼罐头……
Don't worry. We'll make them into a hotpot. Just add cream, biscuit crumbs, and the canned sardines I brought...
鲱鱼罐头也要加进去吗？！
You're putting canned sardines into a hotpot!? Please don't say that...
那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——就让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
Well then, this will be the main course for tonight — I'll show you what I can do as a chef!
那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...
哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
Come on, it's fine. Just leave it to me.
锵锵——超级美味的雪原大乱炖做好啦！
Ta-da! The super delicious Snow Plains Combo Stew is ready!
Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!
从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...
吃得好饱…现在，我们只要等极光出来就好了吧？
I'm so full... guess now we just wait for the light show.
应该再过不久就会出来了。在那之前…就聊聊天吧。
The aurora should start soon. Before that... let's just chat.
佩拉…为什么忽然想一起来露营？
Pela... Why did you suddenly want to come camping?
你以前不是说过嘛——「平时太忙了，休息时间只想瘫在床上」……
Well, aren't you always saying how you just wanna lie in bed when you get off work?
啊！我是不是给你添麻烦了？对不起……
Ah! Sorry, I hope this trip didn't surprise you...
哪有什么添麻烦一说。虽然我确实不喜欢和人打交道，但这毕竟是和好朋友一起露营嘛。
No, no! I mean, sure, I'm not the most sociable of people, but I love camping with a good friend.
我很开心。一点都不麻烦。
I had a great time — it's been a lot of fun.
你老是这样——这次露营也是。从开始到现在，你就一直在揽活。
You're always like this. Even on this camping trip, you keep trying to do things.
真的没这个必要啊，交给我就好了嘛。露营就是要放松，不用老是紧绷绷的。
You really don't need to, just leave it to me. Camping is about relaxing — no need to be so tense.
但是——我觉得这次露营还是很开心的！毕竟终于能试着做自己想做的事了……
It's just, I was really getting into the camping! I felt like I finally got around to doing the things I always wanted to...
给《奇谭》画的那些漫画不算吗？
So all those comics you drew for the Tales series didn't count?
嗯。毕竟还得藏着掖着，总觉得不自在。
Uhh... I have to hide those from other people. I get a little embarrassed.
你太在意别人的看法了。
You care about other people's opinions too much.
也许吧。要是我也能像你一样就好了。
I suppose. I wish I could be more like you...
我啊…也没什么好羡慕的。
I... I'm not as cool as you think.
我只是有点受不了哥哥姐姐…受不了他们总把我当成小孩子。
I don't know how to handle my brother and sister... They keep treating me as a kid.
他们两个都是很厉害，很优秀的人…但也正是因为这样，和他们相处的时候我总会感到压力……
They're both really capable and awesome people... Which is why I feel really pressured when I'm with them...
我明明已经长大了…已经有足够的能力去做自己想做的事了……
I'm already a grown-up... I have the capacity to do what I want to do...
为什么他们就是不能停止操心，让我放手去做呢？
Why can't they just stop worrying and let me do what I want?
…啊，对不起，不该说这个的。我有点太激动了。
...Ah, sorry. I shouldn't talk about this. I was getting carried away.
没事没事，反正我连她的样子都没见过……
It's okay... It's not like I even know what she looked like...
极光啊…什么时候才会出现呢？
玲可，当心——有怪物靠近了！
*gasp* Careful, Lynx — there are monsters coming!
不管怎么样…先专注于战斗吧。
Let's focus on the fight first.
没想到裂界怪物会突然出现……
These Fragmentum monsters are coming out of thin air...
大概是被我们的炉光吸引来的吧。星核危机明明都已经解除了，怪物怎么还是到处都是啊……
They were probably attracted by the stove. The Stellaron crisis is over, why are there still so many monsters?
裂界影响的消除需要时间。
It takes time for the Fragmentum's influence to fade.
With me around, there's no need to worry!
等等，不对——你为什么会在这里啊？！
Wait — where did you come from all of a sudden!?
呃…{M#他}{F#她}就是那个拯救了贝洛伯格的大英雄{NICKNAME}。
Um... This is the trailblazer — the savior of Belobog.
原来如此。谢谢你，不光拯救了贝洛伯格，这次还救了我们两个。
I see. Well, in that case, thanks for saving us — not to mention Belobog.
不过，其实我也想问…大英雄为什么会出现在这里？
So, what's a big hero like you doing out here?
你的哥哥姐姐派我来的。
算了…我已经能猜到个大概了。是哥哥姐姐找你来保护我们的吧？
Never mind... I can take a guess. Serval and Gepard sent you to protect us, right?
…他们总是这样。做那两个人的妹妹，想拥有点私人空间真的很难。
They're always like this. It's impossible to get some private time as their younger sister.
我也觉得他们的做法不好。
I didn't exactly see eye to eye with them...
那你就更不应该出现在这里了啊……
Then why did you still come here...
等一下，这不是我刚才的台词吗？
Hold on, isn't that what I just said?
原来你小时候是这个样子啊？
You were like this when you were little?
现在不是问这个的时候吧……
This probably isn't the best time to bring that up...
好啦好啦。说到底还是因为哥哥姐姐太爱操心，况且{NICKNAME}也救了我们……
Alright, alright. It's all because Serval and Gepard are worrywarts. Besides, you did save us...
既然你跟了我们一路，想必也知道我们来这里露营是为了什么——
Since you followed us all the way here, you probably know why we're out camping today...
留下来，我们一起看极光吧。
Stay and watch the aurora with us.
应该快要到极光出现的时间了……
It's about time for it to appear...
星核事件之后…这应该是规模最大的一次极光了。
This is the largest aurora since the Stellaron crisis passed.
We're really lucky to see it.
真好呀，吃了玲宝做的饭，还看到了极光…这次雪原之行，圆满结束啦——！
So awesome... I got to taste Lynxy's cooking and see the aurora... This Snow Plains adventure was the best!
咳…也没有很开心啦，真的。
Ahem! I—I'm not THAT happy. I, wh—what I mean is, uh...
放心吧，不会的。我能感受到佩拉真实的心情。
It's okay. I won't be sad. I understand what Pela really feels.
和我一起露营，你不满意？
You weren't just here for the camping?
本来我是想承认的…现在突然没有那种欲望了。
I was going to say that... but now I suddenly don't want to.
我能感受到佩拉真实的心情，你没必要藏啦。
I understand what Pela really feels. You don't need to hide it.
好吧好吧…确实是一次开心的经历。多亏了玲宝…还有你，{NICKNAME}。
*sigh* It was a great experience... thanks to you Lynxy... not to mention you, {NICKNAME}.
那，接下来怎么说——就这么解散吗？还是说，晚上要不要再约个夜宵？
Anyway, what now? Back home? Wanna go out for a midnight snack later?
好啊。听说行政区南边新开了家不错的肉排馆，正好我们一起去试试看吧。
We can! I heard a pretty good steak place opened up in the south of the Administrative District. We can go try it out together.
听着不错～那就这么定了。现在暂时解散，夜里再见咯。
Sounds good! That's settled then. Let's part ways for now and rendezvous later tonight.
修好炉具之前，我在地上找到的——我猜，大概是那个圆滚滚的裂界生物留下的。
I found this on the ground before you fixed the stove. I guess that Fragmentum creature dropped it.
我觉得…你还是亲自确认一下比较好。
I think... it might be best if you check it out yourself.
那…我们晚些时候就在这里会合吧，我先失陪了。
...Let's meet up here later tonight... I better get going.
（去机械屋找朗道姐弟聊聊吧……）
(I should go talk to Gepard and Serval at the workshop...)
玲可好不容易回来一趟…怎么还是不愿意见见我们呢。
Between expeditions, it's always a challenge to make time with Lynx... but why doesn't she want to talk to us?
嗐，别急。这不是还有{NICKNAME}帮忙嘛。
Calm down. We've got {NICKNAME} to help us.
哟，{NICKNAME}，我和老弟刚刚才聊到你呢。
Hey, {NICKNAME}! We were just talking about you.
玲可的那件事…怎么样了？
向朗道姐弟汇报了雪原中的见闻……
Tells the Landaus everything that happened in the Snow Plains...
原来那个「陌生人」就是佩拉啊……
该怎么说呢…这倒确实是玲宝的风格。
What can I say... Sounds like a Lynxy expedition alright.
You're not gonna get angry at her, right?
怎么会呢——只要玲宝她能保护好自己，不管做什么，我都支持！
No way. As long as Lynxy can protect herself, I'll be supportive in all her ventures!
姐姐这次说得倒没错…这是玲可自己的选择，我们不会对她生气的。
Serval is right this time... This was Lynx's own choice. We won't be upset with her.
只是，雪原探险这种事，多少还是有点危险……
But... exploring the Snow Plains is still quite dangerous...
好啦好啦，别这么紧张。她肯定能照顾好自己的。
Alright, alright, calm down. She'll be able to look after herself.
不管怎么说，这次多亏有{NICKNAME}你在——不然，老弟怕是要担心得觉都睡不好了。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}, for being around for this. Gepard was too anxious to sleep.
至于之后该怎么和玲宝沟通…我们俩还得再考虑考虑。
As for how we'll communicate with Lynxy in the future... We'll have to have a good think about it.
你这次真的是帮了我们大忙啊——谢谢你啦，{NICKNAME}！
You really helped us a lot this time. Thank you so much, {NICKNAME}!
那我们一起等等佩拉吧——她就在整理间里面。
Then let's wait for Pela together. She's in the storage room.
嗯，只是回去放了行李，顺便冲了个澡。花不了多久。
Mm-hmm. I went back, stored my supplies, and had a shower. It didn't take long.
我们一起等等佩拉吧——她就在整理间里面。
Let's wait for Pela together. She's in the storage room.
她在整理间里面——我们一起等等她吧。
She's in the storage room. Let's wait for her.
我觉得，她应该是在检查那枚软盘的内容…让她一个人静静吧。
I think she's looking over the contents of that floppy disk... Let's give her some time.
我也不清楚具体内容。但……
I don't know the exact details, but...
So, she might be a while...?
我猜，你应该不知道佩拉母亲的事吧？
I'm guessing you don't know about Pela's mother, right?
佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜——十六年前意外罹难的、贝洛伯格最优秀的极地探险家。
Penya Sergeyevna was Belobog's greatest outdoor explorer — passed away sixteen years ago.
这个名字听起来很熟悉。
嗯…毕竟是贝洛伯格的名人，你可能在哪也听别人提起过吧。
She's famous in Belobog. You might have heard other people mention her in passing.
嗯，她一般不会主动对别人说这些。
Mm, she doesn't usually talk about it.
就这么告诉我了，没问题吗？
You sure it's okay to tell me this?
我问过了…她说没问题。看来，她真的很信任你。
I asked her already... and she said it was fine. She seems like she really trusts you.
能看出来，她的性格如此。
…看来佩拉信任你是有理由的。
Looks like Pela was right in trusting you.
可可利亚竟然允许外出科考？
Cocolia allowed explorations outside of the city?
当时的极地探险队隶属于银鬃铁卫，所以是有官方许可的。
The exploration team belonged to the Silvermane Guards at the time, so they had authorization.
…还是言归正传吧。其实，十六年前还发生了一件大事……
*sigh* Anyway, something else happened sixteen years ago...
听说那时的佩妮娅女士不顾自己的身孕，坚持驻扎在雪原营地里。虽然不能上一线，但是还可以留在后方做些文书工作。
They say that despite her pregnancy, Madam Penya insisted on staying at the Snow Plains camp. She couldn't go to the front lines, but she was able to handle administrative duties.
然后，终于有一天…重要的时候到了。
Then, finally... the day of Pela's birth arrived.
不幸的是，那天发生了严重的意外…再加上探险队遇上了暴风雪，营地的人和外界断了联系…大家当时都束手无策。

Tragically, there were complications... Other serious incidents occurred that day — the exploration team ran into a blizzard and the camp lost contact with the outside world... No one knew what to do.
唯一值得庆幸的…大概就是佩拉能够顺利诞生吧。
The only good thing... was that Pela was born healthy.
I never knew any of this...
So what about the floppy disk?
软盘——如果科考队的前辈们说的是真的……
The floppy disk... If the old research team members were telling the truth...
…那应该就是佩妮娅女士留下的遗物了。
...it was something Madam Penya left behind.
佩妮娅女士生前委托了同事，请他把自己的终端机和软盘带回贝洛伯格。据说，那里面存着她给佩拉留下的「宝物」。
Madam Penya asked a colleague to take her terminal and floppy disk back to Belobog — she said they contained a "treasure" for Pela.
她说，等到佩拉成年，自然就能够读懂其中的内容了。
She said that once Pela was older, she'd be able to understand the contents.
然而，那位受佩妮娅女士委托的同事，在返程途中遭到了裂界生物袭击。
But that colleague was attacked by Fragmentum creatures on his way back to the city.
慌乱中，软盘不知道被落在了哪里…到最后，他只保住了那台终端机。
During the attack, he dropped the floppy disk in confusion, only managing to bring back the terminal.
至于具体内容，除了佩妮娅女士本人，谁都没有读到过。他们只说她给佩拉留下了好多好多封信——
Apart from Madam Penya, nobody knew what the floppy disk contained... but they say she left Pela many letters.
从她感知到佩拉时起，一直到分娩那天……
From the moment she knew she was pregnant, to the day of Pela's birth...
{NICKNAME}, there's somewhere I want to go — will you come too?
嗯？你的眼睛怎么这么红？发生什么事了？
Uh, what's with the red eyes? Did something happen?
…你怎么还是像块木头一样啊，老弟！
雪原里一定发生了不少事吧——辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。
Seems like a lot went down in the Snow Plains. Thanks again for your help, {NICKNAME}.
接下来…让我们稍微独处一会儿吧，谢谢你啦。
I think we need a little private time. See you soon.
(I should give them some time together...)
对不起…以前是我太任性了……
I'm sorry... for always being so stubborn...
没关系，我和杰帕德都理解的…对吧，老弟？
That's okay. Gepard and I understand... right, Gepard?
但是，我还是想说，玲可…我觉得你一个人去城外太危险了……
But I have to say, Lynx... I think it's too dangerous for you to leave the city on your own...
…哎呀，行了行了，你还是别说了！
(It's probably best to stick close to the camp...)
小心，玲可——它要发动进攻了！
Careful, Lynx — It's going to attack!
咱们到了，这里就是铆钉镇…唉，熟悉的景色……
We're here. This is Rivet Town... *sigh* Everything looks familiar...
走吧，当心点脚下。我很久没回来过了，里头怕是有不少怪物。
Let's go, and watch your step. I haven't been here in a long time. There are probably some monsters around.
这里什么也看不到…找个高点的地方观望一下吧。
We can't see anything here... Let's find higher ground to get a better view.
那边，远处山坡上的那幢房子，就是娜塔莎以前的孤儿院。
Way over there, see that house on the hill? That's Natasha's old orphanage.
奥列格大叔捡到我以后，就把我送到了那里。我童年的一大半时间都是在孤儿院里过的。
After Oleg found me, he sent me there. I spent over half my childhood in that place.
That must be a time of plenty.
听娜塔莎说，那座房子是从前某位富商捐赠的。不管他是干什么的，肯定是个大好人。
Natasha said that the house was donated by some rich businessman. Whatever his business may have been, he must have been a good person.
小时候那段无忧无虑的日子，现在想想还真怀念啊……
Oh, I miss those carefree days as a kid...
你怎么不说话了？哑巴了吗？
不，我只是…觉得有点熟悉，没事。
No, it's just... this place seems familiar somehow. Never mind.
你们往下看，看到那些杂乱的摊位了吗？那是铆钉镇的集市广场，娜塔莎想要的物资估计就堆放在那儿。
Look down there. See the mess that remains of those old stalls? That's Rivet Town's market. The supplies Natasha wants are probably there.
Let's keep moving. Watch out for monsters.
这些家伙可不是流浪者，它们不会——
These aren't like vagrants. They won't—
你不用把我当新手，我很熟悉裂界里的怪物。准备好了就动手吧！
Don't treat me like a new recruit. I'm all too familiar with the monsters of the Fragmentum. Let's get ready to fight!
喏，镇上口碑最好的一家。娜塔会带表现好的孩子来改善伙食。
Heh, the most famous restaurant in town. Natasha would bring the kids who behaved well here for a special meal.
So did she ever bring you?
我像那种乖小孩吗？当然没有。
Do I seem like I was a goody two-shoes? Of course not.
这里的设备好像维护得不错，不像被遗弃很久的样子。
The facilities here seem to be in pretty good shape, not like those of a place that has been abandoned for years.
被你这么一说，好像确实有点…难道这镇子还有人住？不可能啊……
Now that you mention it, it does seem a little... Could people still be living here? Impossible...
那边堆了好多货箱，可能有我们想找的东西。
There's a bunch of crates piled over there. Maybe we can find what we're looking for.
小心周围的怪物。有必要的话，先把这片区域清理干净再说。
Watch out for monsters. They like to hide. If you need to, clear the area before you dig for the supplies.
该死，怎么全是空的？怪物还会翻箱子吗？
Darn, how could they all be empty? Now even the monsters are gathering supplies?
裂界生物不需要人类的物资，它们抢东西也不会这么…有礼貌。
The monsters of the Fragmentum don't need any materials we humans use. And if they did take anything, this place would look much messier...
你的意思是，有人抢先我们一步？
You mean that someone else got here and took everything before us?
只是猜测——瞧，这边的地上还有踩踏的痕迹。
It's just a guess, but there are also some footprints on the ground here.
泥土的味道还很新鲜，对方应该没离开太久。
*sniff* The scent of dirt is still fresh. They can't have come too long before us.
走，就算把这片市集翻个底朝天，也得把东西找出来。
Let's go then. We need to find something, even if we have to search every corner of this market.
喂，小鬼！你怎么一个人跑到这儿来了，不知道这地方有多危险吗？
Hey, brat! How could you come here by yourself. Don't you know how dangerous this place is?
希、希儿？你、你管得着我吗！我、我想去哪就去哪，跟你们没关系！
S—Seele? Y—You aren't the boss of me! I—I can go wherever I want, it's none of your beeswax!
你把物资都藏到这儿了？挺能干呀。
You took the materials and hid them all here? Not bad, kid.
不过，要是我们没解决游荡的怪物，你打算怎么办啊？一直躲在这个角落里发抖吗？
But if we didn't take care of those monsters, what were you planning to do? Just stay here, shaking in your boots?
还是这么嘴硬，那你倒是说说，你打算怎么当着怪物的面带走几大捆钢板啊？
Still stubborn, huh? Then tell me, how exactly were you gonna get those big metal plates out of here past those monsters?
谁、谁要你们多管闲事啊？我本来马上就能逃走了，根本用不着大人帮忙！
Wh—Who asked you to do anything? I was just about to escape, I didn't need your help at all!
别为难他了，他只是个孩子…
That's enough. He's just a kid...
你别被他唬了，这小鬼是出了名的毛贼。没记错的话，你这衣服也是从其他孩子那儿偷来的吧？
Don't let him fool you. Everyone in the Underworld knows that this brat is a no-good thief. If I remember correctly, even the clothes you're wearing came off another kid's back?
能分我们些物资吗？救人用。
Can you share the materials? They're to help injured people.
你不用跟他客气，这小鬼是出了名的毛贼。没记错的话，你这衣服也是从其他孩子那儿偷来的吧？
Don't be so polite to him. Everyone in the Underworld knows this brat is a no-good thief. If I remember correctly, even the clothes you're wearing came off another kid's back?
说真的，你要钢板跟纱布有什么用？我们可是要拿它们救人的。
Tell us, what do you even want metal plates and gauze bandages for? We need them to save people.
…我没听错吧？你居然还想谈条件？
...Are you kidding me? You want to negotiate?
I... don't have any money with me.
我也…我出任务的时候都不带钱包的。
Me neither... I never bring my coin purse with me on a mission.
两百而已…可惜我出任务的时候没带着钱包。
It's just <unbreak>200</unbreak>... but I never bring my coin purse with me on a mission.
...Not much, but I didn't bring my coin purse.
你还真打算给他钱啊？都跟你说了，这是他的惯用伎俩——
You're actually planning to give this little crook money? I'm telling you. This is his same old trick—
才、才不是，这回不一样！我需要钱，因为老爹他……
No! ...Not this time. I really need money... my daddy...
又把你老爹搬出来当挡箭牌…要是让他知道你总这么干，准没你好果子吃。
Pretending to use your dad again as an excuse... If he knew about this, you'd be in big trouble.
埃里克，对吧？这个给你，拿着。
It's Eric, right? Here, you can have this.
这是一枚奖章，筑城者授予我的…看见中间这块蓝色的石头了吗？那是纯度最高的地髓结晶。
This is a medal given to me by the Architects... See that blue stone in the middle? That's a Geomarrow crystal of the highest purity.
你是因为家人的原因才需要钱，对吧？拿着它，稍微有点见识的买家一眼就能看出它的价值。
You need money for your family, right? Take this and show it to a knowledgeable buyer, and they'll instantly know how valuable it is.
…但是你必须答应我一件事——以后再也不准偷别人的东西了，能做到吗？
But... you'll have to promise me one thing: You'll never steal other people's things again. Promise?
我、我知道了！我以后，绝对不会再偷东西了！
I—I promise! I'll never steal things again!
…那我们就一言为定。如果食言的话，我会亲自带铁卫来抓你喔。奖章收好，赶紧回镇上去吧，路上的障碍我们已经清理干净了。

...Then it's a deal. If you go back on your promise, I'm going to bring my Silvermane Guards with me and catch you myself! Here, take the medal and go back to the town. We already took care of any threat on the way. You'll be safe.
谢、谢谢你，不知道名字的姐姐！这些东西，你们都拿去吧！
Th—Thank you, whoever you are! You guys can take all of these things!
你们，你们也要小心！高处的房子那里，好像有很可怕的东西……
Y—You guys need to be careful, too! There seems to be something real scary in that house up on the hill...
对、对了！市集正面的路被堵住了…你们要接着往前的话，得从商店街绕路才行。
Oh, r—right! The road across from the market is blocked... If you wanna go further, you'll have to go to the shopping street.
Got it. Thanks for the tip.
这、这个…总、总会有办法的……
…那玩意，对你来说挺贵重的吧？
...That object was pretty important to you, right?
就这么送给埃里克…没关系吗？
Are you sure you're okay just giving it to Eric like that?
如果能让他彻底改过，付出这点代价算不了什么。
If it will make him change his ways, it's more than worth it.
哈，万一他还是没有悔改呢？
Hah, and what if he doesn't?
从小到大，母亲一直教我宽容，教我存护人们内心的善意…哪怕自身只是一缕微光，也要努力照亮他人。

From a young age, my mother taught me to be forgiving and to preserve the goodwill in people's hearts... Even if I am but a small glimmer of light in this world, I must try my best to shine brightly for others.
我得给他这个机会，希儿。因为别人给不了他。
I must give him a chance, Seele, because other people can't.
你说话可真难懂。咱们接着赶路吧。
I don't really get what you just said. Anyway, ahem, we should get moving.
埃里克说，继续前进的话得从商业街绕路。我还隐约有点印象…往这边走。
Eric said that we need to take the shopping street to go any further. I think I still remember where it is... this way.
就是这条路，我没记错。顺着它走下去，尽头就是孤儿院了。
This is the street alright. The orphanage should be at the end.
这些店铺和招牌…总觉得我以前见过。
These shops and signs... Why do I feel like I've seen them before?
从这里上去就到孤儿院的入口了。
The entrance to the orphanage is up this way.
不知道那里变成什么样了，说不定还能看到些熟悉的景象。
I wonder what the old place is like now. Maybe some things will still look familiar.
这些阶梯…感觉变窄了不少。
These stairs... they seem to have become more narrow.
就快到了！没想到这里保存得还算完整。
Almost there! I didn't expect this place to be so well preserved.
要是当时大家就能团结起来对抗裂界…说不定我们不用这么快就抛弃家园。
Y'know, if we could've worked together to push back the Fragmentum... maybe we wouldn't have had to take off and leave our homes behind.
这些箱子已经放在这儿好多年了吧？确定里面还有能用的物资吗……
These crates have been sitting here for many years, right? Even if they have materials in them, are you sure they are still usable...?
你该不会以为下层区的人还会在乎保质期吧？有得用就不错了。
Do you think undergrounders care about expiration dates? Even having any supplies is a miracle in itself.
怎么全是空的，到底是谁——
How are they all empty? Who could've—
我只在禁区前线见过这种怪物……
I've only seen this kind of monster before in the restricted zone...
哼，管你是谁——居然敢从背后偷袭，我可不会放过你！
Hmph, I don't care how big you are. You dare sneak up on us from behind. This is it for you, pal!
我们可是正义的三打一。
Well, it was three against one.
哼，我一个人也应付得来啊。不过…跟你们一块战斗确实很痛快就是了。
Nah, I could've taken it on by myself. But still... fighting alongside you two was pretty fun.
你一个人的话可就难了。
It wouldn't have been so easy on your own though.
哼，你瞧不起我？不过…跟你们一块战斗确实很痛快就是了。
Please, you don't think I could do it? But still... fighting alongside you two was pretty fun.
这下周围应该就清净了，我们接着到里面找找吧。
Should be all clear now. Let's poke around.
那边的角落里，我依稀记得有些存货。我们小时候经常在户外打闹，皮外伤是常有的事。
The kids at the orphanage were always getting into scraps when we played out here. If I remember it right, there ought to be some supplies for our cuts and bruises stored in that corner there.
但愿物资没被刚才那家伙毁掉。
I just hope the monster didn't get to them.
Huh? What are you talking about?
这幢建筑，还有这些小孩子的游艺设施…我见过。
This building, this playground equipment... I've seen it all before.
哈？少来，上下层封锁十来年，一个银鬃铁卫也没下来过，你这样的大小姐光临地底，那绝对是个大新闻。

What!? Come on, the overground and underground have been sealed off from each other for over ten years. It would've been news if a Silvermane Guard had come down here, let alone an Overworld princess.
…嗯，有这个可能性。也只有这样才能解释，为什么我的记忆这么模糊。
...Yes, it's a possibility. That would explain why my memory of it is so blurry.
走吧，我得再多看看周围才能确定……
Come on, I need to look around a bit more before I can be sure...
只剩这里没找了…但愿我没记错。
We've looked everywhere but here... I hope my memory is right.
It's... Ah! Yes, we found it!
太棒了，几乎完好无损！娜塔估计也想不到吧，她几年前存放的物资居然保存得这么好。
Great, and it's barely damaged! Nat wouldn't have expected her old supplies from years ago to have stayed in such good condition.
酒精这种东西还是检查下保质期吧，如果过期了就没什么效用了。
You should still check the expiration date for things like rubbing alcohol. If it's expired, it won't be effective.
说的也是，那我拿几瓶出来看看。
Hm, true. Let me check a few bottles.
This is... something from when I was a child.
Wh—When you were a child!? Are you sure...?
You came to this town as a child?
不是的，我现在记起来了……
Just a coincidence. Lots of kids probably have this toy.
这世界上没有那么巧的事。我现在记起来了……
There is no such coincidence in this world. I remember now...
Could it be, when you were a child...
我以前住在这里——就在筑城者将我带走，可可利亚大人收养我之前——我住在这里！我…是下层区的人。
I—I used to live here... B—Before the Architects took me away, before Madam Cocolia adopted me... I used to live here! I'm... an undergrounder.
你是…下层区人？不对，你说可可利亚——你是那个「大守护者」的养女？那——
You're... an undergrounder? Wait a minute... you're saying that Cocolia, the Supreme Guardian, adopted you? Then—
是的，我是筑城者指定的继承人。将来，我会成为领导贝洛伯格的「守护者」。
Yes. I'm the successor chosen by the Architects. In the future, I will become the guardian who leads Belobog.
为什么，为什么我到现在才想起来？小时候的记忆好模糊……
Why... Why didn't I remember this until now? My childhood memories are so blurry...
You were too little to remember clearly.
Cocolia must have done something to make you forget.
不，母亲不会那么对我的…绝对不会。
No, mother would never do that to me... there's no way she would.
筑城者们说过，对「守护者」继承人的挑选会在整个贝洛伯格范围内进行，过程短则几年，长则数十年。
The Architects said that the guardian's successor is selected from among all people in Belobog. The selection process can take anywhere from a few years to a few decades.
这段时间里，上下层区每个到了年纪的孩子都会接受测试，最终只有一个拥有「资格」的孩子会被选中。
During that time, all children of the appropriate age in both the Overworld and the Underworld will be tested. In the end, only one child deemed as "worthy" will be chosen.
我好像…就是在这里被选中，然后被带上地面的……
I... must have been chosen from among the children here and then taken to the surface...
孤儿院的孩子总是来来去去…真没想到，我们中居然出了个未来的大守护者！娜塔知道这事吗？难道她一直瞒着……

The kids at the orphanage are always coming and going... I never thought that there would've been a future Supreme Guardian among us! Does Nat know about this? Could she have been keeping it a secret...
…我不觉得她知道。守护者继承人的选拔是绝对的机密，被选中的孩子必须完全告别过去。
...I don't think she knows. The selection of the successor is done with utmost secrecy, and the child chosen must completely say goodbye to their past.
所以我才会成为可可利亚大人的女儿——除了下一任守护者，我没有别的身份。但我，我差得太远了……
And thus... I became the daughter of Madam Cocolia. My only identity is that of guardian successor, but I'm... not good enough...
我每天都目睹铁卫战士在裂界里牺牲，却始终下不定决心改变母亲大人的想法。
Every day I see Silvermane Guards sacrifice their lives in the Fragmentum, but I've never had the resolve to change mother's mind.
我明明知道下层区在受苦，却什么忙都帮不上。曾经的家园变成了这副模样，我却还完全被蒙在鼓里……
The Underworld has been struggling, but I never tried to help. I didn't even know that it was my own home that had fallen into such a dire state...
到头来，我什么都「守护」不了。这样的我为什么会被选中，我怎么能胜任……
In the end, I haven't been able to guard anything. How could they have thought I was worthy to be the successor...
干嘛？自我感动几句，以为我会同情你吗？你可以躲在宫殿里胡思乱想，上前线也不用拿自己的命去赌，可下层区的人呢？有上顿没下顿，能活着就算不错了！

What? You thought I should feel sorry for you after your little speech? You can hide in your palace while you fuss over your Overworld problems, and on the front line it's not even you who's putting their life in danger. But in the Underworld, what do we worry about? If we'll have food for our next meal or survive to the next week!
「哪怕自身只是半缕微光，也要照亮他人」——这是你自己说的吧。你不是想保护所有人吗？比起在这儿哭哭啼啼，你就没有更要紧的事做了吗？！

Even if I am but a small glimmer of light in this world, I must try my best to shine brightly for others. Didn't you say that? Well, if you really want to protect everyone, what are you standing here crying for? Get to it!
的确，自怜自艾解决不了任何问题。
You're right... You're right, self-pity doesn't help solve anything.
谢谢你，希儿。通常我陷进负面思绪的时候，旁边总是安抚的声音；从来没有一个人敢像你这样，直接把我敲醒。
Thank you, Seele. Usually when I feel sorry for myself, I am met with gentle consolation. Never has anyone dared to be tough and make me snap out of it.
哼，安抚我不会，打醒你要几次都行。
Hmph. I'm no good at consoling, but I can hit you on the head a few times. No problem.
…我一看就知道，你心里的包袱太重了。干嘛把自己逼到那种地步？
...I can tell that you have a big burden to carry. Why do you force yourself to?
…身为贝洛伯格未来的守护者，我必须随时审视自己的行为和思想。
...As the successor to the guardian of Belobog, I must always be vigilant of my behavior and thoughts.
是是是，大小姐～哼，未来的大守护者，居然和我出身同一个孤儿院…真是孽缘。
Yeah yeah, Lady Bronya~ Hmph, Miss Future Supreme Guardian comes from the same orphanage as me... Who thought it would be a good idea to put us together, huh?
要不要我带你在孤儿院周围转转？跟你不一样，小时候的事我可都记得一清二楚。
How about I show you around the orphanage a bit more? Unlike you, my memories from when I was little are crystal clear.
嗯，那我就稍微陪你走神一小会儿吧。
Okay, I'll indulge in old memories with you for a while.
（好像我来得不是时候，还是让那两个人独处一会儿吧……）
(I should let those two be alone for a bit...)
（要找的只剩下止痛剂了——在附近找找吧。）
(The only thing left to find is painkillers. I'll see if there's any nearby.)
找到啦，就在这里！谢谢你，帕金斯。
Oh! It's here, we found it! Thank you, Perkins!
保护克拉拉。开启主动防卫模式——
Protect Clara. Initiating active defense mode—
我见过这个人，{F#她}{M#他}…{F#她}{M#他}不是坏人，对吧？
I've seen this person before. {F#Sh—She's}{M#H—He's} not bad, right?
收到指令。威胁消除。主动防卫模式关闭。
Command received. Danger removed. Deactivating active defense mode.
这个地方很危险，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}快回去吧。
This place is dangerous. You should leave.
I'm looking for medicine to help the injured.
啊，克拉拉也是为了这些止痛剂来的。
Oh? I came here for these painkillers, too.
流浪者营地有很多受伤的人，矿队也一样吧？要是大家能和平共处就好了……
There are a lot of people hurt at the vagrant camp, I guess the miners are no different? *sigh* If everyone could just get along, things would be easier...
Shouldn't you be the one leaving, missy?
克拉拉有帕金斯陪着，不会有事的。我收拾好这批止痛剂就会走啦。
Perkins is protecting me. I'll be alright. I'm going to leave after I gather up these painkillers.
…啊，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}也是为了这些物资而来的吗？
...Uh, is that what you're here for too?
也对，矿队那边肯定也有不少受伤的人吧？要是大家都能和平共处就好了……
That would make sense. I'm sure a lot of miners are injured, right? *sigh* If everyone could just get along, things would be easier...
给，这些药给你，希望有用……
Mm... Here you are. I hope the medicine is of help to you...
你和史瓦罗是什么关系？
史瓦罗先生他…他是克拉拉的家人。我很小的时候就遇到了史瓦罗先生，是他把我带在身边养大，让我成为了他的家人。
Mr. Svarog, he... he's my family. I met Mr. Svarog when I was real little. He took me in and took care of me.
之前在大矿区的事，真是对不起…史瓦罗先生不信任除了克拉拉以外的人类，尤其是「地火」的各位。
I'm really sorry about what happened back in the Great Mine... Mr. Svarog doesn't trust any humans besides me, especially everyone from Wildfire.
史瓦罗为什么要攻击我们？
史瓦罗先生没有伤害大家的意思，他只是相信自己的计算结果…他觉得和人们交涉的效率总是很低。
Mr. Svarog doesn't want to hurt people, but he always follows the calculations of his analysis. He thinks that interaction with humans is... inefficient.
史瓦罗为什么要介入矿区事件？
Why did Svarog want to get involved in the incident in the mines?
因为他听说了有矿工和流浪者们发生了大规模的争斗…他的本意是想阻止大家为了矿脉流血。
He heard that the miners and vagrants had begun to engage in a large-scale conflict... He wanted to stop everyone from getting hurt fighting over the mines.
「地火」的大家，想要带人们离开下层…但是史瓦罗先生希望大家留在这里。因为在他的计算里，地上已经不再安全了。
Wildfire wants everyone to leave the underground... But Mr. Svarog wants everyone to stay here. According to his calculations, the overground is already unsafe.
至少在史瓦罗先生的计算里，是这样没错……
Yes, at least according to Mr. Svarog's calculations...
There must be some error in his system.
不，不是那样的…史瓦罗先生很健康，他的系统一直都有在维护。
No, there can't be... Mr. Svarog is healthy, his system is always being maintained.
所以他才守着大柱子，不让人离开？
So he stands guard at the huge pillar stopping people from leaving?
Yes... Mr. Svarog is very stubborn.
史瓦罗先生说他的职责是「存护」。为此，他必须作出能够保存人类的决定。
He says that his responsibility is "preservation." To do that, he must make decisions that best protect humanity.
裂界迟早会把地底全部吞掉。
The Fragmentum will swallow up all of the underground sooner or later.
他怎么和大守护者一个德性。
Sounds a lot like the Supreme Guardian.
我知道「地火」的大家都很想和史瓦罗先生谈谈…但不管来多少次，史瓦罗先生的态度都不会转变的……
I know that Wildfire wants to talk to Mr. Svarog... But no matter how many times you talk to him, Mr. Svarog won't change his mind...
所以，请相信克拉拉！克拉拉会尽力去说服史瓦罗先生。迟早有一天，他能听进去我的话……
So, please trust me! I'll try to persuade Mr. Svarog. Hopefully, one day he will finally listen...
你是…「地火」的希儿姐姐？我来这里是为了……
You're... Miss Seele from Wildfire? I came here to...
你和克拉拉将刚才交谈的内容转告给了希儿和布洛妮娅。
You and Clara tell Seele and Bronya what you just discussed...
…你为什么要帮流浪者找药？他们不是本事很大吗，怎么好意思让一个小姑娘跑东跑西？
...Why are you helping the vagrants look for medicine? If they're so great, how could they make a little girl go around running errands for them?
不、不是这样的，克拉拉没有受人委托…只是，流浪者们的生存条件很差，他们的聚落里也没有诊所，所以克拉拉才想来帮帮他们。
N—No, it's not like that. I wasn't made to do anything... It's just that, the living conditions for the vagrants aren't great. There's not even a clinic in their camp. So, I wanted to help them out.
而且，其实他们不都是坏人…大家都只想好好地活下去。
Also, not all of them are bad people... everyone just wants to survive.
希儿姐姐，这批药原来是娜塔莎姐姐的吗？那…可以给我一些吗？流浪者们也伤得很重。
Miss Seele, did this medicine belong to Miss Natasha? Then... can you give me some? The vagrants' injuries are quite serious.
我知道了，那这些止痛剂，咱们就平分了吧。
*sigh* I see. Let's split these painkillers then.
真、真的可以吗？不用问娜塔莎姐姐的意思？
R—Really? We don't need to ask Miss Natasha first?
我了解娜塔，她不会介意的。虽说这样会让我俩的善后工作翻倍…不过她肯定能理解，一向都是这么过来的。
If I know Nat, she won't mind. Although this will make it more difficult for us... she'll understand. She always does.
那真是太好了，谢谢希儿姐姐……
要走了吗？这旧镇太危险了，我们送你一段吧。
Are you leaving? This old town is too dangerous. We'll accompany you part of the way.
没、没关系的，克拉拉还有帕金斯陪，而且…我在这里还有些东西要找。
I—It's fine, I have Perkins for company. And... I have some more things I need to look for here first.
我知道了，那你一定要小心。
钢板和纱布…医用酒精…止痛剂。好，这样就齐活了。
Metal plates and bandages... rubbing alcohol... painkillers. Great, that's everything.
快走吧，我预估的时间应该还赶得上。回磐岩镇找娜塔莎交差吧。
Let's go report to Natasha in Boulder Town, it won't take long to get back.
我们到了！居然已经隔了这么久了啊…这里倒是一点都没变。
...We made it! It's been so long... but this place hasn't changed one bit.
前面好像堆了很多杂物，过去看看有没有娜塔需要的酒精吧。
Oh! It looks like there's a lot of stuff piled outside. Let's go see if there's any rubbing alcohol for Nat.
喂，你别到处乱跑！先在孤儿院这边找找吧。
Hey, where are you going!? Let's look around the orphanage first.
我找到了这个，你拿着吧。
I found this. Here, take it.
娜塔莎经常教我们做手工，这应该就是某个孩子的杰作了。
Natasha would often teach us how to make different handicrafts. This must be some kid's masterpiece.
And why give it to me?
你不是把那什么奖章送给埃里克了吗？这玩意没那么值钱，但好歹算个替代。
You gave your medal to that kid Eric. This thing might not be as valuable, but it's at least a replacement of sorts.
但这是别人辛辛苦苦做出来的吧？这样随便拿走的话……
But didn't someone work hard to make this? I can't just take it from here...
…你可真死板，叫你收下就收下呗。
...You sure are prissy, huh? Just take it.
这上面是什么，小孩子的玩具吗？
What's up here? Some kind of toy?
是啊。你选一个吧，红的还是蓝的？
Yep. You pick, red or blue?
哈！你看，这都十几年了，这上面的牙印居然还在。
Ha! Look at this. After over ten years, the teeth marks are still here.
我记起来了！当时有个大孩子想跟我抢玩具，我拗不过他，所以干脆就把它紧紧咬住……
Alright, well... this one time, a big kid was trying to steal this toy from me. I couldn't outwrestle him for it, so I just bit down hard and hung on for dear life.
这秋千上全是灰…喂，别坐，太脏了！
This swing is covered in dust... Hey, don't sit on it! It's filthy!
真让人怀念啊…还记得我有一次荡得太高，把旁边所有人都吓出一身汗。
Ah, it sure brings back memories... I still remember one time I swung super high, and everyone was scared I would fly off.
...Who knew swinging could be so intense?
我当时一门心思想飞上天去，把自己荡到上层区看看。
At the time, I wanted to swing myself into the sky and fly up to the Overworld.
太危险了…你能活到现在真是个奇迹。
So dangerous... You're lucky to have lived till now.
{NICKNAME}，你怎么才到？虎克都在这里等了好久了！
{NICKNAME}, what took you so long? Hook's been waiting here for ages!
Sorry to have kept you waiting.
…其实也没有等那么久啦，你人到了就行！
...Well, it wasn't actually that long. As long as you're here now, it's fine!
我可是一刻不停地赶过来的。
But I didn't take a single break on my way over.
…你说是就是吧。不过没关系，人到了就行！
...Okay, whatever you say. As long as you're here now, it's fine!
虎克有一个好消息，还有一个坏消息——你想先听哪个？
I got some good news and some bad news. Which do you wanna hear first?
虎克把计划告诉了鼹鼠党的其他小伙伴，结果尤利安让我也帮他带个宝贝回去。要是不帮他的话，他就要把咱们的计划抖给老巫婆！
I told the rest of The Moles about the plan, and Julian asked me to get some treasure for him. If we don't help him, he'll tell the old witch where we've gone!
好消息是，他愿意资助我们的冒险。你看，这把花园铲就是他给我的！
The good news is that he's willing to contribute to our adventure. Look, he gave me this gardening shovel!
尤利安打算资助我们的冒险，你看，这把花园铲就是他给我的！
Julian is willing to contribute to our adventure. Look, he gave me this gardening shovel!
坏消息嘛，就是他要我们也帮他找一件宝贝…否则他就去找老巫婆告状！
The bad news is that he asked us to help him get some treasure... Otherwise, he'll tell the old witch about our plan!
放肆，他敢威胁鼹鼠党的首领？
How dare he threaten the boss of The Moles!
算了算了，反正尤利安也帮过虎克不少忙！这次就当还他的人情吧。
Well, Julian has been a huge help to me! Consider this returning the favor.
Are you really that scared of Natasha?
胡、胡说什么！漆黑的虎克大人谁都不怕！
Hehehehe her...? No, what? N—Nonsense, no! Nobody scares Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!
宝贝可不会长出腿自己来找我们！快点，咱们出发吧！
Well, the treasure won't grow legs and find us, will it! Come on, let's go!
尤利安的老爹老妈以前就是在这附近做生意的。我们离开镇子的时候，他家有很多东西都没来得及带走。
Julian's parents used to own a business in this area. When we were all forced to leave the town, there were lots of things they didn't have time to take with them.
他的宝贝应该不会太难找吧！那边，我们去翻翻看！
...It shouldn't be too hard to locate his treasure! Let's start by looking over there!
啊，找到尤利安要的宝贝了！不是那串钥匙，是这些玻璃珠。你看，这有好多种颜色呀！想集齐这一整套可不容易嗷。
Ah, we found Julian's treasure! No, not the key — these glass marbles. Look at all the different colors! I bet it wasn't easy collecting all these.
What are these marbles used for?
啊？你怎么连这都不知道，难道你没玩过打弹珠游戏嘛？
What? Hee-hee, you don't know? Have you never played marbles before!?
话说回来，这把钥匙是拿来开什么的呀？说不定尤利安知道点啥……
By the way, what does this key open? Maybe Julian knows...
I thought the key was the treasure...
不是哦，这些弹珠才是他要找的东西。
No, these marbles are what he's after.
不过虎克也好好奇呀…这把钥匙是拿来开什么的呢？回去以后再问问尤利安吧。
But I'm also curious... What does this key open? Let's ask Julian when we get back.
你那是什么表情呀！虎克知道了，你觉得这罐玻璃珠根本不值钱，对不对？
What's that look on your face? Oh, I get it. You don't think this jar of glass marbles is worth anything, right?
It doesn't look like anything special.
That's not what I was thinking...
哼，别装啦！你的表情已经把你出卖啦！
Hmph, don't even try to pretend otherwise! The look on your face sold you out!
告诉你吧，这罐玻璃珠对鼹鼠党来说，可是有非常重大的意义哦。
Let me tell you something, this jar of marbles means a lot to The Moles.
就是靠着它，尤利安帮鼹鼠党解决了超超超大危机，坐到了二把手的位置！
Julian used it to help The Moles overcome a super-huge crisis, for which he was promoted to second-in-command!
他用弹珠打败了裂界怪物?
He defeated Fragmentum monsters with marbles?
当然不是，但功绩也不次于那个哦！
Of course it wasn't that. But his accomplishments are nothing to be scoffed at!
是威胁到鼹鼠党尊严的大危机哦！
It was a super-huge crisis that jeopardized The Moles' honor!
从前，孤儿院的小孩子跟镇上的小孩子可是死对头！那些家伙仗着有爸妈给的零花钱，经常来欺负我们。
In the past, the kids in town were archrivals to us at the orphanage! Those kids used to bully us, relying on the pocket money that their parents gave 'em.
有一次，他们给鼹鼠党发来了挑战书，说是要和我们进行打弹珠比赛！
One time, they sent us a formal declaration of war — challenging The Moles to a marbles competition!
其实大家都知道，我们的实力相差有多大！孤儿院的大家都只有在路边捡到的玻璃珠，根本比不上那些有钱孩子的弹珠！
We were all well aware that we didn't stand a chance! We at the orphanage only had some old glass marbles we scavenged from the side of the road, which were no match for those rich kids' marbles!
不过就算这样，尤利安还是决定勇敢应战——而且还赢了一大堆五颜六色的玻璃珠回来，真是太神气啦！
Nonetheless, Julian bravely accepted the challenge... and triumphantly returned with a pile of colorful glass marbles he won! It was incredible!
难怪这些弹珠对他那么重要。
It's no wonder he values these marbles so much.
可不是嘛，这下你懂了吧，为什么他要拜托我们来找这件宝物。
Yep. So now you know why he wanted us to find this treasure.
好啦，闲话就聊到这里吧！接下来该去找虎克的宝贝了。
Alright, enough chit-chat! Next we need to find my treasure.
反正就是小孩子过家家呗？
大人高高在上的态度又来了，这次是真正的大危机！
You're being a rude adult again... Believe me, I'm not exaggerating when I say that crisis was super huge!
虎克给你说了这么多，你就这么点儿感想吗？还不如说给盐烧洞螈听呢。
After that epic story, that's all you have to say? Ugh... I would've been better off telling a stone-grilled olm instead.
该做正事啦！虎克的宝贝就藏在孤儿院下边，矿区入口附近。
Time to get to work! Hook's treasure is hidden below the orphanage, near the mine's entrance.
总感觉…这里跟虎克印象中的铆钉镇很不一样。不会连孤儿院也变成这样了吧？
This doesn't feel like the Rivet Town I remember... Do you think the orphanage is like this now too?
这片地方，跟虎克离开的时候完全不一样了！箱子和矿车都被摆在大街上，好乱呀。虎克的宝贝该不会也被人搬走了吧？
This place is nothing like it was before I left! Boxes and mine carts are all over the street. What a mess! Did someone move my treasure too?
据说堆在这里是为了挡住怪物。
Perhaps these are stacked here to keep the monsters away.
虎克以前把它放在矿队的杂物堆那边。那个墙角后面，堆了好多地髓，还有好多好多的箱子。应该不会被挪走吧？
I used to keep it in the mining team's junk pile. Behind the corner, there were heaps of Geomarrow and boxes. Hopefully, it hasn't been taken.
Is that all the info you have?
虎克就记得这么多。不过你放心，我也会跟你一起找的！说不定还能比你先找到呢。
That's all I can recall. But don't worry, I'll look with you! Heh, I may even find it before you.
虎克也一起来找，肯定能找到的。
I'll look with you. We'll definitely find it if we work together.
真没用呀，荣誉队员！到最后还是得靠漆黑的虎克大人亲自出手嘛。
What a shame, honorary member! In the end, we still had to rely on Pitch-Dark Hook the Great herself.
快，快来帮帮我！东西太高了，我够不着！
Quick, help! I can't reach it, it's too high!
你看，就在这个盒子里！这台小钻机是老爹矿队里的叔叔送给我的，也是虎克的生日礼物哦！
Look, it's in this box! This miniature drill rig was given to me by a guy from daddy's mining team as a birthday present!
虎克现在就把它打开——嘿咻！
I'm going to turn it on... Whoosh!
先、先不要跟虎克说话…让虎克冷静一下！
J—Just don't talk to me right now... I need to calm down!
在这里干等着也不是办法。
Standing around waiting won't do anything.
不是都说了嘛，先不要和我说话！虎克必须好好想想……
I said don't talk to me right now! I need time to think...
荣誉队员…我只是好奇，你觉得尤利安的玻璃珠能卖多少钱？
Honorary member... Um, I wonder, how much do you think Julian's glass marbles would sell for?
That's all you came up with after calming down!?
你还当真了吗？虎克其实根本没有这个打算，再说了，玻璃珠子根本值不了钱。
...Uhh, what? Hehehe, did you think I was serious? I wasn't actually planning on selling these marbles — besides, they aren't even worth much.
But these marbles belong to Julian...
虎克其实根本没有这个打算…不过，尤利安拿到了宝贝，虎克却什么都没有…好亏！
...*sigh* I wasn't actually planning on selling these marbles... But Julian gets his treasure and I get nothing... What a lousy bargain!
Why not find someone to fix it?
那倒是可以…但是修理，也是要花不少钱的吧？还是好亏！
That might work... but it'll be pretty expensive to fix, right?
How about we ask the guy who gave you the gift for help?
不行，老爹说那个叔叔走丢了，后来再也没见过他。听说，他好像是去了很遥远的地方……
Not possible. Daddy said that guy went missing one day, and he never saw him again. Maybe he went to someplace far away...
虎克也不知道他什么时候会回来，肯定不行啦！
I have no idea when he'll come back. So that definitely won't work!
Is the drill rig really that valuable?
跟洞洞机肯定没得比啦。但那位叔叔的手很巧，总能做出些很精妙的小玩意。
Not as much as Diggertron, but that guy who gave it to me was pretty skillful. He could always make fancy things.
让那个叔叔帮你修修吧。
How about we ask him to help you fix it?
不行，老爹说那个叔叔走丢了，后来再也没见过他。听说，他好像是去了很遥远的地方……
Not possible. Daddy said that guy went missing one day, and he never saw him again. Maybe he went to someplace far away...
虎克也不知道他什么时候会回来，肯定不行啦！
I have no idea when he'll come back. So that definitely won't work!
等一下！其实虎克还有另外一件宝贝——就在孤儿院那里！虽然虎克也不想卖掉它，但是为了老爹的礼物，这也是没办法的办法……
Wait a second! I hid another treasure at the orphanage! I don't want to sell it, but if I want to buy daddy a gift, I don't have any other choice...
求求你了，荣誉队员！再帮我找一次吧！就这一次！
Honorary member, please! Please help me look for it! Just one more time!
谁知道还有没有下一次。
Will this really be the last time...
你自己找，找到了再叫我吧。
You can look for it yourself and let me know when you find it.
唉，遇到你这么懒的人，虎克也是倒了霉了。
*sigh* Why are you so lazy? I'm so unlucky!
They're worth half a shield at most.
这也太便宜了吧！虎克立刻放弃了邪恶的念头。
That's it!? Ugh, I guess I'll have to abandon my evil plan.
没有了，这就是最后一次，我们走吧！
I promise this is the last time! Let's go!
不准走不准走，要是我们现在就回去了，刚才做过的努力不就白费了吗？虎克保证这就是最后一次了，我们走吧！
No! Don't leave! If we go back now, everything we've done so far will be for nothing! I promise this is the last time. Let's go!
I want to go back now...
这里怎么全是怪物啊？得把他们赶走才行！
Why are there so many monsters here!? We need to deal with them first!
等等！让虎克看看笔记，我把藏宝贝的地方都标记在上面了。
Wait! Let me take a look at my notes. I marked the location where I stashed the treasure.
So what is your mysterious treasure?
是老巫婆给虎克的奖励！等我挖出来你就知道了。
It's a reward from the old witch! You'll know what it is after I dig it up.
「从左边楼梯下来之后，朝着前方走十步，往右转，再走十五步，原地转十圈再往前……」
"Go down the stairs on the left, then walk ten paces forward. Turn right, walk another fifteen paces. Spin around ten times, then keep walking forward..."
完蛋了…完蛋了！笔记的后半部分全都糊了！
...Oh, no... I'm doomed! The second half of my notes are completely ruined!
You shouldn't have written so much.
要是一两句话就能说清楚，那还算什么藏宝图嘛！
What kind of lame treasure map would it be if it only had one or two steps!?
没有后半部分的笔记，虎克肯定找不到宝贝……
Without the second half of my notes, how will I ever find the treasure...
I have a treasure of my own...
真、真的吗？快点，快拿出来看看呀！
（用家用寻物仪帮虎克找找吧。）
(Let's use the Home-Use Object Finder to help Hook search.)
哇！这个小东西…居然也会说话嘛？
Wow! This little thing... it can talk?
脾气好差啊，这家伙！不过，如果能帮虎克找到宝贝的话，虎克就原谅你！
Aren't you sassy! But if you can help me find my treasure, I'll let it slide!
这是什么呀？上面好像还写了字…「给<unbreak>50</unbreak>年后的尤利安」？
What's this? Looks like something is written on it... "For Julian <unbreak>50</unbreak> years in the future"?
不管啦，既然挖出来了，就打开看看吧！
Whatever. Since we've already dug it up, let's open it!
Isn't it unsuitable for people to wear, though?
好像也是哦…那就等<unbreak>50</unbreak>年以后再打开吧！我们先帮尤利安带回去，连着玻璃珠一起交给他。
I guess you're right... We should wait <unbreak>50</unbreak> years before opening it! Let's take it back to Julian along with the glass marbles.
What if it has poison inside?
真、真的嘛！老巫婆好像确实说过，有些东西埋久了以后会产生「有毒气体」……
Really? The old witch did say that some things will emit a poisonous gas after being buried for a long time...
算了算了，还是不打开了！
Okay forget it, let's not open it!
就是它，就是它！这是老巫婆奖励虎克的大熊玩偶！
Here it is — my teddy bear! The old witch gave it to me as a gift!
还以为会是什么惊人的东西…
呜哇，「菌菌」——你怎么这么脏呀，而且还有好几处开线了…不好好清理一下的话，肯定没人会买你的。
Whoa, Junjun... How did you get covered in dirt? And why do you have so many loose threads? If we don't get you cleaned up, no one will buy you.
How much... can you get for him?
老巫婆说过，「菌菌」可不是一般的玩偶！只要把它打理干净，肯定会很抢手的！
Well, the old witch said that Junjun isn't just any old teddy bear! He'll be worth a lot of money once he's cleaned up!
没办法了…虎克还没学会缝纫活呢，只有去找老巫婆帮忙了。
*sigh* There's no other way... I haven't learned to sew yet — I'll have to ask the old witch for help.
真的有大人对玩偶熊感兴趣吗？
Do adults really like teddy bears?
那是当然！老巫婆说过，「菌菌」可不是一般的玩偶！
Of course! The old witch said Junjun isn't just any old teddy bear!
唔…虎克还没学会缝纫活呢，看来只有去找老巫婆帮忙了。
*sigh* I haven't learned to sew yet — I'll have to ask the old witch for help.
要是被她知道虎克又闯进了不该来的地方…呜，又要挨骂了……
If she finds out I went somewhere I shouldn't have gone... *whimper* Hook will get lectured all over again...
不过就算被老巫婆臭骂一顿，虎克也要把给老爹的礼物准备好！
But so what if the old witch yells at me, Hook still has to prepare the gift for daddy!
我要对虎克刮目相看了。
娜塔莎生气了可别带上我。
Don't drag me into this when Natasha gets furious.
宝贝找到了，我们快离开这里吧！那些怪物让虎克心里有点发毛，怪可怕的！
We've found the treasure. Let's split! The monsters here give Hook goosebumps — too scary!
事先说好，你可千万不要把虎克卖掉宝贝的计划告诉老巫婆哦！
I'm warning you — don't you dare tell the old witch about Hook's plan to sell the treasure!
{NICKNAME}，你先进去，虎克随后跟上！只要你吸引了足够的火力…虎克就能安全突围！
{NICKNAME}, you go first and Hook will follow! As long as you attract enough attention, I'll be safe from the old witch!
放心，我不会让你白白牺牲的！鼹鼠党会记得你的贡献！
Don't worry, your sacrifice isn't in vain! The Moles will remember your contribution!
哔嘟…「家用寻物仪」查宝为你服务。请使用语音输入目标物件关键词。
Beep, beep, beep... Findie the Home-Use Object Finder at your service. Please say the target object you want to search for.
你这个小东西不也在说话吗？
Wow, you can talk as well, little thing?
（眼下似乎也没有更好的选择，看来只能再跑一趟了……）
(Looks like there is no other choice. Guess I'll have to go again...)
（看来史考特想要的是这个盔甲。）
(Looks like this is the armor that Scott wants.)
（脏兮兮的盔甲是到手了，现在该回去找史考特要尾款了……）
(Finally got this dirty armor. It's time to go back and ask Scott for the final payment...)
（科鲁泽受了重伤？糟了…有不太好的预感……）
(Kluzer is seriously injured? Oh no... I have a bad feeling...)
（这是…科鲁泽吗？怎么变成这样了？）
(This is... Kluzer? What happened to him?)
(Wait, the one next to him is...)
In the end... the parcel... went to...
科鲁泽倒在了地上，就像裂界怪物一样消失掉，没能留下痕迹。
Kluzer fell to the ground and vanished without a trace, just like a Fragmentum Monster.
在他的消失处散落着私人物品，一个未能寄出的包裹上面清晰地写着：「送往磐岩镇，娜塔莎的诊所收」。
His personal belongings are scattered around where he has just disappeared. "To Natasha's Clinic, Boulder Town" was written clearly on the unsent parcel.
（给诊所寄送物资的好心人，看来就是科鲁泽……）
(Looks like Kluzer is the kind-hearted donor after all, who's been sending supplies to the clinic all this time...)
（他本不该落得这个凄惨的下场…得把这件事告诉娜塔莎。）
(He shouldn't have come to this miserable end... I have to tell Natasha about this.)
那几个孩子，不会是趁着场面混乱，跑到什么地方冒险去了吧？
Those kids better not have taken advantage of the chaos to go on an expedition.
虎克之前一直吵着闹着要去铆钉镇探险…这可不妙。
Hook does always talk about wanting to go on a Rivet Town adventure... this could be bad.
Ready or not, here I come!
可算找到你们了！居然跑到这种地方玩捉迷藏，太危险了！
Found you! You ran all the way out here just to play hide-and-seek? It's too dangerous!
三、三月大姐？！你、你们不是回上层区了吗？
M—Miss March!? D—Didn't you go back to the surface...?
不许叫我「大姐」！虎克她们人呢？赶紧把大家叫出来吧。
Since when did I become "Miss" March? And where's Hook and the others? Come on, call them over.
唔…游戏才刚开始，就这么结束未免太扫兴了……
Aww... but we just started playing. Can't we finish this round first...?
那我们就再来抓一次人吧！
Say no more — this is gonna be easy!
看来你们之前已经玩过类似的游戏了……
才、才不是我想玩啊，都是被这群小孩子逼的！
Hey, it wasn't like I wanted to play! The kids forced us to...
拿棒棒糖钓小孩子出来吧。
If we had lollipops, they'd give themselves up in no time.
好主意耶！小孩子已经就位，只差棒棒糖了！
Great idea! Shame we don't have any.
去把剩下的孩子找出来吧。
Well, we better go and find them.
唔，本来我想先荡会儿秋千再…那行吧，找人的活就交给你们这些大人吧！
...A—Actually, I sorta wanna go play on the swings for a while... I'll leave the seeking to you guys!
…咦，怎么是三个大人？尤利安上哪去了？
呼…真扫兴，我还以为他会趁这个机会对我说些什么呢……
Hmph, so he is a scaredy-cat. I knew he'd get someone else to talk to me...
Well, that explains "sorta wanna go play on the swings for a while..."
还好来的是我们！要是被娜塔莎捉到，你们就等着挨罚吧。
You should be happy it's us and not Natasha! If she'd found you, you'd be in big trouble already.
呣…大姐姐说的也有道理。我知道啦，那我先去找尤利安咯。
Mm... I guess so. Anyway, I'm gonna go find Julian.
怎、怎么是你们！可恶——尤利安这家伙，居然还请外援？真是不讲武德！
Huh!? Wh—What the heck are you guys doing here? Ugh, wait till I get my hands on Julian, that traitor... Where's his integrity!?
老实说吧，是不是你带着小孩子们跑来铆钉镇上的？
What about your integrity, huh? You brought the other kids out here to Rivet Town, didn't you?
我…才、才不是！探险活动的目的地是鼹鼠党的成员一起决定的！
I... I did not! The Moles hold a vote on all our expedition destinations!
集合鼹鼠党吧，我们有事要宣布！
Gather your minions, Hook. We've got exciting news!
行吧，看你们好像挺着急的，这次就由着你们吧！
...Fine, I will. But it better be exciting.
Maybe we should go and get Natasha...
虎、虎克最讨厌打小报告的人啦！我劝你们不要做傻事！
Ah, you snitch! You'll regret it, I'm warning you...
好啦好啦，别贫嘴了，去尤利安那边吧。
Okay, okay, that's enough of that. Let's go and find Julian.
捉迷藏比赛，列车组对鼹鼠党——二比零！
Hide-and-seek update... Astral Express crew — 2, The Moles — 0!
可恶，别神气得太早！正经的捉迷藏比赛可是五局三胜哒！
Hmph, celebrate while you can! Hide-and-seek is best of five, y'know...
想想就来气，不说这个啦！你们跑老远来找鼹鼠党有什么事，快点说吧！
Anyway, enough about hide-and-seek. You came all this way to tell The Moles something, so spit it out.
嘿嘿…{NICKNAME}，快把好消息告诉他们吧！
Hehe... {NICKNAME}, do you wanna do the honors?
将胜利的消息分享给了鼹鼠党的孩子们……
Telling The Moles about the victory...
欸？怎么回事，你们怎么都不说话了？
Huh? What's wrong? Why aren't you saying anything?
我可没料到会是这个反应…
…好、好啦！不许哭，尤利安！你可是鼹鼠党的二把手，才不能给大人看笑话！
...H—Hey! Wipe your tears, Julian! You're second-in-command — no crying in front of grown-ups!
哼，你们三个，给我记住！从今天起，你们就是鼹鼠党最大的竞争对手！
Hmph, you three listen up. Starting from today, you are The Moles' number one rivals!
竞争对手…？什么呀，没头没尾的，完全听不懂你在说什么嘛！
Rivals...? Why the heck are we rivals now? What are you talking about?
…虎克和尤利安，他们一直以来的梦想，就是有朝一日能打败上面的坏人，带着下层大家夺回家园。
...Hook and Julian always wanted to defeat the villains on the surface and take back our homeland.
现在，这个风头都被哥哥姐姐们抢走了，所以……
But it sounds like you grown-ups just stole their thunder, so...
呜…我、我们才不会轻易认输！总有一天，鼹鼠党要当上下层区的大英雄，让大家都对我们刮…刮……
Hmph! You think we're gonna accept defeat just like that!? One day The Moles will be the heroes of the Underworld and the Overworld! Then everyone will sit... sit...
啊，对——刮目相看！我、我能想起来的，才不需要你们提醒！
Ah! Yeah — sit up and take notice! I—I would've figured it out myself. I didn't need you to remind me!
半天不说话，原来你们是在想这事呀。嘿嘿，想变得跟我们一样厉害，虎克可要每天都坚持锻炼哦。
So that's why you were so silent! Hmph, if you wanna be as awesome as us, you better start training every day~
坚持锻炼…听老巫婆的话…这样就能变得比你们更强吗？虎克知道了！
Training every day... listening to the old witch... Will that really make us as awesome as you guys? In that case... deal!
走吧，尤利安，阿丽娜！我们跑步回镇上去，锻炼计划就从今天开始吧！
Julian, Alina, let's run back to the town! Training starts today!
阿、阿丽娜，你要是跑不动的话，我可以背你回去……
Uh, Alina, I can... uh... give you a piggyback if you can't make it...
快看，帕斯卡在那里！在它旁边的是……
Look, Pascal's over there! Who's standing next to it?
咦？那不是「灰熊」型的机器人吗？我们快去看看！
Huh? Isn't that a Grizzly robot? Let's go take a look!
帕斯卡！你怎么伤成这个样子了……？
Pascal! Who did this to you?
请远离，克拉拉。该个体为裂界生物，危险等级评估——极高。
Clara, get away. This is a Fragmentum creature. It's extremely dangerous.
裂界怪物？！你在说什么呀……
A Fragmentum creature!? What are you talking about?
This is clearly a robot, just like you!
接收到用户请求，正在重新解析——
解析完成，仍维持原有判断。该个体为裂界生物，危险等级评估为——极高。
Reanalysis complete. The original assessment stands. This is a Fragmentum creature, and is thus extremely dangerous.
裂界生物都进化到这种程度了？
Have Fragmentum creatures evolved to this level?
怎么可能…帕斯卡明明就是机器人，是你的同类呀！
How is that possible? Pascal is obviously a robot, just like you!
是不是史瓦罗派你来的？快说！
Did Svarog send you? Spit it out!
本机正在执行例行巡逻任务，并未收到来自机械网络中枢的其他指令。
I am on a standard patrol mission. I have not received any other orders from the network hub.
它说得应该没错…史瓦罗先生向克拉拉作出了保证，绝对不会出尔反尔的。
It's telling the truth... Mr. Svarog made a promise to me, and he never betrays his promises.
难道是发生了什么故障…可它看上去很正常啊？
Could it have malfunctioned? It appears to be normal...
请退后，本机将对该裂界生物进行无害化处理——
Please step back. I shall eliminate this Fragmentum creature...
…不好，它要向帕斯卡发起攻击了！必须阻止它才行！
No, it's going to attack Pascal! We have to stop it!
侦测到新增敌意反应——剿灭开始。
糟糕！它好像把我们也当作敌人了……
Oh no! It seems to think we're its enemies as well...
咻…还好，这台巡逻机器人和帕斯卡的核心都保住了，这个大家伙的外壳也几乎没有受损…谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
Phew... Luckily, the patrol robot and Pascal's cores are still intact. The big fella's shell is only slightly dented... Thank you for your help.
只有一点让克拉拉感到很奇怪——大家伙为什么会把帕斯卡错认成裂界生物呢？
The only thing that puzzles me is why the big fella mistook Pascal for a Fragmentum creature.
Hmm, I can't figure it out... Well, let's not worry about that now.
总之，这颗核心，克拉拉先带回去，之后再检查一下。我们先把帕斯卡的核心移植到大家伙的外壳里吧。
Anyway, I'll take this core back and examine it. Now, let's insert Pascal's core into the big fella's shell.
检测，确认，各模块，正常，功能，连接。
Testing, verifying, all modules, working, connected.
欢迎，大家，回来，终于。帕斯卡，一直，等待！
Welcome, back, everyone, finally. Pascal, has been, waiting!
帕斯卡——你终于恢复正常了！
完美的结局！该结算奖励了。
A happy ending! We should work out our rewards.
不对，还有一件事…我们还要向帕斯卡问清楚——它到底为什么要偷零件。
Um... No, there's one more thing... We still need to find out why Pascal was stealing parts in the first place.
问问它为什么要偷零件吧。
Ask him why he was stealing parts.
啊…克拉拉差点忘记了。谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的提醒！
Oh, I almost forgot. Thank you for reminding me!
唔…我们还要向帕斯卡问清楚——它到底为什么要偷零件。
Hmm... We still need to ask Pascal why he was stealing parts in the first place.
帕斯卡…现在，能请你告诉我，为什么要偷零件吗……？
Pascal... Could you please, uh... explain why you were stealing parts...?
工坊？是指铆钉镇上那座「淬火工坊」吗？
Workshop? Oh, do you mean the Tempering Workshop in Rivet Town?
一直，等待，修缮。跟随，请，帕斯卡！
Been, waiting, repair. Follow, please, Pascal!
啊…帕斯卡自顾自地跑掉了！它是要我们跟上它吗？
往那个方向去了…我们快跟上去看看吧？
He went in that direction... I think he wants us to follow him!
这里往下继续走…好像是废弃餐厅？
Up ahead... Is that an abandoned restaurant?
这里…似乎是铆钉镇的废弃餐厅呢。克拉拉曾经在这里找到了不少罐头…营地里的叔叔阿姨们为此开心了很久。
I think this place used to be a restaurant. One time, I found a bunch of canned food here... The vagrants in the camp were so happy.
不过，克拉拉一直在好奇一件事……
这里，为什么…灯光从来没断过呢？明明已经被废弃了……
The light here... Why is it still on? This place has clearly been abandoned for a long time...
而且，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}你看——这座餐厅虽然到处是灰尘…但设施似乎都没有老化的迹象呢。
Also, there's dust all over the place, but none of the equipment appears to be deteriorating.
这个问题也困扰了我很久…
I've been wondering about that too...
Is it possible that someone lives here?
仔细想想…这里应该不会有人住。至少克拉拉在这里寻找物资的时候，从来没见到过。
I don't think so... No one should be living here. I never saw anyone when I came here to hunt for supplies.
咿？！…那岂不是，我们现在就……
Ah!? Are you saying we're... not alone...?
不对不对…这个世界上才没有那种东西……
No, no, no... Ghosts don't exist...
唔，总之…大概是有人一直在修缮这里吧？可到底是谁呢……
Anyway, someone must be looking after this place. But who?
而且…为什么要做这种事呢？
帕斯卡的痕迹往那边去了…我们顺着它继续前进吧。
Pascal's trail leads in that direction. Let's follow it.
这里就是「淬火工坊」…帕斯卡果然在这里。
Hey, this is the Tempering Workshop. And look, Pascal is here.
克拉拉，欢迎，铆钉镇，回到，{NICKNAME}！
看到，是否，亮堂堂？工作，帕斯卡，完成，圆满！
Look, isn't it, shiny? Job, Pascal, done, nice!
咦？难道…是帕斯卡一直在修缮这座废弃的城镇吗？
Huh? Could it be... Pascal has been repairing this abandoned town?
帕斯卡，修缮，确实！等待，一直，大家。
Pascal, repair, indeed! Waiting, been, everyone.
这就是你偷零件的原因？
Is this why you've been stealing the parts?
零件，帕斯卡，收集，不停。铆钉镇，修缮，不停！
Parts, Pascal, collect, non-stop. Rivet Town, repair, non-stop!
看来，帕斯卡之所以一直在偷零件…是因为它要修缮这座城镇呢。
