It seems that Pascal was stealing parts because he wants to repair the town.
Have you been waiting for us?
等待，大家，帕斯卡，不停！离开，大家，回来，有一天！
Waiting, everyone, Pascal, non-stop! Leave, everyone, come back, one day!
难道…帕斯卡是在等待撤离铆钉镇的居民回到这里吗？
Has Pascal been waiting for Rivet Town's evacuated residents to return?
你一直在修缮这座城镇？
Have you been repairing the town?
修缮，一直，每天，帕斯卡！使用，可以，大家，回来！
Repair, been, every day, Pascal! Use, can, everyone, return!
大概是为了让大家回来后能正常生活…帕斯卡才一直在维护这里吧？
Pascal has been looking after the town so that everyone can go back to their previous lives when they return...
所以…为什么带我们来这里？
So... why did you bring us here?
「工坊」，「淬火」，这里。基地，帕斯卡，秘密！
Workshop, Tempering, here. Base, Pascal, secret!
零件，存放！敌人，躲避。地方，安全。害怕，不用，大家！
Parts, store! Enemies, not here. Place, safe. Scared, no need, everybody!
看来，这里就是帕斯卡存放零件的秘密基地吧？
Ahh. This appears to be the secret base where Pascal keeps the parts.
唔，虽然知道了帕斯卡偷零件的原因…但还有许多问题没有解决呢。比如……
Although we now know why he took them, there are still many unanswered questions. For example...
它修缮城镇的动机是什么？
Why does he want to repair the town?
是的。但克拉拉觉得，动机大概是没办法直接问出来的……
Right. But I don't think Pascal will give us a straightforward answer on this one...
唔…不知道这里会不会有线索呢？
Hmm... I wonder if we can find any clues here?
它为什么会被当作裂界生物？
Why is Pascal being treated as a Fragmentum creature?
…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说得对。刚才那个大家伙说的话，让克拉拉很在意……
...Right. That bigger robot said that, how strange...
唔…不知道这里会不会有线索呢？
Hmm... I wonder if we can find any clues here?
该怎么处置这个零件小偷…
How should we punish this parts thief then...?
…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说得对。虽然帕斯卡是出于好意才……
...Right. Pascal is doing this out of good will, but still...
但无论如何，偷东西肯定是不对的，必须让帕斯卡明白这点。
Stealing is always wrong, and Pascal needs to learn that.
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们在附近再多看看吧？克拉拉还有些在意的事。
Let's take a look around again, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. I'm still not finished here.
铆钉镇，居住，克拉拉，{NICKNAME}！游览，随意，请！
Rivet Town, live, Clara, {NICKNAME}! Tour, feel free, please!
经过精心保养的显像管显示器。虽然有些许灰尘覆盖其上，但似乎还能正常工作。
A well maintained CRT display device. Though covered by some dust, it still functions.
这应该是帕斯卡仔细维护的成果…不过，这个小家伙应该没有使用显示器的需要吧。
This must be the result of Pascal's meticulous repairs... but the little fella doesn't really need the monitor, does he?
唔…机柜侧边好像有些人类的手掌印呢。难道最近有人用过这台显示器？
Hmm... Hey! Those look like handprints on the side of the cabinet — human handprints. Could this monitor have been recently used by someone?
书页与信纸被仔细裁剪，摞于一处。内容从幼儿寓言故事至过去的时政要闻，不一而足。
Book pages and letters all carefully cut and put aside, whose content varies from tales for children to outdated political news.
这些书页，裁得好整齐…啊，还有一股地髓燃料的味道。
These pages are so neatly cut out... Oh, and they smell like Geomarrow Fuel.
应该不会有人故意在铆钉镇做这种事…难道是帕斯卡自己收集了这些书页，放在一起了吗？
Is there someone here in Rivet Town doing this...? Or could Pascal have collected the pages and put them together?
咦？这是什么，是日记本吗？
封面上好像有名字呢，好工整的笔迹呀。不对，工整到这个程度，应该是直接印上去的才对……
Wow. Such neat handwriting... no, wait a minute, I think this was printed onto the cover...
事件的原貌居然是这样……
克拉拉需要好好想想…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们再把帕斯卡的事从头到尾理一下吧？
Let me think... How about we go over Pascal's whole story again, from the start?
(Try to sort out the whole story)
（铆钉镇出事后，它的后备能源启动…却发现铆钉镇已经空无一人了。）
(His backup power was activated after the incident in Rivet Town... and it woke up to discover that Rivet Town had been abandoned.)
（它决定收集零件、修缮城镇，等大家回来……）
(He decided to collect parts, repair the town, and wait for everyone to return...)
（…期间，帕斯卡发展出了自我意识。）
你将思考的结果向克拉拉复述了一遍。
You recapitulate your thoughts to Clara.
帕斯卡它…似乎曾经是铆钉镇的护卫机器人之一。
So Pascal used to be a robot guardian of Rivet Town...
铆钉镇居民撤离后不久，帕斯卡的后备能源因为某种原因启动——
Pascal's backup power was activated for some reason shortly after the residents were evacuated...
可重新醒来的它发现，铆钉镇已经空无一人了。于是，帕斯卡决定收集零件、修缮城镇，等待大家回来。
It woke up to discover that the whole place had been abandoned. So, it decided to collect parts, repair the town, and wait for everyone to return...
但是，不知道出于什么原因，帕斯卡频繁遭到同类的攻击…因为自动机兵们会把它识别为裂界生物。
However, for some reason, Pascal keeps getting attacked by his fellow robots, because the automatons think he's a Fragmentum creature.
或许是它产生了自我意识？
莫非真是被裂界生物附体了…？
Could it be possessed by a Fragmentum creature...?
…克拉拉也不清楚。但我猜，帕斯卡的自我意识之所以会如此混乱，肯定和频频遭受同类攻击有关系。
I'm not sure, but I suspect Pascal's tormented sense of self stems from him being constantly attacked by his fellow robots.
用于标识「情感」的模组不断受损…到了最后，它就变成了只知道不停收集零件的小机器人。
The module used to detect emotions was frequently damaged, eventually turning him into a small robot that did nothing but collect parts.
这或许就是事件的全貌了。
至少克拉拉觉得是这样。但帕斯卡究竟为什么会被当作裂界生物？我还找不到答案……
At least, that's my theory. Still, that doesn't explain why Pascal is being treated as a Fragmentum creature...
它为什么会被当作裂界生物？
Why is Pascal being treated as a Fragmentum creature?
不知道…从帕斯卡的日志里找不到答案。
I don't know... I can't find the answer in Pascal's diary.
帕斯卡，到底为什么你会被同伴嫌弃……
Pascal, why do your peers keep rejecting you...
帕斯卡，收集零件，准备，继续！或，等待，指令，下一步！
Pascal, collect parts, ready, continue! Or, wait, instruction, next!
看来…帕斯卡的自我意识，还没有恢复到日志中表现出的高度……
Pascal's consciousness does not appear to have returned to the level shown in the diary...
I see. Thank you so much, Pascal.
帕斯卡，听克拉拉的话——你可以先停止收集零件了。你就乖乖待在这里，等我们回来给你下一步指令…好吗？
You can stop gathering parts for the time being. Just stay here and wait for us to return and give you your next orders, alright?
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}——我们…还是先回史瓦罗先生那里讨论一下吧。
{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, let's go back to Mr. Svarog and talk about what to do next.
不愧是希儿，永远都这么准时。怎么样，你们找到能用的物资了吗？
Hehe, that's our Seele. Nothing if not punctual. So, did you find any usable supplies?
我来看看…钢板、纱布、止痛剂、医用酒精……太好了，需要的物资都齐全了。
Let me see... metal plates, gauze bandages, painkillers, rubbing alcohol... Perfect, that's everything I needed.
就是止痛剂的分量稍微少了些，储藏室那边出了什么情况吗？
Huh... It's just, there are less painkillers than I'd expected. Did someone break into the storage room?
Monsters had destroyed some of them.
喂，用不着说谎，娜塔不会因为这种事埋怨咱们的。
Hey, no need to lie, Nat wouldn't be upset about what we did.
是克拉拉，她比我们先一步到了储藏室。止痛剂我们跟她平分了。
Clara had already arrived at the storage room by the time we got there. We split the painkillers with her.
那孩子的话，我大概明白…她是想照顾受伤的流浪者吧？克拉拉一直很善良……
...If she was there too then... I understand. She wants to look after the injured vagrants, right? Clara's always been a kind-hearted girl...
我认为你们做了正确的决定。不过这么一来，我得好好规划下用药的剂量了。
I think you made the right decision. Still, it means I'm going to have to draw up a detailed dosage plan.
Hey, don't worry. I'll help you.
嘿…不用啦，诊所交给我就好。你们三个还有更重要的事要做吧？奥列格——还有那两位小伙伴，他们正等着呢。
Um, no need. I'll handle the clinic. I assume you three have more important things to be getting on with, right? Oleg will be waiting, not to mention your two companions.
都快忘了还有这俩人了。
I'd nearly forgotten about those two.
原来你们三个关系没那么好啊？我还以为是生死之交呢。
So you guys aren't that close after all? I thought you were sworn friends.
哈哈，布洛妮娅真可爱呢。{NICKNAME}明显是在开玩笑，对吧？
Haha, you're adorable, Bronya. {NICKNAME} was obviously joking~
走之前忘了跟他们打招呼了…
I forgot to say anything to them before I left...
倒也没太大关系，我看那两个孩子精神得很呢。
I'm sure they won't mind, they seemed in good spirits.
奥列格大叔是想谈谈史瓦罗的事吧？我们得走了，不好意思，娜塔——伤员就麻烦你啦。
I bet old Oleg wants to talk about Svarog. We should get going — sorry Nat, we'll have to leave the wounded to you.
No worries, I hope things go smoothly.
你不累吗？一晚上没休息了。
Aren't you? We didn't get any rest last night.
我的最高纪录可是六天不合眼，你还得加把劲啊。
You're gonna have to step it up, y'know. My record is six days no shut-eye.
没打招呼就消失了，抱歉。
哈，这有什么，不打招呼就消失的纪录保持者在这儿呢！
Ha, that's nothing — the unannounced disappearance record-holder is right here!
And that's something to be proud of?
…呃，我没担心你。要说的话，我也是担心布洛妮娅呀。
...Uh, I wasn't worried about you. If you must know, I was wondering if Bronya was okay.
你明明担心得坐立不安。
Oh please — you've barely sat still since they left.
哈哈哈，这下人都齐了，那我就直入主题——
Hahaha, it's good to have everyone back together. Let me get straight to it...
关于你们上次说的「星核」，还有在上层区的遭遇，这两位年轻人又从头帮我捋了一遍。
Regarding this "Stellaron" and your predicament in the Overworld, your friends have gone over both with me again.
上次见到可可利亚，她还是个做派强势的小丫头…没想到当上守护者以后……
The last time I saw Cocolia, she was an impressive young lady... I never thought that after becoming the guardian...
只能说，我对你们的遭遇表示同情。放心吧，「地火」不会干背后捅刀子的事儿。
All I can say is that I sympathize with your situation. Rest easy. Wildfire won't go behind your back on this.
虽然你们的计划跟矿工喝醉以后的胡言乱语差不多，但至少指了条路。下层人早已无路可走，事已至此，我宁愿在你们身上赌一把。

Your plan sounds a bit like the ravings of a drunken miner, but at least you're offering a road forwards. We Underworlders haven't had a road to anywhere for a long time now, and you can see how things have become. I'm willing to give you guys a shot.
放心吧大叔，我们会证明你没信错人！
Don't worry, Mr. Oleg, we'll make sure you don't regret it!
也不是矿工喝醉以后的胡言乱语。
Ravings of a drunken miner is a little harsh.
好！那就把目光放得现实一点儿，你们几个想知道「星核」的下落，而我们「地火」想解除下层区的封锁——

Maybe it is! But I think we need to set our sights on something a bit more realistic. You guys want to know the whereabouts of the Stellaron. Wildfire wants to remove the restrictions on the Underworld...
也就是说，我们的目标都是史瓦罗。不解决那个「大佬」，后面的东西都是废话。
In other words, Svarog is the target of both our efforts. If we can't deal with the boss, we can't deal with anything.
没错，我们去打倒史瓦罗！
You're right. Let's go take him down!
先礼后兵，还是先考虑和平沟通吧。
Diplomacy before violence. We should try peaceful communication first.
你俩说的都有道理，我们当然想尽量和平解决问题，避免损失。但是假如情况有变，那我们也得时刻做好使用武力的准备。

Both your approaches have merit. We would always rather avoid losses and settle matters through peaceful means. But if the situation changes, we must be prepared for armed conflict at a moment's notice.
得想办法让他站在我们一边。
We need to find a way to bring him over to our side.
哼，他是个机器人，听得懂什么？直接砍翻那坨废铁最快了！
Hmph, he wouldn't understand — you're forgetting he's a robot. It'd be faster to smash him to scrap metal!
没错，我们得做好两手准备。能和平解决问题当然最好，但假如情况有变，也得时刻做好使用武力的准备。

We should make preparations for both approaches. Of course, it's better to settle matters through peaceful means. But if the situation changes, we must be prepared for armed conflict at a moment's notice.
「地火」多次尝试跟史瓦罗接触。但每次都被拒之门外，那家伙压根不打算跟我们对话。
Wildfire has tried many times to make contact with Svarog — without success. He has no intention of engaging with us.
以我们的实力，来硬的风险极大。史瓦罗的机器人不怕牺牲，我却不想拿下层百姓的命冒险。
At our current strength, it would be incredibly dangerous to use force. Svarog's robots don't fear sacrifice, and I don't want to risk Underworld lives.
但现在不一样了，你们的到来让史瓦罗也承认「出现外来变量」，事情发生了变化，我虽然不清楚原委——但也许你们有机会说动他。
But things have changed — your arrival constitutes an "external variable" for Svarog. I may not have the full picture, but perhaps you guys have an opportunity to sway him.
哈哈哈哈！瞧咱们这小算盘打的？想得是真美呵。唉，等你们真到了史瓦罗的地盘就懂了，这地下从来就没有那么顺利的事儿。
Hahahaha! Our scheme is coming along nicely! But I fear that Svarog just isn't the swaying type. *sigh* You'll understand when you get to his territory. Things never run smoothly down here.
怎么说，铁卫丫头？我们这一圈人里，就你没有必须跟史瓦罗死磕到底的理由。我倒想听听你的打算。
What about you, Miss Silvermane? You're the only one here that isn't compelled to do or die with Svarog. I'd like to hear your plan.
下层区也是贝洛伯格的一部分，如果史瓦罗的存在威胁到了这里的居民，我当然站在你们这一边。
The Underworld is still a part of Belobog. If Svarog's existence constitutes a threat to the people here, I will of course stand with you.
哈哈哈，很好！不愧是要接过守护者担子的姑娘，觉悟很高啊！
Hahaha, excellent! An enlightened answer, young lady — and spoken like a true successor to the guardianship.
既然我们统一战线，就没必要再耽搁了。走吧，我安排了向导带你们去找史瓦罗。
Seeing as we're all on the same side, there's no reason to delay. Let's go, I've arranged for a guide to take you to Svarog.
「地火」一向跟史瓦罗交恶，跟着你们只怕引起误会，帮了倒忙。我们会在不远处待命，如果事态不对，「地火」立刻赶到。

Wildfire's relationship with Svarog has been hostile for a long time now, accompanying you would only lead to misunderstandings. We'll be nearby, awaiting orders. If things go south, we'll be there in no time.
希儿，再带外来者朋友一程吧。
Seele, perhaps you can take our outsider friends the rest of the way.
希儿，大叔说的向导不是你吗？
So you're not the guide Mr. Oleg was talking about, Seele?
不是，奥列格没交代过这事。但这个向导是谁，我应该猜得八九不离十……
No, Oleg didn't assign that to me. But I've got a pretty good idea who it's gonna be.
桑博呗。向导啊行商啊，骗子啊魔术师啊，这种活简直量身给他打造的。
I guess Sampo. Businessman, magician, liar, and now guide... This kind of work was made for him.
…你干嘛一直发出奇怪的声音？
没啥，只是觉得一宿不见，大家的氛围好像变好了呢……
It's nothing, it just feels like people are getting along better since your unannounced disappearance...
原来如此，鼹鼠党也是「地火」的……
So, The Moles are a part of Wildfire...
是、是我漆黑的虎克没错！找我有事吗？
Th—That's right! It's me, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! What do you want?
Uh, kiddo, I think there's been a misunderstanding...
是我啊，朋友们，奥列格派我来给你们带个路……
I will be your guide, friends. By order of Chief Oleg...
实在太让我伤心了…你们连这么小的孩子都想到了，却没想起我……
I gotta say I'm a little upset at the thought of you choosing a toddler over your old buddy Sampo...
行了行了，计较这个干嘛。我倒想问你：「地火」谁都知道史瓦罗的老巢在哪儿，要你这个向导干嘛？
Alright, alright, don't get started. But I wanna ask you something: Everyone in Wildfire knows the location of Svarog's lair. Why do we need you as a guide?
嗐，术业有专攻呗。「地火」虽然知道史瓦罗的根据地在哪儿，可从来没进去过啊。
*sigh* My specialties in the field, perhaps? Wildfire may know where the base is, but have they ever been inside?
…没有。但那机械聚落上下我摸了个遍，收集了不少线索，保证能帮上你们的大忙。
...No. But I've felt my way around the outside and picked up more than a few clues. I can help you. You have my word.
Let's hope you can walk the talk.
哎哟，这叫什么话！天底下还有比我桑博更言行一致的人吗？
Hey, what are you trying to say!? Name me someone above or below ground that walks the talk like Sampo Koski.
Oleg put his trust in you...?
哎哟，这叫什么话！你们仨能跟「地火」打上交道，不是多亏了老桑博引荐嘛？
Hey, what are you trying to say!? You guys wouldn't have even gotten to know Wildfire without my help, right?
你没事摸人家聚落干啥。
Clues for your own shady dealings, no doubt.
哎哟，这叫什么话！那不是「地火」下了需求，我兢兢业业给他办事嘛？
Hey! That's not nice! Wildfire made a request and I got on with the job.
天地可鉴，我桑博真是一片热忱——
My legacy will prove that Sampo Koski was nothing but a willing and devoted servant of—
行了行了！我们信你还不行嘛，快点带路吧。
Ugh, enough! Jeez! We believe you, okay? Show us the way already.
这是史瓦罗的老巢？我还以为是个冷冰冰的地方，居然这么热闹？
This is Svarog's lair? I thought it'd be cold and lifeless, turns out it's pretty busy!
很多流浪者都暂住在这里，他们的老家被裂界的怪物占据了。
Many vagrants are staying here temporarily. Their homes were overrun by monsters.
在史瓦罗的眼皮底下扎营，不觉得危险吗？
Isn't it dangerous for them to make camp right under Svarog's metal nose?
不会，史瓦罗虽然霸道，但从不无故攻击人类。对无家可归的人来说，这地方反而安全。
No. Svarog may be ruthless, but he never attacks without reason. For those with no home, this is actually a safe place to be.
呵…要不是搬走得早，说不定我现在也是这群人中的一员哪。
Hm... If I hadn't moved away when I did, I'd probably be where they are right now.
哎呀呀，这地方可真是泥沙俱下，啥人都有。招子放亮点伙计们，别被这些家伙给骗了啊。
Alas, this place is a bit of a mixed bag — plenty of... "characters." Keep your wits about you, friends. Don't let anyone deceive you.
你不骗我们就谢天谢地了。
It's all good. We've had you for practice.
Y'know missy, you sure know how to bear a grudge.
好沉的大门…好嘞，看我的！
What a heavy gate... Okay, watch this!
Is that a secret code or something?
童话故事里的口令，在这里不可能奏效吧。
It's an imaginary password that children like to use... and I don't think it's going to be of much use.
What about these clues of yours?
我正想说呢，三月小妹妹就来了这么一段。
I was just about to get into those, before Miss March's colorful attempt.
Help us pry the gate open.
喂喂，当着这么多双眼睛撬门，你当流浪者跟机器人是瞎子啊？
Whoa, whoa! Pry it open? In front of all these vagrants and robots? They have eyes, you know.
我告诉你们吧，这道大门的机制我已经搞清楚了。可不是什么阿猫阿狗都能随便出入史瓦罗大佬的地盘，想见他的人，必须拿到「认证」。

Luckily for us, I've already figured out the mechanism for this gate. They don't just let any Joe Shmoe in and out of Boss Svarog's territory. I mean, if you wanna see the big cheese himself, you need "certification."
没错，只有获得认证资格的「{RUBY_B#史瓦罗的拾荒人}淘金者{RUBY_E#}」才能进出。史瓦罗的淘金者在地底到处收集机械残骸，带给史瓦罗修理。

Correct, only {RUBY_B#Svarog's Scavengers}prospectors{RUBY_E#} with the right certification can get in or out. These prospectors collect mechanical remnants from all over the underground, and then bring them to Svarog for him to repair.
老实说这真是无本万利，我要早想到这一手…嘿嘿，那就是科斯基大佬……
Honestly, it's a very profitable little venture. If only I'd beaten him to it... Hehe, they'd be calling me Sampo "Boss-ki" by now...
少扯闲话，上哪去搞这个「认证」？
...Time out. Where do we get this "certification"?
简单，看见流浪者身边的机器人了吗？那都是史瓦罗的眼线，是照他的指令专门在这儿维持秩序的。
That's simple. You see the robots over by the vagrants? They're all Svarog's scouts — every one of them is commanded to maintain order here.
除了监视小混混们的一举一动之外，它们的另一个职责就是提供「试炼」。凡是想当「{RUBY_B#史瓦罗的拾荒人}淘金者{RUBY_E#}」的，都得通过这些铁螃蟹的测试才行。

Apart from them keeping a watchful eye on these hooligans, another one of their duties is "processing." Anyone who wants to become a {RUBY_B#Svarog's Scavengers}prospector{RUBY_E#} has to pass a test from these walkin' stoplights first.
Do they give you a gachapon for the test?
我哪知道，我又没打算进去跟史瓦罗大佬死磕。要进去的是你们，自己找机器人问个究竟呗。
Not a clue, I never had the urge to go on a Svarog suicide mission before. You guys are the ones that want in, why not go and ask the robots?
这里的人，感觉都被机械管制着……
It feels like the people here are all under the supervision of robots...
这在地上简直难以想象，机器人在上层区只是工具而已。
This would be unthinkable on the surface. Robots are merely tools in the Overworld.
可别把史瓦罗当成普通机器人，他可是…呃，很特殊的。
Don't take Svarog as an ordinary robot. He's, uh... special.
This has to be one of them, right?
这破玩意还醒着吗？不会已经坏掉了吧？
Is it even awake in there? Maybe it's broken down.
协议…启动。开始…扫描…校验。
认证失败…个体未获得访问权限。开启「试炼」。
Certification failure... Subject has yet to obtain access permissions. Launching processing.
Launching stage one processing. Please listen to the following question...
「内燃机说唱大赛」的总冠军是？
Who is the reigning champion of the Internal Combustion Engine Rap Tournament?
什么内燃…什么说唱？这种事我们咋知道啊！
Infernal construction what now? How would we know anything about that!
Sampo, do you know the answer?
Sampo Koski always knows the... Wait, what did it say again?
你这人到底靠不靠得住啊？
Ugh, aren't you supposed to be dependable?
嗨，我又不是全知全能，消息得靠打听的嘛。别慌，别忙…去周围听听流浪者在聊什么呗，说不定有惊喜呢？

Well, I don't know everything. *sigh* Sometimes you've gotta ask around if you wanna know the answer. Don't panic... Let's listen in to what these vagrants are talking about, we might just hit the jackpot.
请回答问题——「内燃机说唱大赛」的总冠军是？
Please answer the following question: Who is the reigning champion of the Internal Combustion Engine Rap Tournament?
回答错误。认证结果——失败。
…我说各位，不懂就别强行装懂啊，又没人会笑话你们！
...Uh, y'know friends, if you don't know the answer, you don't have to pretend you do. No one's gonna laugh at you.

坏了，她有危险！快，赶紧去工坊确认下情况，我认得路。

果然，那边有个大家伙！克拉拉也在，得赶紧去救她！
Just as we feared, there's something big over there! And there's Clara — we have to save her!
上吧，这次我们人多势众，不用害怕。

你没事吧，克拉拉？受伤了没？

谢、谢谢大家，我没事，一点小擦伤而已。

果然不该放你一个人乱跑，实在太危险了。话说回来，你在这里找什么啊？
You shouldn't be running around by yourself. It's too dangerous. What are you looking for here?
基地的供能装置出了故障，要是不快点把它修好的话，聚落里的大家就都要遭殃了。
There's a fault with one of the energy supply units at the base. If I don't repair it soon, everyone at the settlement will be affected.
我知道这座镇上有一家工坊，所以就想来找找看。需要的元件都找到了，但是却不小心撞上了怪物……
I knew there was a workshop in this town, so I wanted to try my luck here. I found all the components I need, but then I ran into a monster...
还好有大家出手相救，克拉拉会把这件事告诉史瓦罗先生的。
You guys saved me — I'll tell Mr. Svarog about it.
...We were planning on paying him a visit.
We were just about to pay him a visit.
…咦？大家是有什么要紧的事要找史瓦罗先生吗？克拉拉可以帮你们带话……
...Huh? What do you need to see him for? I can pass him a message...
不行，这次我们得跟他当面聊清楚。你能带我们去见他吗？

可是…史瓦罗先生一向不喜欢和其他人沟通，尤其是「地火」的各位……

这我当然知道。但他已经逃避谈话太多次了，这回我们坚持要见到他。

…大家都是在为下层区的人们努力，但是史瓦罗先生不相信人类的情感，他只相信计算的结果。

所以，我不能带大家去见他…如果你们和史瓦罗先生起了冲突，肯定会有人受伤的。无辜的人们也可能被波及。
So, I can't take you to see him... If Mr. Svarog and you had a fight, someone would get hurt for sure. Maybe even bystanders...
克拉拉，你上次说过吧？史瓦罗的职责是守望下层区，存护这里的文明。如果我们抱着相同的愿望谋求合作，他为什么要拒绝呢？
Clara, you said it yourself before, right? Svarog's duty is to protect the Underworld and preserve the civilization here. We have the same wish. Why would he refuse to cooperate with us?
我了解史瓦罗先生，他是不会被人们的愿望触动的，他只遵从理性的判断。
I know Mr. Svarog. He isn't affected by other people's wishes. He only follows logical judgments.
这个世界，正在发生非常可怕的事情…在他看来，地上已经快要走到尽头了。
Terrible things are happening on this world... Mr. Svarog thinks that the Overworld will end soon.
根据史瓦罗先生的计算结果，只靠下层区人们的力量，不可能阻止灾难的降临。
According to his calculation results, the strength of the Underworlders won't be enough to prevent the disaster.
他的应对方案，是为了让下层的人们能远离灾难的源头，多生存一段时间……
His plan is to keep the Underworlders away from the source of the disaster, so they can survive for longer...
…那不就是把我们关在笼子里么？可笑，横竖都是一死，早两天晚两天有什么区别？连尝试着挣扎一下都不行吗？
...Isn't that just putting us in a cage? It's ridiculous — what difference does it make if our death gets postponed a couple of days? How is that better than putting up a fight?
就当还我们人情吧，克拉拉。

克拉拉一定会回报大家的！但是唯独这件事不行……

我们必须见到他，不惜代价。

抱歉…这件事，克拉拉真的帮不上忙。
I'm sorry... I really can't help you with this.
Why don't we think of another way?
克拉拉也一直在尝试说服史瓦罗先生，请大家再等等……
I'm always trying to convince Mr. Svarog. Please give me more time...
那个，如果大家不介意的话…克拉拉还有重要的事，就先回去了。
Um, if you don't mind... I still have important things to do. I'll go back now.
希儿，别说了。那孩子已经下定决心了，我能从她的眼神里看出来。
It's no use, Seele. She's made up her mind. I could tell from her expression.
We will have to think of another way...
那孩子可真不一般啊，年纪轻轻的，就这么…固执？不对，聪明？
That's no ordinary kid. So young and yet so... stubborn? No, intelligent?
她把事情看得透彻，而且有自己的坚持，这两点都跟三月截然不同。
She's incisive, and determined... in sharp contrast to you, March.
...Did you really have to add that last part!?
看来，想和史瓦罗本人搭上话，还得先过克拉拉这一关。
It looks like we'll have to get past Clara if we want to speak to Svarog.
If we can't even persuade Clara...
…就更别想着说服那个大机器人啦。
...Then good luck persuading that mass of metal.
绕过克拉拉和那道门，史瓦罗只会把我们识别为入侵者，更不会给我们好脸色。
If we circumvent Clara and the gate, Svarog will only identify us as intruders. He'll be even more likely to give us the cold shoulder.
Isn't a robot shoulder cold to begin with?
克拉拉反复提起史瓦罗的「计算结果」……
Clara mentioned Svarog's "calculation results" many times...
「只靠下层区的人们，不可能阻止灾难降临」——这是她的原话，依我之见，突破口就在此处。
The strength of the Underworlders won't be enough to prevent the disaster... Those were her exact words. For me, that's our starting point.
你的意思是…那个机器人的逻辑里有漏洞吗？
So... you think Svarog's logic has a hole in it?
不，他的推算很准确。「星核」带来的麻烦，靠「地火」现有的力量是不可能解决的。不过，他的计算落后于现状了，新的「变量」还未加入算式……

No, his calculation is correct. At its current strength, it is highly unlikely that Wildfire would be able to resolve the problems stemming from the Stellaron. However, that calculation didn't take the present situation into account. There's a new variable yet to be added to the equation...
得让他认识到我们的价值。
We need him to recognize our value.
…没错。假如能让史瓦罗相信，我们的确能够颠覆「计算结果」，就有推进和谈的希望。
...Precisely. If we can make Svarog believe in us, we can almost certainly overturn the result of his calculation, and we'll be one step closer to peace talks.
但是，要怎么证明呢…这回光拿照片出来怕是不够用了吧？
But, how we can get him to do that... Showing him some of our photos wouldn't cut it, right?
总会有办法的。现在，首先要说服克拉拉。
There's always a way. But first, we have to convince Clara.
她应是直接回机械聚落了吧？我们也跟上。
I assume she must be on her way back to the robot settlement. Let's catch up with her.
看那边！克拉拉乘升降机下去了。
Over there! Clara went down on the elevator.
咦…人呢？明明刚才还看到她往这边走了。
Huh? Where'd she go? We just saw her go this way.
*sigh* We'll just have to head straight and keep looking.
Argh... I can't figure it out...
...Oh, it's you. You came with me after all.
We couldn't give up that easily.
你在修理这台设备吗，克拉拉？是否遇到了瓶颈？
Are you repairing this installation, Clara? Hit a snag?
这两处的线管部件，尺寸和磨损程度明显和设备本身有差别，应该是你刚刚替换掉的吧？
The dimensions and wear of these two roller components look very different from the rest of the unit. You must have only just replaced them.
虽然替换了受损的元件，但是设备却没有照常重启，你是否在为这件事苦恼？
You replaced the damaged components, but the unit isn't starting up as normal. That's what you're trying to figure out, right?
…嗯，克拉拉修过很多东西，但还是第一次碰到这么复杂的装置。
...Yeah. I've fixed a lot of things before, but I never had to repair one as complicated as this.
史瓦罗呢，他怎么不出来帮你？
我不想惊动史瓦罗先生，因为设备是被两个流浪者叔叔…不小心弄坏的。如果被史瓦罗先生知道了，他肯定会很生气……
I don't want to disturb him. This installation was... accidentally damaged by two of the vagrants. If Mr. Svarog finds out, they'll get in big trouble...
你也过于为别人着想了。
You give a lot of thought to others.
…克拉拉，太过善良可是会被坏人利用的。
...Y'know Clara, if you're too kind, people can take advantage of you.
我或许找到问题所在了。虽然替换了线管，但它的轴承错位阻塞了。
I think I found the source of the problem. You replaced the rollers, but the bearing is causing a jam — there's a misalignment.
{NICKNAME}，三月，来帮我一下，合力把这东西修好。
{NICKNAME}, March, give me a hand. We should be able to fix it between us.
又要修东西了？我现在可是轻车熟路啦！
More fixing? I'm getting good at this!
哥哥姐姐，真的能把供能装置修好吗？
放心吧，绝对能搞定——对吧丹恒？
Relax, we got this. Right, Dan Heng?
哇！真的亮起来了，谢谢大家！
Whoa! It lit up! Thanks guys!
这下，聚落里的能源问题应该暂时解决了吧？
So, the settlement's energy supply problem is solved for the time being?
嗯，这样的话，外圈的大家就不用担心失去光和热了。
Yes. The people on the outskirts don't need to worry about heat or light now.
我们不是要刻意讨好你。
We're not trying to win you over.
克拉拉明白。你们帮助了很多矿区的伤员，而且还冒着风险去镇上找物资，大家都是热心的好人。
I understand. You helped a lot of injured people in the mine, and you risked going into the town for supplies. You're good people.
我们再聊聊史瓦罗的事吧。
我知道大家是热心的好人。在矿区里，你们帮助了很多伤员，还冒着风险去镇上找物资……
I know that you're good people. You helped a lot of the injured in the mine, and you risked going into the town for supplies.
如果有其他需要帮忙的地方，克拉拉一定会努力的！唯独这件事……
If there's any other way I can help you, I'll do my best! But this...
*sigh* How are we gonna convince her?
「现状」就是…我们来了！这个星球的灾祸有了解决的办法……
The present situation is... we're here! This planet isn't doomed after all...
「变量」就是…我们的到来！十几年来首次有外人进入地下……
The variable is... our arrival! No outsider's set foot in the underground for over a decade...
...You might be putting a little too much faith in me, {NICKNAME}.
克拉拉，你很擅长观察的对吧？你看我们三个，像是下层区人嘛？
Clara, you're observant, right? Take a look at us. Do we look like Underworlders?
欸？只看外表的话，确实跟其他人完全不一样……
Well, uhh... you do look very different from other people.
那就对啦！我们并不是这个世界的人，在史瓦罗的运算里并没有我们的存在。如果他的计算基于「只靠下层区的人们」，那么得出来的结果已经不适用于现在了。

Right! That's because we're not from here. We've never been a factor in Svarog's calculations. And if those calculations are based solely on "the strength of the Underworlders," then the results don't apply to the present situation.
史瓦罗的计算是在什么时候开始的，克拉拉？
When did Svarog start doing his calculations, Clara?
是在…很久之前，听说是上下层区刚封闭的时候……
It was... a long time ago. The same time the Underworld was sealed off, I think...
现在的情况已经改变了，一位铁卫来到了地下，这件事在史瓦罗的计算中吗？更何况我们——
Circumstances have changed since then — there's a Silvermane Guard down here now! Is that part of Svarog's calculation? Not to mention, we're—
就直接告诉她吧！我们是从别的星球来的！
...Just tell her already! We come from a different planet!
Three people more than when we started!
那是重点吗？重点是我们是从别的星球来的！
That's your big reveal? The important part is: We're from a different planet!
史瓦罗大佬的算法，根本不可能把我们这几个变量囊括进去吧？
There's just no way that Svarog's calculations would have included variables like us, y'know?
请、请不要把克拉拉当小孩子！那些故事都是大人们想象出来的，克拉拉知道……
D—Don't treat me like a child! Those are just made-up stories that grown-ups like to tell. I don't...
人们在别的世界征服了天空。
In other worlds, people have already conquered the heavens.
{NICKNAME}和三月没有撒谎，克拉拉。我相信{F#她们}{M#他们}。
Hey. {NICKNAME} and March aren't lying, Clara. I believe them.
我理解你的心情，克拉拉。你也希望下层区的情况能有转机，但同时又不想让任何人受到伤害，对吗？
I know how you feel, Clara. You want new hope for the underground, but you don't want anyone to get hurt in the process, right?
我的脑海里也存有疑问，但是直觉告诉我，三月，丹恒，还有{NICKNAME}…他们三个就是这个世界的转机。
I also have doubts... But my gut tells me that March, Dan Heng, and {NICKNAME}... They are the new hope this world has been waiting for.
让他们和史瓦罗见上一面吧，看看计算结果会不会有什么不同。于你、于他而言，这么做都没有什么损失，不是吗？
Let them meet Svarog, and let's see if his calculation result is any different. For you, for him... there's no harm in trying, right?
你见识过我们的能力了。
我们会改变这个世界的。
We will bring change to this world.
Come onnnn, what have we got to lose?
我…知道了。我会带大家去见史瓦罗先生。
I... Okay. I'll take you to see Mr. Svarog.
只靠克拉拉一个人的力量，想改变史瓦罗先生的想法要花上很久很久。就算等到克拉拉成为大人的时候，也不一定能有结果。
Trying to change Mr. Svarog's mind on my own would take forever. Even if I kept trying until I was all grown up, I don't think I could do it.
在等待的时间里，大家会生病，会失去家园，还会不断地发生争斗…就像之前在矿区里那样。
And all the while, people would be getting sick, losing their homes, and fighting... just like in the mine.
我不想让事情变成那样。如果大家有信心说服史瓦罗先生的话…克拉拉也要表现得勇敢一点。
I don't want that to happen. If you guys really believe that you can convince Mr. Svarog... then I need to be brave too.
帮助克拉拉修好了能源装置……
You help Clara repair the energy installation...
布洛妮娅！没想到刚才你会站出来挺我们，说得也太好了吧！
Bronya! I didn't know you'd stick up for us like that back there — well said!
哪有那么夸张，我只是…说了自己的真实想法而已。
It was nothing. I just... said what I truly felt.
提米，帮我开门吧，我想去见史瓦罗先生。
Timmy, open the gate please. I want to see Mr. Svarog.
检测到外来人员。是否放行？
Outsiders detected. Do you wish to permit access?
没关系的，他们都是克拉拉的客人。
It's okay. They're all my guests.
指令已收到。门禁终端已解锁。
Command received. Access restriction terminal unlocked.
欢迎回来。克拉拉小姐和客人。
Welcome back, Miss Clara and guests.
那个…如果可能的话，请大家不要激怒史瓦罗先生……
Uhh... If you can, please try not to upset Mr. Svarog...
放心吧，克拉拉！我们是来和他讲道理的。
It's okay, Clara! We're here to reason with him.
谈判的事就交给你们了，我可不擅长这个。
I'll leave negotiations to you guys. They're not my strong point.
和机器人谈判…对我来说也是第一次。
Negotiating with robots... I can't say I've tried it before.
我看到聚落的供能系统重新上线了。谢谢你，克拉拉。
I see that the energy supply system is back online. Thank you, Clara.
但是——你为什么要带他们来？
But... why have you brought them?
史瓦罗先生…有关前往上层区的事情，他们想和你谈谈。
Mr. Svarog... they want to talk to you about going to the surface.
正在分析…分析结果：目标不属于「地火」组织。背景：不明。分类：未知信息。
Analyzing... Analysis result: Target does not belong to Wildfire. Background: Unknown. Classification: Unknown.
鉴于克拉拉的引荐，我会给你们一个发言的机会。
You have arrived on Clara's recommendation. I will give you an opportunity to speak.
喂，他好像愿意跟我们沟通了欸！快，{NICKNAME}，该你的三寸不烂之舌出场啦！
Hey, sounds like he's willing to communicate! Quick, {NICKNAME}, time to smooth-talk him!
We're not interested in stoking conflict.
寻求和平，了解。但那是你们单方面的表态。
You seek peace, understood. Nevertheless, your statement is unilateral.
至于我的态度，要在评估和你们的交涉结果后确定。
My position will be determined after assessing the result of our negotiation.
我们为地下的未来而来。
We're here about the future of the underground.
毫无价值的说辞。你们并非来自地下，无权代表下层区的人类。
An inadequate pretext. You are not from the underground. You have no right to represent Underworld humanity.
生存还是毁灭？这是一个问题！
To be, or not to be, that is the question!
疑问缺乏必要的情境，无法作答。
Said question lacks the necessary context to be answered.
直入主题吧，不要浪费这个世界宝贵的时间。
Proceed with your central point. Do not waste this world's valuable time.
把你的发言全挡回来了啊，这家伙……
He cut you off completely! This guy...
别自乱阵脚。记住，要让他相信我们是计算中的「变量」。
Stay focused. Remember, we have to make him see that we're a variable in the calculation.
Do you know what a Stellaron is?
调用数据库中…访问受阻。与未经授权的目标谈论「星核」：禁止。
Searching database... Access denied. Discussing "Stellaron" with unauthorized targets: Prohibited.
你们在触碰被封于世界深处的秘密。没有人类应当知道的秘密。
You are broaching a secret that lies at the heart of this world. A secret that should remain unknown to humanity.
重新评估目标状态——威胁指数上升。我要求你们告知真实的来意！
Reassessing targets... Threat index raised. I demand that you reveal your true intention.
果然，他知道「星核」…但这个话题有风险……
As expected... He knows of the Stellaron, but it's a restricted topic...
到了这个份上，还遮遮掩掩什么啊！{NICKNAME}，和他摊牌吧！成败都在此一举了。
We've come this far. Out with it already! {NICKNAME}, just be straight with him! Everything depends on it.
我们必须找到星核，然后…
We must find the Stellaron, and then...
我们要终结这个世界的灾难。
We want to bring this world's disasters to a close.
有记载的历史中，人类曾数次尝试与「星核」接触。无一例外，他们出于人类的私欲，企图将该物质占为己用。

Historical records state that humanity has already made multiple efforts to engage with the Stellaron. Without exception, these efforts have been motivated by human greed — attempts to secure the article for a selfish end.
筑城者的指令：任何尝试与「星核」接触的行为都将造成严重后果。重新评估中——目标威胁指数达到最高。
As instructed by the Architects: Any attempt to engage with the Stellaron will result in grave consequences. Reassessing... Target threat index critical.
怎么办怎么办？这情况看着不太妙啊！
What should we do? This is going from bad to worse!
等等，我们和那些人不一样！
Wait, we're not like those others!
没有证据表明你们会是「例外」。维持原有的计算结果。
There is no evidence to suggest you are an exception. Calculation result remains unchanged.
你的计算能力也不过如此了。
目标展现出的敌意大幅超出基准值。维持原有的计算结果。
Target hostility significantly exceeds base index. Calculation result remains unchanged.
和平维系协议暂时中止…申请启动剿灭协议。
Peacekeeping protocol temporarily disengaged... Requesting extermination protocol launch.
剿、剿灭？是字面上的意思吗？
和谈破裂——三月，准备应战！
Peace talks are over — March, prepare for combat!
克拉拉，危险！快找地方躲起来！
Clara, it's dangerous here! Find somewhere to hide!
Tsk... looks like we have to take action after all.
原型机3号——「监督机器」史瓦罗，剿灭协议申请状态：已通过。
Prototype number 3, monitoring automaton Svarog, extermination protocol launch: Successful.
哎呀——没有医生在场的话，怎么能放心战斗呢。
Hah, how can you put up your best fight without a doctor on the battlefield?
大家，请专心战斗吧。我就在你们身后。
All of you, stay focused. I'm right behind you.
「话不投机半句多」说的就是这种情况吧？多亏桑博我早有准备！
Guess you guys had a bad talk, huh? Luckily, Sampo's got your back!
Sampo! I knew you'd be involved somehow...
发现大量「地火」武装成员渗透，评估状态……
Base breached. Armed Wildfire personnel detected. Assessing...
所有高危个体，全部歼灭！
All subjects are high-risk individuals. Commencing complete annihilation!
Darn it! He's got extra hands!
So it's literally a helping hand?
那只大手…好像要爆炸了！
That hand of his! It's gonna explode!
集中精力防御——或者集火把它干掉。
Defense or offense, we need to pick one and go all in.
请不要…伤害史瓦罗先生！
史瓦罗先生已经没法战斗了，请你们…请你们不要伤害他！
Mr. Svarog can't fight anymore! Please... Please don't hurt him!
史瓦罗先生…请不要再逞强了，能把你了解的事情告诉大家吗？
Mr. Svarog... Don't push yourself any further. Can you tell them what you know?
史瓦罗先生说过，你愿意为我实现每个愿望，对吗？克拉拉现在最大的愿望，就是希望大家都能团结起来，像…像家人那样。
Mr. Svarog, you said you were willing to make all my wishes come true, right? My biggest wish right now is for everyone to work together. Like... like family.
过去这段时间，克拉拉学到了一件事——「计算」得到的结果，并不一定能带给大家幸福。
Recently, I learned something new... Calculation results can't always bring people happiness.
就算知道笼子外面的世界并没有多美好…人们也还是想把头探出去看看。
Even if the world outside the cage isn't beautiful... people still want to know what it's like.
评估系统重启中…重启成功。正在转化变量…
Assessment system reset... successful. Processing variables...
变量一：克拉拉的诉求…变量二：外来者的动机。
Variable 1: Clara's request... Variable 2: Outsiders' intentions.
…评估结果更新：将决定权移交外来者，并允许访问「星核」相关的信息。
...Updated assessment result: Transference of decision-making authority to outsiders. Outsiders are granted access to Stellaron intelligence.
这样…这样就算成功了吗？
幸好有克拉拉在，史瓦罗的冰冷逻辑似乎只会对她网开一面。
Clara seems like the only one who can break through Svarog's cold logic. It's a good thing she was here.
可不是嘛！要不然就算打倒了史瓦罗，他也不会让我们接触那些信息的吧？
Yeah! Without her, even if we'd defeated Svarog, there's no way he'd have given us access to the intel, right?
我们的实力得到认可了。
就算是这样，如果没有克拉拉的话…史瓦罗死也不会让我们接触那些信息的吧？
Although, if Clara hadn't been here... Svarog would never have granted us access to the intel, right? Even up until the end.
希望他的记忆库里确实藏着和「星核」有关的数据。
I hope his memory bank really does contain data on the Stellaron.
这就结束了吗，娜塔？我们，「地火」，还有下层区…我们胜利了吗？
Is this it, Nat? Us, Wildfire, the Underworld... Did... did we win?
我们，还有他们的战斗…都才刚开始而已。
Our battle... their battle... it's just beginning.
终于…终于到这个时候了。
Finally... We finally made it to this point.
与其说是紧张，不如说是…胸口有什么东西，在剧烈作痛。
No, but... I do have an aching feeling in my chest.
究竟谁在说谎，该你判断了。
It's up to you to make your own judgment about who's lying now.
…我准备好了，{NICKNAME}。去揭开真相吧，我会在旁边听着。
...I'm ready, {NICKNAME}. Reveal the truth. I'm listening.
与「星核」相关的数据和录音记录已经整理完毕。是否立即调用，外来者？
I have finished collating the Stellaron data and records. Do you wish to proceed, outsiders?
申请调用数据库资料，编号<unbreak>13175</unbreak>。加密级别：最高。
Requesting database materials cache. Serial number, <unbreak>13175</unbreak>. Encryption level: Highest.
资料调用已批准，现在播放……
…多年研究的结果就摆在你的眼前，守护者大人。证据已经确凿了，那个所谓的「星核」就是一切灾难的根源。
...This is the fruit of many years of research, Madam Guardian. The evidence is irrefutable: This so-called "Stellaron" is the source of all the destruction.
民众很难接受这样的结果，博士。如果让他们知道，是伟大的阿丽萨•兰德启动了这个东西，让这个世界被寒潮覆盖……
The people will struggle to accept this conclusion, doctor. If we were to tell them that the almighty Alisa Rand activated this thing and triggered the Eternal Freeze...

把烦心事憋在心里，说到底还不是觉得自己身居高位，不想在别人面前示弱？

You seem to enjoy muddying the waters.
哎唷，这可是天大的误会！我只是热衷「看别人打架」——毕竟人与人斗，其乐无穷嘛！
Hey now, you've got me all wrong! I just enjoy watching people fight, that's all. Fierce words, fists flying... what's not to like?
喂喂喂，别这么肉麻。我们干买卖的最讨厌谢谢两字了——都是生意，么得感情！
Easy there, don't get mushy on me now. We professional types don't have time for "thank yous." It's business! Feelings don't come into it.
开个玩笑～桑博永远乐意为你效劳。
Hahaha~ you see? Gotcha! Hah, seriously though — Sampo will always be happy to assist you.
史瓦罗先生，你还好吗？我先帮你修补一下语言模块吧……
Mr. Svarog, are you okay? Let me repair your language module first...
评估中…语言模块运作正常。谢谢你，克拉拉。
Assessing... Language module operating as normal. Thank you, Clara.
记忆模块有没有受损呢？克拉拉也想尽可能地帮忙。
Did your memory module get damaged? Maybe I can fix that too.
筑城者机械时期的记录，完整；保卫战争期间的战斗数据，完整；地髓开拓团时期的记录，完整…
Architect machine era records: Intact. War of Defense combat data: Intact. Geomarrow Development Group era records: Intact...
克拉拉制造出迷你磁流钻机的记录，完整；克拉拉解释人类行为「睡懒觉」的记录，完整……
Record of Clara's crafting of miniature magnetic drill rigs: Intact. Record of Clara's explanation of human "sleeping in" behavior: Intact...
所、所以，记忆模块应该没问题了？
S—So, your memory module is okay?
与克拉拉相关的记录已经做好了备份，不必担心。
I have made a backup of all records pertaining to you, Clara. Do not worry.
已经进行了多重备份，可以随时提取。
There are multiple backups. I can recover them at any time.
史瓦罗先生，我能不能删掉一部分……
Mr. Svarog, can I delete some of them...?
不予执行。与克拉拉相关的记忆都是重要的数据，必须完整保存。
I cannot grant this request. Records pertaining to you constitute important data, Clara. They must remain intact.
对史瓦罗来说，这就是家人的回忆。
史瓦罗先生，我还想帮你检查下其它模组…请转过去一点。
Mr. Svarog, I still want to help you check a few other modules... Turn around a little.
怎么回事，这下层区的电梯就没一部好用的嘛！
Why? Why is every elevator in the Underworld busted!?
老妹，你不至于隔一分钟问一次吧？再两步，再往前走两步就到了。
Do you have to ask every other minute, missy? Two more steps, just two more steps and you're there.
喂，你去哪！眼下还有更重要的事吧，别到处神游啦！
Hey, where are you going? We have more important things to do. Stop dilly-dallying!
一见倾心，一锤定音！由「地火」组织的旧物拍卖会即将开幕！有意向的朋友，欢迎届时前往流浪者营地参加拍卖会！
Love at first sight, sold at first strike! The Wildfire used item auction is opening soon! If you're interested, head down to the vagrant camp and get involved!
外来者！我记得你，莫非你也想在拍卖会上淘些宝贝？
Outsider! I remember you. Perhaps you're hoping to find some treasures at the auction, too?
What kind of treasures can I find there?
别急着走嘛！让我给你讲讲，讲完了你就感兴趣了。
Don't just dash off! Let me tell you about it. I'm sure I can stoke your interest...
我们这拍卖会没那么多规矩，上到贝洛伯格的珍奇异宝，下到路边捡的破袜子，应有尽有——总有一款适合你！
We're not sticklers at this auction — you'll find everything from exotic Belobog rarities to tattered roadside socks!
Why is Wildfire hosting an auction?
「地火」介入流浪者营地的管理之后，发现那边存在很大的物资分配问题。人们宁愿屯着一大堆没用的玩意，也不愿意拿出来互换有用的生存物资。

Oh after Wildfire got involved in the maintenance of the vagrant camp, they saw there was a big resource distribution problem. People would rather keep a stockpile of useless objects than exchange them for useful resources.
所以我们想了个法子，干脆组织一场民间拍卖会，让大家物尽其用，各取所需！
So we intend to hold a public auction. It will allow folks to make the best use of the stuff they have by exchanging it for stuff they need.
这拍卖会都是什么人参加？
主要还是营地里的流浪者——当然了，磐岩镇的居民也可以自由参加！
It's mostly vagrants from the camp, but Boulder Town residents are welcome to join as well, of course!
来的人越多，可供交易的商品就越丰富，拍卖会的目的也就能达到了！
The more attendees we have, the more items there will be for trade, and the better we can meet the auction's goal!
How will the auction be held?
无论是买家还是卖家，都需要到拍卖会上注册身份信息。卖家的每件商品信息也需要通过注册，确保质量过关。
Buyers and sellers must all register their personal information. To ensure the quality of items, the sellers must also register details for each item.
然后就是正常的拍卖流程。拍卖师展示拍品，买家现场竞价…怎么样，简单吧？
Then there's the standard auction procedure. The auctioneer presents the items, and the bidders place their bids on the spot... Pretty straightforward, don't you think?
拍卖会上有什么好东西？
What kind of treasures can I find at the auction?
那可多了——比如奥列格首领用过的拳套，还有菲多拉小姐制造的家居机器人……
Oh plenty! Gloves used by Chief Oleg, the domestic robot that Miss Fidora built...
流浪者营地里有不少翻找古代遗物的淘金者，所以我们这次的拍卖会也会有不少稀世宝物，举个例子吧，听说有一件拍品是九成新的「地髓矿脉探针」……

There are lots of prospectors hunting for ancient relics in the vagrant camp, so there should be a lot of unique items at this auction. For example, I heard that one of the goods up for auction is a barely used Geomarrow Probe...
怎么，你听说过这样宝贝？怎么样，现在对拍卖会更感兴趣了吧？
Ah, never heard of a treasure like that before, huh? More excited about the auction now?
嘿，这样吧——你拿上这页宣传单，上面有更多有关珍奇拍品的信息。记得到时候来流浪者营地参加拍卖会，不见不散！
Oh, here — take this pamphlet. It has more information on all the rarities up for auction. Remember to stop by the vagrant camp! Be there or be square!
把地髓探针的消息告诉虎克吧…她说不定想帮费斯曼把宝贝淘回来。
I should tell Hook about the Geomarrow Probe... She might want to help Fersman get his treasure back.
宣传单你拿着。好好看看，可别丢了。记得到时候来流浪者营地参加拍卖会，不见不散！
Take a pamphlet, have a look, and don't lose it! Remember to stop by the vagrant camp for the auction. Be there or be square!
啊，鼹鼠党的荣誉队员！虎克正打算去找你呢！
Ah, honorary member! I was just about to go see you!
你先说吧，漆黑的虎克大人？
What's up, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great?
老爹已经订好生日宴会了，但虎克的「菌菌」还没有卖出去…而且，送给老爹的礼物也没有准备好。
Daddy's already planned his birthday party, but I haven't been able to sell Junjun... or buy a gift for him.
虎克该怎么办！荣誉队员，你快想想办法！
What should I do? Honorary member — you think of something!
去把老爹的探针找回来吧。
We should go get your dad's probe back.
啊！虎克正想问你和探针有关的事呢！
Ah! I was just about to ask you about the probe!
I have to tell you something first.
嗯？这么着急？那你先说吧！
Huh? What's so urgent? Spit it out!
我知道费斯曼的探针的下落了…
I know where Fersman's probe is...
啊！你怎么知道虎克在想什么？虎克正打算问你有关探针的事呢！
Ah! How did you know what I was thinking? Hook was about to ask you about the probe!
这么说来，你是找到什么线索了吗，荣誉队员？
Honorary member, you found some clues?
拍卖会…竟、竟然还有这种好事？！
The auction... So... that's where the probe is!?
你懂「拍卖」是什么意思吗？
你这家伙，把虎克当笨蛋嘛！
Hmph! Do you think Hook's stupid or something?
如果是拍卖的话，虎克不仅能找机会把「菌菌」卖出去，还能给老爹买下生日礼物…太好啦！
At the auction, I can sell Junjun AND buy a birthday gift for daddy... Yeah!
The bad news is you'll have to compete with other bidders...
怕什么，不是还有你在嘛！只要你能帮虎克拍下来就行，全靠你啦，荣誉队员！
That's nothing — you're here too! I've got the honorary member here to help me with the bidding!
「菌菌」还在老巫婆那里，我们拿上它，然后赶紧报名参加拍卖会吧！
Junjun is still with the old witch. Let's go get him and then register for the auction!
老巫…娜塔莎姐姐！「菌菌」已经缝补好了吗？
Stupid, witchy old... Natasha! Hehe, h—have you finished fixing Junjun?
啊，是虎克的熊玩偶吗？基本缝补好了，你拿去看看吧。
Oh, your teddy bear? Hehe... He's nearly done. Here, take a look at him.
哇…简直和新的一样！娜塔莎姐姐太厉害了。
Wow... He looks brand-new! Natasha, you're incredible.
你喜欢就好。不过…你带着{NICKNAME}跑过来，真的只是为了取玩偶吗？快说吧，你们又有什么打算？
Glad to be of service. Now then... did you really bring {NICKNAME} over here with you just to pick up Junjun? Come on now, what are you guys up to this time?
啊，不对！我们才没有什么打算！
Ah... n—no! That's not what we're going to do!
…拍卖会，流浪者营地的那个吗？
...The auction, the one at the vagrant camp?
我们要去找尤利安躲猫猫。
We're going to look for Julian and play hide-and seek-with him.
虎克想说的是拍卖会吧？原来如此，流浪者营地的那个吗？
The auction... right Hook? The one at the vagrant camp?
和虎克一起待久了，你也变得幼稚了呢。
...You've been spending too much time with Hook.
虎克想说的是拍卖会吧？原来如此，流浪者营地的那个吗？
The auction... right Hook? The one at the vagrant camp?
你让我费这么大力气缝补好「菌菌」，原来就是为了能把它卖出去啊——虎克？
So you made me go through all this effort to repair Junjun just so you could sell him...?
那个…这个…喂，荣誉队员！快来帮虎克狡辩一下！
I... uh... Psst, honorary member! Think of something!
看好了，我要开始狡辩了。
I think we should give up...
你们两个的组合还真可爱。
Hehe, you two make an adorable duo.
我只是在开玩笑，虎克。「菌菌」是你的玩具，想拿它怎么办都由你自己决定。但你得答应我一件事——
I was only joking, Hook. Junjun is yours, and it's entirely up to you what you do with him. But you must make one promise to me...
别再闯到裂界里去了。费斯曼先生听说了上次的事，专门来找我刨根问底了一番。
Don't go charging into the Fragmentum again. Mr. Fersman heard about what you did and came to me to find out what happened.
你老爹很担心你，别再做让他不放心的事了。
Your dad worries about you — stop giving him reasons to.
老爹…好！虎克保证，绝不让娜塔莎姐姐和老爹再担心了。
Daddy... Aw... Okay, I swear I'll never make Natasha or daddy worry again.
{NICKNAME}，又要麻烦你盯好这孩子了。不过我看你还挺乐在其中的，就不说多余的话了。
{NICKNAME}, I'm going to have to trouble you to keep an eye on this kid again. You seem to be doing a good job, so I'll leave it at that.
去忙你们的吧，祝你们一切顺利。
Off you go then, and good luck.
谢谢娜塔莎姐姐！走吧，荣誉队员——去拍卖会咯！
Thanks, Natasha! Honorary member, let's head to the auction!
去忙你们的吧，祝你们一切顺利。
Off you go then, and good luck.
你好，你们是来参加拍卖会的吗？
Welcome! Are you here to take part in the auction?
没错，虎克想拍卖大熊玩偶！
Yep! Hook wants to auction this teddy bear!
玩偶？小朋友，先拿来给我看看吧……
Teddy bear? How about I take a look at it first, little missy...
嗯…恕我直言，这件商品可能会流拍啊…毕竟在下实在看不出它有什么价值。
Hm... With all due respect, I don't think this item will generate much interest at the auction... I don't see any value in it.
这玩偶其实还挺值钱的。
Actually, this bear is worth quite a lot of money.
嗯，我再看看…做工确实不错，布料也很柔软…但光凭这些应该也卖不出多少钱吧？
Hm, let me take another look... The craftsmanship is excellent, and the fabric is soft... but I'm afraid that won't command a high price on its own.
Take a closer look at the eyes...
就你这水平还当拍卖师呢？
等等，这玩偶的眼睛…是天然黑宝石！天哪，这么丑陋的玩偶上怎么会有这么珍贵的宝石？
The eyes... wait a minute, that's natural erebus! Haha, what are precious gems doing on such an ugly teddy?
喂，你说谁丑呢？快收回你的话！
Hey, who are you calling ugly? Take that back!
哎呀呀，真是没想到…不过容我多一句嘴，两位其实应该把宝石单独取下来拍卖的。
Well, well, well, who'd have thought it... Allow me to make a suggestion — you should only auction off the gems.
你说什么呢？那是「菌菌」的眼睛，不准取下来！
What are you talking about? You can't just take Junjun's eyes off!
…别生气，小朋友，别生气！我知道了，那就遵从主人的意愿，维持原样来拍卖。
...Alright, alright, don't get upset, little missy! I'll respect the wish of the owner and keep Junjun here intact.
来，请在这份商品委托合同上签上名字——
Please sign this commodity contract here...
如果两位也打算参与竞价的话，请在这份买家身份注册表上也登记一下。
And if you and your friend would like to bid, please fill out this buyer registration form as well.
当然要参与，我再签一次！{NICKNAME}，你快打听一下探针的事！
Of course we'd like to bid! I'll sign again! {NICKNAME}, ask about the probe!
探针？小朋友指的可是「地髓矿脉探针」？据在下所知，想买探针的人还真不少，成交价格估计不会低于<unbreak>600</unbreak>冬城盾。

Probe? Are you talking about the Geomarrow Probe? As far as I know, there are a lot of people interested in acquiring that device. The estimated sale price is no less than <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield.
我们会把「地髓矿脉探针」安排在最后的阶段拍卖——谁叫那是既稀有又实用的超级宝贝呢！
Because it's a rare and useful treasure, the Geomarrow Probe will be up for bidding in the final round of the auction.
不过别慌，你们这玩偶熊身上的宝石也价值不俗。要是有人愿意出大价钱买下，你们的探针也就有着落了。
But don't worry, the gems on your teddy bear are also very valuable. You'll have the chance to bid on the probe if someone's willing to pay a high price for him.
I'm great at bidding a price up!
Oh? Then we'll be counting on you.
感觉这东西也卖不了多少钱。
He doesn't seem like he'll fetch too high a price.
告诉你们一个诀窍——<color=#dbc291ff>参加竞拍的买家越多，玩偶大熊的价格就能卖得越高。</color>这会场里还潜伏了很多潜在买家，只需要你们轻轻地推他们一把。

I'll tell you a secret... <color=#dbc291ff>the more bidders there are, the more you can get for your bear here.</color> This place is teeming with potential buyers. It only takes a gentle nudge to get them to join in.
虎克不是很理解，具体该怎么做呢？
Hook doesn't get it. What are we supposed to do?
「真诚的爱」原来是这么好用的东西吗？好耶！
Is "true love" really that useful? Hee-hee!
原来如此，那虎克恐怕帮不上忙啦，因为虎克不会骗人！
Hmm, I won't be much help then. Hook never deceives anyone!
好耶，洞洞机已经准备好了！
Yay! Diggertron's all set and ready to go!
「菌菌」那么可爱，我们赶紧去问问看，肯定会有很多人想买的。
Let's ask around. Junjun's super cute — I'm sure there'll be loads of people interested in buying him.
别来和我搭话！这拍卖会上的人我一个都不信！
Don't try making conversation with me! I don't trust anyone here!
告诉你，拍卖会的赢家只有一个——凡是在场的，统统都是我的对手！
I'm warning you, there's only one winner at an auction — everyone here is one of my competitors!
哼，你其实是在夸我对不对？臭小鬼，别以为我听不出来！
Hmph, I'll take that as a compliment! You think I can't hear you, you little brat?
Well, at least it's a friendly crowd.
哼，你以为能骗得了我？表面装得越友善，背后心机就越重！
Haha, you think you can fool me? The friendlier they are on the outside, the more devious they are on the inside!
这个大叔，好像很容易生气的样子……
Seems like this guy's got a real bad temper...
生气？生什么气，我心情好得很，别胡说！
Temper? What temper? I'm perfectly calm, thank you!
你们是卖家吧？刚才我在竞拍清单上看到个什么玩偶熊，是不是你们的拍品？
You're sellers, right? I just caught sight of a teddy bear on the bid list. Is that yours?
哼，看你们两个一脸正直的样子…这玩偶熊里肯定有诈！
Hmph, you two with your poker faces... You've got a trick up your sleeves with that bear?
…这个大叔，好像觉得全世界的人都在故意骗他…怎么办，荣誉队员？
...This guy thinks that the whole world is against him... What should we do, honorary member?
那玩意就是垃圾，千万别竞价。
The bear is garbage. Don't bid on it.
…怎么，还想忽悠我？你不让我竞，那我偏要竞！我才不会吃这哑巴亏！
...Trying to dupe me into not bidding on it, huh? Fine, then I will bid for it! I won't let this opportunity slip!
怎么？不想让我占到便宜是吧？那我倒要看看你们这玩偶里面藏着什么玄机，哈！
Don't want me to profit from your item, huh? Well in that case, I'm definitely gonna solve the mystery of your teddy bear, haha!
让他买你的玩偶大熊吧。
可我不想把「菌菌」卖给怪大叔……
But I don't wanna sell Junjun to such a weirdo...
…怎么，不想让我占到便宜是吧？那我偏要出来竞个价，看看你们这玩偶里藏着什么玄机，哼！
...Don't want me to profit from your item, huh? Well in that case, I'll just have to place a bid and solve the mystery of your teddy bear, hahaha!
真是个怪大叔…算啦，起码结果还不错，能多一个人竞价也是好事！
What a weirdo... Anyway, at least we've tricked him into bidding for it!
那个熊玩偶不简单啊…你看到了吗？
Well, look at that. That's no ordinary teddy bear...
呃…不好意思，我看入神了。没想到真的还有人来搭话。
Oh! Uh... sorry, I was in a bit of a trance. I didn't know someone was about to strike up a conversation.
罢了，看你也不像有钱竞价的样子，就告诉你吧——那熊玩偶的眼睛可是货真价实的黑宝石！
Huh, you don't look like you'll be bidding on much, so I'll tell you... That teddy bear's eyes are genuine erebus!
因为它的眼睛是黑宝石？
等等，你怎么知道？！莫非是…同行？
...Wait, how did you know that!? Unless you're... a fellow gemologist?
咳，没错…没想到还有其他人发现了啊。哎，看来想把宝石搞到手没那么容易……
Ahem, yes... I didn't think anyone else had noticed. *sigh* I guess getting my hands on those gems won't be so simple after all...
但是这实在离谱，我无法理解…为什么要把那么贵重的宝石缝在玩具熊上？这是什么新型诈骗陷阱吗？
But it's so absurd... I don't understand why precious gems would be sewn onto a teddy bear. Is this some new kind of scam?
…你是觉得「菌菌」配不上那块石头嘛？
...So you don't think Junjun deserves those gems?
没什么！这孩子喜欢说胡话…
No one! This kid's always spouting nonsense...
It's okay, I didn't take it to heart.
其实我们是那个玩偶的卖家。
We are, in fact, the bear's sellers.
原来如此，怎么不早说呢？我对你们的拍品很感兴趣。
Oh, haha, wh—why didn't you bring that up earlier? Your item has piqued my curiosity.
不管怎么说，这种纯度的黑宝石在下层可不多见。得想办法把那只玩具熊搞到手，就算要花大价钱……
In any case, erebus of that purity is hard to come by in the Underworld. I have to get my hands on that bear, even if it means breaking the bank! Ha...
哼，「菌菌」肯定值大价钱没错！
Hmph, Junjun will break your bank for sure.
（宝石专家也要加入竞标，说不定虎克的玩偶会变得非常抢手呢。）
(The gemologist will be bidding too. Hook's teddy bear may be the center of attention.)
请问你对玩偶大熊感兴趣吗？
Are you interested in the teddy bear?
He sure is cute and cuddly!

生日聚会上有什么吃的？
What will there be to eat?
虎克每次过生日都要吃歌蒂大婶做的黑豆蛋糕，分量超足！
Aunt Gertie always makes a big Black Bean Cake for Hook's birthday!
还有还有，老爹每次都会给我准备一只特别大的烤岩居蟹，想想口水就要下来了。
Oh! Oh! And daddy always makes a huge Roasted Rock Crab for me. It makes my mouth water just thinking about it!
也别忘了洞洞机！每年这个时候，老爹还会准备一年份的机油，让洞洞机喝到饱。
And don't forget about Diggertron! Daddy brings a year's worth of machine oil and Diggertron drinks it all up!
我可是鼹鼠党的老大，要是不把肚子填饱，就没力气惩罚坏蛋啦！
I'm the boss of The Moles! If I don't get enough to eat, how will I have the energy to punish villains?
首先当然是老爹啦！说起来，老爹以前从来不过生日，是直到他领养了虎克以后才开始有这个传统的。
Well, I had to invite daddy first! Speaking of birthdays, daddy never used to celebrate them. He only started doing it when he adopted Hook.
其他客人还有鼹鼠党的小伙伴，还有…对了，还邀请了希儿！她说今天没空，但是会把礼物寄给虎克。
I also invited other members of The Moles, and... Oh yeah! Seele too! She couldn't come today, but she said she'd still send me a gift.
虎克还邀请了老巫婆，斯薇塔姐姐…当然还有你啦，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！
I also invited the old witch, Swetta, aaaand... you, of course! The honorary member {NICKNAME}!
老爹我要先来讲两句，大家可别嫌啰嗦——
I do hope you'll forgive the ramblings of an old man, but I would like to say a few words...
在领养虎克之前，我从来不知道自己的生日，当然也不办什么生日聚会。
I had no idea when my birthday was before I adopted Hook, and I most certainly did not celebrate it.
直到碰上我女儿之后，我才意识到过生日这件事的意义…所以我才把自己的生日定在和虎克同一天，这样我们就能一起庆祝这个特别的日子了。

I didn't realize how important birthday celebrations were until I met my daughter... That is why I chose to have my birthday on the same day as Hook, so that we could celebrate this special day together.
就这样年复一年…到了后来，连我自己也开始对生日聚会期待了起来。
That continued year after year... until I, too, began to look forward to the party.
今天是特别的一天——除了鼹鼠党的小朋友们以外，虎克还请到了这位亲切勇敢的新朋友，{NICKNAME}。希望你也能在聚会上玩得尽兴！
Today is an extra special day. In addition to The Moles, Hook has invited a dear and brave new friend. {NICKNAME}, I hope you have a wonderful time at the party today!
毕竟我也算是有功之人嘛。
I guess I did help out a little.
没错没错，荣誉队员可是帮了大忙了！
That's right, this honorary member helped Hook a lot!
我听娜塔莎说了，是你护送着虎克去把她的大熊玩偶给拿了回来。哎，以前虎克不抱着那个玩偶就睡不着觉呢。
Natasha told me that you helped Hook retrieve her teddy bear. It used to be that Hook could only fall asleep when she held that bear in her arms.
老、老爹，别说这个啦！虎克已经长大了，不用抱着「菌菌」也能睡着。
D—Daddy! Don't bring that up! Hook's grown up now — I can sleep without hugging Junjun...
自从我们离开了矿镇，日子就变得越发难过了。为了养家糊口，老爹总是顾不上照看你，经常连着好几天都回不了家一趟。
Life has gotten increasingly difficult since we left the mining town. All those days away at work have meant that your dad hasn't always been around to look after you.
还好有「菌菌」一直陪在虎克身边。老爹不在的时候，是「菌菌」让你不至于感到孤单。所以，老爹我……
But fortunately, Junjun was always with you to keep you company when I wasn't around. I...
...Daddy! I—I have to tell you something...
其实…其实我已经把「菌菌」卖掉了！
别担心，老爹！虎克已经不需要玩偶陪伴啦！有娜塔莎姐姐、鼹鼠党还有荣誉队员陪着虎克，虎克早就不会觉得孤单了。
Don't worry, daddy! I don't need a doll to keep me company anymore! Natasha, The Moles and the honorary member will keep me company from now on, so I won't be lonely.
我、我果然是个不称职的老爹，居然连这么重要的事都不知道……
I truly am an incompetent father. I had no idea...
不不，虎克知道，老爹是最关心虎克的啦！是虎克不想让老爹担心，所以才没告诉你。
Not true! I know you care about me the most, daddy! I just didn't tell you because I didn't want you to worry.
谢谢你，虎克…但是这样一来，我准备的生日礼物不就……
Thank you, Hook... but the birthday gift I've chosen is...
哎？老爹你给我准备了什么呀？

打开了费斯曼送给虎克的生日礼物盒……
Hook opens the present that Fersman got her...
这、这是…给玩偶的帽子、衣服、梳妆台！还有一座给玩偶住的小屋子……
Th—This... a teddy bear's cap, clothes, and a dresser! And a little home for him...
这年头，做玩具的商家真是越来越少了…我走了好几个小镇才买到这些。但是真没想到，「菌菌」已经被卖掉了。可惜……
Toy-making companies are increasingly scarce this year... I had to travel to different towns. I never expected Junjun might have been sold. What a shame...
没关系，老爹别哭！虎克会跟着娜塔莎姐姐学着再做一个玩偶！
It's okay daddy, don't cry! Natasha will teach me how to make another doll!
喔，对了！我也给老爹准备了礼物，你快打开看看吧！
Oh, yeah! I got a gift for you, too! Open it and take a look!
宝、宝贝女儿送给我的？那可得好好看看，好好看看……
打开了虎克送给费斯曼的生日礼物盒……
Fersman opens the present that Hook got him...
嘿嘿，这是我和{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}在拍卖会上买下的探针！竞价用的钱就是卖掉「菌菌」才拿到的哦！
Hehe, {NICKNAME} helped me to bid for it at the auction! I bought it with the money I got from selling Junjun!
有了它，老爹肯定就能把「矿脉探测器」修好了吧？
With this, you should be able to repair the vein detector, right daddy?
谢谢你，虎克！这件生日礼物…老爹特别喜欢，只是现在可能还用不上……
Thank you so much, Hook! Daddy really likes this birthday gift... but I might not be able to use it right now...
这些玩偶…就是老爹卖掉了「矿脉探测器」以后才给你买的。
I... bought your gift with the money I got from selling the vein detector.
…啊！那虎克的礼物不是也…派不上用场了？
...Ah!? So my gift is also... useless...
虎克…你喜欢老爹送你的礼物吗？

…当、当然啦！老爹送给虎克的礼物，是世界上最棒的礼物！
...O—Of course! Your gifts are the best in the world!

哦？你知道的还不少。我也不装了，没错，的确是费斯曼那老头卖给我的。

可惜没能搞来地髓探针…光有这探测器有啥用啊，唉。

Did you send the thief to steal the detector?

我安排了一个小学徒去参加拍卖，遗憾失手了。
I arranged for a young apprentice to attend the auction, but he lost out in the bidding.
哼，你根本不明白古代遗物的价值。
Hmph, clearly you don't understand the value of ancient relics.
可惜，现在再想找到一枚地髓探针可太不容易了…这笔生意真是越想越亏，哎……
Shame, it's becoming increasingly difficult to find a Geomarrow Probe... The more I think about it, the more I realize that this deal was a big mistake... *sigh*
干脆把它卖给费斯曼吧。
Why not just sell it to Fersman?
费斯曼也不会想当这个冤大头吧？不过我可以去问问，能出手的话还是尽早出了才好……
Fersman wouldn't want to be the sucker, would he? But maybe I should ask him... It would be great to get rid of it as early as possible...
哼，那我就姑且信你…等下我去找费斯曼，问问他探针打算怎么卖。

你再等等，总有一天会找到的。
Maybe one day you'll find it.
这探针有多稀有我会不知道？我得查查拍卖会上那个买家到底是谁……

Mechanical Mining Pick and safety helmet
外来…外来者…克拉拉…的朋友。
你是怎么靠肉眼辨认机器人的……

谢…谢谢…外来者…救了…克拉拉。
这小家伙说话怎么磕磕巴巴的啊？

大概是语言模块出了些什么故障吧…你能带我们去见克拉拉吗？
Its language module must have malfunctioned... Can you take us to Clara?
外来…是…克拉拉的朋友…跟跟跟…跟我来……
Outsiders... are f—friends of Clara... Follow me...

Are you trying to start another fight...

There was a huge shaking just now coming up through the ground. Mr. Svarog said it... must have been...

你不早提醒我们还有那种兵器…

The Engine of Creation was an immense construction machine created by the Architects. It was not built to fight.
行吧，反正我们赢了…多亏了那台大机器人，我们终于把「星核」给解决咯。布洛妮娅也给出了承诺，上下层的封锁很快会解除啦。
Well whatever, we won... Thanks to that giant robot, we were finally able to take care of the Stellaron... and Bronya made a promise — the Underworld and the Overworld will soon be reunited.

谢谢三月姐姐…谢谢大家！老实说，克拉拉一开始没有抱太大的希望……

但是现在…史瓦罗先生，可以吗？
But now... Mr. Svarog, what do you say?
哥哥姐姐们说过，你们是来自其它星球的旅行者，对吗？克拉拉也想成为和你们一样的人——总有一天…克拉拉也想去更远的地方旅行，结识更多的朋友。
You guys said you were travelers from other worlds, right? I want to be just like you... One day, I'm gonna go traveling to faraway places and make new friends.
Your future is yours to decide!

确实和一般的拖延症患者有所差别。
She certainly moves a lot faster than some people I know...
...If you haven't got anything nice to say right now, zip it!
那个小偷…怎么又来偷零件了呀？不知道这次有没有留下什么线索……

啊，是外来者{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}……！

There have been a few unusual thefts in the dwelling over the past few days.
流浪者叔叔阿姨们说，大家最近辛苦收集来的零件总是莫名其妙地消失。他们怀疑营地里可能出了小偷——
The vagrants say that the parts they worked so hard to obtain have completely vanished. They're worried that there's a thief in the camp...
可大家搜查了很久，也没有揪出偷走零件的小偷。更奇怪的是，那个小偷似乎只偷零件，对其他贵重物品根本不感兴趣……

Despite our investigations, no one has been able to track down the thief. What's even stranger is that the thief appears to be only interested in stealing parts, and doesn't care about other valuable items...
叔叔阿姨们实在没办法，就来拜托史瓦罗先生调查这件事，但暂时也没查出任何结果…克拉拉自己也小小地调查了一下，还是没发现什么有用的线索……
The vagrants had no choice but to ask Mr. Svarog to look into it, but he still hasn't found anything... I investigated the matter myself, but I came up empty-handed...
啊…克拉拉感觉，有些…头晕。怎么会有这么奇怪的小偷……
Jeez... I'm baffled. What a strange thief...
一起把线索从头捋一遍吧。
Don't worry. We can go over the clues together.
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也要来调查这件事吗？这样的话，或许能发现克拉拉没注意到的线索……
Are you also here to look into this case, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Perhaps if we work together we can uncover some clues that I missed...

It's just... I haven't found enough clues yet. The thief is really tricky. They haven't left any traces in the dwelling...
不如我们再去现场调查一下？
Why don't we go back to the crime scene and start from there?
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也要来调查这件事吗？这样的话，或许能发现克拉拉没注意到的线索……
Are you also here to look into this case, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Perhaps if we work together we can uncover some clues that I missed...
是犯罪的气息…我兴奋起来了！
Mmm! The smell of crime... How exciting!
…{F#大、大姐姐}{M#大、大哥哥}的表情，突然有点吓人……
...Th—That look on your face is a bit scary...

But if you're willing to help look into this case, perhaps we can uncover some clues that I missed.
啊…对了！听说昨晚守夜巡逻的叔叔阿姨又撞到了那个小偷，但克拉拉还没来得及去问…要一起去问问看吗？
Oh! I heard the vagrants on patrol last night ran across the thief again, but I haven't had time to look into it... Should we go ask them?

{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的台词…很帅气呢，很像在史瓦罗先生的「电影」里看到的那种人…是叫「侦探」，对吧？
You sound so cool, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}... You're like one of the characters from Mr. Svarog's movies. Aren't they called detectives?
看到{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}这么有干劲，克拉拉好像也激动起来了——那我们就出发吧。

不过…克拉拉觉得也很帅气！那我们就出发吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
But actually... I think it's cool, too! Now, let's get started, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}!
您还好吗，叔叔？听说您昨晚撞见了那个零件小偷…可以跟我们说说昨天夜里发生的事吗？
Sir, how are you? I heard you saw the thief who stole the parts last night. Can you tell us what happened?
啊、啊！原、原来是克拉拉，我还以为是…吓死我了！
Oh! Clara, it's you! I thought it was... You scared the living daylights out of me!
我、我昨晚是看到那个小偷了…不过，你旁边这位是？

只是一位热心的开拓者。
开拓者…啊，我知道了——你就是那位轰动全城的「外来者」，对吧？
Trailblazer... Oh, I know. You're the outsider who's made a name for themself around town, right?
哎哟、哎哟，有这样的大能人来抓小偷，那我可安心了…让、让我组织一下语言，把昨晚的经历告诉你，你等下……
Oh, wow. I feel way better knowing that a big shot like you is here to catch the thief... H—Hold on, I'll explain what happened last night. Just let me gather my thoughts first...

…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！这个外号果然还是太……

侦、侦探？我知道了，你、你是来帮忙抓小偷的，对吧？
D—Detective? I see. You're here to help catch the thief, right?
哎呀，多个人帮忙可是件大好事…那你等会儿，我、我得组织下语言，把昨晚的经历告诉你……
It's great that there are more people here to solve this case... H—Hold on, I'll explain what happened last night. Just let me gather my thoughts first...

呜…我都快被吓死了，太可怕了！
Goodness, I was so scared! It was dreadful!
Don't panic. We're only getting started...
我、你、我、呃…不好意思…只、只是昨晚的事情太吓人了…我、我继续！
I... you... I—I'm sorry... Last night was just so terrifying... I—I'll continue!
我昨天晚上值岗的时候又冷又饿，于是就想着回一趟营地，把之前吃剩的罐头热一下当宵夜。
I was cold and hungry while on patrol last night, so I decided to return to the dwelling and heat up some leftover canned food for a snack.
结果我刚掀开帐篷…那个黑影，那个贼吓人的黑影就窜到了我的眼前！
But when I entered the tent... the thief's silhouette scurried across my vision!
当时营地里黑漆漆的一片，我没看清那毛贼的正脸，但我确信，那绝对是个凶残的家伙……
I couldn't see the thief's face because the tent was so dark, but I could tell he wasn't a nice guy...
因为、因为那家伙转身逃跑的时候，他身上带的刀具直接划过了我的脸！我当时真的以为要小命不保了……
B—Because when he turned to flee, he swung a knife right across my face! In that moment, I really thought I was going to die...
贴在我脸上的那种冰凉的感觉…还有我闻到的那股铁锈味…那家伙拿的绝对是什么金属利器！只有这一点，我绝对不会记错！
I could feel the blade's chill on my cheeks, and smell its rusty scent... The weapon that fella had was definitely a metal one! That's the only thing I'm certain of!
而、而且，我在黑暗中瞧见他的轮廓…那人的脑壳竟然是方形的！对，没错，特别方！
Also, I saw the outline of him in the dark... That fella's head was absolutely square! Yes, you heard me, square!
——你敢信吗，怎么会有人是方脑壳？！实在是太可怕了……
Can you believe that? Someone with a square head! It was truly terrifying...
A square head? Oh my gosh!
唔，虽然听着有些奇怪…但这说不定也是一条线索。克拉拉记下来了。
It sounds bizarre, but it could be a clue. I'll jot it down.
Please, I can't carry on. I'm too terrified...
呜，克、克拉拉也很害怕！但是…要把重要线索记下来……
I—I'm also terrified! But I still have to jot down the important clues...
Uh, I guess that could be a clue...
啊，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说得对！原来如此，克拉拉记下来了……
Oh, you're right, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! I see! I'll jot it down...
叔叔，您先冷静一下…这么说来，那个窃贼应该随身带着金属利器，而且有个…呃，方脑袋…对吗？
Sir, please take a deep breath... So, the thief was armed with a metal weapon and had a... um, square head... correct?
唔…克拉拉没法通过这些线索联想到什么。{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}有什么想法吗？
Hmm... I'm struggling to make sense of these clues. Do you have any thoughts, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?
没什么头绪…还有其他细节吗？

呜…对不住，人家太害怕了嘛！猛地一个黑影窜出来，谁还会关注那些细节啊……
I'm sorry... I was too scared! When a shadow leaps out at you, who could possibly pay attention to such tiny details?
看来没有更多信息了…我们现在知道了犯人的外貌特征，而且很凶暴。可是要上哪找这样的人呢？
It seems that's everything... We now know one of the culprit's physical traits and that he is extremely violent. But how can we track him down?
瞧你这样…不会是共犯吧！
Why are you being so evasive? Are you an accomplice?
你、你不要凭空污人清白！我都吓成这样了，怎么可能是共犯？呜呜……
How can you just accuse me like that!? I was terrified, how could I be an accomplice!? *sob* ...
对、对不起！那个…{F#大姐姐她}{M#大哥哥他}应该是开玩笑的…请您不要放在心上！
I'm sorry! {F#She}{M#He} was just joking... Please don't take {F#her}{M#him} seriously!
结案了，犯人就是方脑壳悍匪！

喔…不愧是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！可我们要上哪找具备这种特征的人呢？
Oh! You've figured it out. But how are we going to track down someone with such an unusual appearance?
——啊，对了，对了！那家伙逃跑的时候慌不择路，撞倒了一些东西…好、好像还留下了一些痕迹之类的线索。
Ah, yes, I remember something! While the culprit was hurrying to escape, he knocked something over... He may have left some clues or something.
这是很重要的线索…！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们等下一起去查看一下现场吧？

那家伙应该是往那个方向跑的——现场没人动过，痕迹应该都还在…那、那就拜托这位{F#好姐姐}{M#好哥哥}帮忙抓贼了。
I think he ran that way. No one has touched the crime scene, so any traces he left behind should still be there... P—Please catch the thief for us.
山体上有几道突兀的痕迹，似乎是被某种金属利器剐蹭后留下的。痕迹的末端指向了远方的某处。
Some abrupt scratches left on the mountain which seem to be done by a metal weapon. The end of the scratches points to a distant place.
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你看…这里的痕迹不像是自然形成的，会不会是犯人留下的呢？
Take a look at these marks... These are very suspicious. Could they have been left by the culprit?
痕迹向着那个方向去了…我们去那附近找找看吧。
They point in that direction... Let's go take a look.
此处附近似乎很少有人到访，但地上却留下了一串奇怪的剐蹭痕迹，直朝前方蜿蜒而去。
Few people would come to this place, but you can see some scratches on the ground, snaking their way forward.
这串痕迹…好奇怪，看上去不像是人类留下来的……
And look at these! How unusual... They don't appear to have been left by a human...
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，痕迹到这里就中断了…我们只能在这附近找找其他线索了。

不过，这附近是堆放机械垃圾的地方啊。难道……

偷零件的犯人，出来！面对我！

确实…这个型号的机器人，应该没有配备金属利器才对。

少废话，把偷走的零件交出来！

...Is it trying to say: "Please don't hurt me, humans"?

它似乎十分需要这些零件，让我们不要伤害它……

程序已成功植入。该个体需要进行一段时间的断电维护，暂时无法交流。我们可以稍后再来查看状况。
The programs were successfully installed. The robot will require offline maintenance and will be unable to communicate for some time. We can return to it later.
…克拉拉明白了。那…我们就先回基地吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
...I see. In that case, let's go back to the base.
（大概是告一段落了…过后再联系克拉拉看看状况吧。）
(I think it's over... I'll check in with Clara later to see what's up.)
啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！克拉拉想给你看的…就是这些小家伙。
Oh, it's you! I wanted to show you something... These little fellas.
中间这个大家伙，难道是……
That big one in the middle — is that...
你好，你好，欢迎！好久不见，好久不见！
Hello, hello, hello! Long time no see!
好久不见！今天，天气，很好！
Long time no see! Today, weather, great!
谢谢，你！好久，不见！喜欢，{NICKNAME}，克拉拉！
Thank, you! Long time, no see! {NICKNAME} friend, Clara friend!
是的，这就是克拉拉说的…基地网络的怪事。
Yes, that's what I was talking about... Something strange has happened.
之前，在史瓦罗先生的帮助下，帕斯卡顺利完成了格式化，被纳入基地网络。可在那之后……
Mr. Svarog helped to format Pascal and integrate him into the base network, but after that...
克拉拉意外发现…只要我跟史瓦罗先生提到{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的名字，基地里的小家伙们就会变得格外开心。
...I discovered that whenever I mentioned your name to Mr. Svarog, these guys at the base would get really happy.
而且，你看——它们好像对你特别热情！就连克拉拉也没法在初次见面时就得到大家的认可……
Look how excited they are about you! I've never met anyone for the first time that was so happy to see me...
克拉拉在想…是不是因为它们共享了来自帕斯卡的情感？
I was wondering... is it because they share Pascal's emotions?
是啊，就好像是…帕斯卡一直都陪在我们身边一样。
Yeah, it's like Pascal is always with us.
这种温暖的感觉…和以前一模一样呢。
It's a nice feeling... just like the one I had before.
Maybe it's some kind of technical fault?
史瓦罗先生也这么说——他认为帕斯卡的情感智能类似某种病毒，在不知什么时候感染了连接基地网络的全部个体。
That's what Mr. Svarog said. He said Pascal's emotional intelligence was like a virus that infected the entire base network at some point.
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}不用紧张，克拉拉觉得这不是件坏事。因为……
Don't worry, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. I don't think it's a bad thing, because...
史瓦罗先生没有选择清除这种「病毒」——这不就是最好的证明吗？
...Mr. Svarog chose not to get rid of it. Isn't that the most convincing proof?
…啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！克拉拉正在对帕斯卡做例行检查呢。
...Oh, it's you! I'm just doing a checkup on Pascal.
帕斯卡最近没有出问题吧？
看起来没有…史瓦罗先生的保护程序非常有效。只是不知道以后会发生什么……
He's been doing great — Mr. Svarog's programs are extremely effective... It's just hard to know if it will last...
啊…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}难得来一趟，要不要和帕斯卡聊聊天？
Would you like to speak with Pascal?
What have you been up to recently?
帕斯卡，执行，任务，来自克拉拉！
保护，铆钉镇！等待，大家，回来，生活！
Protect, Rivet Town! Waiting, everybody, come back, live, together!
You haven't been stealing anymore, have you?
没有，帕斯卡！克拉拉，说，错误，偷窃！
No, Pascal! Clara, say, wrong, stealing!
帕斯卡，不会，偷窃，再！执行，克拉拉，任务！
Pascal, not, again, steal! Carry out, Clara, mission!
看到你过得不错，我就放心了。
I'm glad to see you're doing well.
谢谢，{NICKNAME}！你，生活，愉快！帕斯卡，开心！
Thank you, {NICKNAME}! Your, life, happy! Pascal, happy!
He's still talking a little funny.
啊…克拉拉也尝试过维修帕斯卡的逻辑语言中枢，我还特意加装了新的芯片。
Oh, I tried to fix Pascal's language module by installing a new chip.
但…似乎没有起到什么效果。不过，考虑到这样也不影响交流…克拉拉就先让帕斯卡保持原状了。
...It didn't seem to make much difference though. Still, at least we can understand what he's saying... I'll leave him alone for now.
不、不太，运行，不太、顺利，很，很抱歉！
Not, not quite, running, smoothly! Very, apologies!
总之，帕斯卡现在的状态还算健康。今天的例行检查也基本完成了…我们就先回去吧？
Hehe, you're in good health, Pascal. Today's checkup is over — shall we head back now?
Flower, flower, flower, for you — don't forget.
帕斯卡，自己，自己做！废弃，零件，材料！不是，偷的，很干净。
Pascal, make, make myself! Scraps, parts, materials! Not stolen, very clean.
Thank you, thank you! Thank you, Clara, {NICKNAME}!
那…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，这朵花就送给你吧？
Umm... {F#big sister}{M#big brother}, would you like a flower?
（这个选择恐怕会直接影响此事的结果…慎重考虑后再做决定吧。）
(My choice will have a direct impact on the outcome... I should mull it over.)
戒备森严啊…想溜进去怕是没戏了。希露瓦，是你智取的时候啦。
They've jacked up security alright... how the heck are we gonna sneak in? Serval, we need one of those brainwaves.
好，交给姐姐我吧。你们跟紧点，别露馅了。
Leave it to me. Stick close guys, and don't get spotted.
前方军事重地，闲人不得入内！
This is a military base. Trespassers aren't allowed in.
等等，这是…欸，这不是希露瓦大姐头吗？好久不见！
Wait, isn't that... Ah! Serval! Long time no see!
哟，这不是弗朗兹嘛！好久不见，你怎么还在看大门啊？
Well, if it isn't Franz, long time no see! You're still watching the entrance?
这…这话我没法接呀，希露瓦大姐头还是这么犀利……
Well you see, I... Bah, you haven't changed Serval. Still nailing us to the wall...
那个…这么晚了，您来这边干嘛？后面这几个是谁？
So... what brings you over here at this hour? And who are the guys behind you?
我老弟说禁区的能源管线出故障了，挺要命的。他又信不过外包的维修工…只好请我来打白工咯。
My brother said the restricted zone energy lines were malfunctioning — told me it was urgent. He doesn't trust those contracted maintenance workers... so he got me in for free.
这几个是我的助手，我们要把这里的设备都检修一遍。
These guys are my assistants. We need to overhaul all the installations here.
那个…我没听说管线有问题啊……
Uh... I didn't hear anything about the energy lines malfunctioning...
拜托，这是技术部门的事，你守门的知道了能干嘛？行了，快让我进去吧。要是半夜供暖出了问题，冻死人了你负责吗？

Oh please, this is a Technology Division issue. Why would they tell you guys? Come on, let us in already. If the heating system goes down in the middle of the night, are you gonna be responsible for all the frozen corpses?
N—No, that's uh, not something I could handle...
既然是杰帕德戍卫官的姐姐…应该没问题吧？
Seeing as you're Captain Gepard's sister, it should be fine...
好吧，这是临时的访客证，您拿好了…呃，出来的时候记得还给我啊！
Okay, here are some temporary passes... Oh, and remember to give them back to me when you leave.
谢啦，弗朗兹。找机会我跟老弟美言几句，让他提拔提拔你！
Thanks, Franz. I'll put in a good word for you with my brother and get him to promote you!
不要啊，杰帕德长官最厌恶走后门，您提都别提我，就是最好的美言了……
No, no, Captain Gepard hates all that under-the-table stuff. I'd have a better chance if you don't mention me at all...
这证好久没见过了啊…禁区基本没有外人。
I haven't seen one of those for a long time. Hmm... The restricted zone virtually never allows outsiders in.
抱歉，我在值岗，没空聊闲天。
Sorry, I'm on duty, no time to chat.
有什么事的话，去找警卫队长汇报吧。
If there's an issue, report to the security captain.
你们不是来做检修的吗？怎么在这里乱晃？
Aren't you the maintenance people? What are you doing over here?
禁区内不得随意走动！快去干活！
You can't just go wherever you please in the restricted zone! Get to work!
听说城里最近在通缉捉拿重案犯，甚至调了批铁卫回去。
I heard that there's an arrest warrant out in the city for some major criminals — they even recalled some of the Guards.
真不消停啊。前线的战况够吃紧的了，后方还出问题……
It never ends. Things are bad enough on the front line without things going south behind us...
还好有杰帕德戍卫官在，听说重案犯之前是被他抓住的。
At least Captain Gepard's here, they say he captured the fugitives once already.
「机械热潮」又发新歌了，你听过了吗？
...Mechanical Fever released a new song. Did you hear it?
听了，这次让佩拉做了主唱，吓我一跳。风格完全不一样了。
Sure did, Pela was on lead vocals this time, scared me half to death. It's a completely different style.
「机械热潮」也要转型了吗…唉，摇滚已死，没有受众了啊。
Even Mechanical Fever is changing... *sigh* Rock 'n' roll's dead, there's no audience anymore.
别这么悲观，偶尔换个口味罢了。我觉得佩拉也不错。
Don't be so pessimistic. They're just keeping things fresh. I thought Pela was pretty good.
马利克下周也要调走了，你听说了吗？最近前线和城里好像都很缺人手。
Hmm-hmm... Did you hear Mallick is being reassigned? It seems like both the front line and the city are shorthanded right now.
真的假的？马利克刚升职没几天吧？不可能调他啊。
Seriously? No way. I thought Mallick had only just been promoted?
总感觉有什么大事要发生了，神神秘秘的。
Mysterious. It feels like something big's about to go down.
调哪都行，别上前线就好…我刚入伍一年，可不想把小命丢了啊。
As long as it's away from the front line, I'd happily be reassigned... It's only been a year since I enlisted — I'm not ready to lose my life.
能不能有点出息，在后备队混吃等死能「存护」谁？我们铁卫是为了保护贝洛伯格人民而存在的！
Ahh, you make it sound terrible. Good luck "preserving" anything with those idlers in the reserve units. Our purpose as Silvermane Guards is to protect the citizens of Belobog.
我知道你们中有些混子，觉得后备队每天就是游手好闲，混吃等死。告诉你们，这种想法大错特错！
I'm aware that there are those among you who see the reserve units as a vacation. Well let me set one thing straight: You are gravely mistaken!
在这禁区，前有裂界怪物虎视眈眈，后要提防渗透城市的阴谋团体——
This is the restricted zone. The Fragmentum before you conceals monsters that watch your every move. Behind us, we have a band of conspirators that have infiltrated the city...
到了情势危急的时候——现在放松散漫的家伙就会被两面夹击，丢掉小命！
The situation is critical... The lazy and undisciplined among you will lose your lives to the forces surrounding us!
所以从今天开始，每天训练增加两百次卧推，外加三十分钟的单手平板支撑！听明白了吗？
As such, starting from today, we will be adding <unbreak>200</unbreak> bench presses and <unbreak>30</unbreak> extra minutes of one-arm planks to our daily drill! Is that clear?
看到中间那座机械栈桥了吗？穿过那座桥，对面就是人间地狱。
Do you see that mechanical gear bridge? When you cross over to the other side, you arrive at hell on earth.
So what exactly is on the other side?
望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
An endless Fragmentum, a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.
这个世界的「地狱」长什么样？
嗯…大概是个冰雪覆盖，冷到让人受不了的地方吧？做科研工作的人才没时间细想这些。
Hm... It's a place too cold to bear, covered in snow and ice. The guys doing the scientific research don't have time to worry about the surroundings.
这座栈桥对面就是禁区的前线，那里有望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
The restricted zone front line is on the other side of the gear bridge. It's an endless Fragmentum with a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.
追随克里珀的筑城者也信地狱？
The Architects follow Qlipoth. Do they believe in hell?
没错。筑城者认为地狱在每个世界都可能存在，是一种若不介入则必然降临的状态。
They do. The Architects believe that hell can exist on any world — a plight that will inevitably come to be without intervention.
未来，某种可怕的灾难将会到来，若不在「存护」克里珀的指引下铸造墙壁，灾难就会席卷群星，让每个世界都沦为地狱。

In the future, a terrible catastrophe will arrive. If, under Qlipoth the Preservation's guidance, we fail to construct a barrier, that catastrophe will sweep away the stars, plunging all worlds into hell.
这就是筑城者的信念…而对于我们而言，地狱就是望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
That's the belief of the Architects... but for us, hell is an endless Fragmentum, a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.
想继续向北方前进的话，就必须穿过那片「地狱」。你们准备好了吗？
If we want to progress further north, we will need to cross that hell. Are you ready?
就是，已经没有撤退的余地啦。
Exactly, we've got nowhere left to retreat.
克服不了困难，谈什么开拓。
Without hardships to overcome, there is no trailblazing.
It's never too late to retreat...
都这时候了，你可不许给我打退堂鼓啊！
Look how far we've come! Don't chicken out on us now.
那就走吧，先想个办法到桥对岸去。
Haha, let's go then. First, we need to think of a way to get to the other side.
我参与过这种栈桥的底层逻辑编写，它是靠几台终端机联合控制的。我们去找找。
I helped set the underlying mechanisms for this type of gear bridge. It's controlled via different terminals in combination. Let's go find them.
不行…这台终端下线了，从这里操控不了。
Nope... this terminal is offline, we can't control it from here.
再找找别的吧，栈桥联结的每个平台应该都有类似的终端。
Look for another — every platform linked to the gear bridge should have a similar terminal.
…不行，启动不了。看来终端的能源被人为切断了。
...Darn, can't activate it. It seems like someone's severed the energy supply to the terminals.
So someone's deliberately trying to create trouble?
不，不对——我又仔细想了一下，这可能是故意的安排。
I... huh. Y'know, the more I think about it, the more it seems deliberate.
Are the Guards doing this intentionally?
我仔细想了一下，确实有这个可能。
I was just thinking that, we can't rule it out.
这应该是铁卫有意为之。
I think the Guards must have done this intentionally.
在前线戒备期间，把栈桥调转到不贯通前后方的位置，然后从后方切断栈桥终端的能源，避免误操作…或者出现逃兵的可能。

With the front line on high alert, they must have rotated the bridge to make it impassable. Then they cut off the energy supply to the terminals to avoid accidental repositioning... or to prevent deserters from escaping.
这样做的话，即使前线溃败…裂界的怪物也无法通过栈桥渗透后方。
That way, even if the front line were to collapse... the Fragmentum monsters wouldn't be able to make it to the other side.
They cut off their only retreat...
布洛妮娅说的是真的…银鬃铁卫确实为了保护贝洛伯格拼上了性命。
Bronya was right... The Silvermane Guards really are risking their lives to protect Belobog.
推测而已，不过…八九不离十吧。老弟说过，为了抵御裂界的怪物，他们不得不动用了一些极端手段。
Just my conjecture, but I doubt it's far from the truth. My brother mentioned that they've had to use extreme measures to repel the Fragmentum monsters.
接着前进吧，两台终端都启动不了，咱们得去找源头的供能设备了。
Let's press on. We can't activate either of these terminals, so let's look for the energy supply installation itself.
就是它！那个像大铁丸子一样的东西。
That's it! The thing shaped like a giant iron ball.
居然隔着一道门，怎么这么麻烦……
And it's behind a gate. What are the odds...
它的学名叫「机关能源中枢」，连着那么多管线，恐怕整个铁卫禁区的能源都是这一台设备供能的。
Its formal name is the "mechanism energy hub." It's connected to all the energy lines — I would've thought it covers the entire restricted zone.
Mm... no wonder it's so heavily guarded.
一台机器掌管所有？这会出事的。我们已经吃过教训了。
One unit for everything? That's a disaster waiting to happen — we learned the hard way.
只要获得这台设备的权限，我们就能操作机关栈桥的终端。
As long as we can gain access permissions to the hub, we can operate the gear bridge terminals.
所以我才跟守门的说，我们是来做紧急检修的呀！除了后方，前线肯定也有需要维护的设备吧？
That's why I told them we were here for urgent maintenance! The front line equipment needs servicing just as much as the rest.
原来如此，不愧是你！我还以为那是你现编的呢。
So that's why you went for maintenance, way to go Serval! I thought you just came up with it on the spot.
走，去问问那个铁卫，看他能不能让我们进去。
Come on, let's see if that guard over there will let us past.
你们就是来做紧急检修的工程师？我看你们在附近晃悠有一阵了，查出问题了吗？
Are you the emergency engineers? I saw you guys hanging around. Did you find the problem?
没有，目前为止一切正常。我推测问题出在「能源中枢」上。
Not yet, everything looks normal so far. I think the problem is stemming from the energy hub.
请让我们进去做个例行维护检查。我参与过这种设备的迭代……
If you let us in we can do a routine service inspection... I've worked on various iterations of this type of installation...
不行！没有警卫队长的密钥，谁也不能接近能源中枢。
Haha, no, no, no, no... No can do! No one gets near the energy hub without the security captain's encryption key.
Uh, not even the supreme guardian?
大守护…别抖机灵！没有密钥，谁也不能接近！
The supreme guardian...? Hey, no games, y'hear? No dice without the encryption key!
你要求「密钥」对吧？我该去找哪位「队长」？
You need the encryption key, right? Which captain should I bother then?
邓恩队长在前面休息，你们自己去找他吧。要是他同意授权你们，我自然放行。
...Captain Dunn's resting up ahead. Go and find him. If he grants you permission, I won't stand in your way.
邓恩…邓恩？嗐，你早说啊！得了得了，那没事了——我们回头再来找你。
Dunn... Dunn? Ha, why didn't you say so! No problem. We'll be back in a bit.
听说，杰帕德派了工程师来做紧急检修？
I heard Gepard sent mechanics for an emergency repair?
和守门的弗朗兹确认过了，确实有这档事。
Yes, I confirmed it with Franz.
我全天都守在这里，怎么没听说有什么设备需要紧急检修？
I've been keeping watch here all day, why didn't I hear about any equipment in need of emergency servicing?
弗朗兹说，来的人是杰帕德戍卫官的亲姐姐……
