I heard from Franz that it's Captain Gepard's sister...
见鬼，我都两天没洗澡了——我身上有味道吗？
...You gotta be kidding me, I haven't showered in two days... do I smell?
哟，邓恩！好久不见了——你都当上警卫队长了啊？
Hey, Dunn! It's been a while. I didn't know you made security captain.
希、希露瓦，好久不见…你还是那么…咳，你气色不错。
S—Serval, it's been a long time... you're still so... Ahem. You look good.
介绍一下，这几位是我的助手，帮我分担机械屋的工作。
Allow me to introduce my assistants to you. They help me take care of business at the workshop.
各位，认识下我的老朋友——邓恩队长。他以前可是我乐队的王牌键盘手。
Everyone, this is Captain Dunn, an old friend of mine. He used to be an ace on the keys in the band.
哦？这位铁卫大哥也玩摇滚吗？你好！
Oh? You play rock 'n' roll too? Cool!
总觉得有一股奇怪的味道……
哼，咳！萨克雷，你几天没洗澡了？
Hmm? *cough* Zackery, how many days has it been since you showered?
Uh... I showered right before my shift—
...I—I haven't showered in two days, sir!
真不像话，在访客面前岂能如此失礼！抱歉，让你们见笑了。
Unacceptable, especially in front of visitors! Apologies for the embarrassment, all.
没事儿，邓恩。对了，有机会的话，我们再上台合奏一次？
It's not a big deal, Dunn. Y'know, if you get a chance, would you wanna get on stage with us again?
我现在的键盘手也不赖，但还是怀念在部队里玩乐队的时光啊……
My keyboard guy is pretty good, but I still miss our military days playing in the band...
都是陈年往事了，希露瓦，我都好久没碰黑白键了。再说，我现在一年到头守在禁区里，怕是没什么机会回城了。
That was a long time ago, Serval — I haven't touched a keyboard in ages. Besides, I'm stationed here all year round, I'm afraid I don't get many chances to return to the city.
这么说有点见外…但你找我有事吗？要是没检查出什么情况，赶紧回城吧。这里不安全。
Though I don't stand on ceremony... How may I assist you? If everything's in order, you'd better head back to the city. It's not safe here.
管线我都检查过一遍了，似乎没什么大问题。就剩「机关能源中枢」还没排查过了。
I've checked the lines, there don't seem to be any major problems. All that's left is the energy hub.
那边的卫兵说，需要「密钥」才能打开闸门。能帮个忙吗？
The guard over there said that I needed an "encryption key" to open the gate. Can you help me out?
We'll be on our way after we run a check-up.
不要在喜欢的人面前犹豫不决。
Don't be hesitant in front of your dream girl.
Could you be any less discreet!?
抱歉，希露瓦…我能问问，杰帕德戍卫官是怎么和你说的吗？
Sorry, Serval... but can you tell me what Captain Gepard told you?
啊？啊…我回忆一下…「老姐，禁区的能源管线出了故障，吃干饭的外包维修商根本查不出问题」——大概就是这样吧……
Huh? Oh, uh... Let me think... "Hey sis, the energy supply lines in the restricted zone have malfunctioned. Those useless engineers can't find the problem." Something like that...
我能再问问…他是什么时候联系你的？
And may I ask... when did he contact you?
呃…今天早上？对，就是早上。他今天不是负责城区巡逻嘛？所以就顺路来委托我了。
Uh... this morning? Yeah, that's right. He's on urban patrol duty today, right? That's why he popped round and asked the favor.
杰帕德长官刚刚回到前线。要不…我再跟他确认一遍吧？
Captain Gepard just returned to the front line. I could... reconfirm with him?
…欸？等会儿等会儿，他已经回来了？不可能吧，他早些时候还在城里……
...Hah? Hold up, he's back? That can't be, he was still in the city a little while ago...
希露瓦…你还是跟从前一样，不擅长说谎啊。
*sigh* You haven't changed Serval... You're still a lousy liar.
你带来的这些人，其实不是机械屋的助手吧？
These people you've brought, they're... they're not workshop assistants, right?
希露瓦，不是我不想帮你…但是你要时刻记住，我可是贝洛伯格的银鬃铁卫！
Serval, it's not that I don't want to help you... but you should remember that I'm a Belobog Silvermane Guard!
这样，你先回去，这件事我不会跟任何人说…但是这些「外来者」必须留下！
How about this. You can leave and I won't tell anyone about this incident... But the outsiders must remain.
Sorry for getting you involved in this.
Looks like this is gonna end in a fight after all...
是我把你们带到这里来的，我会跟你们并肩作战。
I brought you guys here, and I'm standing with you till the end!
事关贝洛伯格——不，事关整个世界的命运。邓恩，不要拦着我们——
Dunn, this concerns the fate of Belobog — no — the fate of our whole world. Please don't stand in our way...
希露瓦！我们过去每天都一起排练，你应该懂的吧？
Serval! We used to rehearse together every day. You must understand?
我的摇滚灵魂，就是维护身为军人的尊严啊！
My rock 'n' roll soul is to uphold the dignity of a soldier!
他们是危险人物，大守护者在通缉他们！希露瓦，你别上当！
Serval, these are dangerous individuals, the supreme guardian has sent out a warrant for their arrest! Don't let them fool you!
我知道自己在做什么，邓恩！你让开吧。
I know what I'm doing, Dunn! Step aside.
邓恩…抱歉，你就先小睡一会儿吧。
I'm sorry Dunn... Time for a little nap.
只是暂时晕过去了，不用太担心。
死板的家伙…但很能打。「地火」缺的就是这种人。
Stubborn fool... strong, though. Wildfire lacks people like him.
找到了，这就是「密钥」！快，趁还没引起注意，我们——
Got it, the encryption key! Quick, before we attract attention, let's—
这是敌袭警报…整个后备区的铁卫都要和我们为敌了。
That's the enemy attack alarm... Every Silvermane Guard in the reserve zone just became our enemy.
Come on, let's take them out!
If we work together we can break through their ranks!
My life was short, but it was a life filled with—
还早着呢，别放弃得这么快啊！
You're not dead yet. How can you give up that easily!?
都走到这里了…就算摔折胳膊再赔上条腿，我也要见到「星核」。
We've made it up till now... I could lose an arm and a leg for all I care — I have to lay eyes on the Stellaron.
走，回能源中枢——谁敢挡路，就给他点颜色瞧瞧！
Quick, back to the energy supply hub. Anyone that tries to stop us is gonna find out a thing or two.
可恶，这操作系统谁设计的啊，这么繁琐！
Ugh, who designed this operating system! It's so unintuitive!
「应急消防疏散系统」…肯定不是这个……
Emergency Fire Evacuation System... Not that...
「舞池摇滚氛围模式」…这谁加的？还用我的歌！
Rock 'n' Roll Dance Floor Atmosphere Mode... Who the heck added that!? And they used one of my songs!
「机关栈桥控制终端」——哈，还不是让我找到了！
Gear Bridge Control Terminal — ha, still found it!
搞定，能源系统已经重新上线了！去操作栈桥终端吧。
That's it, I've reset the energy system! Let's go and operate the gear bridge terminal.
Careful! There's a big guy up ahead.
没有别的路…只能正面应战了。
There's no other way... We'll have to fight.
哼，我们连史瓦罗都赢过，还会怕它不成？上吧！
Hmph, if we can beat Svarog, we can beat this one. Let's go!
能源供应恢复…系统上线…开启验证…快点，快点！
Energy restored... system online... certification enabled... come on, come on!
百分之四十…六十五…八十五……
哈，总算好了！这下我们有操作栈桥的权限了，动作快！
Phew! We did it! We've gained access to the gear bridge. Let's move.
成了！走吧，咱们该去前线了。
Perfect! Okay, we need to get to the front line.
…没问题吗？令弟可能也在那里。
...We could have a problem. Your brother may be there.
大概吧…遇不到是最好，要是碰上了，就只能试着跟他谈谈了……
He probably is... Hopefully, we don't bump into him, but if we do, we'll just have to try and talk to him...
Are you sure you can convince him?
I've probably got a <unbreak>30%</unbreak> chance, or less.
…那就是还有动武的可能性了。
...Meaning it could end in a fight.
你没发现我们不管想说服谁，结果都是要打一顿吗？
Haven't you noticed yet? Most of our "convincing" ends in a fight.
容我确认一下，希露瓦。如果我们和令弟无法达成一致——你会站在我们这边吗？
We need to be sure, Serval. If we can't reach a common understanding with your brother... will you stand with us?
…那当然，姐姐我言出必行。既然承诺了要跟你们站到最后，我绝对不会食言。
...Of course. My word is my bond. I said that I'd stand with you to the end, and I won't go back on that promise.
哨卫向我报告的时候，我还在想这其中是不是有什么误会。也许是入侵者挟持了你，也许你进入禁区和警报完全无关。但……

When the sentry reported to me, I thought there must have been a misunderstanding. The enemy alarm had to be unrelated to your entry into the restricted zone — perhaps the intruders had taken you hostage. And yet...
姐姐，离开入侵者，慢慢走到我身后来。你和他们不一样。
Step away from the intruders, Serval. Walk over slowly and stand behind me. You're different from them.
抱歉，老弟——我说好了要站在他们这边。
I'm sorry... we have an understanding. I stand with them.
给我几分钟时间，只要几分钟，我会解释清楚——
Give me a few minutes, just a few. I'll explain every—
这是什么地方，你应该很清楚，不是吗？朗道家族最熟悉的就是这里，它是抵御裂界的最前线，守护贝洛伯格安宁的核心要塞。
Have you forgotten where we are? We Landaus ought to know this place better than anywhere... The outer reaches of the front line against the Fragmentum, Belobog's most strategic protective fortress.
这里的银鬃铁卫，这里的每一个人，都做好了随时为人民牺牲的觉悟——时刻准备好为贝洛伯格抛洒热血……
Every Silvermane Guard here, every person here, is ready to sacrifice themselves, ready to spill their blood for Belobog at a moment's notice...
而你带领这群罪犯冲入禁区，伤害铁卫兄弟，劫持能源中枢…事到如今仍然执迷不悟…你对得起朗道这个姓氏吗？
Yet here you are leading fugitives into the restricted zone, attacking my Silvermane comrades-in-arms, hijacking the energy hub... Are you really worthy of the Landau name?
你以为我为什么要出现在这里？我们找到了驱散寒潮、封印裂界的办法，那可能是这个世界的最后一线生机！
Why do you think I've come here? We've found a way to dispel the Eternal Freeze, to seal the Fragmentum. It might be the only lifeline this world has left!
若当真如此，为什么不禀报可可利亚大人？为什么偷偷摸摸混入禁区，制造混乱？！
If that were true, why wouldn't you report to Madam Cocolia? Why would you sneak into the restricted zone and create chaos!?
你不明白，阻止我们接近真相的人…就是可可利亚。
You don't understand. The one preventing us from getting close to the truth... is Cocolia herself.
你和那边的三个人都亲自见过大守护者，既然她不认可你们的说法，岂能擅作主张！
...You have all seen the supreme guardian in person. Do you think you can act as you please because she didn't recognize your version of events!?
听我说，杰帕德！裂界的诞生和蔓延与「星核」有关，筑城者记录中的那颗陨星，它——
Listen to me, Gepard! The origin and spread of the Fragmentum is linked to the Stellaron. The meteorite in the Architects' records, it's—
我知道「星核」，你身后那几个犯人就是为它而来，但守护者大人已经对我说出了真相！这几人别有用心，想要偷窃筑城者的宝物。

I know about the Stellaron. It's exactly what the fugitives behind you are seeking. But the Madam Guardian has already revealed the truth to me! These people have ulterior motives, Serval. They want to steal this treasure from the Architects.
守护者大人一早提醒过我，你异想天开，触碰禁忌的知识，会给贝洛伯格带来灾祸…但我相信你，姐姐，我相信你对人民的忠诚！可是……

The Madam Guardian has warned me before that you were indulging in fantasy, that you'd been exposed to forbidden knowledge, and that you would bring destruction down upon Belobog... I believe you, Serval, I believe you think you're acting with loyalty to the people! It's just...
铁卫，列队！捉住他们。裂界怪物随时可能进犯，没有时间浪费在这群人身上！
Guards, formation! Arrest these people. We could be inundated with Fragmentum monsters at any moment, we have no time to waste on them!
禁忌之所以为禁忌，正是因为真相隐藏其中。
The forbidden is only forbidden to conceal the truth within.
可可利亚害怕我们掌握这些知识，她畏惧真相大白于天下——为了拯救世界，我们只好孤注一掷。
Cocolia's afraid that we'll seize on this knowledge — that the truth will spread far and wide: To save the world, we must risk it all.
好了，我要解释的就这么多！至于你信不信，才不关我事！反正老姐我一直都这么任性。遇到讨厌的事或人就要站起来反抗…该坚持的事就绝对要坚持到底！

I've said my piece, whether you believe it or not is up to you. Regardless, you should know by now your sister's never been one to back down. If there's something or someone you can't abide, you should stand up and resist... and if there's something you uphold, you should uphold it to the very end!
将你的解释留给审判官吧。现在，我以戍卫官的身份，下令捉拿破坏铁卫禁区的犯人！
Save your explanation for the judge. You are charged with sabotaging the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. In my capacity as captain, I hereby order that these fugitives be arrested!
这不是小时候的打闹游戏了，姐姐。我不会手下留情的！
This isn't like our childhood games, Serval. You won't get any leniency from me.
「壁垒」的故障还没修好呢，别大言不惭了，弟弟！
The Barrier hasn't been fixed yet. Don't try and be a hero, Gepard!
…唉，我就说凡是要交涉的情节，最后都会开打吧！
...Ugh, didn't I tell you? All our negotiations end in combat!
清醒一点吧，姐姐！你忘记自己立下的「存护誓言」了吗？
Come to your senses, Serval! Did you forget your Oath of Preservation?
记性变差了啊，老弟？你忘了「筑城者」老早就把我开除了吗！
So much for your memory. Did you forget the Architects expelled me ages ago?
把你们带入贝洛伯格…是我犯下的过错。
Bringing you to Belobog... was a grave error.
这个错误就由我来纠正！
An error only I can rectify!
这家伙…好扛打啊。我从没遇到过这么顽强的对手！
This guy... knows how to put up a fight. I've never come up against anyone this relentless!
哈…好像怎么都打不倒他……
Phew... he just won't go down...
因为他是个一根筋！辩论也好打架也罢，只要他认定了一件事，是死也不会让步的…所以才不可爱啊，这家伙！
He's as stubborn as I am. It could be an argument or a fight — he'll do both to the death... That's why he bugs the heck out of me!
差不多了吧，杰帕德！看看你周围，只剩你还站着了！
That's enough, Gepard. Take a look around you! You're the last man standing!
…就算只有我一个人，我也不会屈服……
...Even if I am, I won't yield...
We don't need you to yield.
我们并非要以武力镇服你，那样的服从毫无意义。
We don't want you to yield through force of arms. That wouldn't be a victory for us.
是啊，我们的目的和你、希露瓦、布洛妮娅明明是一致的呀，都是要「存护」这个世界！根本没有敌对的理由好嘛！
Yeah, our goal is the same as yours, Serval's, and Bronya's — we just want to preserve this world! There's no reason to turn against each other!
杰帕德…老弟，到了这份上，你也该懂得变通一下了吧？
Gepard... brother. Surely now you can see the need for pragmatism?
就算你不相信这些外来的朋友，也该相信我——呃，可能姐姐我确实把你的信任都消磨光了——那就至少，相信布洛妮娅吧。
Even if you don't believe my outsider friends, you should believe me... Ugh, maybe I've wasted your trust... in which case, believe Bronya.
你们将所知道的一切告知杰帕德，并交出了布洛妮娅的信件。
You tell Gepard everything you know and show him Bronya's letter.
该说的都说了，老弟，该怎么做你自己决定吧。
There's nothing more to say, Gepard. The decision is yours.
我是银鬃铁卫的戍卫官，职责所在，必须执行「大守护者」的命令。
As a captain of the Silvermane Guards, I am duty-bound to carry out the orders of the Supreme Guardian.
Fine! I've still got fight in me.
——但布洛妮娅小姐是前线实际上的指挥官。根据军规，当前线指挥与后方筑城者的指令发生冲突时，应原地等待进一步的指令。

But... Lady Bronya is the commanding officer for the front lines. According to military protocol, if the front line directives of the commanding officer clash with those of the Architects behind the lines, a soldier must remain at their post and await further directives.
Is this a brainwave? This feels like a brainwave.
Nice interpretation of the rules, dude.
对银鬃铁卫而言，守护者的命令是至高、绝对的。但在誓言里，还有一样东西和她的命令同等重要……
For the Silvermane Guards, the guardian's orders are paramount and absolute. But there is something of equal importance in the oath we take...
失去了人民，铁卫的意义也就不复存在。与裂界怪物的作战是为了「存护」，但和你们的战斗…我现在不明白它的意义。
If we lose the people, we lose the reason for our existence. Our fight with the Fragmentum monsters is for the sake of preservation, but our fight with you... I fail to see the purpose.
如果你们真的能阻止不断膨胀的灾难，那贝洛伯格的所有人都欠你们一份感激。
If you are truly able to prevent our endlessly unfolding misfortunes, then the people of Belobog are indebted to you.
但如果你们是在用一层又一层的谎言粉饰真实目的，利用布洛妮娅和姐姐…我对克里珀发誓，一定会毫不留情地制裁你们。
But if you are using lies to mask your true intentions, using my sister and Bronya for your own ends... I swear by Qlipoth that I will carry out your punishment without an ounce of mercy.
他们没有说谎，我向你保证。
They're not lying, I promise you.
你就是希儿？身手不错，但不像是铁卫的战法。
You must be Seele? You are a skilled fighter... your combat style is nothing like that of the Guards.
不管你信不信，这些人的确帮了下层区很大的忙，很多人都愿意为他们做担保。
Regardless of what you believe, these guys have been a great help to the Underworld. Many people would vouch for them.
想继续向北方进发，要穿过一整片完全被侵蚀的裂界，才能到达另一头的雪原。
If you want to advance further northward, you must traverse an area entirely corroded by the Fragmentum. It's the only way to get to the Snow Plains on the other side.
在下一拨袭击到来之前，铁卫还能争取一些时间。
The Guards can give you some time before the next wave of attacks is upon us.
我可不想被人看成「杰帕德的姐姐」…这次是为了你们，否则我才不想借老弟的名字。
Hmph, I don't want people to see me that way... I'm doing this for you. Otherwise, I wouldn't be using my brother's name.
杰帕德经常在前线值勤吗？
Is Gepard on front line duty a lot?
Yes, but what made you ask that all of a sudden?
这么危险，你不会替他担心嘛？
It's so dangerous, don't you worry about him?
真没想到，你和杰帕德居然是姐弟？
I never would've guessed that Gepard and you were brother and sister.
的确，我俩的性格跟兴趣喜好都完全不一样。
I can't say I blame you — we're nothing alike in personality or interests.
朗道家世代从军，很多人都英年早逝了，不大有时间留给兄弟姐妹。每个人只是努力过好自己的一生。

In our family we have a strong military tradition going back generations — many a Landau has died in their prime. There's not a lot of "brother and sister time." Everyone just does their best to get on with their life.
希露瓦，那个什么邓恩，你认识？
Serval, this Dunn, do you know him?
那可不吗，老熟人了。他挺好说话的，看我来说服他。
You bet I do. We go way back. He's easy to talk to. Watch me persuade him.
早知道「密钥」就在他身上…我一个人潜进去拿走就好了。
If I'd known he had the encryption key from the start, I could've snuck in and taken it off him myself.
别马后炮了，希儿姑娘！只要机械栈桥启动，咱们迟早都要暴露的。
Shoulda, coulda, woulda, Seele! Activating the gear bridge alone would've been enough to expose us.
It's open! Oh, thank you, thank you, thank you, Dunn!
那个，希露瓦…就算咱们通过了栈桥，对面不还有更多铁卫守着？
Um, Serval... won't more Silvermane Guards be waiting for us on the other side of the gear bridge?
要么一路冲过封锁线，要么以理服人——随机应变！
Well, either we reason with them or charge straight through the blockade... Let's play it by ear!
下次冒险之前，咱可得好好跟姬子姐姐请教下谈判技巧。总靠打架解决问题，也太不符合少女的优雅了吧！
Before our next expedition, I need Himeko to teach me some negotiation skills. Beating people up all the time is cramping my elegance!
老弟入伍后，我就没再跟他打过架了。小的时候他可打不过我，现在嘛……
I haven't fought with Gepard since he enlisted. He could never beat me when we were little, but now...
前方是军事重地，临时工不许进入！
This is a military base. Temporary workers aren't allowed in.
你看，姐弟间的矛盾就是这样，痛快打上一架之后就和好如初啦。
You see? Brothers and sisters need to have a scrap once in a while to get back on good terms.
Sorry for getting you involved in this.
别这么说，你再道歉，我的耳朵都要起茧了。
Agh, enough apologizing. My ears can't take any more.
要我说，这都是迟早会发生的事。你们只是给了我一个提前行动起来的理由罢了。
Honestly, this would have happened sooner or later. You just gave me an excuse to bring everything forward.
这就是亲姐弟的相处方式？
So this is how brothers and sisters normally coexist?
怎么？真刀真枪地下狠手，亲姐弟之间难道不该这么相处吗？
What's wrong with a bit of violent coexistence between siblings? Seems pretty normal to me.
嘿，开个玩笑。离开部队后的这些年，我跟老弟间的谈话总会刻意避开一些敏感话题。现在想想，也许是他为了顾及我的感受，一直默默地护着我呢。

Hehe, I'm pulling your leg. Since I left the military, my brother and I have always steered clear of certain sensitive topics... Thinking about it, perhaps he's just been looking out for my feelings, shielding me all along.
以我这脾气，老弟肯定没少替我操心。还真是辛苦他啦。
Knowing my temper, my brother almost certainly went to great lengths on many occasions for me. I should be thanking him.
接下来就该寻找「星核」了。
没错，「星核」虽然和我素未谋面，但是我却因为它丢了筑城者的铁饭碗，是时候去找它算账了。
Let's do this. I may never have come face to face with it, but this Stellaron cost me a nice, stable job. It's time to get even.
其实我还有另一个私心——我想向可可利亚证明我是对的。等我们解决了「星核」这个麻烦…也许她就能变回原来的样子？
Actually, I have another selfish motive... I want to prove to Cocolia that I was right. Once we've taken care of the Stellaron... maybe she'll go back to how she was.
嗐，现在说这些有点不合时宜了，你别介意。
...Sorry, hardly the time for me to be obsessing over all this.
想继续向北方前进的话，就必须穿过那片「地狱」。不过换个角度想想…对咱们来说，那里更像彰显实力的舞台吧？
As I mentioned, if we want to progress further north, we're gonna have to cross that "hell." Still, look at it this way: Just another arena to showcase our skills, right?
准备好了就登台吧，我们一起完成这场演出！
Now, if you're ready to get on stage, let's push for that standing ovation!
必须得承认，我之前对银鬃铁卫的误解太深。他们每天也在为了生存而战，跟「地火」一样。
I gotta admit, I had a lot of... misunderstandings... about the Silvermane Guards. They're fighting for survival here every day, just like Wildfire.
区别在于，我们在为了自己的自由抗争，而他们…他们只是在执行命令。
The difference is we're making a stand for freedom... while they're just carrying out orders.
所以我们才要换位思考。
That's why we have to try and put ourselves in their shoes.
「换位思考」…说着轻巧。人人都有自己的苦衷，但是如果互相之间连面都见不上，还提什么相互理解？
Put ourselves in their shoes... Easier said than done. Everyone has their struggles, but how can we understand them if we can't even see each other?
你理解布洛妮娅的苦衷了吗？
当然，早就理解了。不过依我看，她需要的不是别人的理解，而是迈过自己心里的那道坎。
Of course I do, I've understood them for a while now. But as far as I can tell, she doesn't need other people's understanding. She needs to understand her own heart.
…就跟那个杰帕德一样。我能看出来——他刚才下了很大的决心才放下武器。
...It's the same with Gepard. I could tell it took a lot for him to lay down his arms.
我好像已经听到风暴的声音了，从这城墙外传来的…让人平静不下来。
I think I can already hear the storm on the other side of the city walls... Not a reassuring sound.
希望希露瓦没说错…但愿那个疯子守护者不会伤害布洛妮娅。
I hope Serval's right... That supreme lunatic better not have harmed Bronya.
禁区的大门一旦打开，另一头的怪物就会倾巢出动。银鬃铁卫能做到的，就是尽量拖住敌人，给你们争取一些时间。
As soon as the restricted zone gate is open, the monsters on the other side will turn out in full force. The Guards will do their best to stall them and buy you some time.
一旦你们突破了前线…我们就再帮不上什么忙了。北方的裂界里究竟是怎样的景象，只能由各位自己一探究竟。
Once you've broken through the front line... there's nothing more we can do for you. You'll have to find out for yourselves what lies within the northern Fragmentum.
所以…你们下定决心了吗？
So... have you made up your minds?
我明白了。握紧武器，这肯定会是一场恶战。
Understood. Keep your weapons close. This will be a fierce fight.
铁卫！听我命令——打开大门！
你们每天都在面对这种攻势吗？
Are you dealing with attacks like this every day?
哼，我可不想欠铁卫的人情！
Hmph, well I'm gonna make sure I don't owe the Guards any favors when this is done!
这帮家伙…真是没完没了呀！
数量再多也只是杂碎而已——别退后！
The more the merrier, these guys are nothing! Hold the line!
…早说过了，杰帕德！「壁垒」还没修好，不要逞强！
...I told you, Gepard, the Barrier hasn't been fixed yet! Don't try and be a hero!
这只是…第一拨敌人。它们…很快就会再集结。我不能……
This is... only the first wave. They'll have reassembled soon... I have to...
听你姐姐的话吧，铁卫！一看就知道，你的状态还没完全恢复呢。
Hey, Mr. Silvermane, listen to your sister! I can tell just by looking at you that you haven't fully recovered.
外来的、希儿——趁着下一波攻势还没开始，你们赶紧突围吧！
Outsiders, Seele, the second wave hasn't started yet. Make the most of this opportunity and make a break for it!
欸？希露瓦，你不和我们一起去找「星核」吗？
Huh? Serval, aren't you gonna look for the Stellaron with us?
老弟独木难支啊。刚才把他教训了一顿，这是我的责任。而且……
My brother can't hold them back by himself. He wasted a lot of energy on us. He's my responsibility now. Besides...
我不帮把手的话…下一场战斗不知道会怎么样呢。
If I'm not here to help... I don't know what might happen in the next wave.
我也很想跟你们一起啊，真的很想！「星核」近在咫尺了，离我那么近，我一直想看它一眼——
I want to go with you, I do! I always wanted to catch a glimpse of the Stellaron with my own eyes, and now it's so close...
但总不能丢下老弟和这群铁卫不管吧，我可是朗道家的女儿啊！交给你们了！我相信你们能做到，我在你们身上看到了希望！
But I can't abandon my brother and the other Guards — I'm a Landau! It's up to you now, I believe in you. You've given me new hope!
赶在可可利亚发觉之前，把「星核」拿到手吧！
Get hold of the Stellaron before Cocolia realizes what's happening!
我也不能丢下你们不管啊！
希露瓦说的对，{NICKNAME}。我们走吧。
铁卫为我们打开了通路，不要辜负他们。
The Guards have opened up a way through for us, we can't let them down.
我们不会辜负你的信任。
「星核」的模样…记得拍张照给我啊，小姑娘。
Hey March! Don't forget to take a picture of the Stellaron for me.
一言为定！放心吧，我们可是很厉害的！
Say no more! We're good at this. Don't worry!
所以呢？你们把那批有问题的机器人丢在哪儿了？
So? What did you do with those defective robots?
麻利点！干嘛扭扭捏捏的？
Come on! What are you squirming around for?
负责军备管理的同事，忘了把残次品的事同步给指挥官了……
The worker in charge of arms management forgot to report the defective units to the commanding officer...
那批机器人，可能已经被部署到禁区里了。
Those robots may have already been deployed to the restricted zone.
别、别生气嘛！我已经把这次事故整理成报告，向上级提交了…现在只等上头派人处理这事就行！
Don't get angry! I have written a report of this incident and submitted it to management...We just need to wait for them to send someone to deal with it!
不过你也知道我们的审批流程是个什么状况…在那之前咱也只能坐着干等着了。
But you know what our approval system is like... Until then, we can't really do anything.
干等着？这件事如果不及时处理，迟早要闹出人命！这种状况下你难道坐得住吗？！
We can't just wait here and do nothing! There will be big trouble if we don't deal with this now! How can you just sit around so calmly!?
这…话是在理，可咱就只是个文职，根本对付不了发疯的机器人啊……
You are right... But we are just small potatoes. There is no way we can deal with those crazy robots...
唉，气死我了…戍卫队的人呢？是他们没把好质量这关，让这批垃圾流进禁区的！这帮人总该出面解释一下吧？

Argh! This makes me so angry... Where are the Garrison people? They are to blame for the restricted zone receiving this batch of subpar garbage since they didn't do enough quality control! Shouldn't those people come forward and provide us an explanation?
他们…我联系过了，不管我怎么说，他们都只说是技术部验收结果不牢靠，和他们没半点关系。意思是让我们自己想办法处理……

Well... I've contacted them but no matter what I say, they just blame it on the Technology Division, saying that they're unreliable and the Garrison had nothing to do with it. Which means we have to deal with it ourselves...
…混账！这都什么时候了，还在这儿踢皮球？
That's ridiculous! How can they shirk their responsibility like that?
Huh? Which department are you from?
We met in the city before...
We did? I don't remember you at all.
哼，这地方还有乐于助人的家伙？我可不信。
Humph! A kindhearted passerby in this place? I doubt it.
等等，你们…莫非是通缉令上的「外来者」？之前筑城者兴师动众想要抓住的人…难道就是你们？
Wait! You are... aren't you the "Outsider" on the warrant that the Architects were so desperate to apprehend not so long ago?
可这里是军事管制区啊，按说连只雪地鼠都进不来…你是怎么出现在这里的？
But this is a military restricted zone, and not even a snow mouse is supposed to be able to enter... How did you manage to get in?
哎呀算了算了，不管了！你要是能跟铁卫对着干，对付几个发疯的机器人应该不算什么吧？
Oh, whatever! If you can put up a fight against the Silvermane Guards, those crazy robots must just be a piece of cake for you, right?
听着，我这儿有事需要你处理，非常紧急！这可是人命关天的大事！
Listen! I have something very urgent that I need your help with. It's a matter of life and death!
我还有什么办法？看看这帮家伙，有一个算一个都是废物！
What else can I do? Look at these guys. All of them are useless scrubs!
嘴上说说谁不会啊？希望你真的靠得住。
Easier said than done! I hope you're really that reliable.
我给你梳理一下——戍卫队上个月订制了一批警卫机器人，因为制造班的产能过于紧张，所以把一部分工作外包给了城里的私人制造厂……

Let me give you a rundown first... So, last month, the Garrison ordered a batch of guardbots. And at the time, the manufacturing team was so overstretched that there was no other option but to outsource some workloads to a private manufacturer in the city.
谁知道这批机器人的质量完全没达到验收标准，有严重的失控隐患！
And it turns out that this batch of robots is simply subpar, and there is a real danger that they could go out of control.
后面的事估计你也听到了，我就不说了。总之，我希望你能尽快找到那些失控的机器人，回收他们的<color=#dbc291ff>「核心模组」</color>！

I guess you've already heard what happened afterwards, so I'll say no more. In short, I hope you can deal with those out of control robots as soon as possible and take back their <color=#dbc291ff>"Core Modules"</color>!
我才不管你们用什么手段。电磁干扰，遥控，或者干脆把它们砸得稀巴烂——反正都是一堆劣质的玩意……
I don't care how you do it... Electromagnetic interference, remote control, or simply smashing them to pieces! They are useless anyway...
失控机器的出现位置我已经大致标记好了。赶紧去吧，没时间磨蹭了！
I've marked the general location of those robots. Hurry up! We don't have much time left!
问题机器人现在在哪儿？
Where are the faulty robots now?
——这机器人是有什么毛病？！它识别不出我们是自己人吗？
What's wrong with this robot? It doesn't recognize us?
不知道啊，这台好像是戍卫队那边新投放的机器人…咱俩就这么把它拆了，队长不会找咱们麻烦吧？
I have no idea! It seems to be a new robot from the Garrison... If we dismantle it like this without telling the Captain, will we get into any trouble?
这批机器人失控了，我来回收。
It's a faulty robot. Let me handle it.
啊？这批机器人不是新货吗，怎么突然就…是不是戍卫队没仔细验收啊？
Uh, aren't they brand-new? How come... Is it because the Garrison didn't do proper quality control?
…算了算了，别说了，这不是咱该追究的。
Just leave it be... It's not our job to pursue this matter.
是啊！我俩正站在这儿好端端地聊天呢，这机器人就突然冲过来了！
Yeah! We were standing here chatting and the robot suddenly charged over!
情急之下只好当场进行无害化处理了…以前从没发生过这样的事，吓我一跳。
The only thing I could do at the time was to dismantle it... I've never had a robot charge me like that before. It was quite the fright.
你是来回收它的？我们已经把「核心模组」拆下来了，你们好好研究一下哪儿出问题了吧。以后可别再出现这种事故了，怪吓人的……
Are you here to retrieve it? We have already removed the Core Module. Please look into this matter and don't let this happen again! It was so scary...
花点时间好好想想——这次外包项目的验收流程具体都有谁参与？把你知道的名字都告诉我。
We should take a moment to think this through — who is involved in the quality control process for this outsourcing project? Tell me all the names you can think of.
谢、谢尔盖妮娅长官，我只是个经办的小文职啊，知道的真没您想象的那么多……
M—Miss Sergeynia, I am just a researcher here, I don't know as much as you think...
…唉。第一，我的姓氏是谢尔盖耶夫娜；第二，没必要对我阿谀奉承，叫我佩拉就好。加不加长官随你便，我不在乎……
Sigh... Firstly, my last name is Sergeyevna. Secondly, you don't have to patronize me. Just call me Pela. I don't care if you call me "Officer" or not.
——我只在乎能不能以高效的方式妥当处置这次事故，而这取决于你能不能再从脑袋里挖出更有用的信息。不要浪费时间，这对你我都有好处。
I only care about handling this incident properly and efficiently, and that depends on whether you can give me useful information. Don't waste our time!
啊…你、你来了！那个，你可以先等一下……
Oh... You are here! Well, just wait a moment...
看来你还对我瞒了不少事啊…比如这位突然出现在军事禁区的{M#先生}{F#小姐}——
Looks like you're keeping quite a lot of things from me... like this {M#gentleman}{F#lady} here who suddenly appeared in the military restricted zone...
I'm all done! Where is Molly?
啊…你、你来了！那个，茉莉她……
Oh... You are here! Well... Molly...
看来你还对我瞒了不少事啊…比如这位突然出现在军事禁区的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，还有那位茉莉——
Looks like you're keeping quite a lot of things from me... like this {M#gentleman}{F#lady} here who suddenly appeared in the military restricted zone... also that Molly...
Please don't call my name like that...
Why are you here? This is strange...
杰帕德是叫我不要为难「外来者」…但这铁卫禁区可不是让你们四处闲晃的地方啊。
Gepard did tell me not to make things difficult for the "outsider"... but the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone isn't just somewhere I can let you hang around.
我来帮忙解决次品机器人事件。
I am here to deal with those defective robots.
那你和这次事件是脱不了干系了——坦白从宽、抗拒从严，老实交代吧！
Then this time you can't just say it's none of your business... Be honest and tell me the truth!
我只是做了热心市民该做的事…
I just did what a good citizen would do...
…你知道吗？热心市民擅闯军事禁区可是犯法的。
Hey... But you do know that it's still illegal for a good citizen to enter the military restricted zone, right?
不过，既然你出现在这里了，那肯定和这次事件脱不了干系——坦白从宽、抗拒从严，老实交代吧！
However, since you are here... you must have something to do with this. Be honest and tell me the truth!
在佩拉的盘问下，你坦白了自己了解到的全部内容……
Under Pela's interrogation, you confessed everything...
嗯…情况我都了解了，和我推理的结果基本一致——既然那位茉莉小姐和你都参与到了这次事件里，那一切都说得通了。
Ah... I understand now. It is more or less as I surmised... Since Miss Molly and you are involved in this incident, then everything makes sense now.
至于那些<color=#dbc291ff>「核心模组」</color>，你就先交给我吧。
As to those <color=#dbc291ff>"Core Modules"</color>... hand them to me first.
好了，研究员先生…对此您想发表什么评论吗？你的口供好像和这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}的有点出入嘛。
Alright, Mr. Researcher... Do you want to comment on this? Your statement seems to be a little bit different from this {M#gentleman}{F#lady}'s.
我、我只是怕长官您查到茉莉头上…虽然她是性子急了点，可这次事故和她没半分关系哪…我、我保证！饶了我吧……
Well... I was just afraid you'd make Molly a suspect. She can be a bit impatient at times, but I assure you that this incident has nothing to do with her! Please just spare me, Captain...
放心，你和那位茉莉小姐都不会有事的。只是以后再遇到这种事，别兜圈子——还记得我说过的吗？不要浪费时间，这对你我都有好处。
Don't worry, you and Molly will be fine. Just don't play silly games with me when it happens again in the future. Remember what I said? Don't waste my time!
谢、谢谢您，谢尔盖科夫娅长官！
Oh... Thank you... thank you so much Captain Sergekevna!
其实是佩拉格娅•谢尔盖…
...Well, whatever. I've gotten used to it.
So what are you going to do next?
虽然我很想追究你擅闯军事禁区这件事——但看在希露瓦对你能力和品行高度评价的份上，我想拜托你协助我处理这起事故…就当是将功补过吧。

Even though I really want to hold you responsible for your trespassing into the military zone, I will however let it slide this time, since Serval vouched for your ability and character. I would also like to ask you to help me deal with the incident, which is a chance for you to make up for your mistakes.
长话短说——这起机器人事故只是我在追查的事件的其中一环。这里面的利益纠葛非常复杂，而那位茉莉小姐很可能已经触动了某些人的神经……
Long story short, this robot incident is just one chapter in my ongoing investigation. The stakes here are very high, and Miss Molly may have ruffled some feathers.
总之，她现在很可能有危险。
So... she might be in danger now...
我再问你最后一个问题：你知道茉莉去哪儿了吗？
I am going to ask you one last question: Do you know where Molly is?
她？她家好像出了点事…就先跑回去查看情况了。刚才有个戍卫队的铁卫来找她单独谈话，具体谈了什么内容我是没听到，但她的脸色立刻变得很难看……

Well... There seemed to be a family emergency, so she ran back to check on them. It was a Silvermane Guard from the Garrison who came to send her the message. I don't know what they talked about, but she looked dreadful afterwards.
我觉得…你们可以去行政区，废弃商业街入口旁有栋公寓。茉莉好像就住在那里……
I think... you can go to the Administrative District. There is an apartment building next to the abandoned business street. I think Molly is there.
…看来我预想的没错，她碰上麻烦了。
...I guess I was right. She's in trouble.
我先走一步，请你尽快跟上来。
I'll go first. Please follow me as soon as possible.
——我就知道是你们干的！你们有没有想过，要是因为这批残次品闹出了人命怎么办？
...I knew it was you guys who did it! Have you all ever thought about what happens if people die from those defective robots?
咋办？哼，我告诉你咋办——就算真出了什么事，黑锅也是你们技术部来背。
What happens? Hmph, I'll tell you... even if something really happens, your Technology Division will take the blame!
茉莉啊茉莉…我警告过你很多次了，禁区里的事，你只要睁一只眼闭一只眼就行了——只要你不蹚浑水，说不定我们还能分你一杯羹……
Come on, Molly! I have warned you many times to keep your mouth shut about the things in the restricted zone. You know how it goes, you scratch our backs and we will scratch yours...
放弃吧，小姑娘！你以为只靠自己就能粉碎贝洛伯格所有军商串谋的勾当？这水可比你想的深多了。
Give it up, little girl... You think you alone can put an end to all of Belobog's shady dealings between its military and its merchants? This is so much bigger than you could possibly imagine.
我们最多也就是抄了你的家，要是惹到了上面的人…那后果你根本不敢想！
All we've done so far is just a little "do-over" of your house, but if you ever provoke the ire of those higher-ups... You won't even dare to think about the consequences!
给我谢尔盖耶夫娜个面子…
For the sake of Miss Sergeyevna...
够了！都给我住手！你们，把手里的武器放在地上，双手抱头！动作快！
That's enough! Put your weapons down and put your hands up! Quick!
啊，我知道了…行啊丫头，长本事了，还知道搬救兵了？
Oh... I get it! Good one, little girl... you found someone to help, did you?
哼，可惜只是来了两个弱不禁风的家伙！我告诉你们，今天就是戍卫官本人来了，也没他的好果子吃！
Hmph... Unfortunately, they are only two weaklings! Let me tell you, even if the captain himself were here, I wouldn't be scared off!
口气真大啊，看来你们是没把我这情报官放在眼里…这可是个大问题，之后也要提上日程了。
Wow... It seems you aren't taking me seriously at all. I am an intelligence officer! This is a major case, and I just might have to put it on my agenda!
我们上，{NICKNAME}。下手再重也没关系——铁卫的军医技术可是一流的。
Let's kick their butt, {NICKNAME}! No need to hold back! As you know, the Silvermane Guards have first-class medical support.
嗯？茉莉怎么跑来了，还先了我们一步？
Huh? Why is Molly here? And she got here before us?
…看来她遇到麻烦了。快，我们上去看看情况！
...Looks like she's in trouble. Quick! Let's check it out!
在佩拉的指挥下，犯罪分子被赶到现场的铁卫们押送至禁闭室，等待进一步处置……
The Silvermane Guards rushed to the scene, and under Pela's command, they led the criminals to the confinement room, where they'll be awaiting their punishment...
我还以为他们真的是硬茬…
你怎么还有心情开玩笑啊……
I wish you wouldn't make light of the matter.
看刚才他们那架势，如果没有你们及时出手的话，我恐怕已经……
They were not bluffing, you know. If it weren't for you guys helping me out in time, I'm afraid I would have been...
我、我不知道该说什么好…太谢谢你们了！
I... um... I don't know what to say... Thank you so much!
你没受伤就好。这群人私通黑商的物证我已经找到了…你应该也有要找的东西吧，茉莉小姐？
Thank goodness you weren't hurt. Also, I've found hard evidence of all their illicit dealings with those shady merchants. I believe you were looking for something as well. Is that right, Miss Molly?
嗯，已经找到了！而且完好无损，真是万幸……
Indeed, and I found it! And luckily it's still in good condition...
啊…这是从我祖上一路传下来的宝贝。虽然我也不知道它里面装的到底是什么…但它对我来说十分重要。
Oh... This is a family heirloom. Even though I don't know exactly what's inside, it's still very important to me.
——还有一件很严肃的事要问你，茉莉小姐。你怎么会先于我们出现在这里？理性而论，你此时最该出现的地方应该是机械屋才对。
Miss Molly, I do have another very serious question to ask you... How did you manage to show up before we did? If anything, you should be at the workshop now.
…我只是觉得，这件事毕竟因我而起，所以也应该由我……
I was thinking about how all this only happened because of me, so... I thought I should...
…这可不是什么好理由。茉莉小姐，虽然我不想把话说得太难听，但对于你这次的行为，我只能评价为有勇无谋。
That is not a good excuse, Miss Molly. No offense, but you were simply too reckless.
我欣赏你的勇气和责任感…但你缺少对当前状况作出准确评估的能力，还经常把自己置于险境。
I do admire your bravery and sense of duty... but you're still lacking in situational judgment and thus often end up putting yourself in harm's way.
你有想象过自己该如何独自对抗那些恶棍吗？退一步说，就算你真打倒了那群喽啰…你有对抗他们幕后黑手的手段吗？

Have you really given much thought to how you could win the fight against those thugs all on your own? Let's be charitable here and assume you could beat them. What then? Are you really equipped to take on the criminal mastermind behind the scenes?
…唉，佩拉长官教训的是。这次是我没有考虑清楚后果就擅自行动了…而且那些家伙说的也没错，只凭我一个人的信念，什么都改变不了。

*sigh* You are right, Officer Pela. I didn't think carefully enough about the consequences of my action. And those goons weren't entirely off the mark when they said I couldn't take on the whole world just on my own.
说什么让贝洛伯格变得更好…不过是痴人说梦而已。我连自己的人生都把握不住……
I thought I could make Belobog a better place... Well, I can't even manage my own life...
——我拼死拼活努力到现在，到底有什么意义…？
I've been working so hard... but what's the point?
难道我的梦想真的是个笑话吗？什么公正平等的城市，在这里压根就不可能实现……
Is my dream really a joke? A city that stands for justice and equality... it's impossible in this world!
这…茉莉，不要这样…刚才是我言重了！我不是想打击你……
Well... Molly, please don't get nihilistic... Maybe I was being a bit too harsh just now. I didn't mean to upset you...
…对不起，我没事，只是突然有些控制不住情绪。我还是听佩拉士官的话，先回机械屋吧……
...Sorry, I'm fine. I just couldn't help myself. I'd better listen to Officer Pela and head back to the workshop...
…或许这份工作真的不适合我？唉……
Perhaps this job is not for me after all. *sigh*...
惹到那些权势滔天的家伙…现在军队里恐怕已经没有我的位置了吧？唉……
I've messed with the wrong people. I'm afraid I don't have a place in the military anymore... *sigh*...
你先带着她回机械屋吧，我还得去处理这次事故的后续事宜……
Take her back to the workshop. I have to follow up on this incident...
要是你有空的话，我们晚点在机械屋见吧。茉莉看起来需要和人多聊聊天……
Let's meet at the workshop later if you are free. Looks like Molly needs someone to talk to...
这里到处都是铁锈和烟尘的味道…我不太喜欢。
It reeks of rust and soot here... I don't like it one bit.
但斯捷潘先生说过，这也是我应尽的责任。只有照他说的做，我才能赢得大家的尊重，过上好的生活。
But Mr. Stefan said that this is my responsibility too. If I just do as he says, I'll earn everyone's respect and be able to live a good life.
可我该从哪里开始？我在追求的到底是什么？什么都想不起来，什么都…我需要他的帮助……
But where should I start? What is it that I'm looking for? I can't think of anything... nothing... I need his help...
欸？你是…我们之前见过面吗？
Hmm? Are you... have we met before?
抱歉，我…我现在的状态不太好。很多事记不起来，很多事想不明白……
Sorry, I'm... my head is not in a good place. I can't remember much of anything at all, and I'm not able to think a lot...
你又被箱子给「困住」了吗？
Have you been "trapped" by your box again?
「困住」？唔…我现在有点混乱，没法完全理解……
"Trapped"? Hmm... hah, I'm quite confused right now, and I can't really understand...
你是怎么离开边缘通路的？
How did you leave Backwater Pass?
离开？离开哪里？我不记得自己从哪来，也不记得自己离开过任何地方……
Leave? Leave where? I can't remember where I'm from, and I can't remember leaving any place...
我记得你…比现在年轻很多。
I remember you... back when you were much younger.
但是…我对你完全没有印象了，对不起——我现在有点混乱……
But... I don't have any recollection of you whatsoever. I'm sorry — I'm a little confused at the moment...
斯捷潘先生说过，我不需要靠自己做出艰难的选择。只要是非常重要的场合…他一定会在我身边。所以…我只要等待就好了。
Mr. Stefan said that I don't have to make hard choices on my own. If it's an important enough occasion... then he'll be there for me. So... I'll just wait.
（虽然外表是成年人…但她的思绪好像还是和上次一样混乱。）
(She may appear to be an adult... but her mind seems to be just as muddled as before.)
（她一直在等的那个人，是叫斯捷潘吗？他好像一直没有出现。或许我可以再试着帮帮她……）
(Is the person she's been waiting for this whole time called Stefan? It doesn't look like he's shown up yet. Perhaps I can try to help her again...)
解决这个箱子谜题能帮到你吗？
Will solving this box puzzle help you?
我想试着帮你理清思绪。
I want to try and help you clear your mind.
谢谢你。我…不常接受陌生人的帮助，所以不知道该怎么表达。但我真的很感谢你。
Thank you. I... don't usually accept help from strangers, so I don't really know how to show my thanks. But I really am grateful to you.
这些箱子…我不知道它们和我有什么关联。但我没法把视线从它们身上移开…也读不出它们的意义。
These boxes... I don't know what connection they have with me, but I can't take my eyes off them... and I can't figure out what they mean.
也许解开了这个谜…不，不能期望太多。斯捷潘先生说过，要抛弃不切实际的奢望…一切必须由我们自己争取。
Maybe by solving this puzzle... no, I can't get my hopes up. Mr. Stefan said to forget about any unrealistic expectations... Everything must be fought and won by ourselves.
——我就在这里等你，哪儿也不去。
I'll wait for you here. I'm not going anywhere.
我看到了…人，很多很多人。他们聚集在一片空地上，一起抬头望着某样东西……
I saw... people, lots and lots of people. They're gathered in a clearing, and they're all looking up at something...
It's me. They're looking at... me.
斯捷潘先生在那儿，就在我身边。姐姐没来…我真希望她也在。
Mr. Stefan is there, and he's with me. My sister's not there... I really wish she were.
什么时候的事？发生在哪？
When did this happen? Where did it happen?
等等…我好像…还听到了一些声音，是从人群中发出的声音。
Wait... I think I can... hear a voice, a voice coming out of the crowd.
他们…他们在说一些不好的话。诉苦、抱怨，还有…咒骂。
They... they're saying bad things. Complaining, grumbling, and... cursing.
那些话…好像是在对我说的。他们讨厌我，蔑视我，甚至…憎恨我。我不明白……
Those bad words... seem to be aimed at me. They don't like me. They despise me, and they even... hate me. I don't understand...
但是斯捷潘先生握住了我的手。他在微笑，他对我从来都是微笑…他说一切都会好起来，没什么好担心的。
But Mr. Stefan is holding my hand. He's smiling, and he's always smiling at me... He says everything will get better and there's nothing to worry about.
我相信他，因为他从来没对我撒过谎。那些人的话…不重要。我只要在意他的声音就行了。
I trust him because he's never lied to me before. Those bad words... don't matter. All I care about is his voice.
然后…是黑暗。我只能记起这些片段…除此以外是一片黑暗。
And then... darkness. All I can remember are these flashbacks... other than that, it's total darkness.
但至少我找回了些东西——这是不是能证明…你刚才做的事是有效果的？
But at least I've got something back — does this prove that... what you just did actually worked?
不。虽然记忆恢复了一部分…但我还是哪儿也去不了。
No. Even though I've got some of my memories back... I still can't go anywhere.
Should I do it a few more times?
我感觉到了，困住我的力量…又在逐渐接近我。一步一步…又要重新把我裹入黑暗……
I can feel the power trapping me... coming nearer again. It's coming, one step at a time... to wrap me in darkness once again...
（一眨眼的功夫，那些箱子就又出现了——和在边缘通路遇到的情况几乎一模一样。）
(In the blink of an eye, the boxes reappear — just like how they did at Backwater Pass.)
我打不破这个循环。我不知道该怎么努力……
I can't break this cycle. I don't know what to do...
我感受不到过去，也看不见未来。我好像在一片雪地里独自漂泊，四周都是一模一样的黑夜。
I can't feel the past, and I can't see the future. I seem to be drifting alone in a blizzard, surrounded by nothing but darkness.
但我还是想找回属于自己的记忆，哪怕只是零星的片段。至少…捕获那些碎片以后，我能获得一丝安心感。
But I still want to get my own memories back, even if it's just a few tiny pieces. At least... I feel a little bit better having recovered those fragments.
我会尽力帮你找回自我。
I'll try my best to help you regain yourself.
我比较悲观…但我还是会帮你。
I doubt if it will work... but I'll still help you.
我现在也能安心仰仗其他人了…如果让斯捷潘先生知道了这件事，他会开心吗？
I can place my trust in people now... Would Mr. Stefan be happy if he knew about this?
记忆…终于…我终于记起来了。我的身份，我的过去，我在寻找的东西……
I remember... finally... I can remember. My identity, my past, what I'm looking for...
…全都卷成了一团，我得费上很多力气才能把它们捋清楚，然后再一根一根地抽出来。我想我能做到…靠自己的力量。
...It's shrunk up into a ball. It's hard to untangle it all, so I have to pull out each memory, one by one. I think I can do it... all on my own.
对不起…对不起，我不该在这种情况下曝露自己！我知道你没有恶意，我愿意信任你——但斯捷潘先生说过…他说过……
Sorry... I'm sorry. I shouldn't risk my privacy like this! I know you mean no harm, and I do trust you — but Mr. Stefan said... he said...
对不起，我不能…如果可以的话，请你把希莉儿这个名字也从记忆里抹去吧！就假装…假装我们从来都没见过面。
I'm sorry. I just can't... If you can, please remove the name Cyrille from your memory, too! Just pretend... pretend that we've never even met.
What is it that you're looking for?
我辜负了斯捷潘先生的信任。他那么相信我，但我却…连这么简单的事都没做好。
I betrayed Mr. Stefan's trust. He put so much trust into me, but I... I couldn't even do this one simple thing.
我要想办法补救一切。我必须补救，否则……
I'm trying to fix everything and make amends, or else...
你不再需要我的帮助了吗？
Do you no longer need my help?
…不，不需要了。我们之间的交流…应该到此为止了。
...No, no, thank you. Your involvement... should probably end here.
对不起，我不想冒犯…多亏了你，我才能找回这些宝贵的记忆。但这也是为了你着想……
I'm sorry. I didn't want to offend... It's thanks to you that I have all these precious memories back, but this is also for your sake...
如果我们交流得太多…如果我说了不该说的话，斯捷潘先生，他一定会……
If we exchange too much information... if I say something that I shouldn't... then Mr. Stefan will definitely...
I... don't have anything to say.
对不起…我知道你为了帮助我付出了很多时间。你值得一个答案……
I'm sorry... I know you put a lot of time into helping me, and you deserve an answer...
但我不能和你分享这一切。我不想让你被卷到不好的事情里，我不希望看到善良的人被伤害……
But I can't just share this with you. I don't want you to get caught up in bad business like this. I don't want to see a good person get hurt...
所以…就到此为止吧。我会记住你的善意，但请你努力忘记这一切…忘记我。
So... let's stop there. I'll remember your kindness, but please try to forget all about this... all about me.
（希莉儿让我忘记发生的事，还说不希望我受到伤害……）
(Cyrille wants me to forget everything, and says she doesn't want me to get hurt...)
（虽然桑博说这可能是裂界影响下产生的幻象…但她的语气听上去实在太过真实了。）
(I know Sampo said it's possibly all just an illusion created by the Fragmentum... but she sounds all too real to me.)
（无论如何，还是把这件事报告给负责禁区治安的人吧…）
(In any case, let's report this to the security personnel responsible for the restricted zone...)
前线压力越来越大，现在必须得调整铁卫的战术策略了……
The pressure on the front lines is increasing, and now the strategy of the Silvermane Guards must be adjusted...
外来者，来聊聊吧——你现在方便吗？
Outsider, let's talk. Are you free right now?
我在禁区里遇到了一个奇怪的女人…
I met this strange woman in the restricted zone...
奇怪的女人？确定不是后勤队或者科研部的成员吗？
A strange woman? Are you sure it wasn't someone from the logistics team or Scientific Research Division?
嗯…给我讲讲你的发现吧。如果有必要，我会即刻派铁卫开展调查。
Mmm... Tell me what you found. If necessary, I'll immediately send some Silvermane Guards over to investigate.
把你遇到希莉儿的事转告给了邓恩……
You tell Dunn about your encounter with Cyrille...
唔…满嘴胡话的女人，凭空出现的军械箱……
Mmm... a strange woman spouting nonsense, and Armory Boxes just popping out of thin air...
听上去…确实有些离谱，不过想想是从你嘴里说出来的，倒也正常。
It sounds... utterly outrageous, but then again, it doesn't seem that strange coming from you.
那片区域是堆放淘汰军械的库房，平日里确实少有人经过——不瞒你说，我之前也听过一些古怪的传闻……
That's a warehouse stacked with old abandoned ammo, and nobody really goes by there at all — but to tell the truth, I've heard a few weird rumors in my time...
情况我大概了解了。我过后会派铁卫去彻底勘察一下情况，顺便把库房做一次大清理。
Anyway I think I got the gist of the situation. I'll send some Silvermane Guards over to investigate things thoroughly — and give the warehouse a once-over at the same time.
你认识一个叫斯捷潘的人吗？
Do you know or have you heard about a guy called Stefan?
…斯捷潘？不认识，从来没听过这名字。你找他有什么事吗？我能帮上什么忙么？
...Stefan? No, never heard of him. Have you got some business with him? Anything I can help out with?
嗯？你的反应有点奇怪…嗐，我就不多问了。
Hmm? That's a bit weird of you... Eh, I won't pry.
能帮我查查这个名字吗？
Could you help me look into this name?
没问题。我这就派人去核对下铁卫名册。
No problem. I'll send someone to check the Silvermane Guard roster.
总之，感谢你为维护禁区秩序做出的贡献，外来者！如果发现了什么情况，我会第一时间通知你的。
Anyways, thanks for your contribution to maintaining order here in the restricted zone, outsider. I'll give you a heads-up as soon as I hear anything.
你说你在仓库里有些发现？
You said that you found something in the warehouse?
铁卫小队没在仓库里发现什么异常现象，不过倒是找到了些奇怪的书信…我们大概扫了一眼，但大伙都对里面的内容毫无头绪。
My Silvermane Guard squad never found anything strange in the warehouse other than a few weird letters... We scanned them over but nobody had any idea about what they said.
我在想，说不定你能从中发现些什么…不如就把这些东西交给你吧。
I think you might be able to get something out of them... Why don't I leave these with you?
哦，对了——我去查了下「斯捷潘」这个名字，但在部队的名册里没有相关记录，也包括已经处于退役状态的铁卫。
Ah yes — I checked up on that "Stefan" character you mentioned. There's no record of him among our registers, including retired Silvermane Guards and veterans.
看来，这件事我是帮不上什么忙了。如果你还打算做后续调查的话，祝你好运！
Looks like I won't be able to help you out. If you want to conduct your own follow-up investigation, I wish you all the best!
谢谢你的善意，陌生人。很抱歉我不能对你道出真相……
Thank you for your kindness, stranger. I'm sorry that I can't tell you everything...
请原谅我，这是为了你的安全着想…请你忘记我吧。
Please forgive me. It's for your own safety... Please, just forget about me.
这就是…杰帕德提到的那片裂界？
Is this... the Fragmentum Gepard was talking about?
边缘通路受到的侵蚀跟这里比起来，完全是小巫见大巫。
Compared to this, the corrosion we saw in Backwater Pass pales into insignificance.
How can we pinpoint the Stellaron?
希露瓦说过，星核很可能被藏在贝洛伯格北部的雪原中。想抵达那里，恐怕得先找到这座裂界迷宫的出口。
Serval said that the Stellaron was very likely hidden in the Snow Plains north of Belobog. If we want to get there, I'm afraid we'll have to find the exit to this Fragmentum maze first.
我说…你们有没有觉得这地方很诡异？感觉就像…感觉就像我们在被好多双眼睛一直盯着。
Guys... does this place feel weird to you? It feels like... like there are loads of eyes staring at us.
{NICKNAME}说的没错，感觉就像…感觉就像我们在被好多双眼睛一直盯着。
Oh yeah, {NICKNAME}. It feels like... like there are loads of eyes staring at us.
希露瓦说过，星核很可能被藏在贝洛伯格北部的雪原中。想抵达那里，恐怕得先找到这座裂界迷宫的出口。
Serval said that the Stellaron was very likely hidden in the Snow Plains north of Belobog. If we want to get there, I'm afraid we'll have to find the exit to this Fragmentum maze first.
这地方…让人起鸡皮疙瘩，不舒服。皮肤下面好像有虫子在爬。
...This place makes my flesh crawl... like there are insects under my skin.
现在我们没有向导，也没有能直接指向星核的探测手段——只能步步为营。
We have no guide and no way of detecting the Stellaron. We'll just have to advance gradually... and cautiously.
但也不必悲观。裂界的污染越重，就证明我们离根源越近了。
Don't be disheartened. The stronger the Fragmentum contamination, the closer we are to the source.
看，前面的地上…好像有什么东西？
Look, up ahead on the ground... What is that?
多长个心眼，不要随便碰裂界里的东西。
Be careful, think twice before you interact with anything in the Fragmentum.
We found it in the orphanage...
对！难道…难道她已经来过这里了？
Yeah! So she's... she's been here already?
对，绝对没错！否则不会有那么巧的事……
Right, she must be! This can't be a coincidence.
那是布洛妮娅！欸、欸！怎么还有可可利亚？！
That's Bronya! H—Huh? Is that Cocolia too!?
那里的是…某种残影？是裂界复制出来的某种能量残留……
It must be... a kind of echo? Some type of residual energy replicated by the Fragmentum...
那就是说她们肯定来过这儿了，对吧？
Which means they were definitely here, right?
而且看样子，她们是往那个方向去了。
And it looks like they went that way.
哈，正好！咱们还正愁找不到向导呢。走吧！
Ha, just in time! We had no idea which direction to take. Let's go!
被裂界侵蚀的物件可能不稳定。换做是我，不会去碰那个装置。
Objects that have been exposed to Fragmentum corrosion might not be stable. I wouldn't touch that device if I were you.
…你还没告诉我这究竟是什么地方，母亲。
...You still haven't told me what this place is, mother.
七百年前，这里曾是贝洛伯格的北方边界，也是阿丽萨•兰德带领第一批银鬃铁卫抵御军团的古战场。
Seven hundred years ago, this was Belobog's northern border and the site of an ancient battle. Here is where Alisa Rand led the first Silvermane Guards in resistance against the Legion.
至于现在…只是一座被废弃的回廊，处处回荡着旧世界的残响。
Now... it is nothing more than an abandoned corridor, filled with the sounds of Old World echoes.
但不要被这支离破碎的表象迷惑，布洛妮娅。等到承诺兑现的那一天…这片废墟将成为新世界的温床。
Don't let its fragmented appearance fool you, Bronya. On the day the promise is fulfilled... these ruins will become the breeding ground of a new world.
…母亲，你真的相信「星核」作出的承诺吗？它唤来了墙外的风雪，开启了裂界的大门。它毁灭了我们的文明——
...Mother, do you truly believe the Stellaron's promise? It summoned the blizzard beyond our walls and opened the door of the Fragmentum. It destroyed our civilization, it...
——而我们的先祖犯下的过错，就是没能尽早拥抱毁灭。
...And yet, the crime of our ancestors was their inability to embrace that destruction sooner...
自天外的入侵者降临那一刻起，这个世界就已经被宣判死刑。但星核…它给我们保留了一丝希望。
From the moment those intruders descended from beyond the sky, this world was handed a death sentence. But the Stellaron... has reserved for us a thread of hope.
重获新生需要付出代价。抹除一切属于旧世界的陈腐印迹，放弃毫无意义的苟延残喘…这就是「星核」开出的价码。
There is a price to pay for new life. Wiping away every decaying vestige of the Old World, renouncing the meaningless and lingering struggle... This is the price the Stellaron demands.
祂的承诺兑现后，布洛妮娅…我们就不必再穷尽此生守护一片废土。你和我，我们会亲眼见证新世界从废墟中升起。
When the promise is fulfilled, Bronya... no longer will we have to squander our lives guarding this wasteland. You and I will witness the new world rise from the ruins.
这机关好复杂啊，她们是怎么过去的？
This is a complex mechanism. How did they get past?
唉，咱就知道事情没那么简单……
*sigh* I knew this wouldn't be simple...
对了！刚才那片空地上，是不是有个像「能源中枢」的大家伙？回去看看吧，说不定跟这扇大门有什么联系呢？
Wait! Wasn't there some big energy hub-looking thing back in that empty area? Let's go back and take a look, maybe it's linked to this gate.
我不赞成与深层裂界里的物件做过多接触，但是……
I can't say I like the idea of interacting with our surroundings — especially this deep into the Fragmentum. However...
…别无他法，唯有置之死地而后生。
...There's no other way. Desperate times call for desperate measures.
嘿，理智如丹恒，也有向冒险精神妥协的一天嘛！
Ha, even Dan Heng the sensible has his adventurous days!
...But, the gate didn't move an inch...
是不是还有其它的装置？
嗯。很明显，机关的设计者不希望外人轻易通过。接着寻找能源中枢吧。
Hmm. It's clear that whoever designed these mechanisms didn't want outsiders to get through too easily. Let's keep looking for the energy hub.
看那边！我好像看到下一个装置了。
Look over there! I think I can see the next unit.
那些怪物，好像在把守能源中枢？
Are those monsters guarding the energy hub?
似乎如此…奇怪，裂界怪物应该会破坏人造物件才对。
It seems like it... Strange. Fragmentum monsters would usually destroy man-made objects.
你们听到声音了吗？这道机关肯定也打开啦！
Did you hear that? This mechanism must be on now!
Come on, let's find the next one!
我从来没见过这么荒凉的地方…至少铆钉镇上还留存着矿民的生活气息。
I've never seen such a desolate place... At least in Rivet Town, you could tell that people used to live there.
铆钉镇不过是裂界伸出的一根触角——而我们现在正深入心脏。
Rivet Town is only at the outstretched fingertips of the corrosion... Now, we're deep in the Fragmentum's heart.
成功！这道机关也关闭了。
下一个机关…啊，就在那扇门后面。
Where is the next mechanism... Oh, behind that gate.
没有开关，想办法绕路过去吧。
There's no switch. We need to find a way around.
{NICKNAME}, I want to ask you a question.
嗯，我认为这就是最合适的时机。
Yes, I think this could well be the best time.
你之前提到过的那些梦境，还记得吗？
Do you still remember those dreams you mentioned to us?
我知道你很清醒，但我需要你尝试一下，看看能否复现梦里的「声音」。
I know you're wide awake right now, but I need you to try. See if you can recall the "voice" you heard.
你试图回忆那个怪梦，随着思绪的深入，那声音也适时闯入你的脑海……
You try to recall the dreams. As your train of thought deepens, the voice comes to you...
你闭上眼睛，对回忆并无指望。但那声音却适时闯入你的脑海……
You close your eyes but don't expect to remember anything. And yet, the voice comes to you...
You must...eradicate... Once... and for all...
There was... a voice calling out to Cocolia...
那声音好像知道我们在接近。
The voice... it knows we're getting close.
(Try to repeat the whispers you heard)
以下只是我的推测——你听到的声音，或许是星核以某种方式向可可利亚发出的讯息。
This is merely speculation... but perhaps the voice you heard is the Stellaron somehow conveying information to Cocolia...
而你之所以能听见，是因为你身体里的东西…和这个世界的「星核」产生了共鸣。
...and the one in your body... is resonating with the Stellaron on this world.
啊？！你的意思是「星核」之间能隔空传话？这我可从来没听说过……
Huh!? You mean that Stellarons can communicate? I've never heard that before...
之前也没有人类能在体内容纳一颗「星核」。
Well, there's never been a human that could accommodate a Stellaron in their body.
The Stellaron has already warned Cocolia...
…那，我们岂不是主动往圈套里跳？
...Then, aren't we walking straight into a trap?
是。而布洛妮娅很可能就是诱饵。
...Yes. And Bronya may well be the bait.
既然是丹恒的猜想，十有八九没跑儿啦。但就算我们提前猜到了，现在也没办法打道回府啊。
Dan Heng's speculations are usually right on the money. But even if we've guessed right, we can't go home now.
哼——反正都没有退路了，至少我们做好了准备，不会被可可利亚唬住。有埋伏又怎样？！我们才不会输哩！
Hmph... there's no way back anyway. At least Cocolia won't catch us off guard now. So what if it's an ambush!? We're not about to lose now!
我要救下布洛妮娅，打爆可可利亚，再把那什么星核砍得粉碎！
I have to save Bronya, beat Cocolia, and crush this Stellaron thing to dust!
成功啦！这下机关门应该就被破解了，可真是费了不少功夫啊……
Done! It took some effort, but we finally cracked these mechanisms...
离追上布洛妮娅又进了一步。快走吧！
We're one step closer to Bronya. Let's move!
没错。这里的裂界似乎与可可利亚产生了特殊的联系，它正在反复重现她的形象。
Yes. The Fragmentum here seems to have made a special connection with Cocolia. It's repeatedly generating forms in her image.
我不明白…假如真相如你所说，可是过去的几百年里，在位的每一任守护者都在抗拒星核的召唤……
I don't understand... Even if the truth is as you say, every generation of guardian has resisted the call of the Stellaron...
难道她们都做错了吗，母亲？
Can all of them have been wrong, mother?
你还没看清吗，布洛妮娅？这里没有对错，有的只是人类的傲慢，还有短视。
Do you still not see, Bronya? There is no right or wrong here. Some of them acted out of human pride, others out of human shortsightedness.
我们的先祖——包括阿丽萨•兰德在内——他们为了延续这一方文明燃尽生命，然后归于沉寂，记忆被风雪吹散。
Our ancestors... including Alisa Rand... spent their whole lives trying to prolong this civilization. Then, after all fell still, their memories were scattered by the blizzard.
他们毕生忙于编撰颂扬人类勇气的赞歌，却抽不出时间凝神仰望星空。
They spent lifetimes writing songs of praise that lauded the bravery of humanity, but couldn't spare the time to gaze up into the stars.
于星空中更加宏伟的存在而言，千年的光阴不过一粟，渺小种族的成就毫无注目的价值。
To those entities of greater magnificence in the heavens above, a thousand years is but a passing moment, the attainments of insignificant beings nothing more than a footnote.
我不会重蹈她们的覆辙，走在绝路上顾影自怜。如果坚持注定徒劳，那就选择崭新的开始。
I shall not follow the guardians' misguided steps down that blind alley of narcissism. If persistence is futile, then one must choose a new beginning.
但是，「存护」的克里珀——祂难道不是你所说的「宏伟存在」之一吗？一直在庇护着贝洛伯格的…不正是祂的力量吗？
But, Qlipoth the Preservation... Are THEY not one of the magnificent entities you speak of? Is it not THEIR strength... that has sheltered Belobog this entire time?
「存护」？「存护」何曾正视过人类一眼？那不过是筑城者自以为是的妄想而已。
The Preservation... Has the Preservation ever looked humanity in the eye? Nothing more than an arrogant delusion of the Architects.
你会听到真正的宏伟之声，布洛妮娅…然后，你会理解我的选择。
You will hear the real voice of magnificence, Bronya... Then, you will understand my choice.
别有洞天呀这地方！瞧那些桌子和岗哨，以前有铁卫驻扎在这里吗？
Whoa, check this place out! Tables and sentry posts — there must have been Silvermane Guards stationed here once.
就算有也荒废很久了。或许这儿藏着什么有价值的信息…可惜我们没时间四处翻腾。
If there were, they left a long time ago. There might be valuable information here... shame we don't have time to look for it.
又是从前没见过的新形态怪物呢。
Looks like another completely new monster.
考虑到我们的所在之处，不冒出些新奇的敌人才是怪事。
Considering where we are, it would be surprising if we didn't run into strange enemies here.
管你是什么鬼怪离奇，别想挡我们的路——上吧！
I don't care how strange it is, it's blocking our way... Let's get it!
这个敌人很不一样呢！要不是知道它是裂界的产物，还以为是在和人类战斗哩。
This enemy is completely different! If I didn't know it was a product of the Fragmentum, I'd think we were fighting a human!
和胡乱破坏的低级裂界生物不同，它好像有自己的思想，甚至会使用高明的战术。
Unlike those random low-level Fragmentum creations, this one seems to have a mind of its own. It seems to be able to use complex tactics.
看，布洛妮娅和可可利亚的残影——她们肯定也经过了这里。
Look, Bronya and Cocolia's echoes... they must have come through here.
咦？那岂不是说明我们已经很接近了？
...That means we must be really close, right?
喂，坚持住！可就差这临门一脚了呀！
Hey, stay with it! This is the final push!
我有预感，我们离北方的雪原已经很近了。
I sense that we're very near to the northern Snow Plains.
第一任守护者在这里指挥银鬃铁卫作战，用巨大的牺牲换来了短暂的喘息之机。
This is where the first guardian led the Silvermane Guards into battle. She made huge sacrifices for the sake of temporary respite.
但来自异世界的军团不知疲倦。她很快就意识到，血肉之躯根本不可能与如此可怕的敌人抗衡。
But the otherworldly Legion did not tire. She soon realized that flesh and blood could not contend with so ruthless an enemy.
几近绝望之际…她选择把目光投向「星核」，许下最初的愿望。
When all was nearly lost, she chose to set her sights on the Stellaron... and made the first wish.
之后发生的事…你也清楚了。
As for what came later... you know as well as I.
所以…「寒潮」其实是应人类的愿望产生的灾难……
So... the Eternal Freeze was a disaster brought about by a human wish...?
讽刺吗？星核只是实现了人类的诉愿，我们却在接下来的几百年里对它的存在讳莫如深。
Ironic, no? All the Stellaron did was answer humanity's call, and yet we kept its existence a closely guarded secret for centuries.
甚至还妄图用「它」来抑制星核…可悲，可笑。
Even going so far as to attempt to use "it" to control the Stellaron... Woeful... laughable.
用不属于这个世界的技术打造出来的东西——旧时代的「公司」和筑城者妄图用来收容星核的抑制器。
Something created using otherworldly technology... An inhibitor that a corporation from the Old World and the Architects attempted to use to house the Stellaron.
我知道你有很多疑问，女儿。耐心些…很快你就能得到所有答案。
...I know you have many questions, my daughter. Be patient... soon you will have all the answers.
又是那个女人的影子…这次布洛妮娅不在她身边。
It's that "shadow" of hers again... but Bronya's isn't with her this time.
反正只是裂界造出来的幻象而已，{NICKNAME}，咱们接近点看看。
It's only a Fragmentum illusion. {NICKNAME}, let's get a closer look.
总感觉…和之前的残影有些不太一样？
It feels like this echo is different from the others before.
Huh!? Did... Did she just speak!?
Not good — March, out the way!
这、这家伙，真的不是本尊吗？
A—Are you sure this isn't the real her?
外表再像，裂界复制出来的始终是赝品。打倒她！
It may look like her, but the Fragmentum can only create forgeries. Bring her down!
那段阶梯…只有这一条路了。
Those stairs... it's the only way forward.
不管它通向何处，想来就是这趟旅途的终点。
Wherever they lead, it must be the end of the journey.
我可不想这么快就到终点啊…我希望我的旅途永远没有尽头。
I don't wanna get to the end so soon... I want my journey to go on forever.
也就是说…布洛妮娅，还有上下层区的命运，现在就在前方…就掌握在我们的手里。
This means that Bronya is up ahead... and so is the fate of the Overworld and the Underworld... It's all in our hands.
奇怪，我本以为自己会害怕，或是紧张…但是没有。我现在唯一的感觉…就是不真实。
Strange, I thought I'd feel nervous or afraid... but I don't. The only feeling I have... is that none of this seems real.
Is this how Trailblazing expeditions usually come to an end?
也不会，有时候收尾挺欢乐的。
Not always, sometimes it's a happier conclusion.
他俩应该已经习惯这种冒险了。
These two have gotten used to these expeditions.
老实说，很难习惯啊！以前都得依靠姬子和杨叔……
To be honest, you never really get used to them! We always used to rely on Himeko and Mr. Yang.
能在雪原里安息…也挺好的。
Resting forever in the Snow Plains... that wouldn't be so bad.
喂，你又在说什么丧气话呀！
Hey, way to boost morale over there!
列车行过一个又一个世界，我等只是过客，是一段故事的见证者。
The Express has traveled world after world. We are merely passing travellers — witnesses to part of a grander story.
我们总是避免被卷入决定世界生死存亡的浪潮…但也总有身不由己的时候。
We invariably avoid getting drawn into turbulence that can decide the fate of a world... but there are always times when we have no choice but to act.
换句话说，{NICKNAME}——你的初次「开拓」之旅，运气好到爆棚啦！
Or to put it another way, {NICKNAME}... this is one heck of a first Trailblazing expedition! You hit the jackpot!
我本打算说些多余的灰心话，想想还是算了。跟你们搭伙冒险，总觉得再大的困难都不在话下。
I was about to bore you all with my gloomy reflections... but on second thought — not today. Adventuring with you guys by my side has made me feel like no obstacle is too big.
没错！愉快的冒险本来就没有那么多条条框框嘛。
Right on! But you can say whatever you like — a good adventure shouldn't be full of rules and regulations!
帮助需要帮助的人们，结交值得信赖的伙伴，顺手再拯救几次世界——
Helping those in need, befriending those worth counting on, and saving the world a few times along the way...
This is the spirit of trailblazing!
裂界的深处…不知道会有什么潜藏的危险呢。
We're deep inside the Fragmentum... There could be hidden dangers lying in wait.
还是先找找看别的线索吧？
Let's look for other clues first.
当着敌人的面操作也太危险了——先把这片区域清理干净再说！
Hey, it's too dangerous to operate the mechanism with them here... We better clean this place up first!
想到对岸去的话，恐怕得再旋转一次栈桥，然后绕路过去。
If we want to get to the other side, we'll need to rotate the gear bridge again and go around.
放任敌人不管的话，我们有可能遭到前后夹攻。
If we avoid the enemy, we might be ambushed further in.
到时候后悔就来不及了——就在这里击败它吧。
It'll be too late for regrets then... Let's defeat this one here.
…好…好冷！光凭一点点开拓的力量，已经没法抵御低温了……
It's f—freezing here — the blizzard's so fierce! The power from the Trailblaze Path isn't enough to stop the cold...
这说明我们正在靠近星核…靠近寒潮的中心。
It means that we're getting closer to the Stellaron... and the heart of the Eternal Freeze.
这是…「筑城者」留下的遗迹吗？
…跟城里那些一板一眼的建筑完全不同。
...very different from the uniform style of the buildings we saw in the city.
看起来…像不像一只巨大的手掌？
Does it... look like the palm of a huge hand to you?
这是什么东西啊…噫，真可怕！
就像被琥珀困住的昆虫……
...It's like an insect trapped in amber...
反物质军团的爪牙入侵这个世界时，一定没想到自己会被寒潮吞没吧。
I bet the Antimatter Legion forces never thought they'd be swallowed up by the Eternal Freeze when they invaded this world.
Wanna defrost them and find out?
不了不了，解冻了也是添堵。
No, no! We've got enough on our plate.
我…还是记不起来啊…没有印象……
I... I don't remember... It's a blank canvas...
亏你这时候还有心情开玩笑啊……
I'm impressed you can still think up jokes right now...
不过，冰块里这些家伙还活着吗……
Even in the ice... could these guys still be alive...?
商业区沦陷了。居民已经转移，暂时安置在外城区。戍卫队…牺牲二十六人，但我……
The Commercial District has fallen. We've transfered the residents to the Outer Municipal District for the time being. The Garrison lost <unbreak>26</unbreak> fighters... but I...
我…我不确定牺牲的铁卫是不是真的死去了。我看到他们残破的身形在裂界中徘徊……
I... I'm not sure that they're dead... I saw their broken figures lingering in the Fragmentum...
那里发生的事违背常理，接近疯狂。守护者大人，情况如果持续下去……
What happened back there defied all reason... it was madness. Madam Guardian, if this continues...
…我很清楚后果，杰帕德。退下吧。
...I know well the consequences, Gepard. You may leave.
——你还在犹豫什么，可可利亚？这不是你一直在期待的吗？离开这个笼子，亲眼看看这座城市吧！我们还有什么可失去的吗？
...Why do you hesitate, Cocolia? Isn't this what you've always been hoping for? Get out of this cage and take a look at the city. What is there to lose!?
前人的努力…他们未竟的研究…终于能在这个时代结出果实了！给我一支卫队，让我去找到「星核」，找到拯救家园的办法——
The efforts of our predecessors... their unfinished research... we can finally see them come to fruition! Give me some soldiers and I'll locate the Stellaron and find out how to save our world—
...You need to come to your senses, Serval.
Come... to my senses? What are you—
铁卫！朗道女士累了，带她下去吧。
Guards! Miss Serval is tired, take her to rest.
查封她的实验室，扣押所有研究人员——他们进行的是非法的研究。
Sequester her lab and detain the researchers — their work is illegal.
…为什么，可可利亚…你为什么会变得这么冷漠……
...Why Cocolia... Why have you grown so cold...
希露瓦•朗道…你曾是我最珍视的朋友。
Serval Landau... you were my most cherished friend.
…但约定的新世界里没有她的位置。
...But there is no place for her in the promised new world.
可可利亚大人，怪物正向这边涌来！这里…这里太危险了！
Madam Cocolia, the monsters are surging this way! ...It's too dangerous here!
没人能理解…除了我。他们耳目健全，却看不见、听不到……
Only I... Only I can understand. They have eyes that do not see, ears that do not hear...
把愚昧的意志当作食粮…赦免他们的愚蠢和恐惧……
Feast on their willful ignorance... absolve them of their stupidity and fear...
母亲大人，我还是不明白…
裂界侵蚀已经蔓延到了下层。如果撤走所有铁卫…留在下面的人该怎么保护自己？
The Fragmentum corrosion has already spread to the Underworld. How will those below ground fend for themselves if we withdraw every guard?
自动机兵防线会负责他们的安全。最重要的防线在上层区，我们一旦崩溃，地下将瞬间覆灭。必须不惜一切代价维持防线。

The automatons will ensure their safety. The most important defensive position is here on the surface. If our lines crumble, the underground will vanish in an instant. Our defenses here must be maintained at all costs.
这是取舍，布洛妮娅——身为领袖，就一定要有决断的胆识……
These are the choices we make, Bronya... As a leader, you must harbor the courage and foresight to choose.
你、我，我们还需要履行更重要的使命…早晚有一天，你也要做出抉择
You, me, and every Silvermane Guard in the city, all of us must carry out a higher mission. There will come a day when you must make your own choice. Do you understand?
为时尚早，布洛妮娅…为时尚早。总有一天你会明白的。
It is too early Bronya... still too early. You will understand when the time is right.
不要抗拒，布洛妮娅——接受共同的意志吧！
Do not resist, Bronya... Accept the common will!
No... I... I don't want this...
看着他们承诺的未来，布洛妮娅！一个没有贫穷、寒冷、痛苦的世界；一个人们不必再像囚徒般祈求存续的世界；一个我们可以永远守护的世界。

Look upon their promised future, Bronya! A world without poverty, without cold, without suffering... A world where people no longer have to pray like prisoners for survival... A world that we can guard for all eternity.
七百年来，我们不断尝试，不断抗争，以为人性的光芒将指引我们走向复兴。结果呢？我们一败涂地！
Seven hundred years ago, we tried and fought unceasingly, believing that the radiance of human nature could shepherd us towards rejuvenation. And to what end? A crushing defeat!
为何在面对不可抗辩的力量时，我们想到的第一件事永远是抗拒、堵上耳朵，而非聆听它的诉求？
Why, when faced with irrefutable strength, is our first thought always to resist, to cover our ears, instead of hearing the call?
那就是盘踞在人性深处的，难以磨灭的愚妄和怯懦。抛弃它们，解开束缚你的枷锁！星核将带人类走向进化，祂将……

It is the conceit and cowardice entrenched in the depths of human nature — so difficult to efface. Cast them aside, break free of the chains that bind you! The Stellaron will lead humanity to evolve, and THEY will...
洗脑就到此为止吧，魔女！
Your brainwashing ends here, you witch!
…还是来了啊。本以为这暴风雪能将你们埋葬……
...You came. I thought the blizzards had entombed you...
想得美！还没打倒你以前，我们是不会倒下的！
You wish! We're not going down before you do!
布洛妮娅！我不清楚你们之间到底发生了什么。就算你现场解释，我大概也听不懂那些玄乎的东西。但有两件事我清楚得很——
Bronya! I don't know what happened between you and them. Even if you explained it to me, I probably wouldn't understand all the crazy details. But there are two things I do know...
第一，这些家伙费尽千辛万苦来到这里，为的就是封印那个叫「星核」的玩意。
One: These guys have come through hell to get here — to seal this Stellaron thing.
第二，记得我说过的话吗？如果你出了什么事，我一定会来救你的。
And two: Do you remember what I said? If anything happened to you, I'd save you.
所以，你懂吗？就算你已经被那边的女人洗脑，把我们之间的约定忘得干干净净了——我也要把你打晕了再带回去！
Do you understand? Even if the damage is done — even if you've completely forgotten our promise, then... then I'm just gonna have to knock you out and bring you back myself!
可以了吧？我已经给了你们充分的时间…道别的时间。
...Finished? I think I've given you long enough, to... bid farewell.
带你来这的另一个原因，是时候告诉你了，布洛妮娅。
It's time I told you my other reason for bringing you here, Bronya.
I want to witness your choice.
所有真相，我都告诉你了；有关与星核的交易，有关我向它许下的愿望。我们之间…再没有秘密了。
I have told you all the truths there are to tell: The deal with the Stellaron, the wish I made to it... There are no more secrets between us.
许多年前，「星核」的声音第一次在我耳边响起，而我和历代守护者一样，闭目塞听。那时的我就是现在的你，苦苦守着筑城者所谓的「存护」……

Many years ago, the voice of the Stellaron sounded in my ears for the first time. I was no different from the previous generations of guardians... I withdrew, refused to hear. I was as you are now — bitterly defending the Architects' so-called "Preservation..."
我的信念一度无比坚定…直到一个突如其来的变量打乱了一切；另一个选择出现在我面前，那意味着颠覆旧秩序，迎接新世界的到来。

My conviction was once steadfast, unparalleled... until a sudden change arrived and threw everything into chaos. Another choice appeared before me — a subversion of the old order... and the welcoming of a new world.
但比起虚无缥缈，越来越遥远的「存护」，它是那么真实……
And compared to the illusory, evermore distant Preservation, this was so tangible...
我一直在苦想，苦想该怎么向你传达这一切。承诺中的明天总会到来，但如果你不能待在我的身旁，和我一同守望那个新世界……
I have agonized — long agonized over how to convey all this to you. Inevitably, the promised tomorrow will transpire... but if you were not there beside me, to watch over that new world...
那我将陷入痛苦之中——布洛妮娅，难以抹消的痛苦！
...Then I would descend into torment, Bronya — enduring torment!
也许，我还要感谢你们，外来者。迫于你们带来的压力…我终于得以直面自己最后的弱点。
Perhaps I should be thanking you, outsiders. The pressure you have imposed... has at long last compelled me to confront my final... weakness.
布洛妮娅，从小到大，我从未逼迫你服从我的意志。无论如何，你总有选择——过去如此，如今依然。
Bronya, throughout your life, I have never forced you to submit to my will. You have always, will always have a choice... as then, so now.
可可利亚大人…感谢你把我抚养成人，感谢你把选择的权利留给了我。
Madam Cocolia... I am grateful to you for raising me, and for allowing me the privilege of choice.
可是…对不起，母亲。这最后一次，我不能站在你身边。
But... I am sorry, mother. On this, our final occasion, I cannot stand with you.
你说人性的深处是愚蠢和畏缩，也许不假，绝境会映出人心中最阴暗的一面。
You say that conceit and cowardice lie in the depths of human nature — perhaps you're right... desperation sheds light on the darkest recesses of the heart.
…但你却错过了那些在绝境中努力生存、努力奋战的人。我看到了他们身上的光芒，在禁区前线、在下层区、在被你忽略的角落里。
...But what about those simply struggling for survival, fighting for something better? I've witnessed their light on the front lines, in the Underworld... in places you have overlooked.
先祖用双手建起了这座城市，在风雪摇曳中奋力延续文明。就算这个世界注定分崩离析，通向结局的路途也该由人类亲手铺就——
Our ancestors built this city — striving in the bitter snow to prolong our civilization. Even if this world is doomed to fall apart, we should allow humanity to pave the way to its final outcome...
——而不是把命运交给这枚祸种！
...Not hand over our fate to this seed of ruin!
我们是由普通人选出的守护者，母亲！我们的职责是「存护」由人类建立的世界！我们不是神明，不是裁判！
We are guardians, mother! Chosen from among the masses! Our duty is to preserve the world built by humanity! We are not gods! We are not arbiters!
你想要把人性踩在脚下，同时扮演裁判和神明——这种事，我不能容许！
You seek to crush human nature underfoot while masquerading as an... as an arbiter and a god! I cannot let you!
这样啊…你的选择是…这样啊。我了解了，布洛妮娅。
So... this is your choice. I understand, Bronya.
可惜…可惜你看不到美好的世界了。你无法突破思想的桎梏…知道吗？你本该是…新世界的「母亲」。
Pity... Such a pity that you will never see that resplendent world... Unable to free yourself from the shackles of your mind... You know what? You were supposed to be... the mother of the new world.
地面…地面在震动！怎么回事？！
The ground... it's shaking! What's happening!?
这座城市…贝洛伯格的命运已经注定，它的未来将在我们手中展开。
The fate of this city... of Belobog... is sealed. Its future will unfold in our hands.
而你们…将成为这个新世界的基石！
And you... will become the foundation of the new world!
被冰封的虚卒遗骸遍布这条山道，看来就连残暴的军团也无法抵御寒潮的威力。
The frozen remains of Voidrangers are scattered along the mountain path. Even the ruthless Antimatter Legion is helpless against the might of the Eternal Freeze.
但那虚卒的遗体竟保存得如此完整，你不禁开始思考…也许三月七的怀疑有些道理。
The Voidranger remains are preserved remarkably well in the ice. You can't help but wonder... perhaps March 7th is right.
——无论如何，绝对不能给这些东西解冻。
—Either way, you think that it's best not to unfreeze them.
比、比史瓦罗还大一万倍的机器人！
Th—This robot's a thousand times bigger than Svarog!
...The future of Belobog rests in my hands!
Behold, the end is upon you!
这样的巨物，我们该怎么摧毁它？
How can we bring a giant like this down?
听啊…这力量在涌动…在歌唱……
Listen to the power surge... sing...
星核给予我的承诺，才是这个世界唯一的希望……
The Stellaron's promise is the only hope for this world...
七百年前，它驱逐了反物质军团——今天，它也会将你们的存在一并抹消！
Just as it dispelled the Antimatter Legion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, so too will it wipe you from the face of this world!
…你已经失去最后一个离开这里的机会了。
...You lost your final chance to leave this place.
不自量力…那就让你绝望吧！
Fools... You will know the taste of despair!
「存护」的意志已经作出了选择……
The will of Preservation has made its choice...
贝洛伯格的未来也不再由守护者一个人决定。
Hmph. The future of Belobog is no longer just the guardian's to decide.
你们对这个世界的困境一无所知…对于等待着它的结局一无所知！
You know nothing of the plight of this world... nothing of the wait for its final end!
我们清楚，我们非常清楚。
On the contrary, we know it well.
就算面对风雪，面对裂界…这座城市里的每一个人依旧没有放弃希望，依旧憧憬着明天。
Even in the face of the blizzard and the Fragmentum... the people of this city never gave up hope, never stopped yearning for tomorrow.
哪怕注定走入灭亡，我们也会手牵着手，勇敢地走入那片黑暗——
Even if we are doomed to destruction, we will go bravely, walking hand in hand into the darkness...
不，有我们在，那种结局绝对不会发生！
No! That end won't come to pass while we're around!
以贝洛伯格所有人的名义，我命令你起身——「造物引擎」！
In the name of every citizen of Belobog, I command you to rise... Engine of Creation!
No... No! Obey my commands! Obey me!
The power of the Stellaron is with me...
你们…不过是旧世界崩溃前的垂死挣扎！
You are but cinders of the Old World soon to become ashes!
在列车组、布洛妮娅和希儿的共同努力下，可可利亚战败，{RUBY_B#祂}星核{RUBY_E#}制造的威胁被暂时解除。
With the combined efforts of the Crew, Bronya, and Seele, Cocolia was defeated and the threat created by the Stellaron was temporarily averted.
但贝洛伯格面临的危机还远未结束。在布洛妮娅的带领下，上下层区的人们将再次团结起来，继续为了生存而战……
But the crisis facing Belobog is far from over. Led by Bronya, the people of the Overworld and the Underworld will once again unite and continue to fight for their survival...
列车组在雅利洛-Ⅵ的探险暂时告一段落，开拓者们在星间的旅途才刚刚启程。
The Crew's adventure in Jarilo-VI has come to an end for the time being, but the Trailblazer's journey among the stars has just begun.
如果可可利亚拿布洛妮娅来要挟我们……
If Cocolia threatens us by taking Bronya hostage...
必须把她救下来。下层区…不，这个世界都靠她了。
We have to save her. The Underworld... no, the entire planet relies on her.
喂喂！听得见吗？信号真差……
Hello? Can you hear me? This signal is terrible...
姬子！你可算想到我们啦！
Himeko! You finally spared a thought for us!
什么啊，我和瓦尔特先生可是时刻在轨道上挂念着各位呢，这次的开拓之旅很精彩喔。
What are you talking about — Welt and I have been up on the star rail missing you this whole time! You've got quite the Trailblazing expedition on your hands.
这大家伙到底是怎么动起来的……不过，现在还是让它乖乖别动比较好？接下来，就看你们的啦！
So how does this big guy work...? Or more importantly — how do you stop him from working? Over to you guys, I guess!
我不是正在和可可利亚战斗吗，为什么会在这里……
But I was fighting Cocolia. Why am I here...?
…上次来到这里时，纳努克瞥了我一眼，难道……
...The last time I came here, I drew Nanook's gaze. Could it be...
这把枪是……可可利亚的武器？
This spear... isn't that Cocolia's weapon?
母亲…不知道你最后有没有从梦里醒来……
Mother... Did you ever finally wake up from that dream...?
{NICKNAME}，丹恒——我们成功了，对吧？摆脱了可可利亚和她手里的星核，雅利洛-Ⅵ的危机就算是解除了？
{NICKNAME}, Dan Heng — is that mission complete? We got rid of Cocolia and the Stellaron, so the crisis on Jarilo-VI should be over now, right?
我不清楚，三月。或许得等我们回到列车上以后，听听姬子和瓦尔特先生怎么说。
I'm not sure, March. We should see what Himeko and Mr. Yang have to say when we get back to the Express.
我能明显感觉到，笼罩这座山岭的风雪正在逐渐消退。但是……
It certainly seems that the blizzard around this mountain is starting to gradually subside. However...
...However what? Don't leave us on a cliffhanger, Dan Heng!
…也许可可利亚的话并非满篇胡言乱语。星核对这个世界造成的影响已经太深，恐怕已经到了无法逆转的地步。

...Perhaps there was some truth among Cocolia's ravings. Over such a long period of time, the Stellaron has surely had a huge impact on this world. It's possible that the changes have become irreversible.
But we said we could reverse it...
还是要让姬子来下定论。
We should wait to see what Himeko says.
对呀，姬子姐姐才是这方面的专家，对吧？
Yeah. Himeko is an expert on this kind of thing, right?
你们在说什么？是你们最先承诺能帮忙解决「星核」的问题，我们才——
What!? You promised from the very start that you could reverse the effects of the Stellaron. Otherwise, why would we—
{NICKNAME}已经为我们的世界拼上了性命，你也看到了吧？如果贝洛伯格的命运真的如母亲所说，我相信他们也和你我一样心痛。
{NICKNAME} has risked their life for our world. You saw it yourself. If Belobog's fate really is as Mother predicts, I am sure they will be just as saddened as you or I.
…抱歉，我太激动了。我只是很难接受，难道这一切都是白费力气……
...Sorry, I got a bit worked up. It just upsets me to think that all of this was for nothing...
当然不是白费力气，希儿。抬头看看吧，这是我有生以来第一次看到天空——是真实的天空，不是被「存护」的力量创造出来的宽慰。

Of course it wasn't for nothing, Seele. Look up — have you ever been able to see the sky before in your life? I mean, the real sky, not the comforting fabrication created by the power of Preservation.
我们从「星核」手中夺回了原生的天空…就算这片土地仍然在走向衰亡，至少我们也争取到了一些时间。这个结果已经足够好了，希儿。

We've taken back the sky that was stolen from us by the Stellaron long ago... Even if the earth below our feet is still dying, we at least bought ourselves some more time. That's better than nothing, Seele.
…嗯。只要还有时间，我们就一定能找到修复世界的办法。
...Okay. As long as we still have time, then I know we'll find a way to save the planet.
没错。但在那之前，我们还有太多工作要做……
Right. But before that, we have lots of work to do...
谢谢你们，三月，丹恒，还有{NICKNAME}。我知道这颗星球只是你们旅途中的小小一站，但你们做出的贡献一定会被贝洛伯格人永远铭记。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}, March, and Dan Heng. I know this planet is just one small stop on your long journey, but your help will be forever remembered by the people of Belobog.
我向你们承诺，一定会带领这座城市走向复兴，绝对不抛下上下层区的任何一人…绝对不辜负我们这一番奋战。
I promise you, we will lead this city and its people back to prosperity, both the Overworld and the Underworld... This hard fight will not have been for nothing.
但愿有朝一日我们还能再见…{NICKNAME}。
I hope one day we shall meet again, {NICKNAME}.
人类…总是软弱愚蠢，总是不自量力。
*vicious laughter* Humanity... so weak and foolish. Always overestimating their abilities.
Let me bestow upon you... despair!
母亲…您有没有从梦里…醒来呢？
Mother... Did you wake up from that dream...?
哇，这一次的开拓…真不容易。丹恒、{NICKNAME}——我们成功啦！呃，不过「星核」该怎么办？以前都是杨叔处理的……
Wow... that was a tough trailblazing expedition. Dan Heng, {NICKNAME} — we made it! But, uh, what are we gonna do with the Stellaron? It's usually Mr. Yang who handles it...
我已经通知了姬子和瓦尔特先生，这颗「星核」就交给他们来封印。
I've informed Himeko and Mr. Yang already. They'll seal the Stellaron.
好耶！这下，这个世界的危机就算是解除了吧？
Nice! The crisis on this world is basically over, right?
「星核」封印以后，寒潮会慢慢消退。这个世界的裂界不会再凶猛扩张，但也不会凭空消失。雅利洛-Ⅵ得到了重获生机的可能性，但那需要时间……

Now that the Stellaron is sealed, the Eternal Freeze will slowly recede. The Fragmentum won't aggressively expand anymore, but nor will it disappear. Jarilo-VI has a chance to return to life, but it will take time...
这些，就要看他们自己的努力了。
It will depend on the efforts of the people here.
Don't be too hard on yourself.
Thank you {NICKNAME}... I—I'm fine. Don't worry.
What do you want to do now?
对于贝洛伯格来说…这场胜利只是个开始。
This victory is only the beginning for Belobog.
现在我也开不出玩笑了…
Can't think of anything funny to say...
总要有人保持乐观啊。况且…我们已经迈过了最艰难的一关。
Hehe, start thinking, we're going to need all the humor we can get... At least the biggest hurdle is behind us.
要做的事还有很多…那台「造物引擎」引发的巨大动静，城里的居民一定都察觉到了。许多疑惑需要解释，许多真相需要公开……
There is still much to do... The people will have felt the effects of the Engine of Creation. There are so many questions to answer, so many truths to reveal...
我只是不知道要怎么让所有人接受这一切……
I don't know whether I can get the people to accept all this...
让民众知道母亲的真实目的…告诉他们这个维系了七百年的谎言……
Tell everyone about Mother's true motives... about a lie perpetrated for <unbreak>700</unbreak> years...
用一个谎言去遮蔽另一个——但如果这样做，我……
...Use a lie to conceal a lie. But if I do that, then...
我…我不知道该怎么解释，我只是觉得没有别的办法。
I... I don't know how to explain it... but I don't think there's any other way.
在下层，我们每天都在对小孩子重复同一句话：「明天会好起来的」——谁都知道那是在骗人，但至少能让他们带着希望入睡。
In the Underworld, we tell the kids "things will be better tomorrow." Everyone knows it's a lie, but it gets them to sleep with some hope.
如果把在这里发生的事说出去…你能想象后果吗？人们会失望的，如果连守护者都无法相信——换做是我，我会不知道自己还能相信什么…还能相信谁。
Can you imagine the consequences if we told the people what happened here? They'd be devastated. If we can't trust the guardians, who — or what — can we trust...?
…母亲是为了「存护」贝洛伯格而牺牲的。
从天外降临的旅行者口中，她知晓了「星核」的秘密。她也知道，第一任大守护者阿丽萨•兰德没能摧毁「星核」……
The visitors from beyond the sky told her the secret of the Stellaron. She knew that Alisa Rand, the first supreme guardian, had failed to destroy it...
…但她还是决定挑战这股远超人类想象的力量。大守护者可可利亚牺牲自己，驱散了笼罩贝洛伯格的阴霾。
...and yet she decided to challenge its power — a power beyond human comprehension. Supreme Guardian Cocolia sacrificed herself to dispel the dark clouds enveloping this city.
——从现在起，这就是「真相」…你们认为呢？
