...From here on out, that's the "truth" the world will hear. What do you think?
起码它有点「存护」的希望。
It keeps the hope of preservation alive, at least.
合乎情理…至少极难证伪。
It's logical... and hard to disprove.
为什么非得说谎不可呢…不知道啦，我弃权，我还是更喜欢说真话。虽然…我也理解你们就是了。
Why do we have to lie? ...I'm abstaining — I like telling the truth. But... I get what you're trying to do.
A lie will always be a lie...
我明白。但…我必须保护相信筑城者的人民…
I understand, but... I must protect those that believe in the Architects...
把我们的功劳给抢了啊…
...Maybe we include some of the cool stuff we did?
抱歉…我一定会想办法补偿你们。
Sorry... I'll be sure to make it up to you.
在很多人眼里，母亲是一位优秀的守护者…如果要保存真相，就把那些错误、疯狂、邪恶与梦想保存在我的记忆中…让我来背负就好。
For many people, mother was an outstanding guardian... The whole truth will live on in my mind — all the mistakes, madness, evil, and dreams therein... I will be the one to carry that burden.
既然注定要接过「大守护者」的职责…那我就必须舍弃天真的幻想。
Now I must take over the duties of the supreme guardian... and discard my naive fantasies.
抱歉，希儿。这个秘密，还请你和我一同把守…直到我们生命的尽头。
I'm sorry, Seele. Please protect this secret with me... till the end of our lives.
Say no more — I know what to do.
那么，按照我们之前的约定…着手重建上下层之间的桥梁吧。
Well then, as promised, let's start rebuilding the bridge between the Overworld and the Underworld.
希儿，你能将「星核」被封印的消息带给下层区的大家吗？告诉他们，封锁很快就会结束…很快就能自由地呼吸了。
Seele, can you tell everyone in the Underworld that the Stellaron has been sealed? Tell them the blockade will soon be over... and they'll breathe freely again soon.
当然，交给我吧——我猜娜塔都等急了。
Of course, leave it to me — Nat's probably getting anxious about the delay.
有你帮忙传话，我就能放心赶回行政区了。必须通知杰帕德和希…呃……
While you do that, I'll head back to the Administrative District. I need to tell Gepard... Serv— ah...
怎么了，布洛妮娅？哪里不舒服吗？
What's wrong, Bronya? Do you feel sick?
I'm... fine. I need to... hurry...
她的状况好像不太妙啊！怎么办怎么办…{NICKNAME}，想个法子呗？
She's exhausted! Quick, we need to think of something... {NICKNAME}, help me out here!
希儿，你带布洛妮娅回去吧。
Seele, take Bronya back with you.
去下层传话的任务就交给我们。
We'll go to the Underworld and pass on the message.
…好。差点忘了，你们还在被城里的铁卫通缉…虽然我是下层区人，但起码不像你们这么显眼。
Right... I almost forgot, you're still wanted by the guards... I might be an Underworlder, but at least I don't stand out as much as you guys.
那就这么办吧，娜塔那边就交给你们了。为了布洛…不对，是为了整个贝洛伯格——麻烦你们，保守好这个秘密。
That's settled then. I'll leave Nat to you. Remember to keep the secret — for Bron— No, for Belobog's sake.
你还好吗？哪里不舒服…头昏？乏力？还是……
Are you alright? Are you hurt anywhere? Do you feel dizzy? Tired? Or...
…我说不上来，希儿。全身上下…都感觉…很冰冷。
...I don't know, Seele. I feel... cold... all over.
嗐，那不是很正常吗？这地方本来就冷得离谱…嘁……
Isn't that normal? This place is freezing... *sneeze* Ugh...
还是快离开这儿吧，不然连你也要冻出毛病了。
Let's get out of here before you catch a cold too.
别怕，我身子骨结实得很。来，扶好我…咱们走吧。
Don't worry, I'm a tough cookie. Here, hold on to me... let's go.
{NICKNAME}，刚才你突然出现在战场上，手里还提着那么酷拽的武器…到底发生了什么，也该告诉我们了吧？
So, {NICKNAME}, wanna tell us what happened back there? Don't think you can just reappear on the battlefield with a cool weapon in your hands and skip the story.
唔…你在这个时候被琥珀王瞥了一眼？这也太巧了吧……
Uh... you drew the Amber Lord's gaze? Right at that moment? That's too much of a coincidence...
这是我第二次为你牺牲，三月…
That's the second time I've sacrificed myself for you, March...
呃…谢谢？但是这所答非所问呀……
Um... thank you? That's not answering my question though...
说时迟那时快，力量从天而降…
All of a sudden, I was infused with a great and terrible power...!
能不能正经点！咱是真的很好奇……
Be serious! I really wanna know...
{NICKNAME}本人也不清楚吧？这不是第一次了。在空间站面对末日兽的时候，也发生过类似的事——还记得纳努克的瞥视吗。

{NICKNAME} probably doesn't know what happened either. This wouldn't be the first time... Something similar happened when we faced the Doomsday Beast on the space station. Remember that glance from Nanook?
我们原以为是因星核与「毁灭」有关，但现在看来并不简单——恐怕得与瓦尔特先生谈谈才能理出头绪。
Originally, we thought it was because the Stellaron was linked to the Destruction, but now it seems to be more than that. We might need to speak with Mr. Yang to understand what's going on.
先着眼于当下的事务吧，姬子和瓦尔特先生处理星核时，不方便打扰他们。返回列车再说。
Let's focus on the business at hand first. We shouldn't disrupt Himeko and Mr. Yang while they're dealing with the Stellaron. Let's talk once we're back on the Express.
嗯，也对，毕竟做事就得善始善终嘛…我们赶紧去找娜塔莎。
Mm, you're right, we need to finish what we started... Let's hurry up and find Natasha.
Listen to the sound of Belobog
这座城市在哭喊…「存护」的力量在消褪。
The city is drowning in tears... The power of the Preservation is fading.
最后的最后…我们还是无法抗衡「星核」的意志。
We could not defy the will of the Stellaron after all...
Yes... But we have no right to judge.
This is not what Preservation would have wanted...
过去的七百年，裂界每分每秒都在持续扩张。我们留给接替者的…没有信念或财富，唯有漫无边际的绝望。
The Fragmentum had been expanding for the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years. There is no faith nor wealth left for our successors... only despair.
目睹誓言「存护」的家园在眼前逐渐消逝…是种折磨。再加上那挥之不去、扇惑人心的低语……
To see the home we vowed to preserve wither away... That in itself is torture. Not to mention the haunting whisper of temptation...
再坚定的意志也难免动摇，这一天注定会到来。祂的佑护…注定会离我们而去。
The day will come when even the strongest of wills cannot help but give in to such influence. It is only a matter of time before the Amber Lord forsakes us.
Then let others carry on the will of Preservation.
一介过客，却执意要肩负起一整个世界的命运……
You are but a stranger to us. And yet you seek to bond your destiny to ours...
也好。还有什么可失去…还有什么不能尝试呢？
So be it. What is there to lose when so much has already been lost...
去触碰琥珀的光芒吧，开拓者。看看你内心「存护」的意志是否足够强大…强大到能吸引祂的目光。
Touch the light of the Amber, trailblazer. See if your will can attract THEIR gaze.
这个大家伙…就是星核拘束装置吗？前人居然掌握了如此复杂的科技，真是壮观……
Is this... the Stellaron Imprisonment Device? They had such advanced technology back in the day.... impressive.
可可利亚大人…就是在此处战死的。
...Mm. She gave something back, in death.
该说说你想做什么了吧？
Is there anything you want to do here?
我还以为你是来吊唁的。
Did you come here to pay tribute?
…大概吧。不过…我来这里的主要目的还是为了自己。
I think I'm mostly here for myself. Still...
我来这里，是为了完成一场「告别演出」——
I wanted to come here to perform for Cocolia. To say goodbye...
这历史性的一幕，还想请你们两个共同见证。
...I'm glad you guys are here to witness it.
场地不算好，设备也有些简陋…见谅啦。
Not the nicest spot for a show, and the equipment could be better... sorry about that.
看着我，可可利亚！千万别把目光移开……
Look at me, Cocolia! Don't you dare look away...
哈，痛快。唯一的遗憾是看不到那家伙的表情……
...Happy. I just wish I could've seen the look on her face.
好啦，该办的都办完了…{NICKNAME}，老弟——辛苦你们俩陪我折腾这么久。
Well, that's all from me... {NICKNAME}, Gepard, thanks for sticking by my side with me throughout all of this.
今晚…咱们就去老歌德那儿开个庆功宴吧！
As for tonight... let's go to Old Goethe's place and have a big feast to celebrate!
（这家伙，和之前遇到过的裂界生物有些不一样…）
(This thing seems a little different from the other Fragmentum creatures...)
（她似乎没有主动进攻的欲望。也许可以避免一场恶战？）
(She doesn't seem to have any desire whatsoever to attack. Perhaps I can avoid a tough fight?)
Do I still have to fight?
I don't... want to hurt... anyone...
我已经很久…很久没见到过陌生人了。
I haven't seen a... stranger in a long, long time.
斯捷潘先生走了…他们也走了。所有人都离开了。
Mr. Stefan is gone... they've all gone. Everyone.
信任的人…亲近的人…全都离我而去。这座城市…抛弃了我。
The people I trusted... the people I was close to... they've all left me. This city... has abandoned me.
你…是斯捷潘先生派你来见我的吗？
You... Did Mr. Stefan send you to meet me?
(lying) Yes! He told me to come and save you.
不…不对。你身上…没有他的气息。
N—No. You don't have... his scent.
这样啊…没关系。我也感受到了…你身上的确没有他的气息。
Oh... that's okay. I can feel it too... You really don't have his scent on you at all.
…没有人会到这里来找我了。我不够聪明，不够坚强，不够自立…但唯独这点我很清楚。我一直在欺骗自己，就这样过了太久…我厌倦了。

...Nobody is coming here for me anymore. I'm not smart enough, not strong enough, not independent enough... but I know all that. I've been lying to myself all this time and living that way for so long... I'm so tired of it.
你…陌生人，我不明白…你怎么会知道我的名字？
You... stranger, I don't understand... How do you know my name?
…罢了。我不想再深究…太多过问永远只会给我带来痛苦。始终如此……
...Never mind. I don't want to get into it any further... too much questioning will only lead to more pain. It's always been the case...
你是我唯一的见证者…最后的见证者。这个事实已经足够让我欣慰…知道我不必在永恒的孤独中游荡……
You're my only witness... the final witness. That fact alone is comforting enough... knowing that I don't have to wander around in eternal loneliness...
What can I do for you?
What are you thinking about right now?
I... have a favor to ask.
我想知道…我的命运为何会是这般。我猜答案就被封存在这里，但我对这些谜语无能为力……
I want to know... why my fate is like this. I guess the answer is sealed in here, but there's nothing I can do about it...
你愿意帮我吗，陌生人？如果能找到答案…我愿意把有关自己的一切都告诉你。毫无保留。
Will you help me, stranger? If you can help me find the answer... I'll tell you everything there is about me. No secrets.
我的故事…也许并没有多么有趣。但或许你想听，对吗？希望你会想听……
My story... may not be that interesting, but perhaps you'd like to hear it, right? I hope you do...
我来帮你…我想听听你的故事。
I'll help you... I want to hear your story.
谢谢你。我…我害怕你会拒绝。
Thank you. I was afraid... that you'd say no.
…我害怕你会这么说。但是…我不能强迫你。我从来都没有想过要强迫谁。
...I was afraid you'd say that, but... I can't force you. I would never force anyone to do anything.
也许我只有继续等待了。等待下一个不会再来的见证者经过……
Maybe I just have to keep waiting around. Wait for the next witness, who'll probably never come...
我帮你，哪怕只是出于同情。
I'll help you, even if it's just out of sympathy.
我无处可去，我就在这里等你。
I got no place to go. I'll be waiting for you here.
想放弃了也没关系…我不过是个影子，哪怕被欺骗也不会记恨…不会悲伤。
If you want to give up, that's okay... I'm just a shadow, and I'm not able to begrudge anyone, even if they trick me... And I don't feel sad either.
你让我看清了真相，陌生人。我不知道该如何报答这份恩情…如你所见，现在的我什么都做不了。
You've shown me the truth, stranger. I don't know how to repay this kindness... as you can see, I can't exactly do anything right now.
但我至少还能履行之前的约定，把我的故事告诉你。你愿意驻足聆听吗？
But at least I can fulfill my previous promise to you, and tell you my story. Would you like to stop and listen?
…你很温柔，陌生人。和斯捷潘先生一样温柔。
...You are so gentle, stranger. As gentle as Mr. Stefan.
不…这也是我最后的心愿。斯捷潘先生会答应的。
No... This is my final wish. Mr. Stefan will agree.
——我是希莉儿，贝洛伯格的大守护者。
— I'm Cyrille, Supreme Guardian of Belobog.
我自知不配登上如此高位。若不是姐姐当年无缘无故地离开…我根本不可能走上这条道路。
I know I don't deserve to be in such a high position. If it weren't for my sister going off then for no reason at all... I'd never have been able to take this path.
幸好还有斯捷潘先生在我身边——他是我的老师，挚友。他给了我无数宝贵的建议…帮我撑过了一个又一个危机。
Luckily, I have Mr. Stefan by my side — he is my teacher and dear friend. He's given me countless pieces of valuable advice... and helped me through crisis after crisis.
Why do you linger around here?
因为疑惑…对我死因的疑惑。
I'm confused... confused about the cause of my death.
那些箱子谜题和你有什么关系？
What's your connection to the box puzzles?
它们…是我生命的终点。我之所以会在此徘徊…也许正是出于对自己死因的困惑。
They... are the end of my life. The reason I'm lingering around here... may be connected with my confusion about the cause of my death.
但你帮我解除了所有疑惑——我终于能正视自己的命运了。
But you helped remove any element of confusion — and I can finally face my destiny.
我生而愚笨…也因愚笨而死。我辜负了所有对我寄予厚望的人…我辜负了大守护者的职责和名誉。
I was born a fool... and died from my foolishness. I failed everyone who ever put their faith in me... I failed to uphold the duty and prestige of a Supreme Guardian.
我失足踏入那敞开的箱门，以注定被世人耻笑的方式结束了自己的一生。
I slipped and fell into that open box, ending my life in a way that's destined for ridicule.
或许在生命终结的前一刻，我也曾被卷入羞愧的旋涡…但我已在这交界之域徘徊太久，早已感受不到悲伤或耻辱。我现在唯独渴望安宁。
Perhaps at the end of my life, I was caught up in a vortex of shame... but I've wandered in this purgatory far too long to feel any sadness or shame. All I want now is peace.
陌生人，我能感受到你的强大。与懦弱的我相比…你散发着如此坚强、镇定的气场。
Stranger, I can feel your power. Compared to my cowardice... you exude such a strong, calm aura.
我渴求你最后一次的施舍…希望你能赐予我最后的安宁。
I beg you for one last piece of generosity... I hope you can bless me with everlasting peace.
谢谢你…谢谢你愿意留给我最后一丝尊严。
Thank you... thank you for leaving me with this one shred of dignity.
…你要将我抛下吗？将我留在这无边无际的空虚中？
...Are you going to leave me behind? Just leave me here in this endless void?
也罢…或许像我这样的人不配获得救赎。再见了，陌生人。
Well... maybe someone like me doesn't deserve to be saved. Farewell, stranger.
I will give you the peace you deserve.
谢谢你…谢谢你愿意留给我最后一丝尊严。
Thank you... thank you for leaving me with this one shred of dignity.
I still can't bring myself to do it...
…你要抛下我吗？将我留在这无边无际的空虚中？
...Are you going to leave me behind? Just leave me here in this endless void?
也罢…或许像我这样的人不配获得救赎。再见了，陌生人。
Well... maybe someone like me doesn't deserve to be saved. Farewell, stranger.
对不起，斯捷潘先生…我不是…你要找的……
I'm sorry. Mr. Stefan... I'm not... who you're looking for...
希莉儿的残响被冰风的呼啸声溶解、吹散。
Cyrille's echoes dissipate amidst the howling of the icy wind.
一枚金色的饰品留在了地面上，安静地等待着你将它拾起。
A golden ornament remains on the ground, quietly waiting for you to pick it up.
（这算什么问题？总得拿点东西当任务奖励吧。）
(It shouldn't be a big deal. It's only reasonable to take home some rewards for finishing all these missions.)
（那个希莉儿，居然是曾经的大守护者…难以置信。）
(So Cyrille was actually a Supreme Guardian... how unbelievable.)
（为什么她留下的裂界余响强烈到能聚集成人形？甚至还伴随着那些古怪的箱子谜题……）
(How can these echoes of hers be so powerful that they took on human form in the Fragmentum? And why was it accompanied by all those weird box puzzles...?)
（带着她的遗物回上层区吧。肯定有人了解希莉儿担任大守护者的那段历史。）
(I should take her relic back to the Overworld. There must be someone who knows about Cyrille's past as a Supreme Guardian.)
你知道名叫希莉儿的大守护者吗？
Do you know the Supreme Guardian Cyrille?
…呃，你说的是那位「愚者」希莉儿吧？
当然知道。换种说法，稍微学过点历史的人应该都知道吧？
Of course. I mean, anyone who's studied a little history has heard of her, right?
怎么突然想起问这个了？我可没空给你做知识科普啊…还有一大堆文件等着我盖章批复呢。
What made you suddenly interested in this piece of ancient history? I don't have the time for random trivia right now... There's a huge stack of documents on my desk waiting for my approval.
我从希莉儿那里拿到了这个。
I brought something back from Cyrille.
...Is this some kind of sick joke?
唉，算了…只看一眼倒也耽误不了几秒钟时间。你找到了什么玩意，拿给我看看吧。
Ah, okay... I guess, taking a look won't rob me of much time. What is it? Let me have a check, would you?
没想到啊，你可能真的找到了件不得了的古董……
I'm flabbergasted! You might've just found an incredible antique item...
根据《贝洛伯格前文明遗产保护条例》，通过民间活动获得的古玩古董需要上交给筑城者保管。你找到的这件饰物，我就先收下了。

Based on the Belobog Conventions for the Preservation of Ancient Relics, any antiques found by civilians must be turned over to the Architects for proper preservation. I will have to hold on to this ornament that you've found.
What? This is robbery in plain sight!
Then what's in it for me, huh?
别着急，当然不会让你空手离开。我很确定你找到的这件东西是真迹…一笔可观的奖金肯定是少不了的。
Relax, I won't leave you empty-handed. I'm highly confident that this thing is an authentic relic... I'm sure you'll be compensated handsomely.
哦，对了，你对贝洛伯格的历史了解不深吧？有关「愚者」希莉儿的历史资料，你可以在这本宣传册里找到。拿去吧，就当是政务部送你的纪念品。
Mmm, that's right — do you know much about Belobog's history? You can find out more about Cyrille "the Fool" in this pamphlet. Take it as a souvenir from the Administrative Department.
（这里就是杨叔标记的调查区域了…四处看看吧。）
(This is the area that Mr. Yang had marked... Better take a look around.)
这是一座精美的冰雕——它与你在「黑塔」空间站中见到的虚卒是如此相似，令你不禁感叹寒潮的奇妙造化。
This is an exquisite ice sculpture. It resembles the Voidranger you saw in the Herta Space Station. It leaves you wondering at the amazing creations of the Eternal Freeze.
（这里似乎没有类似信号源的装置……）
(Seems like there isn't any device here that looks like a signal source...)
封印着虚卒的冰块表面被皑皑白雪覆盖。尽管看不清被冰封之物的模样，你还是感受到了一股带有敌意的视线。
The surface of the ice that sealed the Voidranger is covered in snow. Despite not being able to see the icebound creature, you can still feel a hostile gaze.
…等等，不对——它们真的有眼睛吗？
...Wait. That's not right. Do they even really have eyes?
（这里似乎没有类似信号源的装置……）
(Seems like there isn't any device here that looks like a signal source...)
如果雅利洛-Ⅵ的风雪确实持续了近七百年，这个可怜的虚卒恐怕也已在此处度过了相同的时间。
If the blizzard on Jarilo-VI has continued for almost <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, then this poor Voidranger has probably been stuck here for the same length of time.
如今，星核已经被封印，肆虐已久的寒潮想必也会慢慢散去。待此处气候恢复正常，它们从冰封中解脱时又会思考些什么？

Now that Stellaron has been sealed, this punishing Eternal Freeze probably will start to dissipate. When the climate here normalizes, what will these creatures think once they've been freed from the ice?
…罢了，这个问题并不重要。毕竟你也不知道它们是否具备思考的能力。
...Nevermind. That question doesn't matter. You don't know if they even have the ability to think.
（原来不明信号只是「星际和平家电」的推销信息…把这件事告诉杨叔吧。）
(So, the unknown signal was actually an ad from the Interastral Peace Appliances... I'll let Mr. Yang know.)
转达不明信号的调查结果…
Report the findings of your investigation into the unknown signal...
你向瓦尔特与姬子说明了此行的调查结果……
You explain the results of the investigation to Welt and Himeko...
呵呵…有意思。这个结果还真是出乎意料呢。
Heh... Interesting. What a surprising turn of events.
虽然早知道公司在寒潮前就光顾了这颗行星，但据我所知，反物质军团正式登陆雅利洛-Ⅵ之前，公司的人就已经全部撤离了。
I knew the IPC had been on this planet before the Eternal Freeze, but as far as I was aware, it had pulled everyone out before the Antimatter Legion officially landed on Jarilo-VI.
没想到他们竟还派专人盯着被寒潮吞没的星球…可真像公司的办事风格。
I didn't think they would actually send someone to keep an eye on a planet engulfed in the Eternal Freeze... That however does sounds like their way of doing things.
既然只是推销信息，应该不会对雅利洛-Ⅵ形成威胁。有你确认我们就放心了。
Since it's just an ad message, it shouldn't pose a threat to Jarilo-VI. Thanks to your findings, we can all rest easy after all.
按照先前说好的，我和姬子已经为你准备了奖励……
As promised, Himeko and I have prepared a reward for you.
寒潮过后的历史啊…我们的智库里似乎并没有相关文献。
History after the Eternal Freeze... Our data bank doesn't seem to have any relevant documents on this topic.
看来我们列车组的大忙人{NICKNAME}又接到新任务啦，加油喔。
Looks like the go-getter on our crew, {NICKNAME}, has another new mission. Good luck!
我该去哪里了解这段历史呢？
How can I learn about that history?
呵呵，这就是我们「开拓」的意义所在了。
Hehe. That's where our Trailblaze comes in.
I really don't want to go...
呵呵，就知道你会这么说。
Hehe. I knew you would say that.
在我看来，这倒是充实列车智库的好机会…想必你对这颗星球还谈不上非常了解，倒是不妨趁机了解一下相关历史——你觉得呢，{NICKNAME}？

The way I see it, this is a good opportunity to enrich the Express' data bank... I assume you don't yet know everything about this planet, and you might as well take this chance to learn a bit about its history. What say you, {NICKNAME}?
瓦尔特说得对。至于该去哪里了解这段历史嘛……
Welt is right. As for where you should go to learn about this history...
如果我没记错…在你们此次旅行里，应该与那位年轻的大守护者结下了缘分吧？
If my memory still serves me well... You've connected with a young Supreme Guardian during this journey. Isn't that right?
她应该是这颗星球上最接近历史真相之人。去向她请教一下，或许会有不少收获呢。
She is likely the person closest to the true history of the planet. Go and ask her. You might learn something.
I'll be on my way then.
How about giving me my rewards first?
呵呵，别心急嘛。本次的调查任务可是延长了哦，现在还不到领奖励的时候呢。
Hehe. Not so quick, {NICKNAME}. This investigation is now being extended, so it's not quite the time to dole out rewards just yet.
…你就别欺负{NICKNAME}了。不过姬子说得不错——奖励就等这事彻底了结后再交给你吧。
...Don't take advantage of {NICKNAME}. But Himeko does have a point. We will give you your reward after this matter has been completely resolved.
一路平安，{NICKNAME}。愿你此行能有所收获。
Have a safe trip, {NICKNAME}. I hope your journey will prove fruitful.
你对寒潮前的历史有了解吗？
Do you know about Belobog's history before the Eternal Freeze?
寒潮前的历史？我确实有所了解，但没办法很准确地为你复述出来。
Before the Eternal Freeze? I do know about it, but I can't recite it all by memory.
如果你感兴趣的话，不妨在旁边的书架上找找——那里有一套《贝洛伯格大事年表》，或许可以帮到你。
If you are really interested, you should look on the shelf over there for a set of books called Belobog Chronicles. They might be helpful references.
不过，你怎么突然想起要调查这段历史？是出什么事了吗？
What got you suddenly interested in researching that history anyway? Did something happen?
说来话长，我被某个人骚扰了…
Long story. It all started with an ad...
我需要补全列车组的智库档案。
I'm on a research mission for the Express' data bank.
Pfft... I totally get it now.
那本《大事年表》就在书架上，你随便用吧。实在找不到的话就告诉我，我来帮你找。
That Chronicle is on the bookshelf. Feel free to have a look. If you can't find it, just let me know. I'll help you look.
不过，「星际和平家电」这个名字…总觉得有些耳熟。
The name Interastral Peace Appliances... does seem to ring a bell.
「星际和平公司」…这个名字，我好像在守护者的历史教材里读到过。似乎是个在星际间拥有巨大影响力的组织，还和「存护」有关……

Interastral Peace Corporation... I've read about it before in the Guardians' history textbook. I think it's some kind of interstellar organization that has massive influences all over the cosmos. It has something to do with Preservation...
唔…算了。虽然都是「琥珀王」的追随者，但应该暂时和我们贝洛伯格没关系。先不想了。
Oh... never mind. They're all followers of the Amber Lord, but they probably have nothing to do with Belobog. So I need not worry about them for now.
嗯…也是。不过就算将来取得联系，对贝洛伯格应该也是利大于弊……
Hmmm... maybe you're right. But I still believe they might be a net positive for Belobog if there comes a time when we do make contact with them in the future.
好了，你先去找需要的书吧。如果还需要帮助的话，记得随时告诉我哦。
Alright. Go and find the book you need. Just let me know if you need any help.
我先去找档案了，谢谢你。
I'll go look for the records then. Thank you.
别客气。希望克里珀堡的藏书能为你提供帮助。
You're welcome. I hope Qlipoth Fort's book collection will be of use to you.
（《贝洛伯格大事年表》…想必就是这套书了。）
（看看关于寒潮前后的部分吧……）
(Let me read about the years just before and after the Eternal Freeze...)
（原来在寒潮来临前发生了这些事……）
(So that's what happened before the Eternal Freeze occurred...)
（这人真要命啊…还是先回到列车组报告吧。）
(Ugh, these non-stop messages are driving me nuts... *sigh* Guess I should head back to the Express to report first.)
转达关于寒潮前历史的调查结果…
Report your findings of the history before the Eternal Freeze.
你向瓦尔特与姬子说明了关于寒潮前历史的调查结果……
You explain what you learned about the history prior to the Eternal Freeze to Welt and Himeko...
嗯…原来贝洛伯格是这么建成的呀。还有这套历法……
Hmmm... So that was how Belobog was established. Didn't know that they had a calendar system like this...
做得好，{NICKNAME}。这样一来，智库中关于寒潮前后的部分就可以填上了。
Good work, {NICKNAME}. And with that, we can finally have records on the time before and after the Eternal Freeze in our data bank.
{NICKNAME}总是不负众望呢。看来，以后遇到什么事都可以放心交给你啦。那么，这次终于可以把奖励……
You never let us down, {NICKNAME}. I suppose if we ever have a problem, we can just leave it in your capable hands. Now then, we can finally give that reward to...
…{NICKNAME}，你的手机似乎又响了。要看看吗？
...{NICKNAME}. I think your phone is ringing again. Don't you want to check it?
…真是个不屈不挠的人。这次调查任务可真是难为{NICKNAME}你了。
...You're truly the very definition of indomitable. This investigation must've been quite the chore for you, {NICKNAME}.
辛苦你了。来，这是我与姬子小姐为你准备的奖励。
Keep up the good work. Come, this is the reward that Himeko and I have prepared for you.
希望…这些能够弥补本次调查任务给你造成的精神伤害。
I hope... these can make up for any mental damage you've endured during this investigation.
（刚才的推销员说「查宝」本该送往「黑塔」空间站……）
(Didn't the salesperson say that Findie was supposed to be taken to the Herta Space Station...)
(I'll just go and ask Asta about it...)
这是你订购的家用寻物仪吗？
Is this the Home-Use Object Finder that you ordered?
咦？这是…和我当时在官网上看的预览图一模一样，就是有点脏。
Huh? This is... exactly like what I saw on the official website. Only this one is a bit dirty.
哦，不对。这款寻物仪的型号和我订购的不一样，好像是很久之前的老款……
Wait a minute. This finder is a different model from the one I ordered. It looks like an obsolete model from a long time ago...
你手上怎么会有这东西呀？发生什么事了？
How did you come by something like this? What happened?
你向艾丝妲说明了查宝的来历，以及那位锲而不舍的推销员的故事……
Telling Asta about Findie's origin and the story of a certain indefatigable salesperson...
乖、乖～不哭…「星际和平家电」的客服就是这样疯狂推销，根本不管客户的感受……
Now, now. Don't cry... Interastral Peace Appliances' customer service is all about crazy marketing. They don't care one bit how the customer feels...
下次再遇到这种事，你就告诉我，我让他们给你安排专属客服——咱不用受这种委屈！
Just let me know the next time you run into a problem like this. I'll have them arrange exclusive customer service for you. We don't have to suffer this kind of spamming ads!
不过，没想到这个小家伙居然被丢到了雅利洛-Ⅵ，还在那里度过了七百多年…真是一段神奇的故事。
Still, I never imagined this little one got sent out to Jarilo-VI and spent over <unbreak>700</unbreak> years there... What an incredible story.
谢谢你站长，站长最好了…
嘿嘿，放心吧。钱能解决的事都不算事。
Hehe. Don't mention it. Any problem that can be solved with money is no real problem at all.
不过，我还是推荐你直接上「寰宇佳品」买东西，这网站的服务可是超一流的。
But, I still recommend that you buy things directly from Cosmo Premium. That site always has top-notch service.
所以它为什么会出现在那里？
So what was Findie doing there?
这个嘛——站长也感到很好奇。不过，我是说如果啊……
Hmmm. I find it strange, too. Then again, if...
如果，这个小家伙的经历和我那批消失的快递一样——那么根据「寰宇佳品」的说法就是：「因物流受到反物质军团等不可抗力的干扰」。

If this little one's experience was the same as my missing package, then according to Cosmo Premium, it was "because the shipment was impacted by an unavoidable interference, such as the Antimatter Legion."
当时他们通知我丢件之后，很快就发来了一封超级有诚意的道歉信，还给我安排了原路补发——比「星际和平家电」的服务可强太多啦。

After they notified me that my package went missing, they quickly sent out a super sincere apology letter and even arranged for a replacement. Their service is leaps and bounds ahead of "Interastral Peace Appliances."
你如果有什么需要就尽管告诉我哦，我可以帮你代购。只要记得回空间站取货就好啦。
If you ever need anything, just say the word. I can help you buy it. All you need to do is remember to come back to the space station to pick it up.
至于你带回来的这台「查宝」，就留给我作纪念吧～我可以把这个具有传奇经历的小家伙加入我的古董收藏。
As for the Findie that you brought back with you, you can leave it with me as a souvenir. I can add this little legendary gadget to my antique collection.
不过，如果你之后还需要用到它的话，随时和我说——它毕竟是你捡到的，随便你怎么用都可以哦。
If you need to use it in the future, you just let me know. After all, you were the one who picked it up. You can use it however you like.
哔嘟…这里不是「星际和平家电」门店。
Beep, beep, beep... This is not an Interastral Peace Appliances store.
我是谁？我在哪？我在做什么？
Who am I? Where am I? What am I doing?
原来这款寻物仪也会说话呀。
So this finder is able to talk.
「查宝」…对吧？你现在所在的位置是「黑塔」空间站哦，我之后会为你安排好住处的……
The name is "Findie"... right? Your current location is the Herta space station, and I'll later arrange accommodation for you...
哔嘟…我要回「星际和平家电」门店！我要回「星际和平家电」门店！
Beep beep... Must return to Interastral Peace Appliances! Must return to Interastral Peace Appliances!
我已经找到资料了，谢谢你。
I've found the what I needed, thanks.
嗯？已经找到了呀，太好了。希望它能帮上你的忙。
Hmm? Already found it? That's great. Hope it can help you.
如果还有什么需要就尽管和我说，克里珀堡一定会不遗余力地为你提供帮助。
Just let me know if you need anything else. Qlipoth Fort will pull out all the stops to offer you support.
我是受了司辰宫的委派…
The Palace of Astrum sent me...
你就是司辰宫派来体验「星槎测速员」的吧。
You're the person sent by the Palace of Astrum to experience being a starskiff speed tester, aren't you?
你站在桥上，拿着计数器，看着桥洞下面，统计在规定的时间里有多少星槎通过。统计结束之后，然后把数字交给我。
Stand on the bridge and hold on to the counter, then look down and count how many starskiffs go past in a set time period. Once you're done, just tell me the count.
…你说只是站在桥上数数，对体验者来说缺乏挑战性了吗?
...Are you saying that counting skiffs on the bridge is not challenging enough?
你明白我一直以来在干的都是什么样的工作了吧？
Now do you know the kind of work I've been doing all this time?
「你的工作真的有这么无聊吗？」「这就是传说中的薪水小偷吗？」
"Is your job really that boring?" "Is this what people mean by getting paid to do nothing?"
虽然没有说出口，但我听到你的心声了……
You didn't say it out loud, but I know what you're thinking...
乍听你这么说我还挺感动的。你，该不会是为了安慰我才这么说的吧？
Hearing you say that makes me feel a little better. You're not saying that just to console me, are you?
当然也不排除是你在说反话。
Of course, you might also just be sarcastic.
咳，「星槎测速员」这份工作，司辰宫里的同事们都觉得这是职场食物链的底端。谁要是被派来一日体验，都会觉得是对自己工作能力的羞辱。

Ahem. So, the position of starskiff speed tester is known by everyone in the Palace of Astrum as the bottom of the occupational pecking order. Anyone who got sent here for a one-day experience would think that this job is an insult to their intelligence and skills.
明明只要让机巧测速，然后开出罚单就行了，为什么还要有人来监督呢？
Why do we need someone to supervise when we could just deploy an ingenium to measure the speed and issue a ticket?
他们中大部分人都只是凭着第一印象对这差事做出粗暴的判断。统计当然可以由机器代劳，但是有了麻烦，还是得靠人亲自上阵才行啊。
Most people are just judging the job based on first impressions. Statistics can of course be done by a machine, but when there is trouble, it is still necessary to rely on humans like us.
这样吧，为了让你理解一下这份工作的麻烦程度，咱们不妨先来一场小小的测试吧。
How 'bout this, to give you an idea about how troublesome this job is, let's have a small quiz.
<color=#dbc291ff>星槎海的航道里会经过不同颜色、不同型号的星槎。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Starskiffs of different colors and models will pass through the lanes in Starskiff Haven.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>你需要在规定时间内，记下往来这里的所有星槎的型号和颜色。等到结束之后，我会向你提问。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You will need to remember the models and colors of all starskiffs that pass by within the specified time period, and I will ask you a few questions at the end.</color>
比如我会问你<color=#dbc291ff>「蓝色的客运型星槎有多少艘？」</color>，这样一来，「测速」体验应该有些挑战性了，你看怎么样？
For example, I might ask <color=#dbc291ff>"How many blue passenger starskiffs went past?"</color> That should add some challenge to the experience. What do you think?
We can start once you're ready.

星槎海街区目前只允许同行两个类型的星槎：<color=#dbc291ff>客运型和货运型</color>。
At the moment, there are only two types of starskiffs allowed on the streets of the Starskiff Haven: <color=#dbc291ff>passenger-type and cargo-type</color>.
<color=#dbc291ff>货运型的星槎</color>根据货运量区分，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有红和绿两种颜色。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Freight starskiffs</color> are differentiated by the amount of cargo they carry, and are typically colored <color=#dbc291ff>either in red or green.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>客运型的星槎</color>根据虽然各不相同，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有蓝、绿、白三种颜色。</color>
Although <color=#dbc291ff>passenger starskiffs</color> do vary, they generally come in <color=#dbc291ff>blue, green, or white.</color>
I don't have any other questions.
没事儿，等你准备好，我们再开始。
No worries. We can start once you're ready.
哦，准备好了？你要是准备好了，我们就开始吧。
Are you ready? We'll start whenever you are.

门前大桥下，游过一群槎。快来快来数一数，二四六七八。
'Neath the bridge near the gate... starskiffs just passed straight. Come come, count them right... One two three four, eight in sight.

白色的客运型通过了6艘。
You saw six white passenger starskiffs passing through.
红色的货运型通过了1艘。
You saw one red passenger starskiff going past.
Would you like to test again?
我感觉还可以再来一次，多测试几次，我们才能知道效果如何嘛。
I think we can try again. The more we try, the better we can see how effective this is.
No problem. Let's do it again.
就当是帮帮我嘛，再来一次。
Come on, help me one more time.
哦，准备好了？你要是准备好了，我们就开始吧。

<color=#dbc291ff>Freight starskiffs</color> are differentiated by the amount of cargo they carry, and are typically colored <color=#dbc291ff>either in red or green.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>客运型的星槎</color>根据虽然各不相同，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有蓝、绿、白三种颜色。</color>
Although <color=#dbc291ff>passenger starskiffs</color> do vary, they generally come in <color=#dbc291ff>blue, green, or white.</color>
I don't have any other questions.
没事儿，等你准备好，我们再开始。
No worries. We can start once you're ready.
是星槎超速引起的事故！赶紧去瞧瞧有没有人受伤。
It's a traffic incident caused by a speeding starskiff! Let's go see if anyone's hurt.
门前大桥下，游过一群槎。快来快来数一数，二四六七八。
'Neath the bridge near the gate... starskiffs just passed straight. Come come, count them right... One two three four, eight in sight.
你发现，蓝色的客运型通过了3艘。
You saw three blue passenger starskiffs going past.
一辆超快的星槎打断了你的思路，明显那是危险驾驶。
A speeding starskiff interrupts your thought process, obviously driving recklessly.
它穿过桥洞消失在视野里…还没等到你转身追上去，就只听到惨烈的车祸事故声音。
It disappears from your sight after zooming underneath the bridge... You hear a terrifying crash before you can even turn to give chase.
幸好我们来得及时，我已经联系了丹鼎司医馆，急救小队一会儿就会赶过来。
Luckily we got here in time. I contacted the Alchemy Commission's apothecary and an emergency dispatch will be here soon.
这个「谛听」你可能用得上，我先交给你了。
You might be able to use this Diting, so hold onto this for now.
No problem, leave it to me.
别在这里磨叽了，你快去抓人。
Enough talk. You go catch the culprit.
I'll leave it to you here.
这样吧，你留下来，我去追肇事者。
Let's split up. You stay here, I'll go after the perp.
我需要你找到受伤乘客后联系亲属，协助丹鼎司医者完成医疗转运。
I need you to look for injured passengers, contact their families, and help the Healers from the Alchemy Commission with the medevac.
Is there anything I can do?
我需要你找到受伤乘客后联系亲属，协助丹鼎司医者完成医疗转运。
I need you to look for injured passengers, contact their families, and help the Healers from the Alchemy Commission with the medevac.
然后，我现在就去追肇事者。
And now, I've got a perp to chase.
星槎良好的安全避险设计令人称赞，被撞星槎甚至看不出痕迹。
The excellent safety features of the starskiff is commendable, and there aren't even any marks on the starskiff that was hit.
比起星槎，你现在更应该关注受伤的乘客。
You should be more concerned about the injured passengers than the starskiff right now.
The Sky-Faring Commission is just right over there...
Who would dare to stir up trouble here?
要是能帮得上忙就好了。
If only I can help in any way.
好像有什么纸片飞出来了…
Looks like some kind of paper flew out...
哎哟哟，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，俺没事……
Oh my, oh dear. {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}, I'm doing fine...
丹鼎司的救助马上就到了。
The Alchemy Commission's dispatch will be here soon.
这么明显的事故，能没事儿吗？
No way you're doing fine in a serious traffic incident like this.
俺…俺真的…没事——嘶，坏了，我这腰好像是有些问题。
I... I'm really... fine — Ssss, dang it. I must have strained my back or something.
能告诉我你亲属的联系方式吗？
Do you have any family you can contact?
哎呦…{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你帮俺…找找笔记，笔记比俺重要。
Oww... {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}, could you help look for my notes? That's worth more than my life.
俺…带的笔记很重要，刚才掉…出去了。
My notes... are really important. They fell out.
We can look for them in a bit.
不行，要是笔记丢了，俺就没法干下去了。
No. I'm gonna lose my job if I lose these notes.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}…求求你咧…俺的笔记很重要。
Come on, {F#young lass}{M#young fella}... Help me out... My notes are really important.
交给我吧，我在这附近找找。

哎哟，梅姐求求你了，俺记不住事儿，全靠笔记了。
Oh, please help old Mei here. I can't remember things anymore. My notes are all I have.
哎哟哟，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，俺没事，稍微躺一下就能起来了。
Oh, {F#young lass}{M#young fella}, I'm fine. Just hafta lay down for a spell.
梅姐求求你了，俺记不住事儿，帮俺找找笔记吧。
Please help old Mei here. I can't remember things anymore. My notes are all I have.
散页上密密麻麻地写着家政相关的笔记，非常详细，甚至对浇不同花用多少水都有记录。
Detailed notes about housekeeping fill the scattered pages in tiny font. It even has specifications about how much water to use for each type of flower.
笔记上似乎只有一半的联系方式。
It seems that only half of a contact number is written in the notes.
散页上密密麻麻地写着家庭地址、所属登云群阁、工作时间等详细信息。
Detailed notes containing an address, Skyward Pavilions neighborhood affiliation, working hours, and more are densely packed in the scattered pages.
笔记上似乎只有一半的联系方式。
It seems that only half of a contact number is written in the notes.
散页上密密麻麻地写着食品市场的开放结束时间、不同菜品的价格、不同食品忌口等等。

笔记上还写着「联系方式」。

笔记上还写着「联系方式」。

Some time has passed, and the Alchemy Commission's healers had taken Mei away.
之后有机会的话，再将梅姐的笔记还给她吧……

您就是联系我的{NICKNAME}吗，请问梅姐是不是已经离开星槎海了？

丹鼎司医者已经把她带走了。

你应该直接去丹鼎司医馆。

I bought some Xianzhou snacks on the way here as a small thank-you present. Please, take them. Thank you so much for all you've done for a complete stranger.

While enjoying the Xianzhou snacks Luhui brought, you recount the incident in detail...
…原来是这样啊。她既不用玉兆设备，也无亲无故的，联系我算是联系对人了，要不是您好心相助，我肯定什么都不知道。
...I see. She doesn't use the jade abacus and has no relatives, so I'm the right person for you to contact. If it weren't for you, I wouldn't have known about this.
梅姐这人没有家人，很久以前就在一直做家政工作，目前是我在雇佣她。

她这人智力上有些缺陷，脑袋不太好，粗活可以，记事都不太行，买菜也总是出错。
Mei might not be the brightest and may even be slightly dense in the head. She's good at manual labor, but memory is not her forte. She keeps getting the wrong groceries.
Mei does seem a little dense.
有这么明显吗？我和她朝夕相处的，感觉更明显一些。
Is it that obvious? For me, having her around day and night does make me more aware of her struggles.
She doesn't seem like a mentally challenged person.
三两句应该没有办法感受到，她和我朝夕相处，感受很明显。

Sometimes she can't even communicate on a basic level, and I would have to repeat the same sentence a few times before she understood it. Being the way she is, she won't be able to handle the compensation on her own after getting into an accident like this.
我得帮她把赔偿的事儿谈清楚，要是她自己来处理，肯定不了了之了。

Sometimes I get so upset and scold her, but she always laughs it off. The words just go into one ear and out of the other for her, and she eventually repeats the same mistakes, which makes me even more upset... I can't stand this vicious cycle anymore.

我明白了，我们先抓紧问问事故线索，再安排人手亲自把她带回医馆吧。

我想想，我先是听到奇怪的引擎声，然后撞上了，我跑了出来，它消失不见了…重点还是那个引擎。
Let me think. First, I heard some weird engine noises, and then the collision. I ran outside, but it has already disappeared... The most important part is still the engine.

我听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
I heard the <color=#dbc291ff>engine sound of the offending starskiff. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>
这不是相当于什么都没说吗？

啊，我还想到了一点有用的信息，我这个人天生听力很好…「咚——」、「哐——」、「咔嚓咔嚓——」、「咣——」。
Oh, I recalled some information that may be useful. My hearing had always been good... I heard something like "thud," "crash," "whoosh," and "clang!"
我听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
I heard the <color=#dbc291ff>engine sound of the offending starskiff. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>
感谢您配合我们的调查。
刚才你不是来问过一遍了吗？我再讲一次哦。
Didn't you ask me already? I'll say it one more time.
我听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
I heard the <color=#dbc291ff>engine sound of the offending starskiff. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>
您好，我是刚才找过您的天舶司测速员檀檀，我想问问在刚才的事故的情况。
Hello, I'm Tantan, Speed Tester from the Sky-Faring Commission. I contacted you earlier. I would like to ask you about the traffic incident.
哦！我记得你，我当时跑出去追那辆超速的星槎了，你就在我的背后。

当时事故刚发生，我立马就一个百米冲刺加速跑，蹭地一下冲出去了，非得跟这个肇事星槎比比高下！实不相瞒，我这个人从小就爱凑热闹。

看到什么有用的信息了吗？

啊！你说到这个，我就、我就、我就！

I didn't really see anything. My takeaway was that starskiffs are faster than humans.

啊！星槎牌照，没错、没错、没错！我刻意去记了一下！
Right! The starskiff registration plate, that's right, that's right! I memorized it!
是什么来着，二五六、二五七、二八二九三十一……
抱歉，是我输了。有机会的话，我还要和它再比一场！
Apologies, I lost. If there is a chance, I would very much like to have a rematch!

啊！十字航道！没错、没错、没错！你提醒了我。

<color=#dbc291ff>它朝右边拐过去了！</color>我记得很清楚。
<color=#dbc291ff>It made a right turn there!</color> I remember that very clearly.
迴星港的方向吗…感谢您配合我们的调查。

别的东西我都忘记了，就记得一件事，那艘星槎到了十字航道之后，<color=#dbc291ff>朝右边拐过去了！</color>我记得很清楚。
I do remember this, though. When the starskiff arrived at the crossroad, <color=#dbc291ff>it made a right turn there!</color> I remember that very clearly.
天舶司的报告说，路口的机巧鸟抓拍到了一些东西，你将梅姐处置好，一会儿也到天舶司来一趟吧。
The report from the Sky-Faring Commission says that the cycrane captured something. After you've settled Mei, come over to the Sky-Faring Commission.
是你…俺还记得你，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}你有看到俺的笔记吗？
It's you... I remember you. {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}, did you find my notes?
I wanted to give it back to you.
I picked up all of them.
谢谢你，就是这个，可不能随便丢了。对了，芦慧姑娘你见到了吗，哎…俺又给芦慧姑娘添麻烦了。

俺两眼一黑，没有看清楚，就摔出去了。好像是艘<color=#dbc291ff>蓝色</color>的星槎，又好像是<color=#dbc291ff>黄色</color>的……
I blacked out. I didn't see anything when I got thrown outside. It could be a <color=#dbc291ff>blue</color> starskiff, but it could also be <color=#dbc291ff>yellow</color>...
当时俺刚搭上星槎，还没有来得及系好安全带，就感觉背后发出一声巨响，随后，俺就飞出去了。这就是所有过程了……

俺就记得今天油鸡店有折扣，芦慧姑娘从前就爱吃这些不健康的东西…她也挺长时间没吃了，所以俺就想买一点给她。

芦慧姑娘生气了不打紧，她总是很生气，只要对她和和气气的，不顶嘴，她就会自然消气了，俺已经习惯了。

她才没有空操心俺呢，她是大制作人，能调度好几百号人的拍摄现场，可有本事了。

梅姐又拿出了她买菜时记菜品和账目的小本，让芦慧仔细查看……
Mei takes out a note and a vegetable shopping list and asks Luhui to take a closer look at them.
从这里到这里，讲的是房间清洁的顺序…啊，对了，芦慧姑娘你不爱丢垃圾，垃圾全部堆在厨房旁边，始终不记得去丢。听梅姐的，垃圾可不能过夜啊。

From here to here, it's about the order of cleaning the rooms... Oh, another thing, you always leave trash in the kitchen and forget to take them out. Now that I'm gone, you need to remember not to let the trash pile up for more than one night.
好…这画的几个方块是什么？
Okay... What are these squares over here?
洗碗布放在这个柜子里，擦桌子的布，我放在厨房第二个柜门上边，厨房用布也单独分出来了……
The dishcloth is placed in this cabinet. As for the cloth for wiping the table, I put it on the second cabinet door in the kitchen, and the kitchen clothes are placed separately...
你看这一页，是宝宝挑食的食物，这些东西做了他也不会吃，你切得再碎他也吃得出来。这些个是营养搭配的菜单，你爱吃辣的，但是不能一直吃，会上火……

Look at this page. It has all the names of the foodstuffs that the baby hates to eat written on it. He won't eat these, even if you cut them into pieces. These are the meals I planned that will guarantee a superb supply of nutrition. You love spicy food, but don't eat too much or you will get a heartburn...
这就是梅姐要找回来的笔记…
So this is the note that Mei wants to retrieve.
俺头脑不聪明，只好全都记下来了。你看就算俺不在了，这本笔记也能发挥用处，嘿嘿。
I know my mind isn't that sharp, so I jotted down everything. Even if I'm gone later, these notes will still be very useful to Ms. Luhui.
这个「浇花」这里，好像画了一个杯子，然后这里三分之一的水是什么意思啊，是只用倒这么多的水吗？
In the "Water the Flowers" section, you drew a glass that is one-third full of water. What does this mean? Is this the amount of water you use to water the flowers each time?
这是每天浇花时倒的营养液，你说的每次都要倒这么多，多了不行，少了不行。
No. It's the amount of nutrient solution that must be used when watering flowers. Ms. Luhui said that every time the amount must be just right, it can't be too much or too little.
那一页又是什么呢？「好心人，帮我找到了笔记，测速小伙子的同事，要感谢{F#她}{M#他}……」
What is this page about? "A kind young {F#lady}{M#man} helped me find the notebook. Must thank {F#her}{M#him}."
哎哟，芦慧姑娘，这一页俺就自己留下吧。
Ahh. Ms. Luhui, I want to keep this page to myself.
没事儿，我也得记着好好感谢{F#她}{M#他}呀。
梅姐一字一句地向芦慧交代了家里各种活计的细节，你注意到芦慧眼角有泪。
Mei explains the details of the housework to Luhui, and you notice that Luhui has tears in her eyes.
梅姐将笔记交到了芦慧的手上，然后独自离开了这里，她还得帮芦慧接小孩回家。
Mei hands the notebook to Luhui and leaves the room to pick up Luhui's child.
Sorry, I got lost in thought.
It's still not too late to chase her back.
下了决心之后再后悔吗？可以这样啊。
Regret making a decision like this? Can I still...
做好决定了，就不要后悔。
Don't have regrets after making a decision.
你说的对，现在不是后悔的时候…吗？
Right, now's not the time for regrets... is it?
{NICKNAME}{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，我才明白，原来梅姐提心吊胆的，并不是她有多舍不得这份工作。
{NICKNAME}, I just realized that Mei is not worried about losing her job.
她是在担心没人照顾你的生活。
She is worried that no one can take care of you after she is gone.
嗯，对呀，原来她是在担心我。
Yes, she is worried about me.
So what is she worried about?
她是在担心没人照顾我的生活。
She is worried that no one can take care of me after she is gone.
我将梅姐看作是一个干活不称职的帮手，但是在梅姐心里，我只是她辛苦拉扯竭力照顾的…家人，哎。
I've always thought of Mei as an incompetent worker. But in Mei's heart, I'm a family member she has to take care of... *sigh*
你听过我抱怨了很多次梅姐，但是她给我翻看她的小本子的时候，记下了很多「我说过的话」，我才知道自己也不算是一个好的雇主。
You've heard me complain about Mei many times. I didn't know that I was not a good employer until I saw her notebook. She has written down so many things that I said.
考虑到梅姐的智力，我对她远低于市场价格的薪资心安理得；心情差的时候，我也老是对她摆臭脸，给她立下了一个又一个的「规矩」…她也全部记下来了。

Considering Mei's slowness, I have no qualms about paying her well below the market average. When I'm in a bad mood, I always get mad at her and set a lot of "rules" for her, and she wrote them all down without complaint.
看着她的小本子，我才意识到，她照顾我已经有两百年了。
After looking at the notes, I realized that she has taken care of me for two hundred years.
两百年，对化外民来说一定很漫长吧，对我来说这也应该很漫长的，为什么我把这漫长的一切都理所当然了呢？
Two hundred years must be a long time for Outworlders, and it's also quite a long time for me. Why did I take everything for granted?
因为她就像是家人一样。
Because Mei is just like family to you.
…哎，你说的没错，她就像是家人一样，我才会这样理所当然。
You're right. She's like family. That's why I took her for granted.
仙舟上没有老无所依的故事吗？
So Xianzhou has no popular stories about the old and the helpless?
为什么突然问起这个问题，仙舟上没有老人…
Why would you ask this? There are no old people on Xianzhou...
你是想说，仙舟人不像化外民一样会怕老，所以不会害怕自己老无所依吗？
You mean people on Xianzhou don't age like Outworlders, so they aren't afraid of getting old and ending up living on the streets?
真是个奇怪的角度啊，她不会老去，我也不会老去。我没有察觉到她的辛酸，连她自己也没有察觉。
What an odd but reasonable point of view. Mei won't age, and neither will I. I was not aware of Mei's hardship, nor was she aware of it.
这样想想，不会老去也有这样的坏处呀……
If you think about it, not being able to age has its downsides too, huh...
对了，我之前问过您两次，原本希望能够得到您的建议…在雇佣关系里，我到底应该将梅姐看作是一位按时计薪的家政妇，还是一位陪伴许久的家人？

By the way, I asked you twice before and was hoping for your advice. In an employer-employee relationship, should I think of Mei as an hourly paid housemaid, or as a family member who has been there with me for a long time?
这一次我就不问您了，我在刚才找到了自己的答案。
But this time I don't need to ask anymore. I already have the answer myself.
我会在这里待一会儿，就不再打扰您了，祝您的生活愉快。
I'll stay here for a while. I should stop bothering you now. Have a nice day.
寻找丢失的笔记，「谛听」应该能派上用场……
Looking for a missing notebook, Diting might come in handy...
您是我生活里的陌生人，我能很快察觉到您的善意，我也想积极回应您。
Even though you are a complete stranger to me, I can already feel how kind you are. And I really want to do my best to return the favor.
但是梅姐…我对她太过熟悉了，反而注意不到她在为我做什么。
As for Mei... I took her for granted and failed to notice all she has done for me.
怪我多嘴，您也会有觉得家人的关怀是理所当然的时候，可别像我一样习以为常。
Forgive me if I'm being nosy. But whenever you feel that being taken care of by a dear family member is a given, please don't take it for granted like I did.
我会在这里待一会儿，就不再打扰您了，祝您的生活愉快。
I'll stay here for a while. I should stop bothering you now. Have a nice day.
你在这东张西望干什么？
What are you doing here? And looking around like this?
Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}... I'm looking for an assistant.
得找熟悉当地情况的、热心的、接受过良好教育、敢于冒险的化外民充当向导，协助我完成在仙舟上的考察项目。
Someone familiar with the local situation, friendly, well-educated... A capable adventurer... An outworlder... All these qualities must be present to help me finish my research project on Xianzhou.
Woah, you need that many assistants?
多吗？我不觉得啊。等等…你误会了。我只打算雇一个助手，但因为学术研究的关系，我对这位的要求有些严格。
That many? I don't think so. Wait, I think you misunderstood. I just want to hire ONE assistant, but as this is for my academic research, I have slightly strict requirements for this person.
找助手还是给故事选主角？
Are you looking for an assistant or the protagonist of a story?
这要求高吗？对于学会的研究来说，这些不过是一个助手的基本要求。
You think I'm asking for too much? These are just the basic requirements for an assistant when it comes to the Guild's research.
咱们这些博识学会的学士必须深入各个异族文明，赢得当地人的信任；还得冒着天灾人祸，风险可不逊于无名客。

We scholars from the Intelligentsia Guild must deeply penetrate into alien civilizations and win their trust, while also braving any natural disasters we may encounter. It's as dangerous as being a Nameless.
你瞧瞧，星核一来，天灾人祸。我对仙舟医学史的考察计划又打了水漂。
See? Now there's a Stellaron causing calamity here. My plans to research the medical history of the Xianzhou just went down the drain.
他们原本批复让我进入丹鼎司参详医典，做些学术交流工作，但事情拖到了现在。仙舟人等得起，老头子我可等不起。

The locals originally gave approval for me to enter the Alchemy Commission, browse medical texts, and exchange research findings with others, but they kept delaying my visit. Xianzhou residents might be able to afford the wait, but my old bones simply can't.
鄙人陶德•雷奥登绝不拖欠薪资，还会给{NICKNAME}缴纳安全险和双倍加班补贴。
I, Todd Riordan, hereby humbly promise that I will never withhold pay, and will provide {NICKNAME} with personal insurance and double pay for any overtime.
怎么样，这誓言够神圣吧？
How is that oath? Good enough?
丹鼎司里出了不少大事…
A lot has happened in the Alchemy Commission...
云骑军已经入驻戒严了。
The Cloud Knights are already imposing a curfew over there.
等等，绕了一大圈，你好像很了解丹鼎司的内部情况嘛！我听说罗浮将军破天荒地邀请了几位化外民参赞内务…难不成就是你？

Wait... I've been looking everywhere, but you seem to know a lot about what's happening inside the Alchemy Commission! I heard that the general of the Luofu invited some outworlders to get involved in their internal affairs in a rare turn of events... Could you be one of those people?
真是走运！{NICKNAME}，有没有兴趣做我的助手……
What luck! {NICKNAME}, are you interested in becoming my assistant...?
想一想，你会作为陶德•雷奥登的合作伙伴被载入学会的教材，被银河中每个历史学讲师频繁提起。这样的条件对你有没有吸引力？
Just think about it. You will be listed in the Guild's textbooks as Todd Riordan's collaborator, and frequently mentioned by every history lecturer in the cosmos. Does this sound attractive to you?
孩子，这些长生种都是一伙儿的。
My child, all these long-life species are the same.
我恐怕满足不了你的要求。
I don't meet your requirements, though.
忘了那些狗屁要求吧。我用我倍加珍惜的学术声望起誓：
Forget about those darn requirements! I swear with my invaluable academic reputation—
先别急着拒绝，我能开出的报酬可是非常优厚的。现在仙舟上大乱方平，许多化外民的生计都颇为艰难……
Don't be in a hurry to reject me! I can offer you a hefty pay. The Xianzhou is in utter chaos right now, and many outworlders are struggling to even earn enough money to eat...
什么，对钱没有兴趣？我懂，钱无法让人获得真正的快乐。我最快乐的时候也是站在讲台上传道授业的时候。
What? Not interested in money? I understand. Money doesn't bring true happiness. I, too, am the happiest when standing behind a lectern and teaching students.
我能回报你的不止是钱，还有名声和知识。
I can give you more than just money! I can give you prestige and knowledge!
But I've got other things to do.
我明白，我明白。所以咱们就从最简单的开始，只需要一次跑腿，去一趟丹鼎司，替我捎点东西回来，可简单了。
I understand, I understand. We can start with the most simple task. I just need you run one errand for me. Just go to the Alchemy Commission and pick something up. It's super simple.
具体要帮你做些什么呢？
What exactly do I need to do?
放心，咱们先从简单的跑腿开始。
Don't worry. We'll start with running an errand, the most simple task of all.
我想拜托你去丹鼎司里取些研究资料。不会耽误你很久的，看在大家都是化外民的面子上，帮个忙吧，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}！
I want to ask you to go to the Alchemy Commission to pick up some research materials. It won't take too long. Please help a fellow outworlder, {F#young lady}{M#young man}!
说起来，我想先要一本名叫《要药分剂》的仙舟医典。能不能请你跑一趟丹鼎司，帮我把它带来？
Say, I need a Xianzhou medical textbook called the Compendium of Remedies. Could you please head over to the Alchemy Commission and bring it to me?
我说过，对方同意了我的借阅请求。
I've stated that they've already approved my request to borrow it.
去吧，我把批复的手续给你，别让我老人家等太久了。毕竟上了年纪，关节炎每一分钟都在惩罚我。
Go. I'll give you the approval documents. Don't let an old man like me wait too long. At my age, arthritis is a veritable torment.
My medical textbook! Is my textbook here?
啊，{NICKNAME}，老家伙我的关节就要断了，你行行好吧。
Ahh, {NICKNAME}! My old joints are about to break! Please, have mercy on me!
There was no approval. Did you want me to STEAL the book?
读书人的事情…我们可不可以用词文雅些？换个词，比如「借阅」。
Look, we are both educated people... Could we use a less accusatory word? Perhaps "borrow"?
医典应该是丹鼎司机密吧？
These medical textbooks are the Alchemy Commission's secrets, no?
这算哪门子机密啊。这些医典对丹士而言只是随手可以翻阅的辞书而已。何况，他们也同意我借阅了。
How are these books secrets? They are just references that alchemists can browse at any time. Besides, they agreed to let me borrow it.
在会见丹鼎司的丹士长时，她批复了我的请求。
The Alchemy Commission's chief alchemist approved my request when I met her.
按照学会的宗旨，知识需以同样珍贵的知识交换，我给了她一份古老文献的影本。而她回赠了我一纸学会从未收录过的丹方。

According to the Guild's creed, knowledge should be exchanged with an equally valuable piece of knowledge. I gave her a copy of an ancient text, and she gifted me a prescription the Guild had never seen.
我连药方都没开完就被「请」了出来。
I got "asked" to leave before I even finished writing the prescription.
没办法，现在到处都乱糟糟的——
It can't be helped. It's a mess everywhere...
Um, hello? How can I help you?
(Ask to borrow the textbook from them)
《要药分剂》？我记得我前天刚拿来查过某个方子……
Compendium of Remedies? I remember looking up a prescription in it two days ago...
看你的打扮，是来瞧病的化外民么？你找这个干什么？难不成想自己开方子？
Your clothes... Are you an outworlder here for treatment? Why do you want that book? Are you trying to write prescriptions for yourself?
胡闹！到了这儿自会有医士为你看诊的，你想自个照着医书胡来可不行。
How preposterous! Since you're already here, a healer will attend to you sooner or later. You can't treat yourself with a medical textbook.
博识学会的借阅申请啊？我好像听过类似的事。
The Intelligentsia Guild's application to borrow textbooks? I think I've heard about this.
唉，司部经此大乱，同僚们都挨个接受云骑审查去了。眼下你的请求怕是谁都一问三不知。
*sigh* With the commission in chaos, all of our colleagues are being interrogated by the Cloud Knights. I don't think anyone would know about the request you're talking about.
不过新上任的丹士长玉络大人也许能给你答复。
However, the new chief alchemist, Lady Yuluo, might be able to help you.
我记得她就在附近，你可以去问问她。医典外借这种事，向丹士长大人咨询是再合适不过了。
I think she's somewhere around here. You can try asking her. It's best to ask the chief alchemist about important businesses such as outsiders borrowing our medical texts.
Compendium of Remedies? The Intelligentsia Guild's application?
我明白了，那是丹枢大人在位时批准的请求…唉，我又忘了，现在不该称她为大人了。
I see. It was something Lady Dan Shu approved when she still held the post... Oh, I'm sorry. I shouldn't call her "Lady" anymore.
我不想因人废政。但她犯的事，你想必听说了吧？云骑正在严查司内，连正常的医务工作也受到了干扰，真是的……

I don't want to change her policies, but you must've heard about her crimes, right? The Cloud Knights are thoroughly investigating the commission, and even our day-to-day job as healers are being affected...
唉，虽然我认为丹枢的问题不该牵连到司内正常的学术工作。
*sigh* I don't think Dan Shu's crimes should influence the academic work being carried out in the commission.
但规矩就是规矩，丹鼎司大乱后，所有的手续都要被复核了。
But rules are rules. After what happened in the Alchemy Commission, everything has to be re-approved.
一棵普通的树，风穿过树梢的时候，不知为何传来「哗啦哗啦」的纸页声。
This is an ordinary tree. You can somehow hear the sound of flipping pages as wind blows through the leaves.
你顺着声音的源头仔细寻找，发现一册书不知为何悬挂在树枝上，有一种凌乱的美感。
You carefully search the tree for the source of the sound and find a book hanging on the branches. The scene gives off a crude sense of beauty.
难道这就是玉络口中的医典？你决定——
Could this be the textbook that Yuluo mentioned? You decide to...
深吸一口气，抬腿踹向树。
Take a deep breath and kick the tree.
你深深地吸了一口气，将力量往下凝集在腿部，踹向树身。
You take a deep breath and put power into your legs, then kick the tree.
很遗憾，这棵树不为所动，回应你的只有凝固的寂静，那册书与你之间凭空生出了一种疏离感。
Unfortunately, the tree doesn't even shake. Only stupefied silence answers you. The book now suddenly feel more distant than ever.
Jump up and reach for the branch.
你用力跳了起来，举高双手试图触碰树枝，在起跳的瞬间，时间凝滞了。
You jump as high as you can and lift your arms to try to reach the branch. Time stops the moment your feet leave the ground.
你疑心自己是否会摸到了什么不该摸到的东西，比如一个鸟巢或是蜂窝。
You are concerned that you might reach something you shouldn't touch, such as a bird nest or a beehive.
在你若有所思的同时，一册书从树上掉落。
As you ponder about this, a book falls from the tree.
趁眼下没人，拿武器用力砸树。
Hit the tree with your weapon! No one is watching.
你掏出了你最趁手的宝贝，铆足了力气挥舞。
You take out your favorite treasure and swing it as hard as you can.
树身上传来的反作用力令你差点摔倒在地。你这才意识到仙舟上的树似乎不是普通的树，至少这一棵不是。
The rebound from the tree almost knocks you over. Only now do you realize the Xianzhou's trees don't seem to be ordinary trees... Not this tree, at least.
你早就怀疑过地衡司在人工植被上的审美，又或者这是生物工程特殊栽培的产物——树身竟然是某种坚硬的金属！

You've long had doubts about the Realm-Keeping Commission's aesthetics when it comes to artificial greenery. Alternatively, maybe this is a product of biological engineering — The tree trunk is made of some kind of hard metal!
Todd starts reading on the spot...
这张药方虽然在医典记载中存在，却多加了一味来历不明的药材？
This prescription is recorded in the medical textbooks, but there's an extra ingredient.
方子上并没有细说它的来源和性质，只是称它为「天人金枝」？仙舟的常用药材中有叫这么个名字的吗？
The prescription didn't say what this ingredient is or where it's from. It's just called "Divine Aureate Twig." Is this the name of a common medicine in Xianzhou?
唔，从书上看来，她给的药方确有其物，但其中的药材又是怎么回事？
Hmm, it looks like the prescription she gave does exist in the book, but what about the ingredients in it?
谜题的答案总会指向另一个谜。
The answer of one question will always lead to another.
我想搞清楚之前那位丹士长赠给我的药方究竟是真是假。
I want to find out whether the prescription the last chief alchemist gave me is genuine.
当然不会，这只是我研究的开始罢了。而我首先要解决一个心头疑问：那位丹士长赠给我的药方究竟是真是假。
Of course not. This is only the start of my research, but the question I want to answer the most is whether the prescription the last chief alchemist gave me is genuine.
毕竟我可是送出了《冥土还魂论》这般珍贵的古籍影本，当然得验验她这份礼物的成色。
After all, I gave her a copy of Theories on Returning From the Underworld, which is an invaluable ancient text. Of course I need to see how good her returning gift is.
那个女人的礼物一定包藏祸心…
That woman's gifts always contain evil intent...
Don't worry. She is skilled in pharmacology.
按这个抓药服一下不就知道了。
Just make this medicine and ingest it to find out.
短生种服长生种的猛药？老头子我还想活久一些呢。
You want a short-life species to take a long-life species' powerful medicine? I want to live for a few more years still!
I'm guessing it's a twig from the bodies of the mara-struck.
魔阴身？为什么仙舟人要用这么古怪的东西入药？
The mara-struck? Why would Xianzhou natives use such odd stuff in their medicines?
哼，但你说的很有道理，我也见过那些浑身长出枝叶的妖怪。看来咱们的第二个任务出现了。
Hmm, but it does make sense. I've seen these monsters with branches on their bodies. Looks like we've got another mission.
{NICKNAME}，把这玩意儿的样本带一份来吧。这对你来说不难吧？
{NICKNAME}, bring me a sample of this ingredient. It shouldn't be too hard for you, right?
呃，抱歉，我其实才被选入丹鼎司不久，方子我还没背熟呢。
Um, sorry, I just started working in the Alchemy Commission recently. I haven't even memorized the common prescriptions yet.
你问的这个我实在不知道，你还是去问其他人吧。
I really can't answer this question. It's better if you ask other people.
你问丹方的问题？那就去问丹士啊，我学的是手术，开膛破肚的那种，怕了吧？
You want to know about prescriptions? Then go ask an alchemist. My specialty is in surgery. The kind that opens people up. Scared yet?
……好家伙，面不改色啊。那就换你能听懂的：找个懂行的问吧，我、我专业不对口。
... Wow, aren't you a tough one. Fine, I'll say it in another way: Go find a real professional. This... This isn't my expertise.
化外民？有什么事吗？如果寻医问药，去行医市集挂号求诊吧。
An outworlder? How can I help you? If you are after treatment, please go to the Healer's Market and make a booking.
丹士的表情突然紧张了起来。
The healer suddenly looks very nervous.
你是从哪儿得知这个名字的？
Where did you hear that name?
化外民能翻阅的医典里绝不会写上这等禁忌之物的名称。
The medical texts that outworlders have access to would never contain the name of such a forbidden entity.
Are you a remnant of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?
哼，你如果不是药王莳者，便是曾见过魁首大人，受赐仙方。
Hmph! If you're not a Sanctus Medicus disciple, then you must have met the master primus and received her prescriptions.
Thank you for your hard work.
有意思，这玩意儿确实形如某种植物枝条，但上面的脉络散发金光…其中的秘密一定和仙舟人过去的神话有关。
Fascinating. This thing does look similar to twigs, but its veins shine with a golden light... Its mysteries must be related to the Xianzhou natives' legends.
贝尼尼学士若是知道了我的收获，一定会嫉妒的。
Scholar Bernini will be so jealous once he finds out about what I've learned here.
陶德将诡异的枝条制成样本。
Todd makes the eerie twig into a specimen.
虽然手头的工具不多，但学会耽搁许久的研究也算有了些进展了。谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
I don't have a lot of tools available to me here, but the Guild's research finally has some progress after a long delay. Thank you, {NICKNAME}.
说的不错，该是兑现誓言的时候了。
Well said, and now it's time for me to fulfill my promise.
你帮了我这么多忙，我也不是个什么小气的人。除了看得见摸得着的赏金外，我还提供博识学会最常见的报酬，知识——知识远胜黄金。

You've helped me so much, and I'm definitely not a stingy person. Apart from tangible cash, I will also provide the most common reward in the Intelligentsia Guild — that of knowledge. After all, knowledge is worth more than gold.
这次行动我所整理的知识将会同你共享，拿好这份手稿吧。如果有进一步考察的需要，我还会找你的，孩子。
I will share with you all the information I gain from this project. Take this manuscript and keep it safe. I'll come find you again, young one, if I need to conduct more research.
It's difficult to find an assistant...
Why don't you want Xianzhou locals?
我到仙舟一年了，成天被带着游逛景点，灌些难喝的饮料。他们不打算和我分享过去的秘密，就连去丹鼎司的申请都是我再三疏通才得到批复的。

I've been in the Xianzhou for a year already. They keep taking me to tourists spots and make me drink terrible beverages. They don't plan to share the secrets of their past with me. Even the application to the Alchemy Commission was only granted after painstaking networking.
但你就不一样了，你是被将军选中的人，来去方便，不是一般人可比的。
But you are different. You are chosen by the general and can go into many secret places, unlike normal visitors.
Weird. It doesn't match up here either...
呃，你好…请问你有什么事吗？
Umm, hi... how can I help you?
So it's not going to work?
Alright. I'll go and decline Todd's offer.
这些医典并不是什么绝密文献，也不记载什么禁忌内容。
These medical textbooks are not highly confidential files, nor do they contain forbidden knowledge.
可规矩不是由我来定。丹鼎司大乱后，所有的往来申请都要被复核了。
But I'm not the one who made the rules. After what happened in the Alchemy Commission, every exchange request has to be re-approved.
我也是最近刚结束外勤差事回到这儿，丹鼎司里经历了刀兵人患，到处乱糟糟的，许多书都不在书架上。

I just came back from a foreign business trip myself. The Alchemy Commission had experienced a huge upheaval and armed conflict. Everything is a mess. So many books have been displaced from the bookshelves.
我<color=#dbc291ff>甚至看到有几册书不知为何挂在了树上</color>。
I even saw some books <color=#dbc291ff>hanging off trees</color>.
我还得继续清点库存，没什么事的话回头再聊吧。
I still need to continue making inventory. If there is nothing else, let's talk another time.
（这里不像有书的样子…不过玉络说要<color=#dbc291ff>许多书都不在书架上</color>…那就在附近找找看好了。）
(There doesn't seem to be any books here... But Yuluo said <color=#dbc291ff>many books have been displaced from the bookshelves</color>... Let me look around.)
（这里杂物颇多，不过玉络说要<color=#dbc291ff>许多书都不在书架上</color>，恐怕得翻箱倒柜地找找了。）
(There are lots of things here, but Yuluo said <color=#dbc291ff>many books have been displaced from the bookshelves</color>. I might have to dig through everything to find the books.)
从夹缝处不明显的油渍来看，这里或许存放过食物，又或者是新鲜出土的药材。
From the minute traces of oil stains at the creases, you think this place might have been used to store food or freshly-dug medical ingredients.
将书藏在这里属实是糟蹋了，但还好没有，你不禁松了口气。
It is a positive disaster to keep books here. Thankfully, the books were not damaged.
这里并没有《要药分剂》，还是到别处转转吧。
The Compendium of Remedies isn't here. I should check somewhere else.
箱子里空空如也，比化外民游客们的荷包还干净——会误信星槎海「百年老店今日店庆」促销广告的那种。

The boxes are more empty than the wallets of the outworlder tourists — the kind of tourists who would believe the ads about "a centuries-old establishment having an anniversary sale" in Starskiff Haven.
这里并没有《要药分剂》，还是到别处转转吧。
The Compendium of Remedies isn't here. I should check somewhere else.
只听过「瓮中捉鳖」的，倒没听说过瓮中捉「书」，但这种稀奇事儿竟被你碰上了！
People talk about shooting fish in a barrel, but never about getting books out of one. You're lucky to encounter such a rare occurrence!
今天的快乐是书给的，你找到了《要药分剂》其中一册。
Today, your happiness came from books. You found one of the volumes of the Compendium of Remedies.
How much would the insurance payout be...
呃？你就是「鹤运速递」的赔付专员？不过看你这打扮…怎么感觉是个化外民，难道是我认错人了？
Um? Are you the claims specialist from Heron Express? But your clothes... Why do I feel like you're an outworlder? Did I get the wrong person?
就是「鹤运速递」专门负责处理寄件事故和售后的。
They're Heron Express staff that specifically manage shipping incidents and provide after-sale support.
What did outworlders ever do to you?
我不是那个意思，我在等我们本地的「鹤运速递」的专员上门呢，结果认错人了，有点失望。
That's not what I mean. I'm waiting for the local Heron Express specialist to arrive. I'm just disappointed to see someone else.
云骑的人说这附近不大安全，让我先回家休息几天。但我医书还没背熟呢，我就花了大价钱找「鹤运速递」寄件，把书从丹鼎司托运回家。

The Cloud Knights said it's not safe around here and that I should stay at home for a few days, but I still haven't memorized my medical textbooks. So, I spent a hefty sum to have Heron Express deliver the books from the Alchemy Commission to my home.
结果那机巧鸟还没飞出丹鼎司，一路上不是撞到墙就是撞树上去了！气死我了，我就眼睁睁看着我的书从天上掉下来……
But that cycrane kept running into walls and trees before it even left the Alchemy Commission! I'm so angry! I watched helplessly as my books fell from the sky...
哎，我的医书啊！我宝贵的医书！「鹤运速递」不赔我个百八十万，这事我定和他们没完！
Oh, my textbooks! My precious textbooks! If Heron Express doesn't pay me a million or two, they'll never hear the end of it from me!
…你要找《要药分剂》？巧了，有一册恰好在我手上。
... You're looking for the Compendium of Remedies? Lucky for you, I do have one of the volumes.
不过…寄件事故嘛…那册书恰巧掉在这树上了，你要是够得着就直接拿走吧。
But... with the shipping incident... that book ended up in a tree. If you can find it then it's yours.
反正我已拍下事故现场的情况了，「鹤运速递」的专员还不来是吧，真行啊…看来得让我亲自走一趟了……
I recorded the incident anyways. Heron Express' specialists just aren't coming, huh? They sure have guts... Seems like I have to visit them myself...
能不能拜托你，找个丹士挖出线索来？不管是用钱收买，或是…用什么更有说服力的方法，找出答案来。
Can I please ask you to find an alchemist and get some clues out of them? Please find some answers either through greasing some palms or... more persuasive means.
{NICKNAME}，老陶德现在能依靠的只有你了。
{NICKNAME}, old Todd can only rely on you now.
如果不能弄清这个关键，就意味着这笔知识交易对我而言收益为零！去吧，我绝不亏待你。
If I can't figure out this key issue, that means my net gain would be zero from this exchange of knowledge! Now, go, and I will pay you handsomely.
Which direction should I go again...?
Tsk, rote-learning is the absolute worst...
乱是乱了点，这丹还得炼……
It sure is chaotic around here, but the alchemy has to go on...
没想到魁首竟将药方作为礼物送给学会。真是出人意料，可这些短生种毕竟不能理解这用药的奥秘。
I never thought the master primus gifted this prescription to the Guild. How surprising. It's a pity that the short-life species would never understand the secrets behind this ingredient.
实话告诉你吧，这味药来自仙舟人堕入魔阴身后的增生产物。若不猎杀仙舟人，便不可能得到。
Let me tell you the truth. This is nothing less than the overgrowth on the bodies of mara-struck Xianzhou natives. You cannot obtain this ingredient without killing Xianzhou humans.
你既然已知道了，打算怎么办呢？
Now that you know the truth, what will you do?
You sure know a lot about this...
魁首殉道了，莳者星散。我也不得不低调隐匿。
The master primus was martyred, and the disciples all scattered. I had no choice but to hide as well.
